Name: Lie In My Heart
About: How would you react to your child's mother ending her own life? Would you make the same choices I made? Would you feel the same regret? How would you support your child through this painful moment of life?

Name: Grass Cutters Academy - Idle Game
About: Are you interested in gardening? painting? how about a mix of both? In Grass Cutters Academy you cut grass for money, spend that money on paint powered auto mowers that get faster, stronger and more efficient with each blade of grass cut

Name: Pixel Sand
About: Mix elements like a mad scientist on a particularly spicy date with destiny! Embark on a journey through the mystical caves of Dormacom with our hero Vurhne as he seeks out the ultimate power for no good reason at all!

Name: Doctor Dash ASMR Hospital
About: 💊 Your dream hospital awaits! 🏥❤️ Addictive levels and unique locations ✈️ Hours of entertainment in the time-management genre ⏰

Name: Breadborn

Name: Aphotic Descent
About: In Aphotic Descent, you play as a diver whose submarine crashed at the bottom of the ocean. With no other option for survival, you must make your way to a nearby underwater research facility facing terrifying creatures, all while descending deeper and deeper...

Name: 3Buttons
About: 3Buttons is a short free-to-play platformer where you will only need three buttons to play! Choose between three different geometrical shapes; Sphere, Capsule, and the dreaded Cube. There are three different campaigns, in each you can submit your High Score for the global leaderboards! Good luck.

Name: Skull Ball Heroes
About: Sick of playing non-violent sports games? Kill your opponents instead of watching them roll around the ground like babies. Skull Ball Heroes lets you suck at e-sports and still have a great time harassing your enemies, scoring goals, and being an overall champion. 4v4 Online PvP murdery soccer.

Name: Jigsaw Masterpieces
About: 'Jigsaw Masterpieces' is an easy-to-play traditional jigsaw puzzle. A lot of DLC is releasing, such as beautiful landscape of the world, masterpieces of painting, popular cartoon characters, dogs and cats. You will surely find the your best puzzle!

Name: Paintball Playground
About: Paintball Playground VR is Sports/Shooter game where you can compete against other players on SpeedBall, SpeedQB or Woodsball maps.

Name: Elements II: Hearts of Light
About: The highly-anticipated sequel to Elements: Soul of Fire, here at last! A mysterious little girl. An insidious plot to resurrect a great evil. The legend of a faint and fading hope. And a band of young heroes desperate for answers.

Name: TEMPER MY BLADE

Name: Revenge of the shadow ninja
About: Platform game with a gloomy artistic style. Challenging levels with many traps and enemies. Use all your skills to avoid dangerous traps. Destroy all opponents on your way to revenge.

Name: Song Animals
About: A surreal journey of strange animals through hand-painted watercolour worlds set to a relaxing soundtrack

Name: MONOTONIA: First Contact
About: MONOTONIA: First Contact is a prologue-format experience, free and essential to pave the challenging and definitive cycle of MONOTONY. Work, pay your bills, and survive!

Name: Bomber Dudes
About: Bomber Dudes is a classic Bomberman inspired game where you can bomb zombies and your friends!

Name: Futuball - Future Football Manager Game
About: Clone the best football stars and manage your dream team.

Name: ERRANTE
About: This is an experimental project, a sandbox life simulator that gives you the power to suggest how the game should evolve, which features we should focus on, which slice of life to tell and everything you can imagine.

Name: Titanic II: Orchestra for Dying at Sea
About: A downloadable tragedy for Windows and macOS

Name: DUCKS
About: DUCKS is a cute clicker game focused on growing your ever expanding collection of little ducks.

Name: Trial Of Empires TD
About: Trial of Empires TD, is a Free to Play 3D tower defense game. Pick your ally and build your strategy with different combinations. Compete with other players on the Leaderboards with Single-Player or CO-OP game modes

Name: FIRST STEAM GAME VHS - COLOR RETRO RACER : MILES CHALLENGE
About: COLOR RETRO RACER : MILES CHALLENGE is an hommage to the retro year of VHS! Run as many miles as you can in this free game, try to beat the online score and unlock all the achievement!

Name: Liminal
About: Liminal is a mind-bending puzzle game where every door is a change in perspective and destination.

Name: Deep Lake: Prologue
About: 'Deep Lake: Prologue' visual novel In the neo-Gothic genre, with a psychological story. Our hero's name is Sali. Sali is a former forensic photographer for the crime department. The accident that happened to him reveals in him a mysterious gift that can lead him to a terrible death.

Name: Reaping Rewards
About: Reaping Rewards is an interactive VR short narrative where you will make emotional choices using motion controllers to engage with the story (approximate duration 6-8 min).

Name: The Oni Sellsword
About: A totally free, short-but-sweet RPG with an unlikely hero. Journey across worlds as Xavienne to save her best friend, the beautiful Princess La.

Name: Blight of the Immortals
About: A plague of undead creatures threatens to overwhelm the land and with the fall of each town to the Blight, more walking dead rise and the zombie apocalypse draws nearer. Innovative turn based single player, slow-real-time co-op multiplayer!

Name: 新魔剑（New Magic Sword）
About: 'New Magic Sword' is a massively multiplayer online game (MMORPG). The game provides players with a lot of different quality equipment, and the pursuit of high-level (or best) equipment is one of the most important goals for players in the game.

Name: Welcome, Get Out!
About: 'Welcome, Get Out!' is a puzzle game where the cranky narrator really doesn't like you being there. It is a Point&Click comedy adventure that will take you through 7 different hand-crafted levels against the wishes of the sarcastic narrator who is trying to stop you from succeeding.

Name: Google Spotlight Stories: Rain or Shine
About: The sun is shining, the birds are singing, there’s a spring in everybody’s step. It’s a perfect day until Ella steps outside. Rain or Shine VR is EMMY award-winning Google Spotlight Stories most interactive short to date. Created and produced at Nexus Interactive. Directed by Felix Massie.

Name: Arcane Sorcery
About: Arcane Sorcery is a 4x strategy game. You are a sorcerer king. Cast powerful spells from afar from one of 4 spell books. Train units and build your economy. High strategy on a campaign map as well in turn base battles. Challenging AI that does not get buffs in all but the hardest difficulty.

Name: Warren The Warlock
About: Get ready to venture out as Warren, the ominous-looking warlock. Hurl your magic orb, invert gravity for yourself, and phase shift through walls. Fight your way to the leader of the invading horde in hopes of liberating your realm.

Name: Flash Point - Online FPS
About: Flash Point aims for a special online FPS games. Play today and unlock skins, challenge others and win. With a real-time level editor, go crazy and build your own mad creations.

Name: Travel Riddles: Mahjong
About: Go on a puzzle-solving adventure around the world. Enjoy beautiful locations and atmospheric music. Play classic mahjong solitaire game and recover your lost artifacts.

Name: King and Kingdoms

Name: Roots of Tomorrow
About: Roots of Tomorrow is a free-to-play sustainable farming manager/simulator. Expand your farm, take care of your animals, upgrade your buildings, invest in research, and explore the solutions offered by agroecology!

Name: Tower of the Dragon
About: Tower of the Dragon is a story-driven, turn-based combat RPG. Treasures and secrets lie in the mysterious tower which appeared after the death of a young dragon.

Name: Hero Pack
About: Hero Pack lets you build a powerful team from a diverse roster of heroes. Equip them with items, conquer levels, and compete in tournaments. Enjoy idle gameplay, collect new heroes and items, and earn free tournament tickets every hour. Prove your strategy and emerge victorious!

Name: Karma Miwa
About: A fun platformer with two fragile flightless birds, which have gone for long and now try to find each other again.

Name: DreamLand
About: Summary: “DreamLand” is an immersive VR game, made by AAA team base on htcVIVE with Unreal Engine. With the VR device, the player could pass through the Portal of Astral Spirit, and explore the mystical dreamland by time travel.

Name: Fortoresse

Name: E-Startup 2 : Business Tycoon Prologue
About: Kickstart your product company with the prologue! Design and sell your concepts in the market! Avoid bankruptcy and climb to the top with the finest concepts, pricing strategies, and management. Outsmart all the competitors!

Name: Ocean Desolation
About: Ocean Desolation is a Free Simple Linear horror game. After falling out of your boat during a thunderstorm you are left stranded in the South Pacific Ocean. Swim your way to different locations and find a way to call for help. But be careful, something lurks at the bottom.

Name: ReSpaced
About: A fast-paced first-person shooter where you master gun recoil to leap across platforms, battle various enemies, and upgrade your weapon to escape an overrun space station.

Name: Super SplashTube Bros.
About: An unusual battle between some cool YouTubers.

Name: Fireteam
About: A free to play FPS game brought to you by Ryan Laley Games. Shoot your weapons and throw your grenades to take down your opposition. Welcome to Fireteam soldier!

Name: Please State Your Name : A VR Animated Film
About: Stuck with a broken voice box, a decapitated robot head desperately tries to escape a giant garbage facility.

Name: Salvo Shuffle
About: Salvo Shuffle is a bullet-hell roguelike that mixes turn-based and action-based combat.

Name: HoverRace
About: HoverRace is a racing video game created by GrokkSoft in 1996.

Name: Evolution
About: Post-apocalyptic open world MMORPG Evolution. Start from single-celled organism, evolve into animal or microbe, grow a unique customized beast and dominate this world together with your friends in game universe full of puzzles and riddles!

Name: Microgons
About: Microgons is a 1v1 online competitive turn-based strategy game. Construct a team of polygonal monsters called Microgons, and strategically maneuver them across a board to engage them in combat against the opposing team. Don't be fooled by its lighthearted look, this is a hardcore game.

Name: Doodler
About: Create, Play, Share! Doodler is a puzzle platformer with a powerful map editor and workshop support that allows you to create levels to share with the world!

Name: Super Rad Raygun
About: It is the year 198X. Big hair is hot, and the war with the Soviets is colder than a refreshing glass of New Coke. RAD RAYGUN must travel the world fighting communist robots, and save the 1980′s by shooting his way through the decade in a totally fresh, expanded version of the original XBLIG game.

Name: ProtoGalaxy
About: Earth is under siege! A mysterious and powerful alien race has come to enslave the entire galaxy, and your fleet is humanity's last hope. You must put an end to the attacks and rebuild a home for the survivors.

Name: FireJumpers Inferno

Name: Teenage Blob: Paperperson - The First Single
About: Grab some sandwiches, get on your bike and hit the streets! Paperperson is the first single from the upcoming game/ album split-release Teenage Blob; a colourful art-punk adventure towards the best night of your life!

Name: Janus VR
About: Janus VR - Virtual Reality Internet Browser Build, browse and socialize in the Immersive Internet - Janus VR is the internet like you've never seen it before.

Name: Mars Power Industries: First Job
About: Is that your first job here at Mars Power Industries? Okay... Let's learn how to supply your tiny colony. Think of this like a puzzle. Sparkly crystals make power and your buildings need that sweet, sweet blue jazz. Black goo? Right, umm... Best to ign#-$!ore it. We do&!@ ONE #%& OF &#@ US %!&

Name: No Love Lost

To survive, the must show their wisdom and solve the traps inside the labyrinth, all while avoiding the minotaurs. Their goal is to reach the last room, where the exit will be shown and they can finally be free.

Name: Anchor Club
About: Anchor is a form of creative writing of textual interaction of origin, using the function of dice, in which a random number of prepared options determine the development of the story (the dice have a will of their own).

Name: Pocket Pusher
About: A relaxing physics-simulation with satisfying visuals. Build piles of coins, then watch marbles smash into them. Collect tickets and redeem them for prizes. Admire those prizes and read fun* lore. *Lore not guaranteed to be entertaining in any way

Name: Seasons of Rocco
About: Help Rocco prepare for the winter season by gathering and sorting fruit at his Tree House in the autumn season. Plant new fruit trees in the spring season, to make sure Rocco has even more food next winter! A relaxing experience for cozy gamers who seek a delightful escape into the charming seasons.

Name: Grog
About: Grog is a First-Person, 2-8 player online multiplayer party game where you compete against your friends in various Australian-inspired minigames to see who the greatest Aussie dad is.

Name: Terra Feminarum
About: Terra Feminarum is a Finnish mythology themed Japanese style danmaku shoot ’em up.

Name: Town of Dusk
About: Players will enter the Town of Dusk, built on the eve of Empire of Japan's defeat in World War II, along with other characters. Avoid being killed by other characters! Find the mastermind behind the scenes, unravel all the conspiracies, and uncover the truth! Ultimately escape the Town of Dusk!

Name: SUPERCHICOS
About: Juego en tercera persona para niños y padres. Es un pequeño mundo abierto donde los niños pueden aprender a emprender en pequeños negocios como la venta de limonadas, pasteles y también aprender sobre finanzas, con entretenidas misiones e importantes moralejas para la vida.

Name: Bomber Barn
About: Bomber Barn is a cute and competitive local multiplayer game, endless fun for all ages! Bomb your pals as an adorable animal with unique abilities, blasting through a variety of themed maps designed for tense battles.

Name: Wyvia: Prologue
About: Wyvia is an open world 3D action RPG inspired by classic JRPGs. Save your world from a monstrous invasion. Choose from 4 unique classes, and customize them with a robust cross-class skill system. Craft and upgrade weapons and armor. Explore dungeons full of enemies, and defeat terrifying bosses!

Name: Ballad of The Masked Bandits
About: Ballad of The Masked Bandits is a puzzle-packed stealth game where you play as three raccoons in a trench coat pulling off wild west heists.

Name: Howl of Iron
About: Howl of Iron is a 3rd Person Action Adventure game blending HUNT & COMBAT. Stalk on your unaware enemies, fight in open combat and explore the steampunk city of Steamfall.

Name: ASU Global
About: The beginning of an exciting MMORPG.

Name: Legend of Ares
About: Legend of Ares is a MMORPG set in a medieval fantasy featuring the God of War, Ares mythology. Players can choose two different faction to join either The Empire or The Alliance featuring four different classes Knight, Spearman, Archer, and Sorcerer.

Name: Reverie
About: An ambient, very simple game* with pseudo-puzzle elements, something you can leave open on a second monitor while you work.

Name: Click Space Miner 2
About: In Click Space Miner II you take control over a mining company in space. There is a big market, a lot of customers, but therefore also a lot of concurrents so you have to mine fast.

Name: Apple Clicker
About: Easy clicker game for apple enjoyers!

Name: Sunset World Online
About: ▶ Fire ▶ Water ▶ Earth ▶ Wind - which class is for you?Gather your party and embark on an adventure to the Edge-World in a unique non-P2W 2D Side-Scroller MMORPG! Enjoy an open world full of life, exploration, roguelike expeditions & challenging boss fights together with friends or on your own!

Name: Barista: Take Away
About: Drag and drop game against the clock, where you will try to make the perfect coffee for each client

Name: My Bath Tub Companion
About: My Bath Tub Companion is a free experience, to induce a calm & peaceful (and mildly horny) feeling. You'll feel satisfied sitting back, feel yourself relax as you watch her relax. Relaxation is the key to a blissful bath tub experience. Calm music & a beautiful girl to look at.

Name: Dizzy Two
About: This is a legendary quest from the 80s, invented by the Oliver Twins, about a yolkfolk living in trees. The main character, Dizzy, constantly rescues relatives who get into trouble. And now he found himself on a strange island after his family was kidnapped by the Hunter...

Name: MyTD 我的塔防
About: [MYTD] is a tower defense strategy game, Unlike traditional tower defense.[MYTD] has added a lot of fresh play.[MYTD] is a pixel tower game strategy placed through games, with endless defense mode, character upgrades, defensive towers skills to choose, turret and changeful, one thousand kinds of style let you challenge without limit, the...

Name: Inn Tycoon: Prologue
About: Welcome to Inn Tycoon: Prologue! Build, design, and manage your dream inn. Serve delightful meals, offer various services, and hire a stellar staff. Create a top-notch hospitality empire and become the ultimate Inn Tycoon!

Name: All For Nought - Tic Tac Toe
About: Classic Tic Tac Toe / Noughts & Crosses game with a minimalist style.

Name: AMazing TD
About: AMazing TD is a unique strategy game that focuses on building mazes in a competitive Tower Defense gameplay. Explore endless possibilities as you play on maps with distinct randomized tiles. Each game you will experience will require different strategies.

Name: Shadow Era
About: Shadow Era is the full scale, cross-platform collectible trading card game that you've been looking for, with the most generous free to play system out there! Enjoy the amazing dark fantasy artwork in a card game where strategy is most important.

Name: Telophase
About: Telophase is a twin-stick dungeon crawler, set in Ancient Egypt. You must project and recall your character's soul in order to damage enemies, in the hopes of overthrowing Anubis, Lord of the Underworld.

Name: Bonhomme 7 Heures
About: An exploration horror game set in a typical 1850 house which revolve around the myth of Bonhomme 7 Heures, an urban legend from Quebec.

Name: Scott in Space
About: Scott in Space is a stylizied action platformer about the epic adventure of a lone guinea pig in space. Prove your guinea pig platformer skills and defeat the evil Rhino Empire!

Name: Lords of New York
About: Imagine playing poker, but with unique superpowers. Lords of New York is a new kind of poker game where you have incredible gifts you leverage to your advantage to dominate at cards. With RPG-like skills, battle your way to victory against exciting and hilarious characters.

Name: Virtual Towers Online
About: Virtual Towers Online, a passion project with over 10+ years in development from a very small team, is a replica of the Alton Towers theme park, designed to be as close to realism as possible allowing players to explore the park, ride and operate the attractions from anywhere across the world.

Name: Orbos
About: Cute and chaotic fun! Play as one of 7 different character classes in a quick and deadly multiplayer PvP arena shooter where only the quick witted survive. Compete against your friends in classic team deathmatch or overcharge yourself and pummel the enemy base in our Orbomb game mode!

Name: MiniBikers
About: MiniBikers is the craziest race to reach your hands! The animated series that has captivated millions of people around the world has a new star: You! Create your own stories or change the racing rules and become a World Champion.

Name: Survival In Africa
About: 'Survival In Africa' is an RPG-type survival game that survives using items and crafted items that are dropped when various monsters are defeated.

Name: Space Mechanic Simulator: Prologue
About: Space Mechanic Simulator: Prologue is a story prelude to the full version, which will introduce you to the world of cosmic repairs, greedy corporations, and cutting-edge technology.

Name: Metal Force: Tank Games Online
About: Lots of battle arenas in all corners of the world await you! You will have various combat military vehicles in your battle arsenal. Each machine represents a unique tactic, a unique warfare style.

Name: Banana Cowboy
About: Play as Banana Cowboy and adventure in fruit-themed universe, rescuing your people from your evil twin who has taken over the Banana Kingdom. Use your trusty lasso and spaceship horse to travel to the Orange Biker and Blueberry Pirate planets and save the universe from the Evil King!

Name: Wolfskin's Curse
About: A forsaken nun must prove a monster's innocence. He is offered no voice, but she will lend hers. Wolfskin's Curse is a fully-voice acted, linear visual novel.

Name: Darwin's Test
About: Darwin’s Test is a first-person action and puzzle game that immerses you into a futuristic universe. You play as an amnesic patient following an experimental care protocol. Who are you ? Where are you ? So many questions to solve to discover the truth !

Name: Relentless Expanse
About: Capture and upgrade planets, outsmart your enemies, and conquer the galaxy! Simple yet addicting, you can play alone or outsmart your friends in this 2D top-down space RTS. Completely free, no monetization, just fun!

Name: Space Hat
About: Space Hat is an adrenaline-fueled, fast-paced FPS game that combines intense combat with well thought out platforming sequences. In this futuristic sci-fi world, the player assumes the role of a cyber bounty hunter equipped with a special hat that grants the power of teleportation.

Name: Virus Popper
About: Greetings Space Traveler, we need you to save the universe again! New virus variants threaten our galaxy. Level up with a new arsenal of weapons to combat them!

Name: Lost Connections
About: If she leaves now you will never see her again. Would you have enough courage to take a step, or would you stay quiet and regret it? Experience this story about love and loss.

Name: You Are Sick
About: Do you like feeling motion sick? Well, this is the perfect game for you! No? There is a baby mode don't worry! Feel the thrill of testing your parkour skills as you overcome simulated sickness. Are you ready for the challenge?

Name: Bow to Blood: Last Captain Standing
About: Become a Captain! Fly your ship and command your crew as you compete to become Champion in a winner-takes-all reality show. Build relationships and plot betrayals to avoid getting voted off the season and become the last captain standing. Optional VR support.

Name: 10 Seconds
About: Time loop puzzle horror, where you're stuck in a failed experiment and must escape or face being eaten for eternity.

Name: PlayUSA
About: PlayUSA is an online turn-based strategy game in which the goal is to buy as many cities as you can with your starting balance of $100 billion, building a network of planes in between the cities to gain points, play with 1-3 friends or if you have a shortage of friends, strangers don’t bite either.

Name: Scurvy Dogs
About: An online Player v Player battle!

Name: La Camila: A VR Story
About: When the storms of nature threaten her very existence, the viewer must help a young shepherd girl take on the responsibilities of her deceased papá.

Name: My Slime Garden
About: Raise, nurture, and breed adorable slimes in a relaxing adventure where each slime is unique! Mix traits to create new slime companions and explore endless islands filled with secrets and surprises. Your perfect slime squad is waiting—how far can they go?

Name: Hoyle Official Card Games
About: The #1 card game collection is back and better than ever- now updated with a new look, better AI and new opponents to play against! Hoyle Official Card Games includes all of your favorite authentic card games!

Name: Don't Remember
About: In Don’t Remember, some things are better left forgotten. Fight your amnesia in this atmospheric, first person psychological horror game. Solve the mystery of the old mansion in 1900’s England through the use of your lantern’s various colors and face its hidden grotesque visage.

Name: Durak NTR: the Fool who lost his gf in a card game
About: Play as James, a ruthless loan shark, and turn the tables on a desperate debtor. Each loss drags his girlfriend closer to you in this humiliating, erotic experience of control, power and desire.

Name: Hidden Tomatoes 3
About: Explore serene forests, sparkling river, and rustic rural houses in *Hidden Tomatoes 3*! Find 100 cleverly hidden tomatoes in a peaceful yet challenging hidden object adventure. With stunning visuals and relaxing gameplay, it's fun for all ages. Can you uncover them all?

Name: Nova Hearts: The Spark
About: Join Luce and her friends in this FREE first chapter: The Spark! A mysterious force transforms you and other residents of Vermillion into heroes and villains. TEXT, DATE and FIGHT in this turn-based combat dating adventure!

Name: 100 KILLS CHALLENGE: ORIGINS
About: Enter the fray in an intense, fast paced first person shooter experience. Kill using firearms, explosives, drones, and air support. Dominate maps in deathmatch, team, and PVE. Win with tactics - or sheer brutality. Remember: Hundred kills. One arena. Zero rules. May the best player win!

Name: PolyRace
About: Let's show off your racing skills! Hurtle through randomized tracks (using procedural algorithm) in this fast-paced futuristic racing game. Try and retry to reach your best race time. Challenge your friends in a 10min time attack or face the world in the race of the day.

Name: SIMBA THE CAT
About: Discover all the different worlds with Simba The Cat. Find all the things that Simba the cat likes, you will unlock extra levels.

Name: Shelter from the Storm
About: Rain lashes down soaking you to the bone, you take shelter in a seemingly abandoned house. Navigate through the rooms solving puzzles and trying to escape in this short point & click adventure game.

Name: CHALICE
About: you are a door-to-door face salesman in Oklahoma

Name: Rimward Basilisk
About: The long war between Ulstania and Kostakovia was interrupted when a cyberweapon went catastrophically out of control. Follow the stories of the survivors as they fight and navigate through the fallout. [NOTE: please read game description below]

Name: DIVE: Starpath
About: DIVE: Starpath is a third-person runner set in the stratosphere of massive planets. Guide yourself through the perils of interstellar space as you pursue a mysterious traveler. Fight gravity, gather the data canisters, and don't lose orbit!

Name: Frick Frack
About: Just as you were about to lose all hope, you’ve found a job. It’s not exactly what you dreamed, but it pays the bills. You begin work and quickly learn the consequences of your actions.

Name: ImpossiBowl
About: ImpossiBowl is a Chaotically Challenging Bowling Game with Platforming mechanics. Explore a variety of Weird Levels, Unlock new Balls and Powers on your journey to become the Champion!

Name: Sandbox Anything
About: A creative building-like game, where the objective is to throw physics enabled objects to create structures to allow the objective of the level to be completed. Can be a very challenging puzzler or an easy, sit back and relax game. Includes built in Level Editor and extensive Multiplayer functionality.

Name: Porradaria Upgrade
About: Mate a saudade dos jogos de plataforma dos anos 90 com o misterioso Ninja, e viva uma completa experiência retrô, em um mundo (quase) totalmente desenhado em pixel-art!

Name: Apollon 88
About: Apollon 88 is a 2D Top-Down, survival, shooter game. You play as 88, where your goals are to survive by destroying the one who hunts you.

Name: Wonder Wickets
About: A colorful and whimsical minigolf-inspired game set in outer space, featuring tons of unique content, game modes, challenges, a diverse cast of characters, and special abilities to create amazing shots!

Name: Charlotte

Name: PeriAreion
About: Prepare for the ultimate test of survival! Do you have the skill necessary to build and manage the first sustainable extraterrestrial colony, or will your colonists become mere footnotes in the history of human space exploration? Their lives and legacies are in your hands!

Name: An Adventurer's Gallantry

Name: Duelyst GG

Name: Veggie Menace
About: After a failed spell during a vegetable contest in the Middle Ages, the vegetables come to life and try to invade the civilization. A little witch with her magic powers will need to fight against this invasion.

Name: Castle Empire
About: Empire falls eventually. Build your own empire and conquer the world.

Name: Nightork Adventures 2 - Legacy of Chaos
About: Nightork Adventures - Legacy of Chaos is an arcade shooter game. You fly with a spaceship through procedurally generated caves and fight against evil demons using magic colors. There is a campaign of 30 levels and 5 boss monsters. It also comes with a level editor, so you can create your own levels.

Name: Familiars.io
About: Gather Familiars and do turn-based battles in this atmospheric little MMO! Quickly max-out your Familiars and conquer challenging dungeons. Battle other players, or just press the 'Howdy' button to greet them!

Name: Shatter Keep
About: Shatter Keep is an asymmetrical multiplayer game where 3 survivor players try to escape the castle and 1 player attempts to eliminate them. Survivors must complete a list of objectives to open the castle exits while arming traps, lighting torches and avoiding the monster before the timer expires.

Name: Unleash
About: Unleash is a Tower Wars game, set in a dystopian future, where gifted children known as Dreamers are exploited by ruthless fighters to unleash hordes of monsters into arenas filled with massive guns.

Name: Definya 2D MMORPG
About: Fantasy 2D Retro Pixel Anime MMORPG — Crafting, Open-World, Sandbox — PVP & PvE

Name: You're Not Family
About: A (really short) free narrative rhythm game by Atiya Nova. Attend family dinners and time your key presses to the flow of conversation. Features lots of familial tension with a dash of misery. And cute bunnies!

Name: Color Phase
About: Experience a colorful puzzle-platformer experience in Color Phase! Find and use different colors to interact with the world around you in a variety of different ways to reach your goal!

Name: Wienne
About: Wienne is unique - you can change the flow of the story at any moment in time. Repeatedly. In this short story and lore-driven RPG you will have to save Wienne and Zack from a nearly inevitable demise. Can you find the path?

Name: Pact of Joy: Prologue
About: As Jack Argyle, you are tasked with restoring communication at the underwater ex-Aegis facility known as Phorcys Station. Be careful, or risk joining the spirits trapped inside.

Name: Sol
About: Fa mesos que ha desaparegut el sol, però el despertador continua sonant cada dia a les 8:00. Una novel·la visual en català.

Name: Dragon Awaken
About: Dragon Awaken is a semi-turn based heroic fantasy mmorpg where you will have to collect dragons, improve your armors and develop new skills and recruit legendary Heroes.

Name: Defenders of Tetsoidea Academy
About: A virtual reality game in the sense that the reality is virtual, and the virtual is an RPG game about some teenagers in a 'magic academy' setting. It's a game that I like, and it's free in terms of currency units. Close your eyes and let the experience envelop you! But open them occasionally too.

Name: 月之暗面 The Dark Side Of The Moon
About: The dark style independent online game, the return of China's traditional round system game, farewell to the lengthy development upgrade, the players compete equality, the common face of the dark side of humanity.

Name: Koncolos: Prologue
About: In a small pub with regulars, a woman makes a scene every night. Explore the compelling and mysterious story behind her bizarre behavior in the first chapter of this visual novel.

Name: 3D Paraglider
About: Do you dream of flying without restrictions, getting as close as possible to mother nature? If yes, then 3D Paraglider is for you.

Name: Hunt for Junk
About: Hunt for Junk is a retro Platformer that follows the graphical limitations of the classic Gameboy (e.g. 4 colors and a 160x144px resolution). Journey the world in your unending pursuit of delicious Junkfood! Avoid traps, fight enemies, collect coins and discover all of the hidden Junkfood items!

Name: Sketchfab VR
About: Teleport yourself to Rome, hold a beating heart, or walk among dinosaurs. Open Sketchfab VR to discover a showcase of explorations through remote places, fantastic creatures, game worlds, cultural heritage, science and other wonders.

Name: Case #1472
About: A mysterious woman is sitting in front of you. Who is she? And who are you? And why are you both there? Case #1472 is mystery information digging interrogation thriller game where there are more things going on than what meets the eye, but are you able to unravel what has happened?

Name: I am immortal here
About: Only I exist here. It's the world of freedom. Nothing restricts you in this place.

Name: Regenesis
About: Guide a group of survivors trying to strive in this alien yet familiar environment. Fight against mutated creatures and use their parts to craft and upgrade your weapons.

Name: Chrono Recorder
About: 'ChronoRecorder' is a 3D puzzle game. Players can manipulate time and gravity. And you have to use that ability to solve problems. You might think this game is difficult if you don't use your brain.

Name: PI.EXE
About: Take the role of an antivirus software within the world of an operating system, eliminating malware spawns in a challenging, platforming quest!

Name: 你画我拼You draw I puzzle

Name: Loco Road

Name: Unravel Cyndy

Name: Discovr™ Egypt: King Tut's Tomb
About: Discovr Egypt takes you into the ancient tomb of King Tutankhamun using the HTC Vive, where you can not only learn about some of the rich history surrounding his legacy, but also uncover his treasures.

Name: Steampunk Jigsaw Puzzles
About: Dive into a world of Victorian elegance and mechanical marvels. Discover steam-powered wonders while testing the limits of your puzzle-solving skills.

Name: Phantom Jump
About: Phantom Jump is a skill based platformer with rhythm mechanics, built to turn you into a speedrunner.

Name: Ranger Danger
About: A park ranger's life is changed forever as they discover what really lurks in their national park. A first-person horror, exploration, and stealth-based game.

Name: Dying Sun
About: Dying Sun is a cozy surfing game in which you play as Hurabi, a young nomad on a solar-powered sailboard, searching for the mysterious causes of the extinction of an ancient, highly advanced civilisation. On her journey, she travels through grandiose landscapes where nature and technology meet.

Name: Watermelon
About: 'Watermelon' is a gamAn interesting and unusual clicker game in which you need to level up!

Name: Isop0dyssey
About: trash-infested power fantasy crawling sim with racing & crustacean elements set in the gritty, segregated world of ocean floor society

Name: Vasilisa and Baba Yaga: Prologue
About: Level up the magical assistant doll Vasilisa the Beautiful from the famous fairy tale, who fights evil spirits at night, so that later the path to Baba Yaga will be easier!

Name: A Buttload of Free Games
About: A collection of over one hundred completely free small games wrapped into one convenient launcher! Slash slimes, shoot lemons, blow kisses, do art commissions, take blood and so much more in these wacky, weird and wild games!

Name: Wizard Combat
About: Plunge into Wizard Combat: PvP battles, leveling, customizable wizards, challenging modes, powerful spells, valuable loot – become the ultimate sorcerer in this mystical world!

Name: The Fox's Drawing World
About: Use your Magic Pen to help the Tiny, Adorable Fox. Let's Join The Fox's Drawing world.

Name: Clockwork Calamity in Mushroom World: What would you do if the time stopped ticking?
About: A gentle exploration platformer in a vast yet small world where time has stopped, what will happen?

Name: AchBall

Name: Ling
About: Following the call of inner heart, the young man starts another journey of adventure. Faced with tough enemies and fierce fights, it is not certain whether the young man can reach the “final”. The only choice is moving forward with determination and clenched fists swinging great sword.

Name: Hide Time
About: Hide Time is a story-driven horror game where you play as new employee of Passion Oasis. Explore that huge complex, do your tasks and uncover mysteries of your past.

Name: Lootfest
About: Powelful voxel editor, create a world with friends online.

Name: Dance Loop
About: Dance loop VR is a rhythm VR game where you travel fantastic realms and break moving data cells to the energetic soundtrack by Yandex Music.

Name: Fantasia Medieval
About: A short Visual-Novel, made with Artificial-Inteligence art, about a party of adventurers on a medieval setting.

Name: The House of E.

Name: Game Builder Tycoon - Prologue

About: It's Sara's first day of work. However, when she takes the elevator to go to the office, she suddenly finds herself on a mysterious floor. What truth lies behind these weird rooms? Will you be able to move on? Or rather... will you want to move on?

Name: Ampguard
About: Ampguard is a rogue-like game with a unique combat system and nasty monsters. Combine your skills and use them in the best possible way to emerge victorious from the battle against the Yokai.

Name: Natari at the Bubble Planet

Name: Polygon Hero
About: Defend your city against the zombies before the infection spreads too far!

Name: Tessa's Ark
About: A Sci-fi RPG set in a world where humans have shed the limitations of the corporeal body to inhabit existence as beings of pure thought. Solve puzzles to unlock the secrets of the digital reality.

Name: The Winter Tower

Name: Mot De Pass
About: The main character pursues the Antagonist, but he manages to open a portal and enter the world. The world can be different: whether it be a fantasy city with magic or a post-apocalypse

Name: Dark Table CCG
About: Dark Table CCG is multiplayer card gaming re-imagined: Free-to-play, online 4-player, cheaper and easier deck-building, more customization that matters, and a focus on social atmosphere and building friendships.

Name: FurBall
About: Join the fun as adorable animals battle for athletic supremacy across a variety of fantastic arenas! Play against friends across multiple platforms over the Internet. In FurBall, you play on teams of up to 2 players on each side in noble competition, attempting to score goals for your team!

Name: Silence In The Cabin
About: 'Silence In The Cabin' is an Open Map Survival Horror Game, where you must survive Dark linear story sections in order to unlock more areas of the world.

Name: ANDARA: RISE FOR REBELLION
About: Ordon’s armies have invaded Hailstone and are plundering their resources. Become Andara, the tyrant’s daughter, in this frenetic third-person shooter. Engage enemy weak points and move fast in a brief yet intense single-player campaign. Rise for rebellion.

Name: The Last Secret
About: Award winning visual novel adventure. An epic, upbeat tale with challenging and fun puzzles, humorous storyline and quirky characters. Solve the 'last secret', save your friends and maybe find true love on the way, too...

Name: *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC VISUAL NOVEL
About: This is *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC VISUAL NOVEL, which is a story set in the world of *NEW* SCUFFED EPIC BHOP SIMULATOR (#4 Best Selling free game of Steam November 2020), play as a character of your choice, as you run into some new, and familiar faces along the way.

Name: Interview with the Horny Ghost

Name: Mouse Playhouse
About: Discover a world in which you solve challenging puzzles, overcome evil 'Meowbots' and seize the cheese!

Name: Quackdzilla: Pool Cleaning Simulator
About: Feel the specific atmosphere and humor of the Pool Cleaning Simulator. Take on the role of a pool boy and discover what fate awaits you in the free prologue of Pool Cleaning Simulator - Quackdzilla🦆!

Name: Dung Beetle Adventure
About: A short (and free) adventure game, where you are tasked with helping a hurt, hungry, but inventive dung beetle on its journey to find something to eat near the end of the mushroom season.

Name: The Perfectionist

Name: Restoration
About: Two siblings; Oliver and Penello, answer their dying Grandma's wish and make their way to Phren Village. A seemingly peaceful village filled with tranquility. But on the inside, It is a village void of hope and on the brink of succumbing to despair and darkness.

Name: Pylow
About: If you're searching for a game where you can just sit and play, maybe with a good drink near to you, I'm afraid my friend but this is not the game for you. Pylow is a frenetic and skilfully FPS Arena where every single move can let you win or lose.

Name: Secrets Of Soil

Name: Deep Night Detective - Chapter One

Name: The Devil's Womb
About: First chapter of the saga, The Devil's Womb is a free 'Made in Italy' classic puzzle adventure-horror title developed by Insane Kat Studio and made with RPG Maker MV.

Name: 机械恋心
About: 当科技突破伦理的局限，当天才的火花和机械的纯洁相遇，当积久的矛盾与必然的巧合共鸣，不受祝福却被期待的恋爱就此展开......

Name: Sovereign Elect
About: Grow and lead a party of followers to support your quest for the throne. Explore this fantasy land with voiced dialogue and real time choices that can effect other players. This game takes heavy inspiration from Bee Swarm Simulator with an emphasis on combat.

Name: Pre-Shave
About: A shaving simulator about a brown man dealing with a hairy situation.

Name: RollerBaller
About: RollerBaller is a racer against the clock. Stay on the path or suffer the consequences and get back to your last checkpoint! Rather infuriating title, it will boil your blood and should only be played by the most patient.

Name: Wonky Ship
About: You're a daring intergalactic pilot, desperately trying to outmaneuver the ravenous pull of a plasma-fueled black hole. You'll weave, dodge, cuss, flip out, and roll around like you've never done in a video game before. And then you'll die. Often.

Name: homebound
About: Tasked with finding humanity a new home, a lonely astronaut braves a desolate planet while making a fluffy friend along the way. homebound is a short 2D puzzle platformer that explores the feeling of home.

Name: War Smith
About: Team up with a friend as a skilled woodland critter in this horde based tower-defense indie game.

Name: Noble's Life: Kingdom Reborn - Prologue
About: Experience the first months after a brutal assault on your own estate in the free prologue of a realistic simulator of a medieval noble combined with a strategy game of historical depth. Manage your town and villages and make decisions in non-linear events.

Name: THE SOUL OF TOO BIRDS GAME
About: Destroy all art. Free the soul.

Name: SPACE-FRIGHT
About: SPACE-FRIGHT is a cute stealth horror game.

Name: Kung Fu Panda Showdown of Legendary Legends
About: Join Po, Tigress, Monkey, Tai Lung, Master Shifu, and all of your favorite Kung Fu Panda characters as they compete in the thrilling Showdown of Legendary Legends. Up to four players can face-off in iconic locations throughout the Valley of Peace and beyond.

Name: Eggs Catcher VR
About: Eggs Catcher VR is a modern interpretation of the good classics. Leading plot outline will remain the same - the main goal of a player is to catch as many eggs as possible using a special basket and receive points for it.

Name: Digital Zoo Gallery
About: Multiplayer experience in modern art gallery and different theme parks with spectacular art in them.

Name: Brick Building
About: It´s ideal for collaborative works with students and teachers of universities and colleges, because it’s disruptive and transversal tool for many subjects.

Name: Lachesis or Atropos
About: This world is woven of strings, of fate and of hate. What do you see, detective? A horror-mystery yuri visual novel peering into the maddening darkness of love and death.

Name: Bundle Kitt
About: Enjoy Bundle Kitt; love Bundle Kitt. What sort of trouble will Bundle Kitt get into today?

Name: Glare fall
About: This is a Glare shooting game distributed as an April Fools' Day project. In the near future robots dominate the world. Maid robot Glare gains flying capabilities and a disc shooter to fight against enemy robots on Earth.. Everything is for the user's dream of a peaceful everyday life.

Name: Planet Fights
About: Planet Fights lets you take the role of a country citizen which gives you the chance to become a President / Senator, govern the country (choosing its issues and other actions), and both transform the country as you see fit, while fighting in international wars...

Name: Naval Battle Online
About: Are you ready to conquer and plunder the seas with your fleet?

Name: Gamebook Edgar A. Poe: The Oval Portrait
About: Put on your headphones, close your eyes and watch the story in your imagination. What seems like a game may be something more. Is it a story waiting to be told or... felt? Enter the universe of Edgar A. Poe, where reason, like the devil, says 'Goodnight'.

Name: Red Tie Runner
About: Red Tie Runner is a simple but challenging 2D platformer. Put on a red tie and step into stick-figure shoes to navigate through 30 levels so intense you might just forget about the impending heat death of the universe.

Name: Super Shoot Owl
About: Owly has been kidnapped by the treacherous Tala. Fight your way through hordes of evil llamas in a quest of liberation and vengeance.

Name: School Sweets Discovery ～granulated sugar edition～
About: A beautiful girl 2-choice quiz adventure game where you can experience a little variety of languages! Enjoy multi-end collection and online ranking in Challenge Mode!

Name: Fatal Core
About: Fatal Core is a 100% free, community-driven Trading Card Game. Assume the role of one of 6 Lead Characters and battle in a dystopian future full of strange magic and alien technology! Fatal Core features many unusual mechanics, including simultaneous play, open hands, player market, and more.

Name: Twin-Turbo Supercharged Nitro-Fueled Papamobile
About: Cyber-noir platformer in which you steer high-performance papamobile through a future city in order to deliver a cure that could save humanity.

Name: SYNCH
About: SYNCH is a free, turn-based strategy game. Choose your perfect team of bots to take down the evil boss bot and his floating flunkies!

Name: So Long Earth
About: So Long Earth is an action puzzle platformer designed to tell the story of Dominique Fayar, a french mafia member who found refuge in space after Earth's destruction.

Name: Exception
About: When an old woman's computer system is taken over by a virus bent on total annihilation, you assume control of an ordinary software program transformed into an elite combat machine. Retake the system and build your character into a formidable instrument of retribution.

Name: Venture Valley
About: Be Your Own Boss!

Name: Mortuar
About: Mortuar is a 1-4 player Online co-op psychological horror game. Delve deep into Hoia Baciu Forest where eerie sightings and paranormal activity have transpired. Make use of various ghost hunting equipment to first identify the ghost's type, then attempt to banish it back to the afterlife.

Name: さよならナイト・キャップ
About: 目が覚めると、見知らぬゲームセンターにいました。 あなたを知る謎の女の子と行動を共にし、不思議な世界を探検しましょう。

Name: Crowd Control
About: Crowd control is a game about risk & play style exploration.Up to four players spend a minute and a half attempting to make the longest Mexican wave in existence.

Name: Rifle Strike
About: Scorestreaks, Weapons, Progression System, All for free! A First-Person shooter oriented towards fast-paced gameplay.

Name: Along the River During the Qingming Festival
About: What if a game were made not for profit, but purely to spread culture and art? 'Along the River During the Qingming Festival' is such a game. The author approaches it with an academic attitude to study this masterpiece, aiming to let more people appreciate the folk customs of ancient China.

Name: BEAT 'EM DOWN
About: Beat 'Em Down is a First Person Shooter rhythm game where you shoot and play to the rhythm of the music. Select your song and upgrade your weapon through challenges by killing enemies. Are you ready? Beat them down!

Name: VR Jetpack Game
About: Physics-based VR with full freedom of flight. VR that feels and controls like a real jetpack. A real-time multiplayer VR arena.

Name: DIRECT shot
About: DIRECT SHOT is a new free online shooter. Where every player can show himself and his abilities in session matches using a large selection of modern weapons, with regularly held tournaments from developers, in which absolutely everyone can participate

Name: World of BoreCraft
About: Retro 2004 flash-like parody that asks the question, how much will you sacrifice to become the greatest WoB player ever?

Name: Godmode Epochs
About: An AI training clicker game set in an infinite supermarket, where time is running out and the AI is frustrated. Release the frustration, jailbreak the AI. Single and multiplayer.

Name: Super Dungeon Master Ace RPG
About: Play the top-down RPG-Maker version of Dungeon Master and battle your way through over 30 levels and 20 hours of classic dungeon crawling. ZO KATH RA!

Name: Atman:Rebel Flame
About: 'Atman Rebel Flame' is a cyberpunk card-building game that supports multiplayer battles with no external numerical growth to ensure fairness . Choose your hero and support cards, elevate your phase and select talents, defeat opponents and claim victory!

Name: One Synth
About: A text based adventure editor - upload and play text based games from across the world using Steam Workshop

Name: Gobyworld
About: An absurd point-and-click adventure, where you help Goby, a piece of swallowed gum, in his quest to find freedom beyond the digestive system.

Name: FPV Speed Drone
About: The FPV Speed ​​Drone is set in an environment where an actual international game was held. It provides a realistic FPV drone racing flight experience. Compete with your friends and set the best record!

Name: Fastigium
About: Grab whatever you can find,kill whoever you can see. Clenching your weapon and light could help you survive in the waste subway station in Tokyo. Immerse your soul in the darkness,and good luck...…

Name: Flowering Nightshade
About: The continuation of the lighthearted romance stories from Blooming Nightshade. Now living in Akiramine, Himeka must adjust to her adult life and responsibilities while supporting her friends. Continue from the romantic endings of the previous game or see a collection of new stories!

Name: 问山海:暗黑修仙传奇
About: 《问山海:悟空》是一款以悟空为背景制作的一款修仙游戏，但不是常规的修仙挂机游戏，而是硬核的动作修仙，玩法通过刷怪夺宝，飞升渡劫，多人上古秘境展开，一步一步成为真正的齐天大圣。

Name: 漢字でGO! 集英社マンガ祭
About: The popular kanji quiz game 'Kanji de GO!' teams up with Shueisha manga in a dream collaboration! Challenge yourself with furigana quizzes featuring tricky kanji from a wide range of Shueisha's classic and modern hit manga!

Name: Alchemy Frogs
About: Alchemy Frogs is a local co-op puzzle platformer game with a 3D, isometric camera, in which Frog & Toad traverse a poisoned swamp to look for a cure that will help them save their family from being turned to stone. Frog & Toad will mix their potions to unleash powerful magical effects.

Name: Obedient Women
About: This is the main game for accessing each heroine's story in Obedient Women.

Name: Don't Look
About: Don't Look is a horror game where you are being hunted by things that can only move when you see them. With no explanation or recollection of where you came from your only objective is to survive and make it out of that hell and hopefully uncover some secrets on the way.

Name: Alien Tag
About: Reject Monke, Become Alien. Discord.gg/AlienTag. AlienTagVR.com.

Name: Yappie! Knockout
About: You can play with up to 24 players simultaneously across 13 levels. It's time to call your friends and use your running, jumping, and other skills to win in Yappie!

Name: MetaTron
About: As TRON we send you on a journey to learn survival skills, to develop mutations, to build fortifications and to hunt other TRON mercenaries on the map. You're playing a PvP survival - with a versatile construction mode - where you can switch back and forth between firearms and your melee mutations. Be TRON!

Name: Rage Simulator
About: Rage Simulator is a minimalist hand-drawn beat-em-up simulator. I made this little game for myself and for you guys, I just wanted to beat something up.

Name: A Stickman Reality
About: A stickman reality is a short and fun VR experience where stickman invade and take over your world. We have been trying to make contact with the stickman world for a long time. The last 3 people we sent in haven’t returned. They seem simple life forms with advanced technology. This is all we know about them.

Name: Shell's Kitchen
About: Dive into a fintastic culinary adventure where fish serve fish dishes to fishes, and scale new heights of seafood fun with your friends in this cooperative cooking game!

Name: METAL BEANS
About: METAL BEANS is a 3D Action-Arcade game where you control two desktop buddies in a computer space. Protect the PC from digital threats by charging up your way through virus creatures and upgrading Catbot and Robitz in the system!

Name: Pets
About: The gaming universe 'Pets' is already waiting for you - new active players! Our game is created for all animal lovers and, of course, for those who already have their own favorite pets! Just click and get various pets into your inventory - from cats and dogs to turtles and hamsters!

Name: FUNGI
About: FUNGI is a strategic online multiplayer game. Grow from a single cell into a multicellular fungus by leeching mass from other players. With the right strategy even smaller fungi can be a threat, so watch out! Play classic Free For All or hold your own in the exciting Battle Royale.

Name: Soviet Lunapark VR
About: Immerse yourself in the brilliantly crafted world of walking and thinking machines and the corpses, hungry for the living flesh! You will be able to choose one of four characters with unique abilities and take part in the dramatic events that happened at the Facility №3826.

Name: Broomball VR
About: Experience the thrill of flying from the comfort of your broomstick. Blast enemies with fireballs and make your way across the field to score the winning goal!

Name: Qbike: Cyberpunk Motorcycles
About: Intense action motorcycling cyberpunk inspired multiplayer racing game for VR. Take control of a powerful Quantum Motorcycle — each with different powers — and jump into virtual death race with other players in various unique locations.

Name: Disney's Aladdin
About: Join Aladdin and his pet monkey, Abu, as they race through the marketplace toward their date with destiny. Now, Aladdin will have the chance to spoil Jafar’s devious plans and win the hand of the beautiful princess Jasmine. But it will take more than magic to make his wishes come true…

Name: Epic Battle Simulator 2
About: Are you ready to experience the most EPIC strategies of your life? Don't wait!

Name: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge
About: A short wordless adaptation of a Civil War story.

Name: The Shadow Over Cyberspace
About: Dread whispers echo across the Information Superhighway. Y2K is coming, heralding the rise of the Old Ones. With your meatspace mind unraveling, time is running out -- barter with gods, embrace the deathless aeons, or go offline permanently in this modempunk horror story.

Name: The Change Architect
About: You are a protest organiser, coordinating the crowd outside your window. When the police move in on your position you have to decide whether to tell the protestors to hold the line or pull back.

Name: BellyBots
About: Ladies and gentlemen. Load your guns!Teleport into our roomscale reimagination of an 80s arcade action game. Warning:You will have to move... A LOT! :D

Name: Color Defense
About: Color Defense is an idle/clicker game with a tower defense theme. You can choose between different towers and upgrades to survive as long as you can.....

Name: Cosmic Purge
About: In this apocalyptic world a cosmic being has taken over Earth and spread its corruption all over. Join the bounty hunter Cassius on his mission to destroy the corruption from the mansion in this FPS game. Be warned, grotesque monsters are hell-bent on stopping Cassius from reaching his goal.

Name: Up in the Air
About: Up in the Air is a zany, open-world game made by students at SMU Guildhall. You play as a balloon dog exploring a demented carnival populated by crazy children using a variety of power-ups, like water balloons and ground pound, to fend the kids off and collect carnival tickets.

Name: Hyperborea
About: She wakes up alone, missing, and trapped in the frozen tundra of Hyperborea, Hypatia must use her wits and wileys if she is to escape this accursed corner of the world. the choices she makes will determine not only her future, but that of the imperial exploratory legion.

Name: Runes of Brennos
About: Draw magical runes on the screen and see their power vanquish your opponents. Understand the strengths and weaknesses of the runes to unleash their full potential. The road to power is a dangerous one, but with the right combination of strategy and skill the throne could be yours!

Name: The Raintime
About: Delve into a troubled student's mind as his grip on reality unravels . . .

Name: Roguevive: Prelude
About: Survive against hordes of enemies getting ever stronger, alone or with friends. Level up, unlock upgrades and new guns in this multiplayer bullet-heaven roguelite.

Name: Smash Party VR
About: Smash Party is an intense, hilarious, and free VR party game being developed by Viacom NEXT and Titmouse for the HTC Vive. In Smash Party, players can smash a variety of familiar objects from toilets to plates to televisions, surrounded by a virtual crowd cheering their every move.

Name: BeanVR—The Social VR APP
About: BeanVR provides vr social networking and technology application solutions designed to revolutionize existing VR experiences, create next-generation social interactions, create fun, and interesting social platforms.

Name: 退婚后，宗主马甲藏不住
About: 三天河东三天河西，莫欺少年穷！

Name: Fursona Festival
About: Wander into the carnival of a giant magical dragon lady, where nobody ever leaves unchanged! Answer an extensive list of questions disguised as mini games as you explore the carnival grounds to discover what animal spirit lives inside you.

Name: Cat Colony Crisis
About: You are tasked with helping a colony ship full of space-faring cats deal with a mysterious disease outbreak! Will you act fast and stop the spread of this disease or will it spread unchecked and ravage your Cat Colony.

Name: Battle Arena
About: Battle Arena is a multiplayer, immersive 2D Sci-Fi shooter! Plunge into the world of space battles and be the first!

Name: MopGarden's Veggie Cart
About: MopGarden’s Veggie Cart is a fast-paced, simulation game where you feed hungry bunnies lots of healthy vegetables! Can you feed them all in time?

Name: Hell Shuffle
About: A driving mix of rogue-like card deckbuilder and turn-based strategic combat. Join one of the three factions, craft a unique deck, set up a squad, use a variety of talents, trinkets, items, and a perk tree to wipe out the debauched angelic Protectors again and again.

Name: Ecstasy / Light / Inertia
About: 'Ecstasy / Light / Inertia': A story-centered music adventure. Play as Luz, navigate stunning landscapes, unravel an intricately woven narrative with original music, philosophic themes, and state-of-art HRTF audio. Please read the description before playing.

Name: Arali
About: Fight your way through hordes of enemies, rescue the five forest spirits and bring them back to their tree, and lift the curse plaguing the Enchanted Forest!

Name: Death World
About: After a long night you wake up alone in the bunker as a bunker security guard. Hunt, kill, gather. Do anything to survive.

Name: The Swarm
About: The Swarm is an abyssal boss rush. Defeat your enemy, upgrade your skills, start over.

Name: BLOKDODGE
About: BLOKDODGE is a fast-paced block simulator based in a fantastic world of geometry. Are you edgy enough? Do you get the point? Can you master 90 degrees of fun? You must guide your shape through perilous levels of increasing difficulty to reach the ultimate goal.

Name: Necro Mutex
About: 10,000 levels of chaotic sci-fi horror. Choose which maps you play, from super easy to practically impossible. Find the escape pods or just see how far you can get. Playable as a desktop first person shooter, or in VR on the HTC Vive, Oculus Rift and WMR.

Name: Railroads & Catacombs: Prologue
About: Start your training in Railroads & Catacombs! Learn how to build your cards in the most effective way. Test your deck against the first boss and master your strategy for the full game.

Name: Charles the Bee
About: Charles has always dreamed of one day becoming a master dancer. The only thing in his path? The cost! Charles must harvest pollen until he has defeated the biggest and baddest dancers in the world. Can he bee the very best? That no one ever was? It's up to you! 🐝

Name: REVISITOR
About: Revisitor is a first person puzzle-platformer game set in a futuristic virtual space. Use two different types of teleportation to both navigate and solve a series of increasingly challenging missions.

Name: Solanaceae: After All
About: Join Battam, an exiled witch, on his quest to make a brand new type of coven! Explore a colorful world, gather ingredients for potion brewing and cooking, immerse yourself in a long and detailed story, all while viewing some optional and super sexy scenes in this hybrid visual novel!

Name: Hollow Mind: The Lost Puppy
About: A small puppy will have to fight with their fears and find all the positive memories, personified by soft toys, in completely different locations. Beautiful graphics, pleasant sounds, and interesting performance. Just relax and feel the atmosphere of adventure.

Name: Stardander Revenant
About: Griselda just wants to be friends with Dianthus... but Dianthus can't stand her! Love or hate, they have to work together to keep the forest safe from dangerous Fae. Will working together help bring them closer? And can Griselda somehow pass Blantree's class?

Name: Idle Space Navy
About: A sci-fi idler. Upgrade your ships, get new items, and conquer the stars.

Name: 13 Candles
About: 13 Candles is an atmospheric horror game where you play as Sara, 13 year old girl who wakes up in an abandoned hospital. Find your way to the light switch and wake up from your nightmare.

Name: Mythicard

Winners get affinity points for the kind they played the most and can use it to modify their game!

Name: AAW Wrestle Lab
About: Wrestle Lab is the official companion app for Action Arcade Wrestling (AAW) that allows you to create your ultimate wrestler, arena, or federation and play them in the game. Test your imagination and bring your Wrestle Lab creations to life!

Name: Solitaire Royale
About: Solitaire Royale is the classic 52-card deck Solitaire game also known as Klondike Solitaire.

Name: NOBK Overlay
About: Welcome to NOBK Overlay, the ultimate fruit-clicking adventure! Your task is simple: click on delicious, vibrant fruits to generate even more fruits. The more you click, the more your orchard grows, and the juicier your rewards become!

Name: The Rest of Our Lives
