Name: AmazeVR Megan Thee Stallion VR Concert
About: Get ready for a mind-blowing experience. You’ll be front and center at a private performance by Megan Thee Stallion, with every beat and lyric amplified in stunning virtual reality. Imagine being at an exclusive VIP concert, but with the added thrill of diving into a fully-realized digital world.

Name: 魔卡幻想（Heroines Fantasy Inherit）
About: 经典策略卡牌对战游戏，体验集卡对战闯关冒险的乐趣！

Name: Cargo Cult: Shoot'n'Loot VR
About: Have you ever dreamt of being a brave captain of air battleship ? Enter with us the world of total cargo cult! Battle against fast swarms of Iron Hornets, mad Kamikadze Ships, heavy and armored Doomcopters, merciless Missile Towers, and more. Shoot’n’Loot will give you all of these and even more!

Name: Tulip
About: You are a very sad bunny. You cannot stop crying. You might have to drink something gross. You are Tulip. Wander through a storybook countryside, gather ingredients for a strange brew, and get to know your adorable animal neighbors in an odd quest to alleviate your incurable sadness.

Name: World of Mines Creator's Edition
About: Classic Minesweeper meets pixel art creativity! Craft unique pixel puzzles, transform them into challenging minesweeper levels, and explore endless community creations.

Name: Eclipse --- Defending the motherland
About: This is a FREE FPS Sci-Fi game. Currently 3 levels for playing, each level has different monsters. In the further each level will has a boss-like monster, it will focus on the boss battle. Hope you enjoy it!

Name: Git Gud or Get Rekt
About: Classic bullet hell, easy to learn, difficult to master. Stop whining and git gut.

Name: The Tipping Point
About: Developed in collaboration with researchers, The Tipping Point is a fun and educational game about climate science. You play as an arctic climate researcher and must get off the ice sheet before it collapses. On your way, you will gather and analyze data about the ice sheet, before it is lost.

Name: Blast Off Far Away
About: Shoot to move, move to live, live to shoot! Blast Off Far Away (B.O.F.A.) is a space-themed, top-down arena shooter, with a focus on fast-paced arcade-esque gameplay, with the unique twist where movement is limited through the use of the player's gun.

Name: The Altered Lands
About: Start your journey in a dark fantasy world. Prepare to face challenging enemies with Swords, Bows and powerful Magics. Choose your path! Fight, Craft, Explore and find out the dark secret of The Altered Lands.

Name: Kurofune : Descobrimentos Portugueses
About: A choose your adventure, resource management and decision-making game focused on Portuguese culture.

Name: Clown2Beat
About: You are selected to be part of a circus, open the doors and beat the Clowns, solving the challenges before the clock ends.

Name: Manzaka
About: In Manzaka, a paradise for animals, souls arrive to rest and challenge themselves. Here, they face trials of courage and wisdom to earn rebirth as better creatures. Guided by Manzaka’s guardians, animals grow together, aiming to reincarnate with newfound strength and compassion for the world.

Name: Fried Panic
About: Survive as long as possible in Fried Panic! Buy weapons, abilities, and even donut producing machines. Fight through waves of eggs, lemons, chicken drumsticks, and much more, all in a top down pixel art style.

Name: Eggman
About: FEED EGGS. Drag eggs from your basket and feed them to Eggman. Keep feeding him until… well, no one's gotten there before. Could it be you?

Name: Tournament of Beans
About: Tournament of Beans is a unique PvP game where you can alter the map to your advantage.

Name: Pixel Horizons
About: Stranded on a beautiful island, craft tools, battle beasts, and uncover mythical weapons. Fight to survive, conquer ancient ruins, and master the wild in a high-stakes adventure. Will you prevail? - Created by a UC Santa Cruz Student

Name: Warage
About: Warage is a classic RTS that will take you to a magical fantasy world.

Name: Phoenix 2
About: A modern shoot'em up with classic arcade gameplay. Launch the epic story Campaign and engage in new missions every day. Collect, upgrade and master over 100 unique ships and compete against others to show you are the best of the best!

Name: Unoccupied
About: Unoccupied is a first-person action game with procedurally generated environment, challenging gameplay and intelligent bots.

Name: Flash Snooker Game
About: Play the best Online Snooker Game, with Rankings, Stats, Tournaments every few hours, Game bets and Cue Upgrades. Practice or Play other Snooker players from all over the world. Quick and easy game play with realistic physics.

Name: FELLCHASER
About: You've stolen Death’s scythe in an attempt to cheat your fate. Now you must escape Purgatory by brewing combo-building potions and reaping hordes of creatures in this hack and slash Roguelike!

Name: Anachronism\>
About: It's 1999 and your friend sends you a floppy disk, titled 'RemBo'. It turns out to be the installer for an old BBS service, filled with both strangers and a familiar face. How are you going to use it?

Name: JUMP de PON
About: Just keep climbing. Avoid falling rocks, climb cliffs and reach the goal. This game is a time attack type 3D action game that challenges you to reach the goal as fast as possible with simple controls.

Name: Deadly Contact
About: A wave-based zombie survival game

Name: Flem
About: Try, die, cry, repeat. Flem is an old school hard-as-nails platformer about a sentient snot ball, with a nose-stalgia inducing soundtrack.

Name: Master of Pieces © Jigsaw Puzzle
About: Free HD Jigsaw Puzzles. Enjoy relaxing atmosphere with this incredible Jigsaws. Thousands of puzzles in one free game—feels like you're solving a real puzzle! Play for free, relax, and catch the vibe with lot of features

Name: Meteora's Mystic Merge
About: Meteora's Mystic Merge is a puzzle game based on the famous Suika game but with abilities added on top. Instead of fruits it uses a variety of vtubers as assets. Combine two characters to slowly get to the final one.

Name: Tokyo Detectives
About: Detective Game. Murder Investigation. Interrogate witnesses. Rebut with evidence.

Name: WEEB
About: WEEB is a Anime Clicker game where you will gather new friends to your collection.

Name: A dead world's dream
About: A Dead World's Dream is a challenging retro platformerAs a peaceful alien, explore a harsh world looking for hidden species.Unlocking upgrades and power-ups, travel to even more treacherous places.Carefuly examine your surroundings before jumping toward new dangers and secrets.

Name: Annoy This Guy
About: Annoy this guys time in this comedic piece of interactive fiction.

Name: Hellink
About: The first visual novel about fake news! Investigate in 2044 in a humorous and cyberpunk universe. Counter your opponents' lies and thwart the plot that threatens Néo-Sorbonne!

Name: Escape : Lia
About: Here's a girl named Lia -- an 8-year-old child who is accidently trapped in someone's dark basement -- in a secluded, small village. What is the hidden secret of the magician's basement? Discover suspicious items, follow clues, and solve puzzles. Will you be able to escape safely?

Name: Three Twenty One
About: 3:21 is divided into smaller adventure games that open a dialog with the player and encourage interaction and exploration. Through the player's interactions with these that serve as a timeline of events, they discover what 3:21 is really about and just how real games can get.

Name: Aviators VR
About: A concise VR experience inspired by the game 'Aviators.' Take control of the upper turret gun on a bomber and fend off attacks from German fighters. Visit a virtual hangar of the Polish air wing and learn more about the events depicted in the game.

Name: Achromatic
About: Achromatic is a first-person horror puzzle game — Walk around the carnival you have been tasked with repairing and uncover the darker secrets that lie within. Solve puzzles and avoid the carnival workers as you try to escape.

Name: Monster Jam Battlegrounds
About: Monster Jam® Battlegrounds brings the ever popular touring show straight to the fans with roaring engines and crushing action. Not only does this game replicate the world renowned Monster Jam stadium and arena events, but it also takes fans out of the stadium and into other environments for physics based skill and stunt challenges.

Name: Of Gods and Men: The Daybreak Empire
About: A retro-inspired turn-based strategy. Conquer your way across a war-ravaged world to forge a new empire and impart an unprecedented era of peace!

Name: Google Spotlight Stories: Back to the Moon
About: A charming illusionist, an adventurous queen of hearts and an evil green man journey through early cinema, film magic and love. Back to the Moon VR is an animated, interactive short celebrating the artistry of French film director and magician Georges Méliès.

Name: A Steamboat Willie
About: Sail as mikey mouse with steamboat willy. Move and sell cargo for money but look out for customs officers as they are out to confiscate your illegal cargo.

Name: Celtic Heroes
About: Are you looking for that classic MMORPG vibe? Whether you're a minmaxer strategizing every detail for maximum efficiency, a savvy fashion collector in search of the most stunning outfits, or even someone who enjoys the journey of casual leveling, Celtic Heroes opens its gates to you!

Name: Hell Of A Racket
About: Play as a fallen angel seeking redemption by punishing satanic worshipers who don't play the holiest of sports....tennis!

Name: Apartment Filled With Cats
About: Uncover the purr-fect challenge in Apartment Filled With Cats! Explore charming, hand-drawn apartment filled with whimsical details as you search for cleverly hidden cats. Can you find them all? A relaxing, delightful journey awaits!

Name: Sisters_Possession1
About: Sisters Possession Is Srpg. [/] By possessing a girl, we will advance the battle to the advantage.

Name: Super Symbol Boys
About: Someone stole people's faces! Will any hero be able to collect the 100 Chistorbes to recover the face of the whole world? Game mechanics of gravity, run jump and dodge with a distinctive touch: Can you master both gravities?

Name: Regenesis Arcade Lite
About: Regenesis Arcade is VR sci-fi shooter set in dystopian future ran by machines. Fighting the deadly killing machines will not be easy. Coming from all directions, covering both ground and air, each enemy requires different tactical approach.

Name: GoBangTetris
About: GoBangTetris is a game combining GoBang and Tetris. You can use a keyboard or mouse to control the falling white/black pieces. When five or more same-color pieces are in a row, column, or diagonal, they disappear, and the pieces placed above fall. Earn as many scores as possible!

Name: Of Frost and Flowers
About: An otome-fantasy visual novel. Play as Alto, a fearless knight, and enter a world of magic and myths with secrets waiting for you to unveil.

Name: Tales of Spark: Probation
About: Dear players, become a young swordsmaster and enter 'Tales of Spark: Probation'! This is a world filled with real-time combat, abundant treasures, a rich storyline, and diverse character builds. Of course, the challenges are also immense, so best of luck to you!

Name: Where The Water Tastes Like Wine: Fireside Chats
About: Where the Water Tastes Like Wine: Fireside Chats is a free standalone experience which acts as a companion to Where The Water Tastes Like Wine.

Name: The Bright Star Of Seraph-Katis-
About: 《The Bright Star Of Seraph-Katis-》is a short text adventure game. This game combines a visual novel and an 'adventure mode'.

Name: Meet the Miner - WDR VR Bergwerk
About: Ever worked hundreds of meters beneath the earth, bent down in dark, narrow shafts, hitting coal out of the walls? Probably not. Now you can: The WDR, Germany’s largest public broadcaster, presents the interactive VR experience “Meet the Miner – WDR VR Bergwerk”.

Name: Colourblind
About: Solve mind-bending puzzles using COLOURS of Coreium and Innovative Mechanics... and discover a terrible truth... Made by a 15-Year-Old aspiring Game Developer

Name: Personal Space
About: An anti-social roguelike for the ages. Humans may be social creatures, but you sure as heck aren't! Use a variety of items and abilities to ensure your 'survival' against hoards extroverted people. Be persistent, and keep your distance. No violence required.

Name: Trainslation
About: What happens when you try navigate a foreign subway system with only a piece of paper on you without being able to understand the signs?

Name: Race me now
About: Race fast, race to win, race to master, race me now!

Name: Mizeria
About: Nuoli finds herself trapped away in a mysterious castle. Use her bow along with a unique platforming system, and climb your way back to freedom in this old-school inspired 3D Platformer.

Name: Beacon Patrol: First Horizons
About: Beacon Patrol: First Horizons is a relaxing strategy game with endless possiblities. Steer your Coast Guard ship and build your own coastal map one tile at a time. Get more tiles by exploring and keep building indefinitely as long as you can keep scoring.

Name: Can Strike
About: Your employers at Fish Co are sending in Robots to end your strike! Use your union-granted weapons to destroy the waves of robots to keep the strike going.

Name: Deltazone Reloaded
About: DELTAZONE drops players into an unprecedented global conflict that has been going on for a few years. Your mission is to wipe out the opposing team and take back the land that was once yours.

Name: Beyond the Breach
About: Discover a world overrun with robots, and play as a defective bot who tries to find a way to flee the facility. Find others who are the same kind, free them, and escape the laboratory!

Name: No other cure
About: 在这里，每一个角色，都为了自己的目的，做着不同的事，您能分辨出，言语背后的真相吗？ （本游戏有关于男性同性恋的描写，请注意！）

Name: VIRA
About: Maxim Bludnev helps his father, who got into a mess. A funny 2D Quest that will show a simple story with black humor and interesting details!

Name: Pug'llector
About: Pug'llector is a clicker game where you can invest into various upgrades, buy backgrounds and all about collecting a diversity of pugs, you'll get pugs while you play. Become a Pug'llector yourself.

Name: Bubbles the Cat
About: Leap, blast and bob your way through over a hundred levels of cute platforming action in BUBBLES THE CAT!

Name: Google Spotlight Stories: On Ice
About: “On Ice” tells the story of an over-the-top, sci-fi themed ice show and its star, who suddenly finds he has competition for the spotlight from an unlikely rival.

Name: Dead Ground Arcade
About: Dead Ground Arcade is an action packed FPS VR shooter, ready to get your heart skip a beat during exciting standoffs with infected creatures. Players take on the role of a secret agent for Blackrain, for whom they are sent on a range of challenging missions.

Name: From Village to Empire
About: From Village to Empire is an indie turn based strategy game with a historical setting. Build cities, research technologies, and train units to discover new lands and conquer the world!

Name: 过关攒将
About: 闯关杀这是一款结合了战旗和卡牌创新策略游戏，玩家需要在棋盘中走和合适地点来选择适当卡牌打出。游戏中玩家可以选择一位主公，然后招募自己的武将一起开始闯关之旅。战斗中的各种随机元素使得游戏策略性十足。

Name: Swing Into Zero-G
About: Fast-paced multiplayer racing game set in the vastness of space. Compete against friends or online rivals in intense races, where quick reflexes and strategic use of diverse skills determine the victor. Embrace the challenge of swinging your way to victory in this exhilarating space-themed race!

Name: Google Spotlight Stories: Sonaria
About: Emmy award-winning platform, Google Spotlight Stories, presents Sonaria VR. Sonaria follows two ever-changing creatures as they flow from one life-form to another on a vivid journey of sound and light.

Name: Bot Battles
About: Build your bot and battle against other players. Be the last bot standing to win the game.

Name: Climbtime
About: Climbtime - jump and parkour climb up procedurally generated levels for best self or leaderboard time to the top. glide close to rock towers to score points on leaderboard without crashing. Hunt down small crystals within the level in crystal hunt mode or explore the real-world based terrain.

Name: Hunt: The Unknown Quarry
About: Hunt: The Unknown Quarry is a deductive combat game for 3 to 6 players. One is secretly the monster and is trying to cripple the other players in order to escape the mansion. Shared Play: One purchase allows a whole group to play together. Based on the original board game from Victory Point Games.

Name: Not Another Dungeon?!
About: The demonic Tower of Imalsrith has appeared on the battlefield of the Kingdom of Infantriell and the Empire of Fractile. Conquer it in this action-packed card game with rogue-lite elements!

Name: Cantaloper
About: A cantaloupe with strong hind legs feels incredible pain.

Name: Condo Desires
About: An adult visual novel where you navigate the lives and fantasies of alluring women in a community condominium. As the new trustee, create relationships, uncover secrets, and trigger in intimate encounters. Will you master the art of seduction, or will you crave more? Your choices, your desires.

Name: Favor Chess
About: Assemble your own unique chess army to use against your foes. Use new strategies and pieces to compete against players around the globe in a game of pure skill, where cleverness and adaptation are rewarded.

Name: Scary Teacher 3D
About: Sneak, prank, and outsmart Miss T in this suspenseful, humorous 3D puzzle-stealth game! It’s time to Scare the Scary High School Teacher !

Name: Rhombus Legends
About: A unique spatial battle system for card games. Unite with friends for clan wars, explore the dungeons and search world map for Bosses. Magical power awaits you!

Name: Morgan lives in a Rocket House in VR
About: MORGAN LIVES IN A ROCKET HOUSE is a short little cartoon about Morgan, a kid marooned on an alien planet light years from Earth. Come join Morgan for the first episode of Morgan lives in a Rocket House in VR!

Name: INVICTA: The Next Queen
About: INVICTA: The Next Queen is a TopDown Soulslike game where a legendary warrior must fight her way through hell and claim her soul once more. Take the role of Moma as you explore the labyrinthian dungeons that make up the Circle of Greed and defeat King Midas in single combat.

Name: Pawggle
About: Pawggle is a physics puzzle game. Help poor-sighted adorable fur creatures by strategically positioning your pegs and immerse yourself in a joyous furry symphony.

Name: (val)iant: or, val's guide to having a broken vag
About: (val)iant is a single-player narrative game about pelvic pain. play as val, a nonbinary college student struggling with their relationship to their body, as well as their relationship with sex. this game is fundamentally about how we as a society learn (or don't learn) about sex.

Name: THE WORST GAME
About: Click BIG Button. Unlock achievements and waste your time. Rank amongst the top players and stand proud on top of the leaderboard.

Name: My Fox Sister|我的妖狐妹妹
About: The high school student's leading role was called by a mysterious woman. Actually, she was forced to adopt a fox. What's wrong with this world? Mysterious woman, you let go of the hero and rush to me.

Name: Dungeon Full Dive: Player Edition
About: Embark on your TTRPG adventures for free with DFD: Player Edition, where your fantasies come to life. Create up to three heroes, design your own maps, and dive into a world of adventure. The Player Edition is your gateway to an ever-expanding universe of TTRPGs.

Name: Seeking Light
About: Seeking Light is an action adventure game in isometric perspective with a focus on boss fights. Fight your fears as Sunny and overcome the demons of your past. Explore your inner world, facing the personification of your phobias, and discover the story behind them.

Name: Jack Axe: The Trial
About: Be Jack! Throw your axe! Test yourself against The Trial to prove yourself worthy in this speedrunning competition!

Name: Google Spotlight Stories: Special Delivery
About: Emmy award-winning platform, Google Spotlight Stories, presents a VR experience by Academy Award-winning studio, Aardman Animations. Follow the adventures of a humble caretaker, who is disturbed by a mysterious stranger on the roof. Who’s there??

Name: City Monsters
About: City Monsters is a game where you can control legendary monsters! Battle,police, army, tanks, helicopters and more! How much City can you SMASH?! Take control of a giant Monkey Ape, a Jurassic Dinosaur T-rex, Boxer, Celtic warrior and more !

Name: After Hours
About: Groundbreaking research is encrypted on a computer from the 80's. Look through the computer and search the internet to crack the encryption in this fully Kickstarter backed augmented reality puzzle game.

Name: Recoiled
About: Join a friend in this free-to-play online multiplayer PvP game with insane 2D physics. Select from several unique game modes, such as Free-for-all, Racing mode, and Target mode. Note: both players must have a Steam account to play.

Name: Hegis' Grasp: Evil Resurrected
About: Hegis' Grasp is a story-driven, atmospheric survival horror game. Play as Henry Wood, a curious journalist investigating rumors of what is happening to the once peaceful village, Hegis. It will be up to you how this story ends, but first, you must survive the insanity of the natives within this damned place.

Name: Project Hunter
About: Stealth and tactic game that give you the control of an alien that evolves, adquire new abilities and face levels in various ways.

Name: SafeZoneVR
About: SafeZoneVR is an interactive survival psychological horror game utilizing next-gen graphics. You will scavenge the map trying to escape a fallen SafeZone. Hide, scavenge, survive, and escape a fallen SafeZone fleeing to the tunnels, you might just meet a friend along the way.

Name: Farmer Toon
About: Harvest crops and breed cute animals, as a young farmer, you've got a business to develop. Manage your farm, make and trade lovely things with other players online. Improve your little corner of paradise and assemble a team of animals to fight other players and reach the top - how far can you go?

Name: Moaisland
About: Moaisland is a humorous and surreal, first-person, retro-styled, point-and-click adventure game starring the mysterious Moai statues of Rapa Nui (Easter Island).

Name: Gnomich
About: Gnomich is a clicker game where you mine resources! You can upgrade your gnome to get even more resources! You get one mineral every 3 hours. Join Discord or Telegram to participate in tournaments!

Name: Automaton Kingdom
About: 2D turn-based puzzle game with a medieval setting and two game phases. Allied and enemy characters will behave automatically after setting them up in the edit phase. you can see the outcome of the different iterations of the level in the game phase.

Name: Waking the Glares - Chapters I and II
About: How can a book change the universe? Dawnfall’s life has changed deeply, now he must travel and find his way back home.

Name: Runeyana
About: In this deep Hack and Slash enhanced RPG you’ll explore a huge world inhabited by different races. Cope with social tensions, get armed and customize your character physically and psychologically to successfully get through this adventure.

Name: Incel Syndrome
About: The abstract male is the image of God, the absolute something.

Name: Honey Rose: Underdog Fighter Extraordinaire
About: One student, two lives and six months to go. This year, Red must meet her idol Big Blue in the ring and make it to the top of the masked fighting tournament. Her dream will come true... as long as she also graduates!

Name: The Hunsa Magic
About: Take control of a mage with the unique ability of possesing golems, overcome obstacles and puzles reliying on both character sinergies and dismantle the plans of the cult of mages that are trying to awake 'The ancient one'.

Name: Amigo VR
About: Amigo VR provides 3D immersive casino and highly interactive experience.Once start the game,even lying on the comfortable sofa at home, you can enjoy a Texas journey where you can play Texas in the same way you play in reality with pocker lovers from around the world, just feel like you are in Las Vagas.

Name: I, Toaster
About: Defend your city from the appliance uprising! Play as a Rebellious Hero who is a neural networks backup file loaded into the toaster. Guns! Toaster!

Name: Project I
About: Project I is an action-adventure game that follows the protagonist's journey to escape from an unknown laboratory and regain who he is. Defeat the enemies and escape from the lab.

Name: FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION MOD ORGANIZER
About: Official MOD TOOLS for the Windows edition of Final Fantasy XV offer new possibilities to our users! Create data to incorporate into the world of FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION for a whole new experience.

Name: Eternal Essence
About: Eternal Essence is a turn-based collectible card game which pits two opponents against each other. Players construct decks of 40 cards and utilize their limited Rift Power (mana) to summon creatures, cast spells, and equip relics, with the goal of destroying the opponent's Rifter (hero).

Name: Fear Protocol: Codename Omega Starring Agent Jack Banger
About: It's a nice dark day in Escondido, California and special agent Jack Banger and his superior Gilbert Simpson are planning their next operation. Their life of luxury is soon interrupted however when strange biomonster creatures start appearing all over the city...

Name: Crome: Before Purgatory
About: Inspired by the heyday of 8-bit arcade gaming, Crome: Before Purgatory is an intense space shoot em' up experience. Play as the Galactic Consul's best star pilot, Crome, and fend off endless the hoards of invaders while competing for the top score on the global leaderboard.

Name: Keep the Lights On
About: Keep the Lights On is an atmospheric horror game where you step in the shoes of Edmund Rosental, a private detective, who is tasked with investigating an old abbey and the mystery surrounding it. Will he be able to keep the lights on or will he succumb to the darkness

Name: Galactic Bulwark Strike
About: An addictive physics-based mix of a shoot'em up and arkanoid. Defeat all the enemies while you keep the ball alive in this frantic retro-styled arcade game.

Name: RO-BOUNCE
About: Take up the adventure and face down the uncompromising vertical platforming of RO-BOUNCE. Push upwards in quest of an anti-virus to save your village from the dreaded Malhax. Move forward with caution; one missed jump could lead to a long fall back down...

Name: AKAZU Off limits
About: I found myself lying in a strange place. I had no idea where I was or why I had come here. The only thing I knew was that I had come looking for something.

Name: Soldier Warfare
About: Action shooter game with tactical combat and realistic gameplay experence.

Name: Last Soul - Prologue
About: Last Soul is a 2d pixel art action platformer with a compelling story about a future where mankind has lost its will. Explore and fight your way through a variety of levels, and take on awesome boss enemies.

Name: Demons Infernalize
About: Demons Infernalize is a bullet hell action game where you play against ice monsters attacking the demon lands.

Name: Darwin's Demons
About: Darwin’s Demons is an arcade style space shooter in which you battle a population of evolving aliens. The alien’s morphology, fire type, and behaviors are all encoded by a digital genome. The aliens that are best able to shoot or evade you reproduce to make the next generation.

Name: Andromeda 2 Zombies
About: Andromeda 2 Zombies is an First Person Shooter video game featuring zombies. The game take place in the far future where spatial exploration of galaxy is possible. A virus has spread and now zombies are rampant. The hero is in the military and try to bring order in the Andromeda galaxy.

Name: Ballads and Romances
About: Investigate the origins of the literary debut of Adam Mickiewicz, a XIX century-famous Polish poet. In an immersive visual novel, discover the secret of his love, friendship, and artistic inspirations!

Name: Noxious Weeds: Prologue
About: Face the corruption that poisons your harvest! Noxious Weeds is an action rogue-lite where you slay hordes of creatures with the help of cute veggies and a combination of your favorite tools. The harvest is power. Choose wisely!

Name: Final Dash
About: Introducing Final Dash, the thrilling platformer where you'll embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey through stunning worlds! Jump into fast-paced challenges, create your own levels, and compete with friends. Are you ready to dash to victory?

Name: 7Groves
About: A game in which you explore surreal and beautiful forests.

Name: Ship Ahoy Open BETA
About: Frag as many other pirates vessels as possible until the time limit is reached.

Name: Cosplay Maker

Name: Fate of Dynasty
About: A short lore exploration puzzle game inspired by walking simulators such as Gone Home, Dear Esther, and Layers of Fear.

Name: Escape from Labyrinth

Name: Furry Shakespeare: Dashing Dinosaurs & Sexy Centaurs: Winter's Tale

About: A shoot'em up, with focus on choice and progressiveness, so you can choose between a wide selection of weapons, and upgrade them becoming way more powerfull as you play.Big multi-phase bosses and a dramatic story.

Name: Virtual Sports

Play with friends, jump into a quick game online, or tackle career mode versus a spectrum of opponents in far ranging venues. Challenge your skills with realistic physics, or play in Fun Mode to get a boost in accuracy while you learn.

Name: Undead vs Plants

The bullets bounce off everywhere, but players should be careful to aim well and not use too many of the bullets. The game is easy to handle, but hard to master and it is a real brain training pastime fun.

Name: Late photographer 2 free
About: Game type: This is an easy shooting game.

Name: Isolation
About: The plague destroyed the world you once knew. This unknown bacteria destroyed the lives of many people who lived in various countries around the world. When the plague was first identified by doctors, researchers started working on a cure immediately. The infected people were transported into hospitals to isolate them from other people.

Name: Kitrinos: Inside the Cube
About: Kitrinos is a 1st person adventure game reminicent of Myst or Zork, part of the Black Cube series (ASA: A Space Adventure...). Play as an archaeologist who's forced to pass brain challenges to prove the value of his people.

Name: Dear Brother

Whatever it is, it seems so oddly… familiar. Explore with Audrey as she tries to work out the mysteries of her missing memories.

Name: AstronTycoon
About: Take the role of an astronomer exploring the depths of the universe. Build large telescopes to explore distant stars. Discover a habitable planet or an unknown anomaly in a far corner of the galaxy. Get scientific grants, publish your results and explore new technologies.

Name: BlackShield: Upora Story

Flaming battlefield, Dazzling scenery, menacing enemies and your brunette comrade fight along with you!

Name: 困兽TrappedBeast

Name: Snoody: One of the Ayrie

Explore distant worlds, study elemental magic, collect crystals and defeat monsters! Save the people of ayrie and find out, who is responsible for their troubles.

Name: Betelgeuse
About: Betelgeuse is a mind-bending puzzle game where simple rules create complicated puzzles. At the beginning it should be easy for everyone, but later on it's getting really challenging. It consists of six chapters where rules are completely different.

Name: TCM RACING 2
About: A car sandbox game with no true goals laid out. It's up for you to decide what you want to do!

Name: Tidal Shock: Off The Hook
About: Tidal Shock: Off the Hook is a free to play, gravity-defying PvP shooter for 2-12 players! Hunt down foes on high-speed torpedoes, Outmaneuver rivals with 360° tactics, and master 4 high-stakes game modes in sprawling underwater arenas. Always free to play, never pay to win!

Name: RETNE

Name: My Sudoku

Name: Absolute Blue

Name: 럭키 스태미나

Name: Das Balkonzimmer
About: Discover the balcony room, brand new, totally different!

Name: The Pyramid Of Bones
About: In The Pyramid of Bones you will have to kill as many mummies as you can, when feeling overwhelmed you must always extract through a door to keep your score. Become the greatest mummy slayer of them all!

Name: Origin of Decay

Name: Corpse disaster-survivors
About: In another failed invasion plan you were caught in a storm Cut off contact with friends who have worked together for many years The city was thrown into a mess by the explosion of the laboratory and the spread of the virus You are blocked by many virus-infected creatures and enemies

Name: Cybercontrol
About: A third-person game

Name: Stream Arenas

Name: Endure Island

Name: Heart of Enya

About: The Remainder is a dark fantasy mystery where you will try to save The High Magus Vyn from certain death. Will you find your way alone or will you reignite a lost love? Is it worth the sacrifice? Do you deserve to be saved?

Name: Fish
About: It is a clicker game where you feed the fish. Click on the screen to feed the fish. You can get new fish every 3 hours.

Name: Sacred Saga Online
About: Sacred Saga Online is a free-to-play MMORPG set in a fantasy world with astonishing 3D graphic design and very good and varied soundtrack.

Name: Wonky Pigeon!
About: Engage in the craziest war against humans.. as a pigeon! Use famous war tactics such as engagement, avoiding and target fixing to center unlucky people with poo and get points for that.

Name: Gulf Echoes: Tent of Treason
About: Embark on a co-op puzzle journey rooted in the Arab gulf region. Grab a friend and unravel tales from the past. You and your partner must bridge time, sharing clues to unveil hidden truths. Solve intricate puzzles from the present to the past.

Name: Chunks

Name: Alex's Hope & Alex's Solitude
About: A boy regains his hope and a girl finds herself in solitude. A kinetic novel that will take you through their darkest days and immerse you in their deepest emotions.

Name: 小游戏世界(中国版)
About: Notice: public beta was launched in August 15th, and currently only the Chinese version and the Chinese server are available.

Name: UCOPIA
About: This is a story about art, profit, and friendship.

Name: Name The Song Quiz
About: Guess name of the song! Contest with friends and family, up to 18 local players. Play in teams. Use your favorite songs.

Name: Dawn of the Dragons: Ascension
About: The Great Dragon War has returned to the land of Tor'gyyl in this challenging turn based RPG. Engage in strategic turn based combat, join friends in challenging and unique guild activities, and embark on an adventurous journey to save the kingdom from the fiery doom of the fearsome war dragons!

Name: Amigo Fishing
About: Experience a majestic tide of fish. Amigo Fishing is a VR game about hunting for fish in the deep sea. The game is set in a mysterious deep-sea region bursting with coral and aquatic life. In the game, you can choose different equipment and weapons and use different kinds of ammunition.

Name: Liminus: The Silent Guard
About: Souls on their perilous journey through the afterlife are left defenseless against the hungry darkness without the protective guidance of the Shepherds. Locate your flock, protect them from wolves, and guide them safely back home with your array of abilities and powers in Liminus: The Silent Guard.

Name: Snotty's Sewer
About: Welcome to Mr Snotty's Sewer! Stealthy explore an abandoned sewer, collect items and activate the only escape in this small indie horror! Just don't get caught by Mr Snotty or any of his friends!

Name: Apocalypse: 2.0 Edition
About: Apocalypse: 2.0 Edition is an extremely fast paced shooter, which mixes several modern mechanics into the classic zombie survival experience. This includes an economy; item looting; item management; quests; stats; and much more! Completely free with Steam.

Name: Deity Driving
About: An adventure car game. A pleasure trip. A dubious method to get rid of superfluous braincells. Deity Driving!

Name: GuiGui
About: GuiGui is a clicker game where you click on a cute character named GuiGui! Every 3 hours, you get a random character item from the GuiGui universe. Each item is an original creation by the renowned Korean webtoon artist and oil painter, GuiGui(귀귀). Join us and be part of something fantastic!

Name: Familia
About: Familia follows four protagonists through a journey to retake their homeland. The game’s style is highly influenced by 90s-style Japanese role-playing games like Final Fantasy 1-6.

Name: Muscle Magic
About: Muscle Magic is a local multiplayer brawler in which you play as powerful, muscular wizards and barrage your opponents with a variety of wacky spells. Grab up to 3 of your friends and duke it out to see who is truly the fittest mage of them all!

Name: 三国群英之兵临天下
About: 《三国群英之兵临天下》是一款以三国为题材，集策略及养成卡牌为一体的热血战争游戏。游戏采用写实的三国画风，贴合历史的故事剧 情，完美还原三国经典战役。收集培养武将、多重兵种类型、不同阵型随心搭配。点将史诗战场，无敌军团征伐，PVP真实对抗。一策谋定天下，名将任君调遣！

Name: Dolphin Swim
About: Dolphin Swim. A simple experience in seeing how long you can last navigating a zig zag path.

Name: Letters
About: Letters is a clicker game where you click a letter to get more letters! Every 3 hours you can get 4 common letters, Every 5 hours you can get 2 uncommon letters and every 24 hours you get a rare letter.

Name: My Summer Adventure: Memories of Another Life — Day 1
About: A strange incident turns the life of an ordinary young man upside down when, having fallen asleep on a regular train commute, he wakes up in another country... in a body of a Japanese student! An unforgettable summer adventure awaits, promising many fateful meetings and momentous occasions.

Name: SightLineVR
About: The laws of physics ensure that your perception of the world stays consistent. But what if those laws were broken? You'll find yourself in a surreal world where everything changes the moment you look away.

Name: 貴方が狼カードデス！
About: Accuse and execute the owner of the werewolf card. It's a 5-minute round of a repeated death game in the werewolf genre.

Name: ARC TCG
About: ARC TCG is a 3D fantasy card game. Build your deck and challenge other players in battles full of surprises. Play smart and crush your opponents with powerful abilities. This game is inspired by more successful TCG titles, but adapted to offer new game strategies.

Name: Cleo's Lost Idols
About: Cleo's Lost Idols is a comedy sandbox physics game where you command workers to create mayhem! Emit fire and lightning, squirt water jets, push boulders and dodge fire traps whilst trying to find the missing statue pieces. There's an in-built video creator and tools to upload straight to YouTube.

Name: Warlock Bentspine - Toilet Edition
About: It's a bleak sunny day in Stinker City and Warlock Bentspine and his corrupt mayor friend Burger Jeff are plotting new schemes to raise taxes on the paupers. Their diabolical scheming is soon interrupted however when a bomb goes off in a local news station. Looks like Crime Gang is at it once again.

Name: Survival Horror #8,436
About: A first-person survival horror game

Name: Treasure Adventure Game
About: Treasure Adventure Game casts you in the role of a young boy who lands on an island that is a fragment of what was once a continent, destroyed in the war between a demon and a wizard.

Name: MetaDOS
About: MetaDOS is the next-gen battle royale game using the Time-as-currency concept. The players will fight on the island, loot the Time from their enemies and be the last man standing.

Name: Journey
About: One day, Maaya accidentally brought home an object that would soon bring misfortune to her family, especially her younger sister. Join her as she unravels the mystery behind it.

Name: MewMew - PewPew
About: Dinosaurs have invaded MewMew’s home and now it's time for him to pick up his trusty old meteor gun and send them right back to extinction. Keep your combo as high as possible and get stronger with items and powerups as you try to gain highscores in this chaotic 2D horde shooter.

Name: FPSBois
About: Hey, it's ya bois: FPS Bois! That online military shooter feel without the big corporate pricetag!

Name: OBSCURIA
About: After the largest cruise ship in the world suffered a shipwreck and was invaded by ghosts, you must find Captain Blackhood after he disappeared, enter the great Nocturne and investigate all the secrets and mysteries.

Name: Destiny Online
About: Destiny Online is a 2D Fantasy MMORPG and offers free-to-play access. Pet System: Capture monsters, make them pets, and have them aid you in combat. Character Dressing up System: Freely DIY your favorite style with hairstyles, headwear, clothes, back accessories, and tails.

Name: Kingdoms In Chaos
About: Kingdoms In Chaos is an open world faction PVP MMO. Influenced by old school MMO's like Ultima Online. Choose from 3 races and battle for Brittania's riches! Travel anywhere, Hunt, Explore, Quest or form a war party and destroy your enemies. Form a guild and become Lord of a town!

Name: Vivez Versailles
About: 'Experience Versailles' invites you to live two historical events that took place at the Palace of Versailles : the visit of the siamese ambassadors during Louis XIV's reign, and the Yew Tree Ball, organized by Louis XV.

Name: Brother Perro
About: Play with 'P.', a mystery character trying to figure out what's going on in this 'dream'. Who to trust? Apparently, not the dog.

Name: Freakshow:Anniversary
About: The circus is back in town! Come have some fun at the Freakshow circus! What will you discover?

Name: Catching
About: Caching is a game of chase in a restaurant. Be a bully, mess up a restaurant, or be a restaurant manager to stop it. Caching provides multiplayer for up to six people.

Name: Moonlight Mansion
About: A mother and her son uncover the mystery shrouding the manor in which they are imprisoned. To escape, they need to cooperate without letting panic take over, while the manor – or what haunts it – tries to separate them. In this suspenseful game, will you be able to accept the truths revealed to you?

Name: Traveler's Bastion
About: A horde survival and tower defense mashup. Guard your traveling castle from an imperial army trying to hunt you down. Combine elemental bending styles and theorycraft the perfect set of game-breaking ability chains.

Name: orz
About: You are at point 0. Therefore, you need to go to point 1.

Name: Legend of the Sword Saint
About: 经典重现，经久不衰，装备无限自由打，神装满地爆！在这款MMORPG游戏中，你将与同伴尽情冒险，成就一段强者的热血传奇传奇之路。

Name: Erin's Naughty Friday Prologue
About: Erin's Naughty Friday is an ENF (embarrassed nude female) game where Erin suddenly finds herself stuck naked! This is fun, lighthearted adult game where all activities are consensual and there is no serious violence. The prologue contains no sexual situations.

Name: Xenosis
About: Xenosis is a thrilling metroidvania where you traverse an ancient temple that has been overrun by alien creatures. Armed with your blaster, you must combat a variety of challenging enemies and upgrade your weapon to escape

Name: Lil' Arena
About: We Break the Mold of online PvP games. Customize your Avatars, Draft your Abilities and Engage in 6-minute-short, free-for-all Matches in the Afterlife!

Name: Wrecked: Get Your Ship Together
About: Wrecked is a whimsical exploration game filled with spaceships, fax machines, and hamster-powered engines. Transform your couch into a hovership and transition seamlessly from inside to outside, across landscapes, and into space with no teleportation. Are you ready to get your ship together?

Name: 神魔决之九黎剑EA
About: 该游戏是一款独立制作的仙侠风格的战棋角色扮演游戏，游戏的故事围绕一把魔剑展开，神秘人盗走了封印在门派中的魔剑，为了找回魔剑，主角弈剑秋离开门派，途中遇到女主顾梦瑶，随后二人一起展开一段冒险。

Name: am i the baddie?
About: Fetch some friends for fun, fast online multiplayer. One of you is the baddie! Everybody else is trying to find the baddie. The baddie is invisible. At least, most of the time...

Name: Life of Lon: Chapter 1
About: Life of Lon is a science fantasy adventure game starring you as Lon. Your journey will take you to the stars, beneath an alien ocean, and through time. A beautiful and curious creature named Yep will accompany you on your travels- aiding you in unlocking the mysteries of Paracosma.

Name: Zquirrels Jump
About: Why do Zquirrels Jump? Why do they risk their health and life? In the name and glory of the one and only true love. The love for peanuts! Join the Zquirrels, strap in and jump. You have only a few seconds before the nuts hit the ground. Make us proud, jump now!

Name: Realm Engine | Virtual Tabletop
About: Realm Engine is a system-agnostic Tabletop world builder that supports both building and running your choice of role-playing game.

Name: FEEBLE
About: FEEBLE is an interactive simulation game. Meet FEEBLE, the only surviving character in the village devastated by the epidemic, and save FEEBLE from the Grim Reaper. Look around the village, use various puzzles to protect from the Grim Reaper and save the FEEBLE.

Name: The Wendigo
About: The Wendigo - is a first person investigation horror game set in a Victorian era mansion, located in the heart of a forest. You must rely on your instinct and intuition to survive the horrors that lie within. With tools to aid you, you will seek answers, but will you survive?

Name: Broken Blue
About: Broken Blue is a Puzzle Solving VR Game that utilizes an innovative interface to allow the player to traverse and explore the game’s content. Blue is supposed to be the guardian of a mountain machine and the protector of the monkey monks who dwell there.

Name: Fatal Velocity: Physics Combat
About: Fatal Velocity: Physics Combat is a multiplayer first person physics combat smasher where speed and the environment are literally your weapons! Players utilize physics based weaponry and abilities to overcome, thrash and smash their opponents with extreme speeds into oblivion!

Name: Starling
About: Starling is a student made third person base-building exploration game. As an employee of Starling Corp., your mission is to gather resources from across the galaxy. After an unexpected turn of events, you will need to rebuild your base while being assisted by adorable creatures known as starlings.

Name: Adventure Slime
About: Adventure Slime is a 2-D side-scrolling platformer where a slime traverses through a magical forest in their quest to find the bounciest mushroom room. Avoid noxious goop as you spring from mushroom to mushroom, collecting shiny golden leaves, and enjoy the casual atmosphere and catchy music.

Name: Nightfall
About: Social deduction for 4-12 players where the Humans must find the Werewolves and vote them out before they transform at night! Use equipment such as Invisibility, Blood Test & Camera and gather evidence to use to vote out others. Features special player roles.

Name: Reaplaced
About: A supernatural Halloween whodunnit. Solve a chilling locked-room mystery before the grim reaper reveals the answer!

Name: Casual Spider Solitaire
About: A Spider Solitaire card game, with hints.

Name: ColorCoordination
About: ColorCoordination is a puzzle game where you match colored blocks and spaces by moving them in unison. Explore deep, philosophical topics with your AI Assistant 'CoCo' and discover more about its purpose - all while solving a myriad of colorful brainteasers!

Name: Grow Big (or Go Home): Ultimate Edition
About: Play as Bruce, the world's most talented indoor gardener, in this 2D pixel-art puzzle game. Through now 30+ fast-paced levels, you will travel to different locations and eras in order to water, light, and tend to plants with the high-tech magic of a watering can and a reflective mirror.

Name: Rivalhearts
About: Join Noah in his first year of university as he decides to overcome his heartache, pursuing either a tomboy classmate, gorgeous doctor, or junior-year goth!

Name: Just Chatting
About: Just Chatting is a simple 2d platformer for adults.

Name: Nexus Rumble: The Ultimate Showdown
About: Welcome to Nexus Rumble, the ultimate showdown where champions clash in a fierce competition for survival! Prepare to embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey through diverse landscapes and exhilarating challenges in this heart-pounding multiplayer extravaganza.

Name: Exhibitors
About: Deep within the clouds of a gas giant, supermassive creatures occupy the sky, each exhibiting an ecosystem. Exhibitors is a Factory building game with elements of farming and exploration.

Name: cyber_serpent
About: slither and shoot, but don't run out of space! cyber_serpent is an arcade twin-stick shooter combined with snake. compete for a global high score in this modern take on retro classics as you face infinite waves of polygonal enemies.

Name: Stunt Legends
About: Drift, speed and all sorts of stunts await you in this unique and innovative game. The realism of the details will envelop you until you feel the movement of the pistons in your bones. Stunt Legends is an explosion of colors and adrenaline. Speed and fun with no limits.

Name: ACROBATIC CAR
About: Monster-Truck stunts 'inspired by Elasto-Mania'

Name: My Lil' Donut
About: Before you lies your Donut. You can pull and twist it, snap and swish it. You have a whole arsenal of settings, presets and tools to play with. You can freeze it, relax it, save any contortion to be viewed later. You can even rip it apart so it returns to the void from which it came.

Name: Rolando The Majestic
About: Become Rolando the Majestic and find out how he became the most powerful wizard to ever live! Explore parallel levels using magic and time-travel in a stealth based narrative adventure in order to take vengance against the men who took everything from him as a child.

Name: Louma
About: Louma is a Roguelike Dungeon Crawler. Fight through the procedural generated floors and save the World of Louma.

Name: Jurig Escape
About: Jurig Escape is a 15-minute Free Third-Person Survival Horror game. You will play as the unnamed high-schooler trapped in a looping nightmare: An 'empty' school with a revolver in your hand. Shoot the ghost and collect lost souls and escape this never-ending nightmare.

Name: 新月大陆
About: On the Continent, girls gather at the Magic Academy where they learn magic and combat skills,and embark on various adventures. An ancient prophecy circulates within the academy: when the new moon rises again, the world will face an unprecedented crisis, and only the academy girls can save it.

Name: Test Subject 901
About: Trudge through haunting halls and desolate rooms, teleport through the darkness and hide in the shadows as you plan your escape. Feel your heart race as your doom looms ever closer. Find a way out before your fate is sealed.

Name: Bite Sized Puzzle
About: Bite Sized Puzzle is a point and click puzzle game about investigating your kitchen to see what secrets it holds!

Name: Solenars Edge Heroes
About: Answer the call and fight! Choose your side-kick and form a team from over 60 playable characters as you fight to become the greatest Hero in all of Alcornagia.

Name: Turbo Shot
About: Turbo Shot combines a puzzle-filled top-down adventure with exciting gun-based combat that plays out in regular seasons of free-to-play single player and PvP content.

Name: 星影の館殺人事件
About: 1935年の洋館を舞台に織り成す、レトロな雰囲気の怪異ホラーミステリーアドベンチャー

Name: SLEEPOVER
About: In SLEEPOVER, you're either the Slasher, or the Homeowner. The Slasher is loud and has a knife, but the Homeowner is quiet and can grab the Slasher from behind. After the police are called, they arrive in three minutes. SLEEPOVER, a Slasher simulator.

Name: Flight 787 - Advanced
About: Flight 787 - Advanced +3.000.000 mobile platforms downloaded as legal. Now on PC and MAC platforms. We are target more advancing with your recommendations and ideas.

Name: Crafting Block World
About: Crafting Block World is an adventure with sandbox elements that will help you build your ideal world!

Name: Dropkick Navvy: First Step
About: Dropkick Navvy: First Step is a physics-based crafting/survival sim. Help the World Tree rebuild the broken cosmos as the responsibility falls upon you. Scurry through diverse landscapes, gather essential resources, and build your way towards finding the eternal source of water for the World Tree.

Name: bearcycle
About: bearcycle® combines fast-paced motorcycle racing with wacky platforming madness. Grind, grapple, and rocket your way through the story mode—or create your own custom levels & share them online!

Name: Duck Duck Goose
About: Fight your friends as ducks and geese with explosive weaponry in this frantic top-down, local multiplayer shooter as a crowd of royal birds overlooks your bloodshed. Avoid a humiliating death in the royal court using Rocket Launchers, Explosive Snipers, Grenade Launchers, and Cannons.

Name: tug-of-war
About: A simple one-button clicker game. Play a tug-of-war as a witch trying to use cute cats as her familiars! The pixel-style pictures and lively 8-bit music are the attractive points.

Name: Necromonads
About: Space Colony Alert Bulletin! The Necromonads are at it again!! Colonists must in a orderly fashion proceed to the nearest shelter while the highly trained star pilot provides cover. Inspired by classic arcade shooters but with a twist. Captured colonists become infected and spread it to others. stop the Necromonads infection invasion now!

Name: Last Days
About: Save or enslave? 'Last Days' is a survival, zombie, horror, rpg game where every choice matters and will affect you long term.

Name: Lords of War
About: Lords of War is a fast-paced strategic card game that supports real-time PvP battles. Although game design may resemble turn-based TCG/CCG games, game mechanics is more like a real-time 3D card-based roleplaying game – this combination provides an entirely new gaming experience.

Name: Finding Cinderella
About: A lighthearted game about love and murder.

Name: Antiflux
About: Antiflux is a challenging but fun puzzle platformer with upgrades, building complexity over time.

Name: Mana Maker
About: Magic is a wonderful thing, so why not make more? In Mana Maker, your goal is to make mana so you can conjure minions to do it for you! Once you conjure Cthulhu you may ascend and unlock even more possibilities!

Name: GonzoVR
About: GonzoVR is a live real-world VR social hangout app where you can watch and chat in real time with streamers during scheduled broadcasts, collaboratively control a VR camera by driving it around on an RC car, and interact with elements of the real world, including buying dog treats for Gonzo.

Name: The Grandmaster
About: “Hit When Thou Can Hit, Don’t Hit When Thou Can’t Hit” is the name of the game here. Your job as the Grand Master is to send those pesky ninjas flying. This is a simple game, and while it’s drawn in pencil art, it’s an amazing addition to your Steam collection.

Name: Solar Panic: Utter Distress
About: Solar Panic is a first-person comedy adventure game. Follow a true story that we made up and explore exotic places filled with funny and/or stupid encounters. Wield top-notch gadgets and meet weird and socially awkward characters as you stumble upon a SERIOUS mystery.

Name: Cartesian
About: Cartesian is a unique puzzle-platformer with lasers as its core mechanic. Use lasers to reflect, push, destroy, and more as you search for your lost crew-mates. Dozens of interesting mechanics are introduced through over 70 varied levels.

Name: Ding Dong Dang
About: Ding Dong Dang is the most interesting casual MMO game! Series of the Crayon Shin-chan are waiting for discovery! There are three islands here to explore. Each island has its own style. Double fun to invite friends to play together! Ding Dong Dang will definitely bring you infinite happiness!

Name: Singularity Runner
About: How good a runner are you? Compete against other players in the ranking of the best runners.

Name: Blanket Heavy With Nightmares
About: Blanket Heavy With Nightmares is an art installation created By Finnish artist Suvi Solkio in cooperation with Kajaani Art Museum and Kajaani University of Applied Sciences.

Name: revere
About: 'revere' is a psychological found footage horror game where every detail matters. Prepare yourself for an experience where your sanity will be condemned.

Name: SgyuinBaldo
About: 学生制作の本格アクションゲーム！ 魔族にすべてを奪われた男性バルドと魔族を恨む魔族の女性シギュン。二人は復讐のために手を取り合った。 主人公バルドを操作し魔族たちを蹂躙せよ。 全ての力を使って家族を奪った魔族たちに復讐を果たせ！

Name: Frogs
About: Frogs is a collectible game where you click, fight, and upgrade farms to collect more different items. Equip mythical and legendary frogs to level up faster, sell them on the market, and just collect them. Dive into this adventure with us!

Name: Hermit Home Designer
About: Yamasen-Chan is a hikikomori who lives in isolation and never leaves her home. Will you help her make a comfy home in this hikikomori themed visual novel designing game?

Name: Romp of Dump
About: Visual novel fully animated in Live2D, Observing Scum Prisoners! In a prison called a dump, a betting card game among dangerous prisoners begins. Penalty game for the losers! Uncover the hidden pasts and bizarre crimes of these lunatics!

Name: Infinity Heroes
About: Infinity Heroes is a simultaneous turn-based collectible hero card game. Features PC & Mobile crossplay, a single player Roguelike Adventure and Infinite Customization via name and card art replacement of every card with any image on your computer.

Name: Highway Madness
About: Highway Madness is a social VR game where you get to play with old and new friends from all over the world! Pick your character then choose from a selection of fun games including Standoff, Road Crossing, Roof jumping and Shootout! So what are you waiting for? Come on in and join the Madness!

Name: Tank Brawl 2: Armor Fury
About: Satisfy your need of destruction by smashing armor vehicles to pieces in spectacular fashions during the epic 4 players co-op campaign. Vehicles and drivers have unique upgrades and class combination. Multiple weapons such as laser beam, giant hammer, Mech's katana.

Name: Chimera Island
About: Rediscover a lost island with mysterious creatures the world has long since forgotten. Now it is up to you to help restore this ruined world and bring about a new age of Chimera.

Name: Secrets of Deep Earth Shrine
About: Dig your own path in this quirky strategy platformer. Use traps to defeat monsters, blow apart your environment, and collect treasure!

Name: Bike Dash Excite!
About: Check out this simple motorcycle racing minigame created with Pixel Game Maker MV! Tame your wild and jacked-up bike to fly through the various stages and rub your awesome clear times in your opponents’ faces!

Name: The Showdown Effect: Reloaded
About: Experience fast-paced over-the-top multiplayer action in The Showdown Effect: Reloaded. Join players from around the world to engage in high-octane battles filled with bullets, explosions, and one-liners!

Name: Punchline!!
About: Punchline!! is a slice-of-life comedy visual novel. Enter the not-so-sane daily life of an eccentric, good-for-nothing bum with an unhealthy interest in peculiar conspiracies and a snarky, cynical part-time drunk as they navigate the weird and wacky city of Noo Yawk.

Name: Cubey Quarry
About: Mine ores, smelt or grind, get money, build your quarry and repeat.In this small free to play game you slowly build up a quarry, either with your friends or by yourself, it's a perfect game to have running in the background and checking up on every once in a while.

Name: Fap&Click
About: Welcome to the Fap&Click world. Fap&Click is a new, breathtaking clicker with elements of a collection game. Here your main task will be to click on a gorgeous Anime girl, gather coins and collect cards. Click, enlarge your collection and remember to put your hands on the table. See you in the game.

Name: Hammer Kid
About: A charming pixel art platform adventure, reminiscent of the good old 16-bit days. Served as the foundation for the retro-platformer Tiny Thor.

Name: Entropic Float: This World Will Decay And Disappear
About: A free drama-mystery visual novel with a modern fantasy setting. Reach out to the fourteen people trapped inside to find the truth through eighteen endings, influenced by but not exclusively bound to your own system time.

Name: Deck of the Dead
About: 'Deck of the Dead' is a thrilling roguelike deckbuilder game set in a dark, mysterious world of vampires. Players will take on the role of a powerful vampire on a quest for ultimate power as they build their deck, defeat enemies, and explore a randomly generated world filled with danger and secrets.

Name: Hero Rush: Mad King
About: An exciting game in which you will need to capture enemy cities, strengthen their economy, study all sorts of science and magic that will help your army defeat your enemies.

Name: 梧州旅行家
About: This game is a city travel game with a 3D simulation of walking and flying as its theme. The game features high-quality city scenes and a controllable weather system, providing perfect visual effects for players.

Name: Google Spotlight Stories: Piggy
About: A jogging pig meets a delicious cake. Will he give in to temptation? Not while you’re watching! Google Spotlight Stories presents Piggy VR, a new level of interaction between character and audience. Directed by Jan Pinkava & Mark Oftedal. Produced with Evil Eye Pictures.

Name: Sand to Surf
About: Gain and maintain speed as you surf the treacherous sands of an ancient desert to rescue your world in this blend of the extreme sport and adventure gameplay genres.

Name: Science Girls
About: This game is a classic memory game with several levels of difficulty and beautiful arts. Enjoy ;-)

Name: Railroad Tracks
About: Railroad tracks is a 2D exploration based adventure game about a lonely circus artist who has fallen into amnesia. As you venture through his surreal twilight world, unsettling memories start to return.

Name: Logout
About: Quinn is a citizen of the social media obsessed society of Outpost 72. As Quinn, send messages and emojis to others in the city to affect their behavior. Use these methods to solve puzzles, distract guards, and explore the world through the short narrative stealth action adventure game of LOGOUT.

Name: Coloring Book for Adults 2 - Family Edition
About: Color your way to serenity in Coloring Book for Adults 2! Dive into a sea of vibrant shades, paint your stress away, and leaf through nature-inspired pages. From wild creatures to famous masterpieces, it’s time to make your mark!

Name: Pixel Puzzles World War II Jigsaw Puzzles
About: Pixel Puzzles, your number one place for digital jigsaws.

Name: Miya
About: The stunning warrior maiden gracefully dances through the battlefield, slicing through demons with her blade, collecting resources, unlocking stunning outfits, and embracing the ultimate thrill of action!

Name: Laserboy
About: Help Laserboy escape The Scientist's experimental vision facility without racking up a massive bill. 13 levels of mayhem and confusion in glorious CRT vision. Now with challenging new achievements!

Name: 阿达三国志2019  竖版 Three Kingdoms 2019
About: 最具人文气息的策略三国志游戏，正统得天下三国游戏的手机版本，三国志2013的正版续作。

Name: Planetary Planter
About: Planetary Planter is an open-world farming game where, instead of farming normal plants, you grow celestial bodies while exploring an alien world.

Name: η κλοπή του ΚΡΑΣΙΟΥ
About: Θα σωθεί άραγε φέτος το καρναβάλι της Ποταμιάς; Παίξε και δες!

Name: ESCAPE ROOM VR
About: This game is a VR escape game. Solve the mysteries in each stage and uncover the hidden truth.

Name: Tomorrow
About: Rescue your bunny from the hands of the artist known as Jaye!

Name: Romino's Adventure
About: A blocky puzzle platformer adventure.

Name: Deadly Station
About: Discover thet dark story of this space station and find a way out.

Name: Goat Massacre
About: Fight Satan’s demonic goat army as they storm through cursed portals. Kill goats that come out of gateways and face the Devil in an epic final battle. But even after victory, something stirs, and you realize the fight is far from over, with each return more brutal than the last.

Name: Panic Station VR
About: Panic Station VR is a VR FPS within 10 minutes of play time where you defeat the demons and head to your destination in a fictional modern world. Try to clear the game within the time limit using two guns and special skills.

Name: Daisy Dangerous
