Find friendship and love, learn about yourself and discover who you really are!

Name: Limbo Revolution
About: Limbo Revolution is a first-person shooter set in a 1980s Eastern European City ravaged by war. In this haunting world, you play as a stalker, battling and surviving against bandits, other stalkers and the military.

Name: Untitled Space Game
About: A retro space themed local multiplayer PvP game which prioritises skill over luck. Kill your friends, get better weapons, kill them more, repeat!

Name: Full-On Paintball
About: Best first person shooter paintball game simulation ever! 32 Players Dedicated Servers, 20+ Maps, 10 Gametypes, 20+ Weapons, Character & Weapon Customization, Skills and Ranks! Enjoy.

Name: Super Neat Cat
About: A retro style simple platforming adventure! A small cute cat must save their world from an ancient Nanobot Virus. Explore a beautiful pixel art land as you try and find the source of this destruction.

Name: Mercapolis
About: Build and manage your own supermarket. Place orders for seasonal products, stock them on the shelves, and get ready to survive a workday full of surprises. Hire employees and keep your customers happy in Mercapolis.

Name: ZaBaTa!
About: ZaBaTa! is an online multiplayer game where you must find human players hidden among AI NPCs. Blend in, complete missions, and most importantly - don't get caught! Play ZaBaTa! with friends for even more fun.

Name: CLeM: The First Attribute
About: CLeM: The First Attribute is a free prologue that offers the first loop of CLeM, a narrative-driven puzzle adventure game with a dark twist. Wake up in a world where puzzles intertwine with exploration, weaving a unique narrative rooted in alchemy.

Name: The Magic Storm
About: A hiddenobject game from 7-y.o. storyteller. The graphics are based on the works of a young artist.

Name: Stabby Cats
About: Fighting your fellow kitties with your incredible agility and arsenal of sharp weaponry in this 2D action game! Toss knives, climb around mansions, and stab your friends to see who will be rewarded the coveted golden yarn!

Name: HUMANS CONNECT
About: STORY TELLING BOSS RUSH. Humans, animals, or both. What and who are they? In a world known to be inhabited by both. Beings more than humans and animals. Shrouded in mystery. Connected either through mythology or paranormal. Discover through the narrative of 'HUMANS CONNECT'

Name: UBERCOLD
About: A stylish parody game featuring an unconventional weapon.

Name: 揭谛/GATE
About: GATE is a text-based furry homo romance game developed by NVL maker, in which the player will play the role of the protagonist to 'break the system' as an opportunity to establish a relationship with the furries and find a way to achieve peace between races.

Name: Skylost
About: Skylost is a 3D exploration and crafting game where you climb and glide your way through dangerous floating islands in search of your lost love Amelia.

Name: Dreamkeeper
About: You play as Marshmallow, the cute little pet of a girl named Ava who wants to become a heroine and save her village from the Nightmares. To protect her you use magical bullets, tarot-cards and try to find your very own playstyle to unlock the story and get the highest score!

Name: Blink: Rogues
About: An EXTREMELY DIFFICULT Shmup that will ruthlessly challenge your abilities by requiring extreme precision, top notch reflexes and solid enemy mapping. Engage in short and intense levels, switch battle direction, teleport between lanes, steal loot and combo your way to Victory!

Name: Luxaren Allure
About: The evil overlord is the hero's girlfriend?! Fantasy RPG featuring WLW romance. Explore the Isles of Luxaren with a cast of gay ladies!

Name: Real-Time Assist Replay Time　～1 minute until closing～
About: This is an original slot-style mini-game set in the future where you've hit the ultra-high-speed, high-purity increase, endless ART just one minute before closing! Try to collect as much as possible before time runs out!

Name: Hot Squat 2: New Glory
About: Welcome back to Flynn Fitness! Prepare for an intense leg workout with this overhauled squatting experience. Compete to do as many squats as you can, create your own custom workout routines, unlock flashy cosmetic items, try out a brand new exercise, and more...all while supporting charity!

Name: 街机三国
About: 全新的街机三国故事，高度还原街机经典场景。街机三国演绎出你心中的武将，超高契合度的人物形象，帅的美的你爱的，统统都可以收入你阵中。巧妙搭配武将技能，摆脱阵容限制，名将也能逆袭！ 游戏用APRG的模型代替了原有的街机，使游戏更有乐趣，更有深度。

Name: Drag Her!
About: Drag Her! Failure to Launch Edition is a skinny version of our fast, fabulous and frenetic 2D fighter. Featuring a roster of real-life drag royalty, including the iconic Alaska 5000, Kim Chi & Laganja Estranja.

Name: WHERE SAFETY ENDS *R*
About: What does it take to be SAFE? Maybe it's all about a person who will come to your rescue no matter what. Or maybe it has to do with a place that you know inside and out. OR, perhaps, (just maybe) a room full of strangers with no entrance might just do the trick.

Name: Diorama Worlds
About: Build and Explore worlds with a growing library of tiles and objects. Simple to use, easy to learn, fast to build.

Name: Pearls of Atlantis: The Cove
About: Color match in a whole new way! Drop, pop, swap and match magic pearls to collect the charms inside and rebuild the hidden Cove of Memories!

Name: Tobit
About: A relaxing walking simulator game with biblical narration from the book of Tobit. Relive a narrated biblical story of Tobit in an engaging forest environment.

Name: Endersite
About: Enter a new world where you can BATTLE YOUR FRIENDS TO THE DEATH, or team up with them TO TAKE DOWN A FOE. In this new game made by Lilkkgoog you can battle on 6 different maps in which you unlock them slowly. Or go into the single player mode to break targets

Name: Loop
About: One day, all of a sudden, Sora finds out that the elevator is connected to her room On her usual way to work. She tries to find a way to escape this endless Loop. Your choices will be a matter

Name: Desperate ESCAPE
About: Ted Williams, who has been sheltering in a school bunker for three years after a rocket attack, now has to escape due to a lack of food supplies. To do this, he has to solve his self-constructed puzzles and obstacles that were supposed to prevent him from escaping the bunker.

Name: Nonogram Kingdom
About: Come play Nonogram Kingdom, a world where you can explore a whole range of different places by solving nonogram puzzles and unlock amazing prizes that allow you to customize your game. These puzzles are fun and a great way to keep your brain active and to challenge yourself daily.

Name: Nearly Friendly Tribes
About: Dive into the future of gaming and wield your own arsenal of weapons against adversaries. Most importantly, revel in the chaos of possibilities that the weapons provide in this new type of game and have an absolute blast!

Name: Alice Through the Fey Realm
About: Alice Through the Fey Realm is an enchanting isometric narrative adventure that puts you into the shoes of Alice. A compelling adventure unfolds as you awaken in the mysterious Fey Realm and embark on a quest to discover the key to your journey home.

Name: The Pentest
About: The Pentest is a first-person puzzle game. You play as a pentestor in charge of the security audit of the space station Achero 410. You will have to use your gear and skills to detect all the flaws and complete your mission.

Name: NecroCity: Prologue
About: NecroCity: Prologue is just part of the gameplay that awaits you in the full version of the game. Take on the role of the young Prince of Undead, trying to prove himself in the world of the Undead Kingdom. Push back the hordes of monsters and build your fortress! 🔥

Name: Dark Forest: Lost Story VR
About: In this horror game we will tell you truthful stories about demons and ghosts.

Name: Nightfall
About: Nightfall is a top down sci-fi game with turn based combat. After waking up on a strange world without any recollection of your past, you must explore, fight, and survive in order to rediscover your memories and find out why, and by whom they were taken away.

Name: Road to Top G
About: Survive waves of zombies, collect perks, unlock boss door, and face the Top G in an intense showdown.

Name: Holiday Escape
About: Holiday Escape is a casual game in which you play a snowman trying to outrun a large snow ball while grabbing as many ornaments and presents as possible to spread holiday cheer.

Name: PAL
About: A new mission awaits completion. Will you listen to PAL? Maintain your engine, lights, and oxygen levels while avoiding PAL and navigating towards destination

Name: Hide and go boom
About: 'Bomberman' without 'Bomberman' in the title, and in first person. Just like the good old days, this is a fast paced, easy to learn, short game time, addicting gameplay with many fun hours to be had. Best played with friends

Name: Tanuki Justice
About: Tanuki Justice is an action-packed run 'n gun (but with shurikens) platformer. Take on the role of a cute yet ruthless raccoon and take out various foes charging you from every angle. Play alone or, for double the fun, invite a friend, for there are many challenges to overcome together!

Name: EnviroGolf
About: A short environmentally savvy text-based golf game.

Name: Ynglet: Prologue
About: Ynglet: Prologue presents the first levels of my new game Ynglet! You’ll jump between bubbles that float in the sky like you’re a space dolphin, as you melt into a highly reactive and dynamic soundtrack created by Ynglet’s custom (and needlessly complicated) music software!

Name: MASKA
About: Welcome to the new virtual reality! Metaverse Maska is a home to interesting people, fun parties, exploration and fulfilling relationships! You create your own world, from your unique persona to their exciting adventures.

Name: They That Feast
About: They That Feast is a cosmic / Lovecraftian horror game in which your enemies can't simply be observed by the naked eye. Can you walk the line between sanity and survival?

Name: Forgotten Symphony
About: In der Zukunft hat man es sicherlich nicht einfach, oder? Der Klimawandel, übermächtige Konzerne, totale Überwachung... Ellie versucht ein ganz normales Leben zu führen, als sich ein ihr unbekannter Hacker Zutritt zu ihrem Hirnchip verschafft und anfängt ihren Körper zu übernehmen.

Name: Sacred Siren
About: Sacred Siren is a psychedelic virtual reality experience created for ᔕᙡᓮᙢ ᔕᗢᘎᒪᔕ's debut album, '𝔾𝕠𝕕𝕕𝕖𝕤𝕤', released on Business Casual.

Name: Latent Experience
About: Latent Technology's first tech demo. A journey through different worlds built with Generative Physics Animation technology, featuring, for the very first time, fully physical and interactive characters.

Name: Rama's Quest
About: Rama's Quest is an action survival game rooted in Hindu mythology. Invoke divine powers from the gods in your custom builds as you face waves of Rakshasa demons.

Name: Hoverloop
About: Hoverloop is a multiplayer arena shooter that features customizable hover drones in high-speed combat. Players take their mechanized gladiators into a battle for glory across a multitude of maps and gametypes. Flaunt your skill & your style!

Name: Farm Wars
About: Farm Wars is a real-time PVP strategy game where you compete to outwit your rivals. Plant crops during the day, defend your fields, and transform into animals at night to sabotage your rivals' fields. Outsmart your rivals, sabotage their plans, and dominate the battlefield with clever tactics!

Name: Arithmetic
About: A revolutionary puzzle game combining box-pushing and math operations! Slide number crates, merge targets with +-×÷, and challenge your logic & arithmetic skills

Name: Cruise Ship Manager: Prologue - Maiden Voyage
About: Have a taste of managing your own Cruise Ship in this free version of Cruise Ship Manager! Maintain your vessel and sell tickets to the wealthiest of passengers. Issue orders to your crew and keep their morale high. Choose the layout of your ship and the kind of amenities you want to offer.

Name: The Witch, Wife, & the Wish
About: Once upon a time, there was a witch who lived in the middle of a forest. Rumors said that even the witch was cursed herself, but the witch had long forgotten what spell had been cast, until one day a brave young man came to ask a favor of the witch, for his ailing wife.

Name: Burger Zombies
About: A top down free roaming shooter where you play as a burger delivery man who is completing his orders during the zombie apocalypse. Pick up and deliver orders while shooting and driving against a ever growing horde of zombies.

Name: Midnight at Forest
About: Try to escape from the Forest as you setup camp, then realize you were locked in there by a Park officer. There were 5 keyholes, so you had to find one key for each one.

Name: Agent Team Simulator
About: Build a team of Elite Secret Agents, and send them on dangerous missions around the globe.

Name: Weird Hat Fight
About: Weird Hat Fight is a party game where you use magical hats to fight your friends to the death.

Name: HoloCall - Send Your Cheers!
About: A rhythm music game where you press buttons while doing fan calls. Show your support for your favorite hololive idols by cheering with your voice!

Name: Combat Cat
About: A fast-paced, side-scrolling, bullet hell with an inventory system where a player can upgrade their weapons and player stats to survive as long as possible.

Name: TankVR
About: TankVR is a open world arcade tank game, where you have to destroy all hostile tanks. The objective is to destroy all tanks on the map. After the game is finished, your score is now shown in the leaderboard. Challenge your friends, if you are brave enough.

Name: Fingers: Mini Games
About: In this small game you have to control your physical hands. Interact with objects the way you would do it in real life. Virtual hands react with objects according to the laws of physics. The game will offer you some puzzles and a free room. Sleight of virtual hands in your hands.

Name: COSMONAUT
About: Unravel the mystery surrounding the lost vessel Diogenes. A story-driven retro platformer with elements of horror. Use the zero-g suit to explore the eerie corridors of a derelict ship filled with unknown lifeforms and dark secrets.

Name: The Last Frontier
About: You are the last surviving person on earth, between you and the hordes of zombies, only the walls of your bunker. Learn how to build weapons and turrets, defend yourself and your base, but remember, sooner or later they will break through your defenses...

Name: Squeaky Squad
About: The Squeaky Squad struck again! Fight an army of rodents in this roguelite platformer.

Name: 被坏女人骗成冒险者!
About: 2D side-scrolling rpg, clap mobs! get stronger! build your own broken set! Let's progress as a adventurer with our main character and complete the ultimate quest! (the game currently does not support English sorry about that! however, it is still totally playable because we all gamers!)

Name: Chroma
About: Set out on a mission to stop the attacks of the tyrannical machines. Fight your way through a dystopian city and stop them. You are the city's only hope...

Name: PhyxBox
About: PhyxBox is a physics based sandbox in VR, construct anything you can imagine!

Name: Guerra Sangrenta
About: “Guerra Sangrenta” has many attracting game modes, with its unique optimization technique, such as Classic Competition, Casual Game, Adventure mode etc. Join to find all the wild gears and weapons for your taste, run through the storm of shots and shells. Exciting battles await you!

Name: Spaceflight Factory : Prologue
About: Spaceflight: Prologue is an Automation and Base Building game with some survival game mechanics.During this prologue, You will lead a small colony of human remnants. Help them to survive, expand and gather enough resources to leave Earth for their new home planet.

Name: Ludicrous Speed
About: Run, jump, and wall-grind through an infinitely-generated track in VR! Dodge deadly hazards and collect rings using natural physical movements, surrounded by a surreal pulsating neon world that reacts to whatever music you're listening to!

Name: Vistascapes VR
About: Have you ever wished to be sitting next to a fireplace during a rainstorm, camping in the woods, or standing on the edge of a beautiful mountainous landscape? Now you can with this virtual reality (VR) room-scale experience.

Name: Lost Chronicles
About: Investigate the disappearance of a child and unravel the secrets of a deceptively quiet town called Forest Hill. “Lost Chronicles” is an adventure game in the genre of Hidden Object, with plenty of mini-games and puzzles, unforgettable characters and challenging quests.

Name: Critter Gang
About: Squeak! Chitter! Chatter! You’ll send these mafia members to heaven on a silver platter! You play as a red squirrel trained in the martial arts of crankin’ out kunais and shwingin’ shurikens! You’ll teach three very important lessons to three unlearned delinquents!

Name: Lost Items
About: You wake up lost in a maze and realize there are many items on the ground. They all seem high-valuable, so you decide to pick them all. But there are also many ghosts that don't really want you to pick the items. Not that they will try to kill you, but they'll steal and move the items...

Name: Dodecadone
About: A physics & logic puzzler about merging shapes and traits, similar to Suika games. A triangle might be bouncy, your septagon sick & coughing, or an ennenagon defying the laws of physics.

Name: Emil: A Hero's Journey - Prologue
About: As Nazi forces take his father, equipped only with his imagination and creativity, Emil goes on a journey to find him. Emil: A Hero's Journey is a Cinematic Puzzle-Platformer, combining intense action and creative puzzle solving. inspired by actual testimonies that took place during WW2.

Name: All Over
About: An indie Action RPG/adventure/puzzle Complete story-based quests, solve puzzles, use your sword and spells to fight and gain loot from monsters. Gather resources to build and craft potions and items. Fight legendary bosses.

Name: John:Condemned
About: John: Condemned is a psychological horror game. John, a man trained from a very young age to be a murderer, is contacted for a final assignment.

Name: Planet Bounce
About: Planet Bounce is an action packed arcade-style space game. Navigate solar systems, fire unique weapons, unlock powerful new ships in your quest to conquer the galaxy.

Name: Pentagons Go WEEE
About: A free-to-play 2D Rhythm-based action game where you don't have to be on the beat but rather have to dodge the beats. Compete with the world with global leaderboard and be number 1 in all difficulties: Easy, Hard and Impossible!? Take a deep dive into this retro-type game with over 5 songs.

Name: Preston Sterling
About: Preston Sterling and the Legend of Excalibur is the first episode of an adventure series that will transport you into the world of English myths and legends. Tackle tricky puzzles and enjoy an exciting story, lovable characters and stunning scenes and locations!

Name: Mythrel
About: Mythrel: Trading Card Game. A multiplayer online trading card game! Build your collection and decks, battle your friends, trade cards, and dominate the weekly Leagues!

Name: GoRogue
About: GoRogue is Third person shooter with multiplayer support.

Name: SOUL JANITOR
About: In SOUL JANITOR you play as a worker contracted into a night time janitorial job, but when you arrive you find out that your cleaning up more than just toliets. Armed with only your spray bottle fight your way through the facilities in order to complete your contract and escape the facility!

Name: Divergence
About: Explore a mysterious island with the help of a time manipulation device. Rewind and diverge from your current timeline to combat the ancient guardians and discover the secrets behind Titans.

Name: Blown Away
About: Blown Away is a puzzle platformer that lets you explore the world of Yhorba. Let Mylo take you on an adventure and help him solve puzzles and save the island. In these puzzles you need to find certain parts that will help Mylo and the island of Yhorba to restore peace. Are you in for a new journey?

Name: Questinarium
About: Here you will find answers to all your questions (or not, lol). Create your own questions and send them to your friends to laugh

Name: Chronicles of cyberpunk
About: Chronicles of cyberpunk is an adventure in the city, where power belongs to the Big Brother and his supercomputer. Freedom of actions and thoughts is just an illusion

Name: It's Hard Being A Dog
About: IHBAD is a 2D roguelike, Hack N Slash Platformer game where you play as a dog! Fight strange creatures and mighty mythical gods as you uncover your origin in this dark dystopian world.

Name: Infinite Incantation
About: Fight for survival as you battle massive hordes of enemies. Wield powerful spells that you can mutate and evolve to ludicrous strength. Customize your character's stats, elemental affinities, and make upgrades to become the ultimate spell-slinging force of destruction.

Name: Destiny Island
About: Destiny Island is a very short computer game. You play a man who visits his memories. You can walk and talk to mannequins about 7 sins. Associate essence with anything comes to your mind.

Name: Avoid The Monsters
About: A mix of puzzle and (roguelike) RPG where your aim is to upgrade yourself as much as possible while.. avoiding the monsters!

Name: English Is Hard_
About: An arcade style typing game that evokes the nostalgia of Missile Command. Defend your cows, shoot aliens, and go for the high score!

Name: Binaural Odyssey
About: See how sounds and shapes help mental health in virtual reality. The aim of Binaural Odyssey is to create and guide the user’s emotions. The virtual world reacts to the eyes of the viewer and creates visual shapes from whichever direction the user looks at.

Name: Love Birds
About: Get them cats! Play alone or join your friends to free every last imprisoned bird, but that's not your only goal. All those forest freaks are gonna be out to get you. Explore the many different biomes, and build up your base! Raise a bird army!

Name: 100 Hidden Cats in America
About: Can you find all 100 Hidden Cats in America?

Name: Dimensional Rift
About: Dimensional Rift is a Virtual Reality arcade game with intense hand waving. Fight your way through waves of hostile spheres, deadly laser and devastating bombs. Survive for as long as you can and compete on the leaderboards!

Name: Jotunn - Day of Judgement
About: Alone you find yourself stranded in a dark and mysterious norse forest, tasked by the gods to acitvate the forests magical runestones to open the Serpent-Gate. But you are not alone. A vicious creature lurks in the shadows of the misty forest...

Name: Constantine Scores
About: Constantine Scores is a single-player heisting Sci-fi First Person Shooter. Upgrade your arsenal to gain more abilities, weapons, and perks to keep the playing field equal. Fight against three separate factions, spanning multiple contracts, and randomized multi-day campaigns.

Name: Nock & Load
About: Become the best band of bowmen in the land by defeating all those who would stand against you! Nock & Load is a small, casual archery game with PvP and roguelike elements. Recruit archers into your troop and collect upgrades to outmatch your foes.

Name: Deadly Daycare VR
About: Deadly Daycare is a VR experience where you must take care of a cast of chaotic creatures before they destroy you and your daycare!

Name: Divided Skies
About: Fly through the slums of futuristic Mumbai and complete various missions as Kyra - a member of the Nandaka gang. Transport illegal tech and mechanical enhancements, fight off rival gangs, chase down foes and explore hidden areas as you uncover the secrets of the metropolis

Name: School of Magic: Deck and Slash Prologue
About: In School of Magic, you master limitless strategies by crafting endless builds, then dive into hack-and-slay combat and exploration to become the ultimate wizard.

Name: REDACTED
About: A first-person zombie survival game

Name: Jumping Jax
About: Exploit interesting movement mechanics to chase after your teleporting cyber-corgi!

Name: Qybe
About: Qybe is a fresh & innovative speed runner with dark atmosphere & smooth graphics, where you're set to navigate a Cube through lots of different Levels as fast - and as creatively - as possible. Easily create & share your own maps with the community using the included Editor - then watch others run them!

Name: Where the Music Dies
About: A short visual novel about dealing with loss. You explore a festival filled with old memories and regret. Where the voices of the dead never stay quite dead. Will you manage to change, before it's too late?

Name: Clay Soldiers
About: The war rages on, choose to side with the Mercenaries, the Undead, the Angels, and more! Play through the single-player campaign, unifying the factions. Fight against other players and AI in the battleground's mode! Or strive for a conquest that takes you through the ages in war mode.

Name: Fightworld
About: Fightworld is a free-to-play online brawler game. Control your clone, pick your skill-stick weapon and participate in different wacky gamemodes to become the ultimate Fightworld champion!

Name: [Test Subject Name]
About: [Test Subject Name] is an FPS Platformer that sees you descend through layers of test chambers, fighting multitudes of robots along the way, using weapons taken from enemies, and coming in contact with intelligent machines that want you dead.

Name: Gold
About: This is an idle game! You can randomly drop gold bags and gold when you idle! The value of gold depends on its weight! The heavier the weight, the rarer it is! Come and earn your first pot of gold in life!

Name: Resume: The Video Game
About: Resume: The Video Game is an arcade style indie game, intended to demonstrate my game development ability. Play these fun mini-games: Brick Fish Racing, a multiplayer extraterrestrial racing game; Flap Tapper, a rhythmic flying game; and Chris Kerfuffle, a death match with quick size changes!

Name: Quantum Tripper
About: Identification with something absolute and manifest as pure observation. Seeing things differently is a feature of our perceptual systems. Removed from the materialist plane of existence and world substantiation. Regions of the brain will find particular sets of images more challenging.

Name: RoboArena
About: Multiplayer action game where you can assemble your robot from spare parts and go into battle with it.

Name: Polycalypse: Last bit of Hope
About: Survive the zombie apocalypse by yourself or with your friends in this low poly post apocalyptic world. Survive, build your base and fight the zombies. But beware, you aren't the only one trying to survive. There are other survivors in proceduraly generated bases that will shoot you on sight!

Name: 3AM CORP: The Balbazar Resort
About: Beware of Balbazar in this horror/psychological thriller adventure. Evade the enigmatic Balbazar, use your wits and homemade sleuth kit to capture proof that something ominous is happening, and make it out alive. Do not get caught. The cops aren't doing anything... perhaps there's a reason.

Name: CowaCowa: Jinmenken
About: 'CowaCowa: Jinmenken' is a 3D horror adventure game based on the Japanese urban legend of the 'Jinmenken,' a dog with a human face. Explore a hand-drawn 2.5D world from a first-person perspective, uncovering eerie mysteries in a quiet residential neighborhood at night.

Name: White Mirror
About: A hardcore platformer, intended for speedrunners to try to beat as fast as possible !

Name: World Senate
About: World senate is an online browser game in which you can have your own virtual life. You can join a country, buy vehicles, items, properties, open a political party, be a country president, world senator or representative, vote world issues and you can do many other activities.

Name: The Dream of Shadowlands Episode 1
About: Traverse through twisted dreamscapes and encounter disturbing monsters in this action-horror RPG, while discovering a compelling story with loveable characters through hand-drawn visuals inspired by 90s anime.

Name: Beach Body Bros
About: Embark on a ridiculous 4 minute musical journey through a world of pure muscle, intense strength, and stupid greatness.

Name: Speakeasy
About: An isometric shoot 'em-up minigame set in an underground bar in 1930s Chicago. Speakeasy combines historical charm with edge-of-your-seat action for a gaming experience that’s as thrilling as it is unique.

Name: The Most Lecherous
About: The first erotic game for young people, why pay when you can play for free?

Name: Dawn of the Falkonir
About: In this online cooperative action-adventure game, two players are tasked with overcoming a wraith-infested mountain while utilizing their personalized kits. Play either as Aella, a spunky Falkonir with her multi-purpose crossbow, or Horu, the brave Falcon with his essential mobility.

Name: Trial of the Towers
About: Confront the Trial of the Towers in this short-and-sweet retro-3D boss rush, inspired by action RPGs and classic games from the '90s. Defeat the bosses and overcome the Trial, no matter how many tries it takes.

Name: WatanOS
About: WatanOS is a c̶̭̄ọ̶͝m̷̝̂ṕ̵͉l̶͚̂e̵̥̽t̵͕̂e̴̝͑l̵͎͛y̸̮̌ ̷̡͝ñ̵ͅo̷̦͒r̶̤̽m̷̧̌a̵̼̽l̶̹̇ operating system for all your mistery-solving needs!

Name: Gods and Nemesis: of Ghosts from Dragons
About: Explore the bizarre alien land as described in the book Gods and Nemesis: Leviathan Seed. Additional chapters will be added allowing you to advance your character and support a growing universe.

Name: Zombie Commander
About: Zombie Commander is a strategy game about bringing the extinction of humanity by a zombies invasion, and lead the apocalpyse !

Name: Diamond
About: Diamond is the NEW interactive clicker game in town! Simply click the diamond and every 15 minutes you will get a diamond with the chance of receiving one of the ultra rare coveted diamonds!

Name: MindMindMind
About: A dark, psychological romance VN about a British ghost who has haunted you since childhood. When you get close to a new boy at college, he starts to get possessive, and the mind games begin! Voice acted with Live2D-style animated illustrations.

Name: TSA Frisky
About: In TSA Frisky, you are a TSA agent with the daunting task of surviving your shift. Manage lines, luggage, and leisure, to keep from blacking out on the job. Survive your shifts to earn promotions and upgrades to become the TSA's most effective employee.

Name: Hare Apparent
About: An ancient custom is invoked, and five kingdoms send their young heirs to play a legendary game. Build relationships, form alliances, and win the crown in this high-stakes game of woodland politics and social maneuvering.

Name: AIR WARS
About: AIR WARS is flight simulation game created with the history of air war. Board the aircraft that was actually used and feel the excitement of becoming a hero in history!

Name: Spell Casting: Meowgically Enhanced Edition
About: Spell Casting is a line drawing puzzle game in which you are a young wizard learning spells in the comfort of your home thanks to Wizardly Distance Education offered by the prestigious Magical Education Of Wizards School!

Name: Letters from the War
About: Modern reimagining of text adventure games with a new gameplay and multiple endings. Censor letters coming from soldiers at the front and make the history of your nation.

Name: Acorn Cop
About: Based on a true story, Acorn Cop is a meme game where you shoot all the acorns, but do NOT shoot any human or other living things. Enjoy and collect easter egg items. Can you do just that for 20 minutes?

Name: DarkenDerek The last Fallen
About: Play the role of an insane being apish looking and face a new threat. Arm yourself to the teeth and prevent aliens to kidnap our beloved woman. Kick back invaders to their own galaxy or kill them all! Will you be able to save all girls bringing peace again in Club City?

Name: S.F.77
About: Use your space fighter (S.F.77) to destroy enemy spaceships and collect energy from them. Use that to upgrade you speed, weapons, or improve shields which will allow you to survive even harder attack waves.

Name: Sixteen Undead
About: Drive Like Hell! A high-octane chase through the endless desert! Dodge cops, rock out and tear up the road as a stitched-up teenage Frankenstein!

Name: My Corp Cargo Simulator : Prologue
About: Start and grow your own cargo company! Make fast and reliable deliveries to your customers by foot, bike, motorcycle or car. Improve your business by making strategic decisions. Build your cargo empire in this simulation game where you will feel like a real entrepreneur.

Name: Chicken Tricks
About: Peck, dodge and shoot your way through endless waves of enemies. Upgrade your Chick and prove you have what is needed to avoid being turned into fried chicken.

Name: OrcCraft
About: This is very simple leveling survivor action RTS game. with Zombie. If you're bored, this game would be perfect.

Name: Shanghai1920
About: This game is a suspenseful visual novel style game, Players will play a 20th century police in Shanghai, China, Discover the hidden story and truth behind the murder through exploration and investigation.

Name: Agent Of Love - Josei Otome Visual Novel
About: Play as a detective. Live life as a woman. Use your choices wisely to uncover hidden mysteries and solve intriguing cases. Experience Asian family drama and let love find you in this Agent of Love Otome Visual Novel.

Name: Starman's VR Experience
About: Experience Starman's amazing journey through our solar system in Virtual Reality. See a 'live' view from the cherry red sports car or move in time to see future events.

Name: Riki's Risky Ride
About: Riki’s Risky Ride is a challenging 2.5D Platformer. Drive, spin, jump your car to reach the top of the city.

Name: Slurpy Derpy
About: Breed ever-stronger Derps. Use them to Bake, Conquer, Research and Evolve!

Name: The Closing Shift
About: An interactive first-person horror game. Walk, look around, and talk to people to finish the short story about closing your restaurant. Complete the story with immersive sounds, and spooky tension and jumpscares to keep you focused.

Name: Battle Of Tarlis
About: 'Battle Of Tarlis' is game where you explore many areas to get the best gear or highest level to defeat bosses or survive the hardest zones!

Name: Voidwalkers: The Gates Of Hell
About: You are one of the Voidwalkers, tasked with a life-long oath to defend the Gates Of Hell from any who would try to cross into the land of the living. After a thousand years without incident, thousands of undead warriors have begun crossing the plane, and it's up to you to stop them!

Name: Bryce's Movement Engine¹
About: Be prepared for a trip into yesteryear! Bryce's Movement Engine¹ is an MSDOS Ware meets Post-Trainwreck-era game set in the halcyon days of 1998! An all-new classic adventure, BME¹ is the ultimate tribute to a mega-cool era of awesome gaming!

Name: Pixelitos - Spritle Royale
About: A creature-collecting teambuilding autobattler with over 130 unique elemental creatures to collect and battle with! Assemble a team of Pixelitos to face opponents in 6v6 auto battles. Face off in online asynchronous multiplayer, online versus with friends, or in the single-player campaign.

Name: Break Time!
About: Break Time! is a physics based destruction game for Virtual Reality.

Name: (Removed from steam store)
About: Special thanks to everyone that supported this project!

Name: Reality's Reverse Side
About: Work is boring if you are the only employee in your department with no cases ever. But when work appears, life immediately rises upside down! Forever. Immerse yourself in a dramatic yet charming world of evidence-gathering, deduction and dramatic events on the reverse side of our world.

Name: Pushika - Cat Suika Game
About: Merge kitties & feed them fishes. Dress them in adorable outfits!

Name: Dura Vita Online
About: Dura Vita Online is a multiplayer RPG in a medieval fantasy setting. You are an ordinary citizen living your life when The Occurrence happens. Now evil has started to spread across the land and you have no choice but to take up arms and destroy it!

Name: Anatidae: To The Nest Level
About: Anatidae is a precision platform game about a little duck with amazing skills. Your objective is catch the max golden eggs that you can! Do you have what it takes to go through all the challenges?

Name: Jay's Walkin'
About: Jay's Walkin' is the quintessential jaywalking experience! Feel the extreme thrills of breaking the world's most sacred law as you swerve through traffic ridden streets and evade corrupt law-bringers.

Name: Advent
About: Havilah and Asharia are at war. It's not the first time and it probably won't be the last. But, what the people of these countries don't know is that these wars have already been foretold. The 4 ancient tablets left behind by the 'Creator' prophesy of other things as well but, no one knows what they say.

Name: Jurard Run
About: A short side-scroller shooter game featuring Jurard T Rexford of holostars! Fight against corruption beasts and 4 other holostars members in this simple boss-rush game!

Name: Block Tower: Prologue
About: Block Tower TD is a roguelike tower defense strategy game with interesting innovations. Build a world out of blocks, choose random upgrades to make every run unique.

Name: Infinite Art Museum
About: The Infinite Art Museum is a free, permanent virtual reality museum and archive of art. Explore a growing collection of over 800 original paintings, illustrations, digital art and photographs from artists around the world.

Name: HEXTERMINATE
About: HEXTERMINATE is a top-down shooter which puts you in the role of an Imperial Captain. Your mission is to reclaim a galaxy shattered by centuries of in-fighting. Customise your ship with dozens of different modules, fight side by side with allied fleets and reunite the galaxy under Imperial rule.

Name: The Wire
About: 'The Wire' is a casual puzzle game with plenty of levels, which is designed to suit the needs and abilities of players of all ages. Play with the electronic background music, you just need to move the controller to go forward. The most import thing is making sure it is going on the track.

Name: Training Elves
About: You are an adventurer of some renown that has grown tired of adventuring. After losing almost all of your money gambling, you meet two elves that seek you out and put you to task of training them into adventurers. In exchange, they give you amorous nights.

Name: Screamboat Willie
About: Do you LOVE Steamboat Willie? Great! He's in this game! Do you HATE Steamboat Willie? great! He's gross and scary and you are trying to dodge him and ultimately get away from him! So basically no matter what this game is for you!

Name: Vivaldia 2
About: Pitted against relentless robotic foes and navigating through dense and perilous jungles, scorching lava fields, and treacherous swamps, Vivaldia once again seems faced with an impossible challenge. With the fate of the land in her hands – will Vivaldia rise to the occasion?

Name: Project Apidom
About: Free-to-play multiplayer extraction RPG set in the apocalyptic future world of Pangea. Fight against enemies, both other players and monsters, for resources. Craft items and earn skill points to build an unstoppable Apidom that matches your playstyle.

Name: Sommad
About: Sömmad gets you on an adventure in a self-overlapping VR maze to find a diamond with help of your friends outside VR. In this local multiplayer, walk freely in a large VR maze, make decisions with friends, and challenge your guiding skills using a mazy map!

Name: ULTRARUSH
About: ULTRARUSH is a free-to-play, fast-paced arena shooter where you fight for tokens in the middle of arena. It highly relies on movement, reflexes and gamesense.

Name: City Z
About: Put on your armor, choose a rifle or a shotgun - now you are part of a special forces group. Shoot your way out of a skyscraper full of zombies.

Name: QUANTAAR
About: QUANTAAR is a free-to-play VR Party Brawler! Command Heroes with distinct class-based roles and enhance Hero abilities with Cores to compete in multiple game modes. Party with friends in social-themed rooms and customize yourself with cosmetic skins.

Name: Nebula Within
About: Nebula Within is a contemplative yet challenging twin-stick shooter about exploring your emotions and finding self-acceptance. Plunge into a colorful consciousness and reveal a mysterious diary alone or with up to 8 of your friends.

Name: oct 14
About: It's what happened that day.

Name: Goofballs
About: Goofballs is a goofy physics-based soccer game made by students at SMU Guildhall. Players roll, dash, and ground pound their way to victory. With a variety of ball types, playing surfaces, and arenas there are hundreds of combinations to play! Proceeds go to support student development.

Name: Killer Worm 2
About: Is basic a classic 'Snake' in reverse! You are a gladiator in an arena to die with a giant worm chasing you that grows as you get points. Run, dodge, collect points, power-ups and make combos to get the highest score while staying alive.

Name: FreeRunners
About: This goal of the game is a 3-D platforming to race on selection of maps in order to compete for the fastest time and play with others online. The game has a simple objective and was made to be enjoyed with friends or alone if you wanted to see if you could get the fastest time.

Name: Linx Battle Arena
About: Fast paced Third Person Shooter action across a range of CQB and open area maps. Starting with 1 gun and half health you will always be aware of how vulnerable you are. Play challenging single player games or invite friends to private mutiplayer games.

Name: Apocalypse Slave x Warlord
About: In a post-apocalyptic setting where zombies, raiders, and military fascists have taken over, you can either take the role of a warlord or a slave and roleplay surviving. Depending on the route you choose, you'll have different goals and objectives.

Name: Invasion Zero
About: Invasion Zero is a multi-player online free to play first-shooter game where you are able to play against enemy AI bots or players from all over the world.

Name: Gary the Gull
About: Say hi to Gary! Gary the Gull is an VR Animated Interactive Short Film where you are part of the story! Respond to Gary's questions -- nodding, shaking your head, talking -- and see how your decisions affect how the story plays out.

Name: Tactical Warfare: Siege Survival
About: Immerse yourself in Tactical Warfare, a captivating mini-game of the base game where you defend your base against relentless enemy waves. Strategize, fortify, and survive to emerge victorious. Wishlist now for exclusive access to the playtest and full game on November 29, 2024!.

Name: UNCORPOREAL - "Fluffy!"
About: 'Fluffy!', an experimental VR short, is pure camp horror with a script based loosely on the iconic 80's horror film 'An American Werewolf in London'. A surrealistic motel is imagined in the world of the original film, starring a peculiar bellmen who's obsessed with 'pets'. Run length is 1 min 30 secs.

Name: 毛蟹穴
About: 毛蟹穴是僑光科技大學2021年畢業生的畢業專題，遊戲是改編自清朝嘉慶年間臺中沙鹿地區活人陪葬真實事件，結合臺灣傳統技藝皮影戲作為美術風格，遊戲為2D橫向捲軸解謎遊戲，中間加入煎藥及抓雞的小遊戲。遊戲共分為五個章節，作為學生專題，我們把第一章的故事完整開發完成，遊戲時間約為40分鐘。

Name: Wizard Prison
About: Escape the Wizard Prison! A mashup of retro and modern that won't hold your hand.

Name: Kiya
About: Kiya is a five minute virtual reality piece telling the story of two sisters valiant but unsuccessful efforts to try to rescue their third sister, Kiya, from a deadly attack by her ex-boyfriend. Using two separate recorded calls to emergency workers, the experience puts the viewer on scene as the tragic events unfold.

Name: Indygo
About: Indygo is a narrative game with elements of point'n'click set in one room only - painting workshop. It tells the story of a painter who suffers from depression. Solve puzzles and make decisions that affect how the game ends. Indygo attempts to show how people with depression can feel.

Name: Space Captain McCallery - Episode 1: Crash Landing
About: Space Pirate Captain McCallery has Crash Landed on an alien planet! Explore a strange and hostile alien world in this Low-Poly 3D Action-Adventure game.

Name: Last Blossom: Roleplaying tabletop based scene
About: The last Blossom it's a short game scene, based on tabletop roleplaying games. It presents some story, and it's up to you to choose how it will go. Dice rolls and their consequences, tough negotiations, turn-based combat, adventurous atmosphere, and, of course, some dancing lights!

Name: protoViolence - Definitive Edition
About: Can a scientist save a test subject from her life’s work? A sci-fi/drama visual novel, and a prequel to malViolence.

Name: The New Sheriff
About: A shooter where you won't have to shoot everything, presented in black and white like classic westerns.

Name: Kessler Syndrome
About: Alone in orbit with a corpse and no way to reach Earth, play as an astronaut who must keep a defunct space station aloft. Maintain the onboard systems, deal with the constant threat of space junk, and navigate the dark halls in zero-gravity. Day by day more systems fail, and the void draws closer.

Name: Jet-Story 2018
About: Master the acceleration and inertia of your spaceship in gravity field, use lethal firepower to eliminate any opposition and destroy all enemy bases to win the game!

Name: Flawless
About: Flawless (完美无瑕) is a third-person adventure game that takes place deep within a young boy’s dreams. Explore the surreal landscape and solve puzzles to discover the origins of the boy’s fears in this psychological narrative experience. Can you escape the nightmare?

Name: Block Arena
About: Block Arena is an exciting online game where you try to stay alive on a constantly breaking map!

Name: Block, Love, and Ancient Greece
About: A chaotic educational game set in ancient Greece!Become the fictional philosopher Epistemonos and defeat the scholars who stand in your way!Drag blocks to merge them and defeat the enemies.Immerse yourself in a topsy-turvy story set in ancient Greece, with a focus on the Acropolis.

Name: Poco In
About: Let's guide Poco-chan to the goal! This game is a simple maze game. Remove objects with a revolver.

Name: Monster Battle
About: 'Monster Battle' is a cute and charming roguelike deck builder featuring adorable monsters. Journey through a randomly generated world, build an army of monsters and defeat foes with strategic deckbuilding.

Name: Jake's Halloween Night
About: 'It's October 31, follow Jake as he gets ready for a killer Halloween party.'

Name: 决战紫禁怀旧服
About: 《决战紫禁怀旧服》是由泳漫网络发行的一款大型多人武侠类端游。

Name: Bewildered
About: Bewildered is a single player combat-adventure game, where you cooperate with a ferocious monster as you expel the deadly corruption and restore your sacred island. Learn to trust and assist each other while facing obstacles and fears, through a vibrant, but dangerous world.

Name: Watermelon
About: Watermelon is a clicker game where you click on a watermelon to earn more watermelons! In Watermelon, your goal is to click the juicy fruit to expand your watermelon collection. Every 3 hours, a new watermelon will appear for you to add to your growing stash.

Name: 1000 Princes: Born to Love You
About: 1000 Princes is a female-oriented 3D visual novel otome game.A fracture in your timeline has caused all your prince husbands—spanning past, present and future from different settings—to time-travel to your current era. Now1,000 princes coexist on your shared timeline, protecting and adoring you.

Name: My Douchey Boss Has a Gentle Twin Brother?! - BL Visual Novel
About: Kyle's new boss, Vincent, is mischievous and eccentric. One day, Kyle bumps into his boss after work and is surprised when his superior acts kind. Later, he finds out he'd actually met his boss' twin brother, Vernon. The brothers are estranged, but what happens when they fall for the same person?

Name: 花母·序
About: 你来到了一所郊外的“荒野高校“，你发现了这所学校，不仅仅是表面上残破不堪 ，而且每个角落都透露着诡异且压抑的气氛。随着时间的流逝以及事件的推进，被尘封已久的历史真相被一步步揭露。 我与寥寥几名的“全校同学”展开了对于学校的探索，已生命为代价换取来的真相，才是整个事件的冰山一角。

Name: Cake Game
About: Strategize, combine cakes, and bake your way to victory!

Name: Ad Agency Simulator: Prologue
About: Ad Agency Simulator: Prologue offers a short simulation experience for those who want to pursue a career in advertising. Are you ready to create your own ad designs and manage your ad agency starting from a small ad office?

Name: Nightmare: Worlds Collide
About: Nightmare: Worlds Collide is a unique horror experience that follows Jessica Redford as she recalls her memories after a horrific event causes her to lose touch with reality. Throughout the experience you will be unravelling the mystery as she tries to escape her dark inner secrets.

Name: Kill Your Shapes
About: Kill Your Shapes is a third-person shooter roguelike set in a world where reality and creation has been simplified down to shapes. Kill the enemy shapes and get new items and abilities. There are several levels and bosses to beat.

Name: Hyakki Yako: OH&S
About: Haramita Renkai is trapped somewhere deep in the underworld after a ritual gone awry. Armed with naught but his wits, his talismans and a burning desire for self-criticism, Renkai attempts to flee the grasp of the ravenous Demon Parade and escape back to the mortal plane.

Name: LA Monsters
About: travel through the LA wasteland with josh and sid in this atmospheric interactive video novel

Name: Miracle Calamity Homeostasis
About: Discover the secret ingredient of the best shawarma in Miracle Calamity Homeostasis novel. But be on the alert! If it comes to your taste then you are the chosen one to save our world.

Name: Rival Rides
About: Rival Rides - the ultimate VR PARTY game! Compete, laugh, and mess with your friends in a 4-player online setting.Uncover ridiculously fun games. Who will dominate the competition? Strap on your VR headset, hop on your ride, and dive into a world of hilarity and excitement. Ready, set, ride!

Name: Solomon's Link
About: In Solomon's Link, catch a glimpse of two lives on the lam: A pair of fugitives, raiding an abandoned factory to survive. Piece together their pasts, and watch over their fragile partnership as it grows - or crumbles - around the shackles that serve as their only unquestionable bond.

Name: FORWARD
About: FORWARD is a flight based time trial racer set in a sci fi environment. The game sees you flying at breakneck speeds through tunnels that are packed with obstacles you must avoid in order to make it to the finish line of each level.

Name: Terra Atlantis
About: Terra Atlantis is a first person shooter for single players. Explore and discover thoses worlds and try to finish the trials created by gods from this far galaxy.

Name: Synthesis: Mind, Body, and Soul
About: Synthesis is an extraterrestrial adventure with a twist, you don’t have a body! Swap between foes to maintain your health and gain valuable abilities that will aid in you in your quest.

Name: Literally Just Pixels On A Screen
About: Welcome to Literally Just Pixels On A Screen. In this 'game' you get to collect pixels. That's it.

Name: Universe Generator: The Golden Sword
About: Universe Generator: The Golden Sword is a short FMV puzzle game about the search for a powerful sword through the manipulation of dreamscapes.

Name: 我愛師大附中HSNU
About: This is an online game about the scene of the High School Affiliated to the Normal University. If you meet a classmate of the Middle School Affiliated to the Normal University in the scene, remember to say hello.

Name: Burning Skies Arcade
About: Lt Blitz has the city sieged, and it's your job to destroy his troops. Shoot, dodge and upgrade your jet and and try to take on this challenge! Burning Skies is a free, endless retro shmup, that will take you right back to the era of arcade machines, with modernized graphics and gameplay!

Name: Poetry Pigeon
About: Fly frantically between fast-approaching obstacles by typing classic poems! Put your skills of both typing and timing to the test in this new spin on an old favorite! Prefer to fly casual? Try relaxed mode instead and take in the beauty of balladry!

Name: FADE^2
About: FADE^2 is a 2D action game that brings platformer, runner and music interactive genre all together. A desperate journey of the reanimated one, and the storytelling of music from the bleached world. Run along the music, and play along the course!

Name: Elliot and the Musical Journey
About: The Evil Skeleton King has stolen the music from the world and without it the world is dying. You are the only one who can revive it. Elliot and the Musical Journey is a classic 3D platformer filled with music and puzzles. Can you save your friends, the Queen and the whole world?

Name: Shattered Slime
About: A cartoony and colorful 2.5D platformer.

Name: Mariam Game
About: Mariam Game is a narrative game, set in a fantasy version by help her get back to her home, where your choices impact the fate of you and Mariam. 'Survival Horror', 'Puzzle' and 'Clicker' and get story hints by playing 'Cards Mode' and completing all the levels.

Name: God Is Not Here
About: FREE THRILLING FIRST-PERSON HORROR! You will find yourself in a house haunted by ghosts, and there is no help from above. Fear, darkness, and real danger await you, hidden within the walls of the mansion. If you dare to enter, prayers will no longer save you.

Name: Parked In The Dark
About: Find you car somewhere in the garage by finding clues, before the time runs out. But you are not as alone as you think...

Name: Final Warrior Quest
About: Final Warrior quest is a parody JRPG. Developed entirely in Japan, thus making it a true Japanese Role-Playing Game. Recognizing the inherent foibles of the genre, Final Warrior Quest has tried to mitigate the annoyances while utilizing a humorous tone.

Name: Inops
About: Dive into the wondrous world of the Inops! The 2D puzzle based side scrolling adventure of dark and light. Battle the fire breathing demons and rescue the scattered Inops.

Name: 8-Bit Attack
About: A turn based tactics game where the player commands a cast of unique heroes as they travel across space and time in order to power up and defeat the evil lord Cthulhu. Build up your party by destroying mini-bosses and their lackeys in preparation for the final battle to save the universe!

Name: NOVA CORE CHAOS
About: NOVA CORE CHAOS is a chaotic co-op cooking game for one to five players. Play as one of five unique classes and follow the recipes to make energy cores. Give these to your customers to help them evolve into Novas!

Name: click to twelve
About: THE WORST GAME OF ALL TIME :D In this game all you do is click until the center number becomes twelve, play this incredibly engaging experience for about 20 seconds then immediately forget about it’s existence

Name: Machinist
About: A game production platform based on 3D physics engine and building block logic programming. Players who like creating games and assembling machinery can design a rich variety of custom games without having to learn and memorize complex commands and gain profit through the in-app purchase system.

Name: Guidelicious
About: A short, interactive visual novel about waking up in a strange room with a mysterious man. But why are you here? Let Him be your Guide to the truth.

Name: The Magical Land of Canada
About: Our heroes must travel to Canada and are surprised to find out it's a real place and not fictional.

Name: Bauer
About: Bauer is a side-scrolling fun little endless runner game where you help a simple mouse fly his plane and avoid all the obstacles in the air.

Name: 灵师
About: 灵师是一款俯视角开放世界休闲冒险RPG像素游戏，灵瀚大陆灵气复苏，诡怪归来收割生命，大陆所有的国家联合起来成立了联盟，主角亲人被诡物杀害，但在其中却有无法描述的交易，主角需要探索灵瀚大陆寻找当年的真相，为自己复仇。灵瀚大陆最重要的便是灵力修行，和掌握强力的灵技。

Name: 未知记录
About: HANA—A cyberpunk puzzle-solver. “AI test run: successful. Your serial number: 22500814. Your mission is to help our clients live a perfect life.” —An unknown record, a cyberpunk ensemble. A choice of souls and reality, a story of the savior and the saved. Year 2250, Winter Lake City. Connect now.

Name: ウワガキアイ
About: A tragic story of repeated overwriting. Exploration type ADV I woke up in a laboratory. I immediately noticed something strange, but the erosion had begun. （In a certain laboratory, I started an experiment.) (The first and last experiment for me, risking everything...)

Name: TankDestruction
About: TankDestruction is a multiplayer game with a focus on fast-paced action. Select 5 special abilities and battle on large-scale maps with up to 20 other players! Destroy tiger tanks, other players, and automated turrets that stand in your way, to capture enemy towers and win the game!

Name: Old Roots
About: Old Roots: fight your fear and survive your fate. Inspired by the geography of Siberia and with inspiration from games like Doom or Hellblade, you will have to face your own fear and overcome your enemies... without losing control.

Name: Zarie: The Story of Sin
About: What kind of conversation will you have with the Shinigami girl? How will you conclude your story? The choice is yours in this tale of sin and 'the girl'.

Name: Diorama No.1 : Blocked In
About: In 'Blocked In' you will visit the workspace of a Russian scientist to enjoy an extraordinary view of the end of the world by Tetronimoes, that will leave you ‘Blocked In’. ‘Blocked In’ is the first entry in 'The Shoebox Diorama' series by interactive illustrator 'Daniel Ernst'.

Name: Peach
About: In this world, simply being near or gently tapping one of my peaches ensures a fresh delivery to your Steam Inventory every 30 minutes. Embrace this future, and taste the excellence of natures blessing.

Name: Escape Room
About: Look for hints and disable the bomb. Now!! Your time is running short.

Name: Daedaluz
About: Daedaluz is a game about maneuverability and obstacle avoidance where your ship breaks apart as you collide with them. Try to reach the end in consecutive increasingly difficult levels or try infinity mode and see how long you can survive.

Name: Dark Odyssey
About: Dark Odyssey, an epic online rpg game that features idle playing, dungeon challenges, boss fights, character enhancing and customizations. Get ready to embark on a dark and thrilling journey, increase your power, team up with other players and save the world!

Name: Forever Space
About: This experimental short story is more of an interactive experience than a 'game'. It is based on an original story by Catalina Leon and presented through key moments over several days. Play as Greg who must decide whether lapses in his memory are just paranoia, or something more sinister.

Name: the fairytale of DEATH
About: A story that should never have been written…

Name: A-Rabbit
About: This is an original Japanese style slot machine! Reels are stopped by internal flag and your operation. BONUS will be hided at first when you get it. Find out BONUS by patterns, effects and navigation with knowledge and technique, like playing a puzzle game!

Name: Dual Chroma: Academy Carols
About: Spend Winter break with the popular and unapproachable Prince of the Empire in this cozy and heartwarming Magic Academy visual novel

Name: Angela's Odyssey
About: A surreal point-and-click adventure

Name: Let's Play Jigsaw Puzzles
About: 'Tis the season for puzzles!

Name: 2023: Alien Bugs Invade Earth
About: Why are alien insectoids invading Earth in 2023? This narrative driven 2D shooter pits you against a seemingly hopeless battle against the invading Insectoids. How will you (and Earth) manage to survive? What hidden technological, historical, and spiritual secrets will you discover as a result?

Name: Meat & Greed
About: In the atmospheric puzzle-platformer Meat & Greed, you will experience the horrors of a slaughterhouse from the perspective of different animals. Solve riddles and collaborate with other animals to try and escape this ill-fated factory.

Name: Dice Player One: Trailer
About: 'Dice Player One' is a roguelike strategy game where dice reign supreme! Roll your dice, seize pivotal moments, and transform limited chances into boundless opportunities. Conquer challenges, unearth hidden secrets, and master the art of dice manipulation!

Name: Cuties Dungeon
About: Welcome to Cutie’s Dungeon! Meet Cutie, A dark and demented rabbit hellbent on destroying everything that’s cute! Cutie is out for revenge and won’t stop until he has ended the never-ending cycle of cuteness happening around him.

Name: Happy Funtime Labs
About: Build and play the deadliest levels together in Happy Funtime Labs and discover what your plushies are really made of.

Name: Algebra Ridge
About: Solve quick math questions and use handy upgrades to save the world with the power of math! In Algebra Ridge, you must stop Big Cheesy from stealing the Pencil of Knowledge in this unique story-driven adventure!

Name: xingchenbian online
About: MMORPG Players can role-play to choose their own faction (fairy or demon) Players complete team formation, team copies, and world bosses through cooperative teamwork. Players and friends team up to participate in various PVP activities.

Name: The Scary Square
About: The Dark Side Of Mr.Square To Be Discovered.

Name: Honored
About: Honored is a stealth, action-adventure game where the player uses various gadgets and powers to knock out or kill enemies in order to escape and take down the Egyptian empire.

Name: 光辉耀浙里 Brilliance shines in Zhejiang
About: 2D role-playing game Players will play the protagonist, the protagonist's first-person perspective to experience the historical changes in Zhejiang in the past hundred years, and experience and learn from the protagonist's tenacious ideals, beliefs and spiritual strength.

Name: Farmageddon: A Cattle Royale
About: Farmageddon: A Cattle Royale is a series of cow puns masquerading as a new kind of roguelike.

Name: Cross Soul

About: Grab your Proton Pack and join the Ghostbusters alongside your friends, exploring Manhattan, blasting ghosts, and trapping those runaway ghouls.

Name: Let Hawaii Happen VR
About: Visiting Hawaii as a tourist is amazing. But when you get to “Let Hawaii Happen” with a local as your guide, it’s a totally different experience. Start by paragliding into an island of your choice. Then, upon landing, a local will give you the most personal tour of their island — virtually-speaking.

Name: The Summon
About: This is an RPG where you can decide what kind of build you are going to make. Become a tank that focuses on damage mitigation, healing and reflecting damage back to your opponents or a glass cannon that focuses on high burst damage with massive lifesteal.

Name: The 52 Fragments
About: The 52 Fragments are an experimental, esoteric series of games and experiences. Beginning Nov. 1, 2023, one fragment will be added to the library each week for one year. These games examine themes related to identity, agency, perception, and the creative process.

Name: Stellarion
About: Upgrade your spaceship and conquer the stars in this thrilling space-mining adventure! Mine asteroids, battle enemies, and trade resources for powerful upgrades to customize your ship. Master the galaxy and embark on the ultimate journey!

Name: DepthQVR_AQUA
About: DepthQVR_AQUA is a fun, engaging, immersive ride & casual gaming experience. Also configurable for out-of-home PC Café, Entertainment Attractions, Brand Experiences, and Educational Attractions.

Name: Heaven Snakes [Beta]
About: A new generation of a Snake arcade game with unique mechanics, fully in 3D and online😍! [Beta]

Name: TVG (The Vox Games). Journey
About: Voxel-like medieval escort game.

Name: Shred Off
About: In this 3rd-person action, snowboarding shooter, perform Stylish tricks in the Alaskan mountains while gunning down enemies with an arsenal of ranged weaponry. Shred down the mountain on your snowboard to get a high score while competing against your friends!

Name: Red Ruins: Asymmetric VR vs. PC
About: Red Ruins is an asymmetric VR game created by students, where one player becomes a Demon Lord in VR, facing off against Heroes on PC. With powerful weapons and strategic gameplay, players must either vanquish their foes or join forces to conquer the Red Ruins together.

Name: Subject A-119
About: You play as Subject A-119, the first successful experiment in a series of clones. You wake up unintentionally and you don't know who, what or where you are.

Name: Szikra
About: A relaxing, 2.5D side-scrolling short game set in a unique steampunk/fantasy environment. Find your way through vast fields, magical forests, and giant gears in a steaming factory to reach the twisted circus where your friend is locked up. Jump, find switches, push boxes around to get there.

Name: 100% Challenge
About: Action arcade! CAPTURE enemies of your color and AVOID the rest to become the best in the world! Fast, addictive and 100% challenging!

Name: PRO DRIFT RELOADED 2020
About: PRO DRIFT RELOADED - Bringing A Completely New Drift Experience with high-quality graphics featuring a full controller and wheel support.

Name: Letzte Worte VR
About: Trapped in a strange shattered world lost in fog, you take a trip down memory lane. The past not only hides memories of your relationship between you and your brother, but also the suppressed event that may has led to his suicide. Face your deepest fear in this built-for-VR adventure.

Name: The Plant
About: Интерактивная история про ученого-отшельника, с которым заговорил его подопытный цветок. Настраивая характеристики выбора ответа, результат приведет вас к одной из нескольких окончаний.

Name: PogoStickMiooooooon
About: An action game where you bounce up and up and up and up, just trying to get to higher. This game is hololive unofficial fangame featuring Ookami Mio.

Name: L/Right Reflection
About: 'L/Right Reflection' is an RPG game in which the player fights by reflecting enemy attacks. Choose the appropriate magic for each situation, detect the enemy attacks, and face a variety of enemies.

Name: Worldwide Battle Royale
About: Battle royale game with realistic world maps and characters.

Name: The Dark Book
About: An obscure old-school rpg - Single player offline with a skeleton warrior

Name: Syzygy
About: Syzygy is an enigmatic game focused on the ability of morphing at will a square world into triangles and hexagons

Name: Fury Strike
About: Fury Strike is an 80s-themed 2.5D cel-shaded fighter game created by Full Sail University students in collaboration with Rooster Teeth.

Name: Missy's Transformation Tournament
About: Rogue-lite meets single-player battle royale! Enter Missy's Transformation Tournament! Preserve your humanity at all costs! Defeat the other contestants by transforming them into submission. Survive in a dynamic arena where anything could be a threat. Will you lose yourself to Missy's power?

Name: Sword of Atlas
About: Combine fast-paced, real-time strategy with grid-based combat in this character-driven roleplaying game.

Name: Dimensional Gears
About: Dimensional Gears is a 2.5D puzzle platformer that takes place in a dystopian steam-punk future where household appliances are the only sentient beings left. Shift dimensions in order explore a dangerous 2.5D environment, escape the factory, and save your friends!

Name: Welcome to Bunny Farm
About: Welcome to Bunny Farm is a tomato clock function idle game where you only need to click the 'Start Working' button and wait, as Bunny, your trusty employee, will take care of the farm for you. Other small animals may drop by for a visit; you can greet them, and who knows?

Name: STARTMOVE
About: You and your friend return to his home in the city, which after the nuclear war and the appearance of the 'Goro' mutants will no longer be the same 'home'. You will survive and fight with creatures that become more dangerous each new level. But you need to go through this to collect local riches!

Name: UFO Checkers
About: A classic game of checkers to play with your friends. Turn-based and themed after an alien invasion.

Name: Goldilock One: BOSS ARENA
About: Boss Arena is a combat arcade experience of Goldilock One. Hack, slash and destroy waves of enemies, massive bosses and improve you combat skills, in a short experience that shares the progress with the main game.

Name: Plant Gallery: A Short Botanic Experience
About: This is a short game about a gallery with plants. In order to complete the game, you will need to find keys, open chests and connect the right name tags to the right paintings. Duration of the game is aproximately 15-30 minutes.

Name: ダンジョン人狼
About: Can you survive this dungeon...! A new dungeon exploration werewolf game is here! ! 20 people can play against each other and over 60 types of roles!

Name: Dreamslayer
About: Dreamslayer is an epic fantasy first-person hack’n’zap swarm arena game with retro styling. Defend your world from a Demon invasion from beyond the stars.

Name: Danger Room VR
About: Danger Room is a short and frenetic VR game. Players will have to master their reflexes and skills to reach the goal: try to collect as many knowledge balls as possible, while avoiding the multiple traps awaiting you.

Name: BattleCry: World At War
About: Addictive text-based Military MMO RPG where you team up with other players for TOTAL DOMINATION of the world. Join now, make alliances, build the greatest military force, crush your enemies, defend allies and rule the world!

Name: God of the Arena Dungeon
About: Destroy arena vermin, level up, choose your class path, get loot, and slay other players. Destroy the bosses of the arena without being slain, and perhaps your ascent into arena God-hood will be recorded into legend!

Name: UnSummoning: the Spectral Horde
About: A nefarious necromancer summoned an army of vengeful spirits to wreak havoc upon the world. Unfortunately, they only wanted to wreak havoc upon HIM! Now he must undo what he has done by drawing upon the power of magic sigils to blast the ghouls back to the netherworld.

Name: Puppy Chef Academy
About: Puppy Chef Academy is a Virtual Reality cooking experience designed to help you learn how to cook without the stress and mess of a real kitchen. Throughout your adventure you’ll cook tasty recipes, learn about cooking, and even make some friends along the way!

Name: Team Indie
About: In Team Indie a selection of indie game characters join forces combining their unique skills. Play coop with your own previous runs and bend time to master puzzles and action sequences!

Name: Temple of Kasthet
About: Brian Teaser must escape from a mysterious Temple by solving mindblowing puzzles before they, well, blow his mind.

Name: Grapplania
About: Join Lynn, a descendant of a long line of whip-wielding warriors, in a 2D adventure through a perilous, abandoned castle filled with treasure.

Name: Canto I
About: Face the Dark Forest of the Divine Comedy in this action platformer inspired by the Sommo Poeta’s masterpiece! Help Dante avoid pitfalls, spikes & specters using double jumps, magical attacks and dashes. Find the scrolls containing the triplets of the Canto exploring this gloomy, pixelart forest!

Name: Bad Credit
About: Let's take it back to 2016. Donald Trump just went on Jimmy Fallon. The new Ghostbusters is still in theaters. You're working as a two-bit financier in the morally and financially bankrupt city of Tucson, Arizona. Take your own path and brave the new world in this neo-western visual novel.

Name: Power Solitaire VR
About: Power Solitaire VR is a delightful version of the Klondike solitaire card game that introduces unique game play only possible in Virtual Reality. Play alone, against an intelligent robot, or live multiplayer with others online. It's a social VR game the whole family already knows how to play.

Name: The Paper Trials
About: A first-person horror maze game. Hiding & Standing still is Death. Run or you are DEAD. Trapped in a realm of nightmarish mazes with your only hope of survival is to find all of the pages to the mysterious book and ESCAPE!

Name: Fateless
About: FPS game in which you defend Earth from monsters. You shoot the monsters with a double-barrel shotgun and other weapons and move through various buildings made of brick and stone. You make your way to the underground where the monsters came from and rid the planet of their presence.

Name: Cat Jigsaw Puzzle Games
About: Do puzzles in a new puzzle way! Advanced puzzle layout and involving gameplay will help you to relax after a hard-working day. The player can choose to play with 20, 30, or 42 pieces.

Name: DUMB Infernal
About: Enter the infernal hellscape as a lone warrior fending off an army of monsters in arcade style combat.

Name: Gaze Into Fate
About: A meditative and story-driven puzzle game, where you must discover answers to decisions, we all have to make. Can you make a change in a world of endless wars?

Name: All Fall Down
About: Set in a distant future world, this is a unique first person shooter/platform/puzzle game where you need to find out why all the debris is falling and save your world from destruction.

Name: Eukarion Tales: Origins
About: A retro-flash, isometric RPG set in a medieval fantasy world. Battle hordes of enemies, upgrade your abilities, and experience a deep, fantasy-filled storyline in a European Middle Age-inspired world!

Name: Cards of Heart
About: Join Amalia on her journey to confront her inner Shadows! Complete errands for town residents, build your deck, face Shadows in gripping card battles, and uncover Amalia’s memories in this cozy, narrative-driven, deck-building RPG.

Name: BLOKI
About: BLOKI is an educational game in which you'll transform into a designer of residential building facades from the Soviet era. Using the available set of tools and guidance from the moderator, you'll design facades and develop the nearby area.

Name: Comets Wake
About: Come join the adventure of Comets Wake. Explore vast archipelagos of floating islands with infinite variety. Find waterfalls, lava lakes, towers, ruins, giant mushrooms, and more! Choose from a huge array of weapons from guns to swords, or even a mage staff.

Name: Arctic Wolves
About: Arctic Wolves is an open-world action game that blends the charm of wolves with high-energy combat scenarios. Customize characters and homes for a fully personalized experience, giving you ultimate freedom to shape your adventure.

Name: Space Merchant
About: Based off the original Merchant RPG, a new Idle RPG space exploration experience!

Name: Operation Covid-19
About: An endless first person shooter in which you CAN destroy viruses with TP rolls. Earn points, level up, get upgrades and shoot the new normal in the face.

Name: Machine Heart
About: Delve into the captivating cross-timeline puzzles of Machine Heart, and unravel the conspiracy behind a mass mind-uploading scheme.

Name: Kosmolaris
About: Kosmolaris is a relaxing puzzle game where you'll have combine a wide variety of elements to create new ones, starting with four basic elements: Air 💨, Fire 🔥, Earth 🍃, and Water 💧.

Name: Orange - The Annoying Clicker
About: Orange is a spiritual successor to certain phallic fruit clicker Game, in which you click an Orange, only a little bit more annoying *wink*! All you have to do is click the Orange! No Drama No Stress

Name: lightblue
About: An ancient legend, a shattered family, an exorcist priest. Embrace the crucifix, have faith in the Lord and face the evil inside lightblue.

Name: Stacy Sharp and the Night Of Too Many Monsters
About: SSATNOTMM is a small action game with roguelite elements. Survive waves of enemies, buy permanent upgrades, befriend colorful characters, die and do it all over again.

Name: Word
About: Type the Bible and record your best WPM for each verse!

Name: Descenso
About: A very short adventure in which you will explore a futuristic world and a handsome deck.

Name: Reality Simulator
About: This is a 3D simulation game walk through where we showcase how realistic next generation games can be and how far 3D realism has come 1. Walk through a house 2. Walk through a stage

Name: Wheelborn
About: Explore, fight, and gather materials in an atmospheric, ruined kingdom inhabited by creepy-cute car creatures, in this short and unique exploration experience.

Name: Silent World
About: Get rid of fatigue in Silent World! Listen to relaxing music and casual skateboarding in the sunset or early morning. It’s just a simple 2D pixel game.

Name: Cloud Bashers DX
About: So, you wanna bash some clouds huh? Go through 10 worlds each with different cloud types and a boss that's out to take you down. Bash them all with your trusty bat and take back the skies!

Name: Medved Hellraiser 3: Green Elephant
About: 3D first-person shooter where you have to fight monsters, gopniks, debt collectors and homeless people!

Name: Strawberry
About: Strawberry is an engaging clicker game, your objective is to smash click the vibrant strawberry repeatedly. By clicking the Strawberry, you accumulate more Strawberries. Every 3 hours an additional strawberry drops, rewarding your persistent clicking.

Name: Major League Gladiators
About: Major League Gladiators is a 2-player co-op shooter for VR. Each taking control of one of two classes, players will have to survive endless rounds of enemies by combining their unique movement and combat abilities as well as maintaining each others resources.

Name: Natural Disaster: A Butterfly's Guide to Mass Destruction
About: Natural Disaster is a point-and-click-inspired adventure game set in a View-Master. Explore a world in scenes and sow the seeds of disaster by virtue of the butterfly effect!

Name: PEDRO!
About: A cool clicker.

Name: Rabbi-T
About: Save Wilson Toys Inc. from the villainous robot ACTO and be a hero. Rabbi-T is a running action game that pursues destruction and speed. Destroy obstacles to run faster. Reach the boss's weakness as fast as possible.

Name: Duskborn
About: Duskborn is a 3rd-person roguelite game. Descend into the Abyss as fast as possible, level up by defeating various enemies, collect and combine items to upgrade your player. Maneuver through the Abyss with your jetpack and grappling hook. The race against time is on.

Name: Kilonova
About: Embark on a journey of revenge as Sol, a warrior of the celestial cosmos, as she fights to repel the corruption that has shackled the creatures of a fractured world. Wield her cosmic strength to shatter your foes and expunge the malevolent influence of the cosmos most ancient enemy; The Kilonova!

Name: Ika's Odyssey
About: Before his flock's migration, Ika the Woodpecker lost his ability to fly. He is forced to do the impossible - walk the migration path. Hope emerges when he discovers a magical child of a long extinct species. Craft, climb, and solve puzzles to overcome obstacles as a duo in this puzzle-platformer.

Name: Prototype ONE DAY I AM
About: Zordi Mi Lé is an open world game prototype on Reunion Island, explore the city of Saint-Pierre in search of 'dreams': One day I am possesed, One day I am at the plain of sands , chaos and mod run 200m st anne

Name: The Eyes of Dr Kautzmann
About: The Eyes of Dr Kautzmann is a first-person point-and-click detective game inspired by German expressionist cinema. Solve environmental puzzles to uncover the tragic history and secrets of a doomed town.

Name: 唱舞全明星
