About: 《唱舞全明星》一款充满挑战性和趣味性的音乐舞蹈游戏。在这里，你可以与众多志同道合的玩家一同起舞，畅享魅力四射的音乐与动感节拍；在这里，你可以展示自己的时尚搭配和创意，尽情表达自己的时尚态度；在这里，你可以与TA一同欣赏浪漫海边的烟花，沉浸在如诗如画的画面之中。

Name: Elara: A Coding Adventure in Space
About: Solve puzzles and learn how to code in this unique and gripping sci-fi adventure!

Name: The Devil's Bride
About: Run from The Devil Bride, where you must outwit and escape from the clutch of the Devil’s Bride to save your niece, Nina. Solve challenging puzzles while hiding from the relentless Devil’s Bride in the world of Indonesian cult horror experience.

Name: The 'I Love Money' Show
About: Grab a weapons and fight! Play single player campaign or with friends in local coop. Wins the one who collects the most money!

Name: Maneki's Curse
About: In the realm of mortals, it is Gojun who reigns after killing the former god of war, Maneki. Now Maneki's soul is trapped in the Underworld--a rich labyrinth from which no soul can escape. But the former god of war's soul is unlike any other, and his vengeance has had a millennium to burn.

Name: Reberryon
About: An action strategy war game set in a cutesy fruity wonderland that combines 3D platforming with RTS elements​

Name: Above: The Fallen
About: Above: The Fallen is a 2D side-scrolling, puzzle - platformer game that is centered around travelling upwards instead of to the left or right. The goal is to climb the trees of an ancient and mystical forest in order to break through the canopy.

Name: 타부티(TAVUTI)
About: TAVUTI's adventure to regain the power of the Whale God and rescue the kidnapped COCOSI!

Name: Chronicles of Vipers
About: Chronicles of Vipers is a remake-demake first-person shooter inspired by old 8-bit and 16-bit console games, as well as VHS-era movies.

Name: Astral Quester
About: The game features a card-based mechanism where each space companion, or 'waifu,' is a distinctive Star Maiden with unique skills and characteristics. Through recruiting, training, and assembling your card deck, you'll craft your own squadron of stellar ladies.

Name: The Lizartian
About: The Lizartian is a top-down action-adventure game. We will embody a lizard tamer, a Lizartian, who will have to travel the vast lands of Dekoto to enact his revenge. Along the way, he'll face dangers like savage bandits, rugged terrain, and the legendary sandstorm.

Name: VectorWave
About: VectorWave translates the traditional tower defense experience into virtual reality, allowing you the freedom to buy, place, toss, and move towers as you see fit with minimal menu interaction.

Name: Idle Mall Tycoon
About: 🛒 Ever played a realistic and stunning mall tycoon game like the screenshots? 1️⃣ Start by building up your free cash flow with a clicker power business using windmills and solar panels!2️⃣ Supercharge your mall’s growth with a REAL business investment!

Name: World of Grimm
About: Dive into the enchanting universe of Grimm Fairytales! Collect powerful cards, engage in fast-paced battles, and rewrite the destiny of iconic characters. Unleash your strategic skills in this captivating and fast-paced collectible card game. Join the adventure now!

Name: Endless Ascent
About: In a tower filled with robots and... magic! Ascend your way out with confusing puzzles and mind-torturing obstacles in your way!

Name: And So It Was
About: You are the Boy, who escapes captivity and goes through unique areas fighting (or avoiding) enemies while trying to figure out how and why he was imprisoned in the first place. Mouse-driven top-down action adventure with randomized elements and a mysterious, narrated story.

Name: Limberjack
About: Known to chainsaw-wielding loggers around the world as ‘limbing’, the art of stripping felled trees of their branches is exciting, but very dangerous. Welcome to Limberjack! Grab your Husqvarna chainsaw, and pursue your dream of becoming the undisputed greatest limber alive.

Name: Minigame Game
About: Minigame Game is a first-person focused minigame collection that supports anywhere from 2-16 players.

Name: Conflux: Prologue
About: Date! Fight! Collect! Conflux: Prologue is a collectible visual novel card game featuring a medieval fantasy setting with unique card battle mechanics and character hangout events. This is a prologue to the full version of the game – Conflux.

Name: HHHalloween
About: Play as a young girl who was sent to an orphanage just a month ago to find the truth about the Halloween demon. The game is a role-playing turn-based RPG. Players need to collect as much candy as possible, talk to passersby as much as possible, and advance the plot.

Name: Anturi
About: As Wikku, embark on a search for your missing father in the unknown world of Anturi. Explore the islands and help the inhabitants. Also gather information about your father's fate. Improve your skills to better combat the unknown dangers.

Name: Garden of Roses: Summerset
About: The prologue arc to the 'Garden of Roses' story. A visual novel set in a world where monster girls walk among us. Take the role of Will Getz, a young man with a score to settle after 15 long years of being away from home.

Name: Radical Solitaire
About: Never a bad deal. Always a RAD DEAL! You can't lose so stop being a loser and start wasting all your time playing Radical Solitaire!

Name: Midsummer Leg's Dream
About: Enter a whimsical dreamscape where every step reveals a new surprise. Level up to uncover short, unexpected clips. Embrace the quirky journey of a leg in a world where dreams and reality blur — exactly as it should be.

Name: Dead End Aegis: Gaiden
About: A squad of magical girls are the Earth's only defense against an alien invasion.

Name: Chasing Tail
About: A peaceful fantasy of creatures big and small in all shapes and sizes. But a quiet danger threatens the tranquility of life, and could potentially throw the balance into chaos. Who will stick by your side? What bonds will hold true to the end? Will love help you prevail or will hate end us all?

Name: Little Bo Reap
About: Little Bo Peep's sleepiness has led to all of her sheep being killed! Take revenge using powers of necromancy to summon undead flocks of sheep to defeat your foes. Each different flock can assist in your movement or your battles to defeat your foes in an untold number of ways!

Name: Bullet Runner: The First Slaughter
About: A clone army is taking over the world. Kill them all in an epic single-player campaign to save humanity, and yourself!

Name: The Secret Life of Dorian Pink
About: A choices-matter narrative RPG set in an alternate universe of the Picture of Dorian Gray by Oscar Wilde. Save your boyfriend Basil from the Devil by making questionable choices, gaining allies, and making doughnuts explode.

Name: Bingo VR
About: It is unheard of that a casual BINGO! game is a weapon of choice which drives aliens to their homeworld and defeats them forevermore. Yet, it is based on a true story.

Name: Wet Dog Corp
About: Race against the clock and clean up these mucky pups! Created by Virtual Reality Development students at Ringling College of Art and Design.

Name: IMPACT
About: IMPACT is an immersive sci-fi game set on the Moon. Build and manage a lunar base, generating valuable scientific data along the way. This data is used by the European Space Agency to train a real AI that will eventually land on the Moon.

Name: Alas Astra
About: Among distant stars a lone Robot Knight must stand against an ancient and unfathomable evil. Explore the vast and alien Degathalion space station and battle the nefarious Xetanoids in a daring quest to confront their rulers and save the Centaurus galaxy.

Name: Aquarius
About: Aquarius is a 90's style arcade game where you play as a cave diver in search for treasure, guarded by the ocean's fiercest predators and its cuddliest minnows. Navigate through the caves, collect the treasure, and survive!

Name: Mech Marines: Steel March
About: Mech Marines is a strategic game inspired by Metal Marines (SNES, 1993 by Namco Bandai Games). Build up your island with unique buildings. Defend it at all cost. Attack your opponent with missiles and figure out a leak in the defense to destroy the enemy's bases with your Mech Marines. Equip them with various weapons.

Name: 誘拐犯 Kidnappers
About: 誘拐犯 Kidnappers is a horror game where you aim to escape without being caught by mysterious visitors while retrieving the game you lent to your friend.

Name: Jump Jumpz
About: Reach as high as possible while collecting as many coins as you can. This game has the difficulty and style of Arcade games of the 80s.

Name: Hank: Straightjacket
About: The time-traveling vigilante Hank has been captured by the devious Unraveler. However, before the crime genius gets rid of the hero, he must satisfy his curiosity - How has this pathetic drunk so easily thwarted so many of his plans?

Name: Teku
About: Place hexagonal tiles to form islands across a selection of varied levels. Teku is a peaceful game where the goal is to achieve the highest possible score.

Name: Hang Up
About: Players find themselves in a small room with a telephone switchboard. They must complete the correct cord circuits to connect calls. In doing so they can listen in on the different conversations and uncover the unsettling secrets that make up a larger mystery.

Name: The Enlightened League of Bone Builders and the Osseous Enigma
About: Reckon yourself to be a most esteemed anatomist, do you? Well then immerse yourself in an intriguing Victorian parlour of curios to see how quickly you can piece together Yorick's complete skeleton. There are lots of other things to explore too, so stop your lollygagging and see if you've got the right stuff to join the Enlightened...

Name: Parts of the Elephant
About: Weird things are happening in the Elephant Hotel. It's getting late, you're getting drunk, and moments in the lives of strangers are scattered around you like spilled puzzle pieces. Can you put it all together?

Name: Blitz Runner
About: In Blitz Runner, you'll dash through colorful landscapes, collecting dazzling gems that not only increase your score but also your speed! The more gems you collect, the faster you run, making every game a unique and exhilarating journey.

Name: Kili's treasure
About: Kili's dog Rosco had to be sent to the farm recently. To cheer Kili up her mother has organized a treasure hunt with a surprise at the end! Help Kili solve the clues one after another and get to the treasure!

Name: Synthetic Hazard
About: 2107 AD, Hopi Desert, Arizona. A secret biotech weapons laboratory has suffered a containment breach. A dangerous biological weapon capable of modifying machinery at its will has escaped. It wants to escape the facility and reach the surface. Stop it before it's too late.

Name: Loopomotive
About: Loopomotive is a short casual train survival game where you drive a train stuck in a loop that never stops! You can accelerate or slow down the train, but never stop it. Avoid accidents to complete levels!

Name: Art Diff
About: It is a cozy puzzle game in which you search for the differences between two pictures. Restore 26 animated artworks in the public domain, such as 'A Sunday Afternoon on the Island of La Grande Jatte' and 'The Great Wave off Kanagawa.'

Name: Witchcraft: Candy Hunt
About: Witchcraft: Candy Hunt is an old-school shooter game with charming pixel art graphics that will take you on a Halloween adventure. Fly on a broomstick and battle your way through three exciting levels, each one featuring unique spooky creatures such as pumpkin monsters, evil crows and ghosts.

Name: Croak Crusader: Spawn of the Spore Spectre
About: Embark on an odyssey into the unknown! Behold the tale of Toadman, an enigmatic being born from alien tech and the mysteries of Radiant Verde. Witness his perilous quest through treacherous jungles to confront Captain Croak in an epic showdown! Welcome to 'Spawn of the Spore Spectre'!

Name: Pulse Forge VR v0.544
About: Pulse Forge VR– get the highest score in your favourite music by destroying everything. Forge your own map for music destruction and have fun!

Name: Galeid.
About: 「いつもあなたの傍に」 Galeid.は不気味な夢の世界で魚を釣ったりゴミを食べたり世界を救ったりする こわかわホラーRPGです。

Name: Kickoff Legends
About: Kickoff Legends is a multi-player, cross-platform football team management game. It's a real time football multi-player game that is fast and fun. Matches are played in real time. Any platform against any platform!

Name: One Week With The Mafia
About: After a misuse of your home address, and the general incompetence of an old friend, you find yourself stuck with the Italian mafia hunting you down. In this parody of Scott Cawthon's 'Five Nights at Freddy's', it is up to you to stop the mafia from wasting you.

Name: Spark of Survival
About: Defend your kingdom by fighting back against an approaching robot invasion. Place, upgrade, and relocate elementally-charged towers strategically to destroy incoming robots. Watch as elements collide and combine to create explosive reactions!

Name: Thereafter
About: You play as a stray black cat, abandoned in a dark alleyway. Your goal is to find and untangle the mysteries of several lost spirits in order to fulfill their journey into the afterlife.

Name: Quanero 2 - System Release
About: Imagine you are a detective in the future, with the best surveillance system ever developed. You can reconstruct crime scenes in virtual reality, move freely and manipulate the time to carry out your investigations.

Name: 阴桃花
About: 幻想非幻想 自然超自然

Name: Bite At The Museum
About: Play as Tony the baby Tyrannosaurus and rex shop like never before. Tricera-top the scoreboard as you styrac up dino-mite combos! Veloci-rip through 3 unique exhibits! Stego around and ptero down all sorts of displays and cause a giganto mess! Ankylosaurus!

Name: Welcome To... Chichester 1/Redux : The Spy Of America And The Long Vacation
About: WTC 1/Redux is the origin story of how the protagonist (that is, you !) unknowningly ends up in England. When a long forgotten mission resurfaces, your nemesis takes drastic measures to deal with it - including taking you along with her.

Name: Treasure of Barracuda
About: A Point & Click Puzzle Adventure, exploring the Treasure of Barracuda, a real brick built puzzle box. Solve the riddle using your old grandfathers amulet and find the treasures within! Fully buildable and functional in real life as well!

Name: Synthetic Love
About: Biochemist Victor (the inventor of the serum) and three girls go to the isolated private residence high in the mountains. They work, they rest and make experiments there. The serum has an impressive effect – your sex satisfaction becomes incredible. But there's one unpleasant side effect – partial memory loss.

Name: Corrupted Universe Cries Quietly
About: Roguelike survival game that focuses on combat and exploration. Have Fun! Inspired by Muck.

Name: The Love Boat
About: Join the Love Boat crew and relive the famous TV show! 🚢 ❤

Name: Save Iron Globe
About: Learn the story of Priscilla, the Perfect Soldier (PS) of the United Earth Federation, awakened from the cryptosleep to stop an alien invasion.

Name: Senna and the Forest
About: A forest is a family and families have secrets. Talk to the trees, solve detective-style puzzles and make your way to the heart of a dying forest and experience a story of tragedy and hope.

Name: Crypto Skoof Tycoon
About: Click on the sloppy guy, earn money and spend it on increasing your media influence and reputation to become a real crypto scammer. Decorate your table with the most valuable artifacts. Get rich from promises and become the blogger you hate so much!

Name: Dusk Mark
About: The dusk mark is a symbol of strength given by the gods and a fantasy legend that has been lost for thousands of years. The protagonist is sent to Driftleaf Town, deep in the dense forest. The power of the imprint is carried on the back, and what is waiting for him?

Name: 7 Years War
About: Top-Down 2D action/adventure about the French-Indian War in North America.

Name: Bubble Tea : game for thinking and imagination
About: Let's find legendary bubble tea to cure grandpa! This is a puzzle RPG Maker game that take you on an adventurous journey across the world, through various dangers to find legendary treasures according to Grandpa's orders.

Name: GHOSTWINTER
About: You are in The Ghost suit. Welcome to The Virtual world - little village in Siberia, Russia. Try to complete Single game hardcore mission - it's not so easy, but the atmosphere... Winter landscape is beautiful and magic! Play Multiplayer DM/TDM/GG Matches and ranking UP! Have fun!

Name: Kira
About: Lose yourself in a Faerie workshop full of mysterious structures, magical devices, and colorful beasts. This is a mini-experience designed to highlight the immersive qualities of VR for friends and family, allowing them to explore each nook and cranny of a fantasy scene.

Name: Humans V Zombies
About: Play Humans Versus Zombies, a new kind of battle royal FPS. There are three distinct game modes, survival mode, get to the objective, last man standing.

Name: Connected! 2
About: Minimalistic puzzle game. Connect the opposite sides of the same color by rotating the tiles. Each level is randomly generated, but guaranteed to be solvable!

Name: Our Hero! First
About: [Game 1 of 3] Our Hero! is a funny Hack and Slash Adventure game with RPG mechanics starred by cute and colorful characters: dive into this light-hearted story-driven world, full of treasures, puzzles, secret places and boss fights!

Name: Snowkissed Romance
About: It's 1994 in the mountains of Northern Japan - Are you ready to fall in love? Snowkissed Romance weaves addictive stat-building, day planning, and mini-games with captivating storytelling and plenty of ’90s shoujo charm.

Name: Beat the Blitz
About: Join Peyton Manning in Gatorade’s Beat the Blitz, a free-to-play VR experience. You’ll test your throwing skills on the field, travel inside the body to see how hydration impacts performance and more. See you on the field.

Name: Mobile Wars X
About: Mobile Wars X is a shoot them up in which you must fight against an alien invasion. You can choose between 3 Mobile X: A very fast ship capable of firing tracking missiles, A robot with advanced ninja weapons and a special ship with unique laser attacks!

Name: Dino Clicker
About: Tap repeatedly to crack open an ancient egg and collect 9 different dinosaurs, from common to rare and elusive creatures. Try out this addictive clicker game that challenges you to unlock them all through luck and perseverance!

Name: biorhythm
About: You are bacteria, lost in the human bloodstream. Explore, fight, and uncover the mystery of your new home to the beat of the heart.

Name: Milky Way TD SURVIVORS AUTOBATTLER RTS: Earth
About: Milky Way is a unique mix of Tower Defense, RTS, Auto-Battler and Survivors. Build your base, choose random upgrades and use powerful skills to survive against hordes of enemies.

Name: ERR - 001
About: The simple RPG game where once you beat it, it's over... A simple to grasp plot and easy to pick up gameplay, ERR-001 is designed for all players. With 5 different areas to the game to master, this short but sweet experience will either interest or intrigue you depending on the way things are looked upon. Every world needs a leader...

Name: 宇宙大战
About: Universe Wars is a multiplayer game similar to Plants vs. Zombies. Plants become evil Earthlings, and zombies become cuddly three-eyed aliens. And on the basis of 'Plants vs. Zombies' and increased the multiplayer online, fashion system, formation evolution, protagonist system.

Name: Bad birthday
About: You decided to explore the area outside the city to find a suitable place for a birthday picnic with your friends. But......

Name: Hoping this Finds You Well
About: An experiment in letter writing, meant to evoke the distinctly sweet homoeroticism of Victorian and Edwardian literature. Follow the correspondence of two professors, in the months before one of them makes a decision he'll never be able to take back.

Name: Pipe Escape
About: A 2D puzzle game with a spin! Make your way through obstacle courses of pipes, water streams and bats as fast as you can whilst spinning out of control.

Name: 할 짓 없는 군주님
About: 'Imperator with nothing to do' is a classic strategy RPG that is very simple, but requires choice and focus. Experience 100% original graphics, sounds, and detailed battles for free!

Name: Dawn of a Soul
About: Dawn of a Soul is a mathematical puzzle game about creating perfectly balanced paths by building chains and combos.

Name: self-indulgence
About: In SELF-INDULGENCE, players delve deep into the haunting psyche of the game's lone developer. Engulfed by a relentless cycle of self-destruction. A single-player, old-school survival horror experience that explores the harrowing confines of personal demons.

Name: Two Brothers
About: Two Brothers is an Action Adventure game that features a classic Gameboy aesthetic. Roy Guarder, inventor, scientist, and philosopher, is on an expedition to discover the origins of life. This quest has brought him to 'The Cursed Lands,' a stretch of land so dangerous and shrouded in mystery that it hasn't been explored in over...

Name: War Sniper
About: Engage in intense warfare like never before in 'War Sniper' the ultimate war game. Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-pumping action of a battlefield where snipers, tanks, and drones are your tools of destruction.

Name: Blade Flash Death
About: Control your samurai by manipulating the timeline. Be diligent with each movement you make. When ready, press play and watch the scene unfold. If you've thought-out your movements carefully, you will be the last samurai standing.

Name: Nystagmus
About: An island, shrouded with darkness and clouds of mystery, is your only hope for salvation. In this first-person horror game, your character, an engineer in search for his fiancee, arrives at the suspicious island you’ve only ever heard about.

Name: SnowBrawl
About: A multiplayer snowball fighting game! Choose from different hero characters, team up with ur friends and best the opposing team in familiar game modes!

Name: VERY BAD DREAMS - FREE DIVE
About: Bad Dreams is a Solo VR Horror game with immersive gameplay based on real gesture. A unique experience, where nightmares become reality.Fight, Run, Jump, Wipe your eyes, Cover your ears... while avoiding the game's traps and puzzles, you won't come out unscathed!

Name: Dungeon Divers Prologue
About: Dungeon Divers Prologue is a dungeon-themed roguelike puzzle game about clearing derelict dungeons. As the newest employee of Dungeon Divers Inc., you must advance through multiple levels, use your wits, and tools you acquire along the way to get to the core to defuse it and bring home the cash.

Name: Obliteracy
About: Obliteracy is a word game set in a utopian future where energy is generated from language itself. Word-warriors pilot enormous mechanized robots in a tournament to prove themselves worthy of the title of Champion—and to earn the chance to craft the future of the world.

Name: Fortune Cookie
About: Look, there are fortune cookies! Fortune cookie is a click game which won't make you fat. Here you click the fortune cookie and see the words in it.

Name: Too Angry To Die
About: Take control of Gideon Rageblade in this action-filled clicker game. Click to destroy endless waves of enemies, face epic bosses, and earn unique drops. Embrace the rage and irony in a quest that proves dying once was just a fluke—he's too angry to die again.

Name: T.I.M.E
About: T.I.M.E is a First-Person, Arena, Boomer Shooter that pits players against each other in a one-on-one contest. Players compete in a round-based first to 3 wins system that is balanced through time rewinding set by the round loser to balance the scales of skill against strategy.

Name: Warranty Man
About: First person scary game set in an underground parking garage. Find your lost parking card, collect some cash to pay for your parking and get out before Warranty Man finds you and sells you auto insurance.

Name: Reflection of a Fallen Feather
About: In Reflection of a Fallen Feather you are the enemy. Triumph in turn-based battles to transform into defeated monsters - each party member is a fusion of three monster types with near infinite customization. Find hidden treasures used to jump, smash, swim, and manipulate the environment.

Name: 1.96.9 all update
About: The game is simple to play, with players using the mouse to search for hidden NPCs. The game allows players to save while playing, and there is no 'game over' for players, making it easy to play. Some NPCs like to hide, so we recommend exploring the map thoroughly.

Name: Devinica
About: A corporate artificial intelligence simulator.

Name: Cardaria
About: Сardaria is a simple and smart collectible card game with unusual mechanics

Name: ParkTo
About: ParkTo is a simple puzzle game that stops the car at its destination. You don't drive a car yourself. The car just moves forward. Use the given triggers to move the car to its destination.

Name: Dead Blue Rose
About: A multiplayer horror where you escape a laboratory at the cost of others.

In the year 2040 you and the 12 billion inhabitants of the Earth fled from the Earth after being attacked by extraterrestrials, you took refuge on a planet named 4004-022, but this planet is also being attacked by aliens.

Name: Scratch Man
About: In this 2.5D obstacle dodging game Scratch Man is on a train home when he encounters his old enemy the Evil Squirrel, who has recently escaped from prison.

Name: Cones in Space
About: Cones in Space: Literally the best survival game you will ever play.

Name: Oil Wars
About: Strategy and simulation game where you will be faced to enemies for control of oil refinery and strategic resource locations.

Name: Dumball Rush
About: Dumball Rush is an online racing party game from 2 to 8 players with a 3D third person view. The player controls a snowball that is racing against other players. Roll in the snow to be bigger and faster! Avoid obstacles and activate gifts to take advantage and win the race!

Name: DOOM TOMB
About: Cut to the chase with DOOM TOMB! A chase-based PvP game. Catch, evade and outplay your opponents in this 3D arena filled with obstacles! Chose from a selection of abilities and items that will suit your playstyle.

Name: The Curse of the Egyptian Pyramid "Remaster Edition"
About: A first-person horror game about Egypt. Explore the scary secret of the mysterious pyramid. In order to protect the heroes from danger, the player can use the characters' cameras to see a ghostly entity and anomalies invisible to the human eye.

Name: Crackin' Smackin
About: A chaotic stoneage arena brawler with destructible levels for up to 8 players. Customize your character and jump into action!

Name: The Homestead
About: The most visually stunning representation of a real-world environment. This is a real location, a real art-gallery based in Auckland New Zealand. The art-work has been scanned to a level of detail not demonstrated in any other traditional VR experience.

Name: VirZOOM Arcade
About: VirZOOM Arcade is a collection of virtual reality sports for the VirZOOM bike controller. Your pedaling and leaning propel you through race tracks, battle grounds, and soaring skies. Play online live or against ghost players.

Name: Arboreal
About: Arboreal is an open world farming and adventure game where you have to save the world from a spreading corruption.

Name: Faceted Flight
About: Faceted Flight is a stylized stunt flight game designed to deliver the thrill of flight. Take control of the Hover Jet and challenge ghost racers in Ring Attack or just relax and explore Free Flight....or you could always hop into the cockpit of the Jump Seat and give Target Practice a try. What are you waiting for? Do a barrel roll.

Name: Assault on the Necrospire
About: Assault on the Necrospire is a roguelike with an emphasis on interesting loot and character building. Your mission is to destroy the Necromancer. Wipe the dust off your spellbook; you're going to need it.

Name: Riptide
About: In Riptide, gear up your ship, customize your loadout, and fight for the fleet! Riptide is a spaceship combat game with an emphasis on powerful customizations and utility. Accomplish your mission by loading up and taking out the enemy.

Name: Phantom Ascension
About: Dive into the intense 'Phantom Ascension,' a single-player action game set in a dystopian 20XX. With unchecked corporate power, crumbling governments, and rampant lawlessness, the Blacklight Gang, a coalition of criminals and mercenaries, seizes control, plunging the world into chaos.

Name: The Energy Lab
About: You find yourself at the threshold of an abandoned lab containing technology of unknown origins. Welcome to The Energy Lab. You've found your way in, now find a way out.

Name: LastOneStanding
About: LastOneStanding is an online cooperative third-person zombie shooter game. You will play as a special force soldier, using guns, grenades and whatever you got to kill as many zombies as you can. You can play solo or create a listen server to invite two other friends to take on exciting levels.

Name: 4Prot
About: 4Prot is an interactive prototyping laboratory that allows you to create virtual spaces for students and professionals to creatively build different types of prototypes. The free version of 4Prot allows you to save 2 projects with 100 blocks each.

Name: Fantasy Defense
About: Evil woke up! Horde of an evil wizard, which is ready to seize all kingdom of Hamdar. Ahead of you is a difficult task - build a powerful defensive system and throw an evil army into Hell. 12 levels and more than 6 hours of gameplay.

Name: Tori
About: Explore spirits of sound by flying as a bird through the mystical floating islands of Otokai.

Name: Lathe Safety Simulator
About: Play Lathe Safety Simulator and learn how to operate an industrial lathe. Follow the tutorials, identify all the major lathe parts and turn a work piece.

Name: Thirdmage
About: Thirdmage is a thirdperson arena spellslinger game where you try to defeat your oppenents using a variety of spells and throwing them on the hazzards present on each map.

Name: Hack Run ZERO
About: It's time for a SECOND Hack Run! Test your skills again as you hack your way through strange and secretive organizations to discover their hidden agendas! Hack Run ZERO uses old school prompts (like dos and unix) to help you navigate from system to system.

Name: TRANSCEND
About: In this unique 2D world, you will partake in the story of a 'Spirit Warrior' who is seeking to become THE Greatest Warrior ever. In order for him to fulfill his destiny he will 'transcend' time, worlds and even dimensions, to test himself against the strongest warriors to ever live...

Name: Electronics Circuits Simulator
About: Learn electronic circuits in a new and exciting way and increase your understanding of basic electronic circuits. Seven complete levels to assess your knowledge of basic electronic circuits including Series Parallel Resistor circuits, Resistor Capacitor (RC) filters, Graetz Bridges, Wheatstone bridges, Weighted summing amplifiers,...

Name: Wandering Skies
About: Navigate through the Sky Lands and uncover its secrets to restore their lost harmony. In this first person platformer, use your abilities to reach the end of each level. Observation and skill are the keys to success !

Name: Crochet Cavalcade
About: Crochet Cavalcade is an adult visual novel series, with an expansive cast of characters and unique scenarios! Chapters will be published frequently, and each new story adds another intertwining link into the ever developing world!

Name: Toy Robot
About: You are a simple toy robot with no name, no memory and no serial number. You discover that your battery is damaged. Now the journey to repair your battery and save your life begins... In this journey you will need to: Run, Jump, Shoot and Solve Puzzles.

Name: Cats-Shaped
About: Cats-Shape is a clicker game, in which you click on a cat shape!Earn random cat shapes to grow your collection!Come hang out with us and let's become the kings of cat shapes!

Name: Short Memories
About: A short story about life shared through the conversation of two women sitting on a bench.

Name: Boo's There?
About: Boo’s There is a single-player time management game where players must question trick or treaters at your doorstep on Halloween night. Visitors vary from monsters to regular trick-or-treaters, so watch and question visitors for any clues as you do your best to protect your town from peril!

Name: Piwall
About: Play a neon pinball machine in the arcade room and take a look at the released and upcoming JanduSoft games.

Name: ELIOS VR
About: In a virtual reality space with a fantasy background, three basic classes (warrior, wizard, archer) raid giant boss monsters. MMORPG VR game content that allows you to perform special role missions with a special class called Ghost (Ghost) if you fall into spirit escape during battle with a boss.

Name: Mist of the Undead
About: Mist of the Undead is the perfect laid back shoot em up zombies game. Fight off endless rounds of zombies meanwhile upgrading your weapons to do serious damage. Speed around the map with the speed boost and super jump. Purchase armor, or don't, can you survive?

Name: Football Blitz
About: Football Blitz is an action packed, vibrant soccer game. You can choose from several different game modes, so everyone will find his favorite one. Play a single player mode or get even more fun gaming with your friend in 2 players mode.

Name: Fireworks Desert Blast
About: You're alone in the desert with an endless supply of fireworks. Let the rockets (and your imagination) fly.

Name: The Journey Home
About: A VR interactive story about family, dreams, and the meaning of life. You will be an astronaut who failed the mission, gets stuck in space and haunted by past memories.

Name: VGA Planets Nu
About: A graphical multi-player play by turn war game that simulates combat in space between galactic empires.

Name: We're All Going To Die
About: Gather a squad and fight for survival in We're All Going To Die. Work together with a squad using abilities, equipment and exploring different levels to make the most of your fight against your demise, after all, you're all going to die at some point.

Name: Cluck
About: Cluck is an extremely fast-paced fps arena shooter. Spawn with only a pistol and find weapons, armor, health and powerups such as the Quack and Speed along the map. Jump pads and portals are also around the map, enabling you to get to your destination. And customize your own chicken!

Name: Unearthed Inc: The Lost Temple
About: Explore the Lost Temple in this thrilling virtual reality adventure! Pair up with your sidekick Droid, solve ancient puzzles, fight a giant spider, and wreak havoc with your telekinetic powers!

Name: Harvester of Dreams : Episode 1
About: Harvester of Dreams is a first person adventure game, taking you on board an steampunk airship. Unravel the secret of the ship while you are exploring it room after room.

Name: Cloaks and Capes
About: C&C is a Roguelite Shooter with a Dark theme. Inhabit Cloaker, a caster who grieves for vengeance and whose sole purpose is to resurrect his son as you engulf celestial beings in flames of anguish. Embrace powerups and spells as you pave your path through traps filled caverns and abysses.

Name: Colony 42™
About: Alone, lost and forgotten. You tread the dusty ruins of a deserted, city-sized Nuclear Bunker in search of freedom...

Name: NIGHTSTAR: Rogue Wings
About: NIGHTSTAR™: Rogue Wings is an Arcade Flight Combat Game set in a decaying galaxy where machines are hunting down the last of us. Restore freedom through deep space and planetside missions in this epic single-player campaign.

Name: Overboard
About: A ridiculous VR game about fighting bloodthirsty and increasingly deadly sharks using makeshift weapons. Elevate the battle from the open ocean to the skies, and even into space! The sharks will stop at nothing to devour a tasty human.

Name: A.V.
About: A.V. is a first-person stealth-puzzle-musical-adventure game (Try saying that 5 times fast). The game places the player in the role of a rogue music-processing algorithm from a computer's sound systems. From this role, the player can view the world only through audible means.

Name: Goalkeeper Journey
About: Step into the gloves of a rising goalkeeper, starting your journey at local clubs and working your way to the world’s biggest football stages.

Name: Midnight Syndrome
About: A summer night consumes the girls... Exploration type horror ADV game

Name: Captain Lycop : Invasion of the Heters
About: A space shooter mixing adventure, action and tactics. Face off against pen-pushing insects, merciless enemies and epic bosses. Your only hope is to banish all cowardice and follow a virtuous path.

Name: Hashtag Dungeon
About: Hashtag Dungeon is a dungeon crawler with roguelike elements that uses Twitter as its method of dungeon generation! Create dungeons yourself using our built-in dungeon editor and tweet your levels to the world, or venture through levels created by other players.

Name: Air Raid Over Britain
About: Air Raid Over Britain (technical demo) places you in the heart of a small English town during the 'The Blitz' (1940-1941). Uncover facts about WWII and experience an actual air raid by German HE-111s.

Name: Security: Stories by the fans
About: Every time you die, a new story begins. In this prologue to Security: The Horrible Nights your job is to monitor the hospital and fix problems when they happen. Every night, a new horror tale based on fans’ ideas will unfold.

Name: Eira: Echoes of Adventure
About: Eira: Echoes of Adventure is a casual adventure game where you play as Eira and trace your grandfather’s footsteps to journey through an icy world filled with curious alien wildlife, spatial puzzles, and hoards of treasure.

Name: KICK ME!
About: Kick opponents off rooftops in KICK ME! Multiplayer PvP madness awaits as you strategize, deploy unique abilities, and grab boosts to secure victory. Navigate dynamic arenas, and be the best kicker! Are you up for the challenge?

Name: Cursed House
About: In the process of searching for real estate, he comes across a lucrative offer - a 2-storey house with a basement and an attic for only $295,000. After much hesitation, he contacts the seller and agrees to the deal. But what happened on the next day after the move, he was shocked.

Name: Anderson (Alpha)
About: CAN YOU ESCAPE THE MYSTERIOUS ROOM AND SOLVE THE SECRETS BEHIND YOUR CAPTIVITY?

Name: Astrogon
About: Hardcore precision platformer, with creative mode, multiplayer versus, first competitive of the kind, with speedrun and international leaderboard. Jump and dash your way, between walls and obstacles, to reach the teleport portal.

Name: SpaceDRG
About: SpaceDRG is a high-octane, motion sickness inducing action game featuring cute pixel art graphics. Fight against the letters D, R & G in a space themed 1980s retro arcade environment.

Name: Ping
About: Defend the center against a nonstop surge of dots by changing the color of the screen!

Name: Junkpunk: Arena
About: Junkpunk Arena is an arena combat game in which the player controls robots that they designed from various pieces of junk. The gameplay consists entirely of online competitive multiplayer in which the player's robots are pitted against each other.

Name: Earthshakers
About: Earthshakers is an action shooting game that fights against enemies as a post-human 'puppeteer' born with the ability to manipulate machines in the future world where the war between humans and machines is deepening.

Name: Immortals Revenge
About: Step into the immersive MMORPG world of Immortals Revenge, blending adventure, role-playing, and hack-and-slash gameplay. With rich storytelling and expansive landscapes to explore, master divine abilities to restore balance to Olympus.

Name: JAMs
About: JAMs is a clicker game with Steam items themed around art and music, served in jars.

Name: Amihailu in Dreamland
About: A magical, dreamy adventure starring Amihailu Dugashoba and her friends! You'll wander the echoey and endless halls and spooky painting worlds to solve the mystery and escape the fantasy world. Or you would solve the mystery... if anything Amihailu said made a grain of sense!

Name: Sillyfun Valley
About: Francis's best friend and canine companion, Chewbarka, is missing! Join her on a hilarious animated (FREE) adventure as she searches the quirky neighborhoods of Sillyfun Valley to find her dear doggie. Along the way she will meet eccentric inhabitants, solves puzzles, and even find romance!

Name: Oh Darling! I Hate To Tell You This...
About: Little Darling makes a wish at the place where all the wishes come true. Then her journey begins. She has to fight against the monsters with the power of light.

Name: Platform Gun
About: A sci-fi puzzle platformer using the platform gun

Name: Battlemon
About: Battlemon is an action-fighting game where you take control of small, cute character and battle in various different arenas. There are many vibrant and powerful different characters to choose from, with even more being gradually added through updates!

Name: GLADOM - 2D PVP Free & Skill Based
About: GLADOM it's a new and free to play multiplayer game PVP oriented with a focus on skill rather than progression.Play game modes of Deathmatch and Capture The Flag, in 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, and 4v4 matches.Easy to play, hard to master sliding physics-based mechanics.

Name: Car Crash Couch Party
About: CCCP Is a local multiplayer party game!

Name: Baby Coyote
About: The Arts And Craft Islands Awaits for your arrival, Join Coyote and General Warthog on a tropical Platforming Adventure across this creative archipelago, to save The Craft Kingdom from the Evil Captain Fat Cat.

Name: All Abug!
About: Faced with the threat of a wave of toxic fumes, embark on an expedition to save yourself from certain death. Gobble up obstacles on your path to allow your caterpillar to move along and board survivors who also seek asylum!

Name: Shoo, Box!
About: Shoo, Box! is a silly sneaker adventure, where you play as a shoe box who comes to life with a pair of human legs. Use the shoes you collect to solve exciting stealth puzzles, explore the world in search of your owner, and ruin a bunch of peoples' days!

Name: Steel & Bone
About: Explore the mysterious aristocrat's dungeon in this free and short but exciting dungeon crawler.

Name: DeadTruth: The Dark Path Ahead
About: DeadTruth is an episodic, first-person horror adventure, featuring a complex and emotional story, filled with dark and mysterious secrets. Are you willing to enter the unknown?

Name: The Fleets of Sol
About: The Fleets of Sol is an strategy-survival meets fleet management game where you command a group of capital ships as you jump from sector-to-sector engaging a persistent enemy, rescuing civilians, and trying to grow your fleet to improve your survival odds.

Name: Iragon: Prologue
About: The Prologue to an Erotic RPG Game with a story about magical girls, elves, and a bisexual sorceress.

Name: Portable Farm
About: A 3D idle farming game for VR that uses a portal to allow users to see and interact with the scene presented inside of it, while inside of any other VR game

Name: Vessel Blue
About: Solve text-based puzzles by interacting with a computer you've found and uncover Vessel Blue's secrets. You are bound to your chair, so defending yourself against unwanted guests is difficult.

Name: Eon of the Green: Area Delta (Prologue)
About: A secret scientific research on life’s final terrene days. Your consciousness serves as a vessel gathering information on a future period they dubbed Eon of the Green. Slowly but surely it takes hold of your mind and the only human factor is that colleague on the intercom.

Name: Banana 3D
About: In this game you click to earn skins to trade with and to collect. You receive a drop every 30 minutes, up to 4 a day. There is a short collection of developer-created skins, with an in-game workshop up-loader for the community to create their own skins for the Steam market.

Name: Codename: TIARAS
About: Codename: TIARAS is a fast paced cyberpunk game focused on player movement and reaction time to overcome obstacles and collect data cubes.

Name: A Bad Day For A Hangover
About: You awaken with the worst of hangovers in a nuclear bunker with supplies running low, the only chance of survival is to scavenge for tinned goods in the robot infested nuclear wasteland above before the town is nuked again

Name: Nemesis Realms
About: Be the massive raid boss in VR, smacking heroes around with your awesome powers. Be a multi-headed dragon spewing fire, or an arcane entity wielding the power to tear down worlds. Only possible in the ultimate VR bossfight game: Nemesis Realms!

Name: 沃瑞尔：荒境
About: 《沃瑞尔(Warrior)：荒境 》是3D Rogue Like动作游戏。玩家化身勇者追寻着传说中英雄们的足迹，在破碎的诺达尼尔大陆上不断探索死亡、轮回，去各个地方寻找遗落的宝物和祝福，还有关于时序奥秘的只言片语，想办法寻找到斩断时序轮回、击败隐藏在大陆深处的黑暗。 在游戏中，玩家每次关卡体验都是随机的，每一次开启新的挑战篇章，你可以在游戏中组合不同的战斗技能、流传之物、宝物，选择不同的地图策略来获取崭新的游戏体验与战斗节奏。

Name: Plight
About: Delve into the immersive world of Plight, where darkness has consumed the planet, and its up to you to re-energize it! Challenge yourself with over 90 handcrafted levels that put your puzzle solving skills to the test!

Name: BomberGuys
About: BomberGuys is a multiplayer game made with Unreal Engine. It is played by 2 to 4 players in an arena. Your task is to undermine all opponents. The last one left in the arena wins.

Name: Nephilim
About: Battle Angels and Demons alike as Strider Lazarus -  a fighter born again to master Darkness and Light - in this student-made isometric combat game.

Name: Sentinels
About: Sentinels is a free-to-play hero shooter game created by ClearSky Studio. Master the powerful abilities of the various agent characters in the game and experience tactical squad play, fast-paced hero shooting and team deathmatch.

Name: Dinos
About: Hatch eggs, collect dinosaurs, and trade them with friends! Get free eggs every few hours or trade your extra dinosaurs for more eggs!

Name: IVRI
About: IVRI is a space-station exploration game in which you navigate an eerie, abandoned space station, piecing together the puzzle of the missing crew and uncovering the secrets hidden within the ship's walls.

Name: Evil Sinister
About: You're a journalist investigating an abandoned house. Armed with only a flashlight, navigate its haunted halls to uncover its secrets. Beware, malevolent forces lurk, blurring reality and nightmare. Will you survive to reveal the truth, or become another victim of its sinister grasp?

Name: The Unfound Soul
About: Unlock the ultimate power as you combine artifacts to create even more powerful ones in this turn-based roguelike adventure. Collect over 1000 weapons, armor pieces, and artifacts as you vanquish your foes and rise to the top as the ultimate soul.

Name: Cuboid Bouncer
About: Cuboid Bouncer is a 3D Side-Scroller video game that includes 12 levels with different challenges on each level. The player is called Cuboid (a cube like character) that must jump or bounce its way through the different obstacles.

Name: BLUE NIGHT LAUNDROMAT
About: A short 2D exploration adventure in a retro style! Explore a laundromat in the middle of the night and try to clear it!

Name: Bean Battle Brawl
About: A simple, early beta 3D multiplayer fps!

Name: illumizzle: Finding the lost light
About: illumizzle: Finding the lost light is a single-player puzzle adventure game. The main characters, Raco and Vera, live in a village in a virtual world where there is no natural light. Help them solve puzzles to finish their adventure of repairing their broken sun!

Name: Flip
About: Flip is a a puzzle game for your eyes and your brain. It has a simple and easy to understand mechanic, but the possible combinations on each puzzle will require deep thinking to solve them in the minimum number of moves. Play just to chill out or to exercise your brain.

Name: Spirit Realm
About: Take a trip into another dimension in Spirit Realm! In this VR short, artist Matthew Reed brings his vision of spiritual worlds and astral planes to the immersive space of VR. No controllers necessary, experience by standing, sitting or laying down. Audio design by James Raymond.

Name: Until None Remain: Battle Royale PC Edition
About: Until None Remain is a futuristic multiplayer third person shooter in a Battle Royale or Last Man Standing format. Matches pit weaponless players against one another in a death match that continues until only one player remains. Players must rush to acquire equipment to defeat the competition.

Name: Dies irae ~Amantes amentes~
About: Night after night, the same dream of a guillotine. A headhunting serial killer. And the 'knights' in black who follow soon after. Irrationality that defies the realm of common sense begins to assault and devour the city.

Name: 3D Text Adventure
About: This Australian Indie studio is committed to converting the old Infocom text adventures to 3d first person adventures. 3D Text Adventure is the first of these to be developed. These infocom remakes are practically exactly the same as the originals.

Name: BlueSuburbia
About: BlueSuburbia is a haunted world where you explore poems through immersive environments. Seek out dark secrets, confront your demons, and delve deeper into a dream that dances between beautiful and terrible. Explore forgotten dreamscapes and open worlds on your quest to find hope.

Name: Monstro: Battle Tactics
About: Monstro takes the traditional tRPG gameplay and reconstructs it into a completely deterministic, logical experience with a twist of tactics. All of this is spiced up with ridiculous, tongue-in-cheek lore and approachable difficulty.

Name: The Directed
About: Go around dangerous traps, solve riddles. There is only one way. Can you find it?

Name: Ashen Knights: One Passage
About: Ashen Knights: One Passage invites you to explore the beginning of Ashen Knights story. Two heroes, two different genres: souls-like & hack’n’slash. They switch places and trigger a wild emotional storm making sure you never get bored of playing.

Name: Forgotten Lands: Online
About: A free online multiplayer RPG that tells the tale of a realm whose history was lost to time! Battle through hoards of monsters, join up with other players you meet along the journey, and compete in enjoyable mini-games to rank in the leaderboards!

Name: I Want to Fly
About: This is the story of Evie Maine, a shy girl with a difficult past. Evie is just starting her first year of university away from home. At first she's worried about fitting in, but once she sees a glider flying high above, her priorities quickly change. My name is Evie, and I want to fly.

Name: Age of ilcoin VR : Retribution
About: Age of ILCoin Retribution is a virtual reality game set in a futuristic sci-fi action setting where the ultimate treasure is ILCoins (ILCs). You will become “The Miner” and your mission will be to earn and protect your coins from the space aliens pirates.

Name: Strange Encounter
About: You are a ufologist investigating recent UFO sightings in a region of the Swiss Alps. Enjoy an original adventure full of mysteries !

Name: Zombie school-丧尸学院
About: Use virtual reality to enter a fictional open comic world, freely experience a horrible time with black and white comics, explore the story of each character and their respective destiny and ending

Name: Flame of Memory
About: Flame of Memory is a strategy/indie game where your task is to survive as long as you can, in a dark forest. At your disposal will get two guerillas, whom you can give commands. How long can you survive?

Name: Deckweaver: Descent Into Chaos
About: Deckweaver: Descent into Chaos is a first person deckbuilding game where the player crafts their abilities using different cards they find in the environment. Obliterate forces of chaos, fighting through corrupt locations in the world before getting the chance to face and defeat Chaos itself.

Name: Escape From The Depth
About: Escape From the Depth is a cosmic horror game that takes place in a submarine under the dark, cold, and desolate oceans of Europa. The player must survive while trying to collect the necessary items to safely evacuate the sinking submarine.

Name: Sweet Science – The Girls of Silversee Castle
About: This lighthearted visual novel lets you meet four quirky young women. A fun and highly interactive story taking you back in time – to the 1990s and a castle full of science, mysteries and – perhaps – romance...

Name: 文若九洲记：艳欲之乡
About: 这是一款剧情丰富，玩法大胆创新的卡牌游戏。您将以第一人称视角，扮演古希腊传奇英雄阿奇尔。与来自东方的游侠张文若，和随故事发展依次登场的九位美女熟妇们组成队伍，联手闯关的同时。提升她们的好感，邀请她们共度良宵。

Name: Inferno Wizards
About: Fight other players for control of wizard towers. A multiplayer action RPG with permadeath. Going for that sweet, sweet classic MMO feel.

Name: Find The Key
About: A strange game with skeletons and giant aliens.

Name: Blank
About: Dive in the metaphorical universe of Blank, a third-person puzzle-platformer game with stealth aspects. In a world filled with headless people, you must escape from the claws of the Metropolis, switch perspective to find the right path through this dystopian world and recover Blank’s true identity.

Name: Beer and Skittls VR
About: Beer and Skittls is a strategic VR game that will challenge your skill level of throwing.

Name: The Spreader
About: Learn to master the art of spreading and compete for the best times in the online leaderboard to prove you are the master spreader in this groundbreaking, never-before-seen spreading experience. Develop new strategies and execute them perfectly to have a chance for a top spot.

Name: Wizard Slime
About: Wizard Slime is a 2D Top-Down shooter game in which you dodge enemy bullets and shoot Magic Missiles guided towards your mouse pointer to successfully beat the dungeon levels without perishing in the process.

Name: Zhijiang Town
About: 你是然比，在架空的小镇上肆无忌惮地和妹子们玩耍（绝对清纯）

Name: Scrash
About: Being dubbed 'Pong on crack', Scrash is a two player face-off with breakable blocks, air hockey and table-tennis all in one.

Name: Red Spider: Vengeance
About: 'Red Spider' is a Hong Kong Noir-themed Visual Novel. There are 6 story routes with the different characters(approximately 105,000 words in total).

Name: From Nava
About: Uncover the secrets of an abandoned research laboratory by drawing patterns to cast powerful spells in order to escape a puzzle and monster-infested world.

Name: Biotix: Phage Genesis
About: Immerse yourself in an epic war for survival.

Name: Install Wizard
About: Play as the Install Wizard in an exciting retro twin-stick shooter/dungeon crawler in which you use your digital sorcery to zip around and fight within corrupted programs to take back your computer from the hands of an evil virus!

Name: Speedway Challenge League
About: Speedway Challenge League is a 2D speedway game. Feel speedway emotions thanks to realistic riding physics. Play in league mode, challenges mode, friendly matches and individual tournaments. Are you ready for the challenge?

Name: Floating Life Record
About: I found myself in a strange place filled with dangerous monsters, You must find a way to escape here and return to the real world, but before that, you need to collect materials, food, and weapons to ensure that you can survive here.

Name: Kleebuu Craves Fruit Salad
About: Explore your warped mind while solving platforming puzzles, in an tale that will unfold the deeper you get. Delve into the suppressed memories and remember how to leave this dream. Escape before the nightmares catch up... If you dream about fruit for long enough it's bound to turn rotten.

Name: The Homecoming Exhibition
About: A high-fidelity immersive gallery experience that places you into fully interactive 3D world of modern art, sculptures, and culture as you explore the minimalist environment inspired by Hiroshi Senju's Museum. Experience the future of art with groundbreaking work of Nako Baev.

Name: Lucky Night VR
About: Welcome to the world of Lucky Night. Enjoy a brand new life in Virtual Reality. Lucky Night is a VR social platform. You can make more friends and play fantastic games by VR equipment and intuitive ways of interactive.

Name: Fateful Destiny
About: Can you uncover the truth, or will the mystery remain buried? Explore a village, make final choices, and shape a story you can never undo.

Name: Janosik 2: Prologue
About: Pick up the mantle of the plucky maiden getting ready for her date night that is unceremoniously interrupted by the dastardly duo of Countess Bathory and Baron de Blonde in this prologue to the colourful Janosik 2 retro action-platformer…

Name: Experience: Colorblindness
About: Have you ever wondered how colorblind people see the world? Now you can experience it yourself. Let yourself be guided in narrative mode, explore 3 immersive environments, try fruit shopping or painting. Color vision tests also included.

Name: CRAPPY ZOMBIE GAME
About: Dismember Zombies - Manual Reloading System - Dual Wielding - Axe Throwing Zombies - Pistol Zombies - Full Left-handed Support

Name: Mortal Glory 2 Prologue
About: Manage a team of traveling gladiators in this turn-based fantasy roguelike. Find the best recruits, tinker with unique items and discover clever tactics on the battlefield. The tournament awaits those who desire MORTAL GLORY!

Name: The Bean Trials
About: In The Bean Trials, join your friends in competing to see who is the best! Play in over 20 different minigames all while trying to top the Leaderboards! Talk in text or voice chat with other beans while you complete challenges, win to earn coins, and unlock over 100 unique items for your bean!

Name: Crack it Up! - Prologue
About: This is the free Prologue of Crack it Up!, a trading card collecting game. Order booster packs from your 90s computer, crack them up, sell your duplicates and rarest cards for profit and complete your collections!

Name: Endless Bullet Heaven
About: In this endless bullet avoidance game, you join the fallen angel named Brace in her fight to reach the heavens in which she once resided!

Name: Boom
About: Boom is a logic puzzle game with a relaxing atmosphere, which builds clear links,An exciting new twist on a classic game without the element of guesswork!

Name: Mirror Shoot
About: In Aranet, space is connected through mirrors. You are an agent in Aranet and you need to learn the physics in this planet and fight for resources.

Name: Space Expand
About: Take control and expand your empire through different constellations in this minimalist 4X strategy game.

Name: I Wanna Brother
About: Little Timmy wants a brother! Help him manipulate their parents into making one...

Name: Jera
About: Jera is a 2D platformer game, in which the main character will improve its mobility gaining elemental powers affecting the stability of the world.

Name: Flat Trip
About: Flat Trip is a small platformer adventure, set in the doodly world of Flat Land – the weirdest place of all. Simple gameplay mechanics with challenging gameplay moments, interesting looking graphics and an awesome soundtrack – those are the core features of this game.

Name: Try Me
About: Try Me is a 3D Platform game where moving a ball to a floating square has never been more difficult. This game is completely torque based and all about momentum.

Name: Captain CigArrr
About: Captain CigArrr is a third-person naval combat game where the player has to focus on completing objectives and killing enemies on different maps.

Name: G9:League of Aces
About: In G9: League of Aces, heroes have personalized skills, allowing players to choose combinations based on preference. Three modes offer diverse gameplay: 5 vs 5, A.R.A.M., and the original Crazy Carnival Battle Park. From high-tech enhanced heroes to superhumans and aliens, all compete for glory!

Name: Hidden Chibis in Combinis
About: Hidden Chibis in Combinis is a FREE hidden object game asking you to find cute Chibis hidden in Combinis. Can you find them all?

Name: Pixel Puzzles Aardman Jigsaws
About: Pixel Puzzles Aardman Jigsaws is a traditional style jigsaw puzzle game.

Name: Pocket Plants
About: Explore environments as a mushroom man, collecting, planting, and watering plants to level up and restore the area by clearing fog or restoring crystal light.

Name: Legends Of Iona RPG (2007 arcade mod)
About: Zaak is trapped! Retro five-level dungeon crawler, hack and slash. Focus on the quests-story, get Ionix crystals for special attacks to exit the dungeon! Role-playing arcade joystick game converted for the PC. (Dev by fans of Phantasy Star 1987)

Name: Burntime Remastered
About: Burntime is a remaster and expansion of Max Design's post-apocalyptic strategy game 'Burntime' from 1993. It includes improvements like doubled resolution and wide screen support.

Name: Kingdoms Of Marazia: Classic
About: Conquer lands and build your kingdom in this multiplayer, real-time strategy game. Defend your castle and expand your army or be wiped off the map. Forging alliances may help you survive, but ultimately, it’s every man for himself in the ruthless world of Marazia.

Name: Human Rights
About: Human Rights is an interactive lyric video / toy, developed as a companion piece to the song 'Human Rights' by Monster Mansion. Players explore a set of scenes and objects that relate to self expression, while listening to the song, which was inspired by the 2017 Australian same-sex marriage vote.

Name: Thibalryn
About: A love letter to classic NES games! Explore an ever-expanding, challenging maze filled with countless secrets.

Name: SCP-087-B UE Remake
About: SCP-087-B UE Remake is a free single-player horror experience which seeks to recreate many aspects of the 2012 game SCP-087-B made by Joonas Rikkonen while keeping the charm and feel of the original.

Name: GymBro
About: GymBro – is a clicker game that immerses you in the world of sports and lets you click a kettlebell! Quickly join our community, play the mini-game where the main object is a kettlebell, change its appearance through the inventory, and earn rewards... Of course, in the form of kettlebell skins!

Name: Real Al's Humanity Academy
About: Real Al’s Humanity Academy combines wacky minigame action, a bizarre sense of humor, and the world’s most human robot to give you a VR party game unlike any other. There’s never been a better time to learn how to be human. Enroll today!

Name: ULTRA LMAD
About: A free roguelike deckbuilder about becoming an LMAD in a fantasy way. Get cards by taking classes, build a deck to battle against projects and complete all semesters to graduate.

Name: Bam Boom Blade 竹個擊破
About: Bam Boom Blade is a physics-based 2D joust game for 2 players. Act as a wuxia riding on a bamboo, and try to defeat your rival using only 2 joysticks on your gamepad! Experience the original Chinese wuxia sword fight aesthetics in the bamboo grove.

Name: Krieg
About: Built from the ground up for VR, Krieg is a team-based fantasy multiplayer competitive game. Thrown into the middle of a war between The King's Army and The Ancients, only the strongest will survive. This war of epic mercenaries and guardians will decide the fate of the realm.

Name: Saloon VR
About: Saloon VR is an arcade VR bartending simulator, where you focus on serving alcohol to your impatient customers as fast as possible, while also contending with other tasks behind the bar.

Name: Wind Ryder
About: A comedy, romantic dating sim, masquerading as an adventure RPG.

Name: Kristal Mağara
About: Kısa bir platform oyunu tüm kristalleri toplayıp bir sonraki seviyeye geçiyoruz oyun toplam 5 seviyeden oluşuyor

Name: INARI
About: Descend from the heavens and slay the evil spirits plaguing Japan in INARI, a college project made by students at Columbia College of Chicago. Slice your way through wicked yokai as you run across rooftops and make your way to the leader of the demonic parade.

Name: Comrade Quack
About: Comrade Quack is a fun, hybrid, third person tower defense game aimed at young adult audiences! Play as Comrade Quack to defend the Mother Pond from filthy Capitalist Pigs with an array of combat turrets, barriers, and more!

Name: Don't Get Tagged
About: Escape the Bobber occupied levels by doing puzzles and strategic movement through levels. Experience a variety of levels and challenges through out your play through, overcoming obstacles and those that block your path completely. Just don't get tagged In the processes.

Name: Welcome to Levy
About: All the women in Levy have disappeared. Why did they leave in bare feet? Discover their story along with 680 CGs and 11 unique endings in this apocalyptic visual novel.

Name: VR Jogger
About: Get started on the trail to a healthier you with VR Jogger today!

Name: Thin Judgment
About: What am I doing with my life? Here I am, putting miniature paper people into a vacuum tube. Why should I do that, when I can just watch them burn instead?

Name: Floresia I : Intemporel
About: Neyn was depressed after his wife Nayah died, when miraculously she appear in his dream, asking to resurrect her by accomplishing the mysterious Floresia quest.

Name: Burning Requiem: Fates
About: 'Burning Requiem: Fates' is a new 2-On-2 Indie Fighting Game produced by Project Requiem! Seeking to shake up the fighting game formula to bring some new flair! Featuring characters coming from the new tie in webcomic series of 'Burning Requiem'!

Name: Eonica Chess Battle
About: Eonica Chess Battle is an auto-battler game, mixing together elements of the classic chess game with elements from the fantasy fiction world.

Name: The Roy Game
About: A game where puking zombies try to puke over your trashcans, you have to defend your trashcans by placing automatic puking robots. Meanwhile you have to attack the zombie-printing machines.

Name: 异世界的雪与奇迹
About: 在十八岁生日的那一天，少女在月神面前许愿，希望自己能成为更勇敢更有主见的人。不知道神是否真的听见了她的愿望，但属于她的奇迹的确从天际降临了，如同一颗燃烧的流星般。

Name: Enclosure 3-D
About: You are Mike Goodman, joining a mission to investigate mysterious activity at an arctic base. Text-parser mystery adventure game inspired by classics of the genre, using pixel art in 3D.

Name: Harrowed World: What's Past Is Portents - Gothic Vampire Visual Novel
About: Step into a dark and unforgiving world where vampires pull the strings of humanity. You are not the hero, you are not the villain, you are nothing but a pawn in schemes that you cannot even begin to understand. The first in an anthology of vampiric tales elegantly presented in a gothic visual novel.

Name: 冒险之路(Adventure Road)
About: A global service, real-time combat Strategy Role-Playing online games(SRPG).

Name: Pool Game
About: A small, 'realistic-ish' Pool game you can play for FREE.

Name: MultiVerse
About: A Multiplayer game

Name: Envoy of Nezphere
About: A virtual-reality open-source rhythm game, Envoy of Nezphere welcomes everyone to feel the flow of the music by chopping the boxes alone the right direction.

Name: Bernackels' Shoggoth
About: Shoggoth is a multiplayer (4vs2) stealth game, in which the player takes on the role of a small dragon. With the ability to fly and to morph into items, your mission is either to seek and kill your opponents or to search for keys and escape the level.

Name: Click the Chick
About: The chick hungers for the click! Are you ready to click it and be the clicker of the chick?! Chirp, Chirp, Chirp!

Name: Skystead Christmas
About: In this festive-themed hidden object game, every click costs a snowball, and every snowball requires some snow! Collect snowflakes as they are falling and try and find all 24 Skylets to win!

Name: DreamBack VR
About: DreamBack VR is a virtual reality, first-person psychological horror game where you explore the eerie Rickfford Mansion, trying to unravel its mysteries and survive the experience with your sanity intact.

Name: Antimatter Elevator
About: Connect non-matching pieces to reach level 99.

Name: Move 'n' Bloom
About: A simple but also challenging puzzle game about moving, pushing and matching colors.

Name: Eternal Realm
About: The journey begins with four silent protagonists. They go into dungeons, fight enemies, defeat bosses, and level up. But, is that all there is to their lives? Meanwhile, in the real world, a group of bored game designers are looking to bridge the gap between the virtual and real worlds.

Name: Block Busters
About: Knock your friends or foes into oblivion in Block Busters! An exciting & chaotic brawler where up to 4 players bust their way to victory!

Name: Drive Thru Miami Prologue
About: A simulation of running and expanding a drive-thru shop where players take orders, prepare various beverages and foods, manage supplies, and serve customers efficiently.

Name: Arcanbreak
About: A short story-driven game about two inquisitors, Arun and Quila, investigating a murder. During the game you'll control both, each having their own set of skills you'll need to solve the mystery.

Name: Re: Award
About: Corridor walking simulator. You can walk in the corridor. Rin and Scarlett came to Rin's grandfather's house in the country.

Name: Dream #46
About: Chill exploration, contemplative ride game with a boat.

Name: The Night The Carsons Disappeared
About: On April 6th 2009 the Carson family disappeared from their home in Richmond, and were never heard from again. The last known communication with the family came when Mr.Carson contacted local police to report the occurrence of a series of unexplained phenomena.

Name: Power
About: POWER is a moddable multiplayer FPS. Our community can create, share, and play endless content using the full power of Unreal Engine 4.

Name: Octofight Escape
About: Octofight Escape is a social and cooperative game combining strategy and fun. In the Escape mode : escape with or against your friends (from 2 to 10 players). Be careful, your role will change at each game, many surprises...

Name: Escape Velocity
About: Escape Velocity is a singleplayer game that tells the rather extraordinary life story of an ordinary man who struggles to obtain the things he desires. The game seamlessly interweaves robust runner-like gameplay mechanics with an engaging story, which has been previously unexplored or a weakly employed combination in endless runner games...

Name: FreedroidRPG
About: FreedroidRPG is an open source sci-fi role playing game, where the player fights against hordes of bots in order to free humanity from rebel bots whom know no mercy.

Name: M.A.R.S.S.
About: MARSS is a reaction-oriented and puzzle laden RTS game. Use the power of numbers, mandatory friendship and space-gulag threats to take back Mars and expand the robocommunist empire!

Name: 二狗子历险记
About: 一款休闲娱乐的R P G游戏，游戏时间在30-50小时，没有无脑的BOSS战斗，都要稍微动点脑才能过关。 合理搭配队伍技能和词缀是你通关的关键所在。

Name: Tactical Genius Online
About: 'Tactical Genius Online' is a turn-based strategy game with the focus on multiplayer, in which the gameplay is broken up into two phases: concurrent planning and execution. Players give orders to their units, and only when everyone has finished their moves, the turns are put into action.

Name: Rapture - World Conquest
About: Rapture - World Conquest is a fast paced real-time strategy game that puts you in the celestial shoes of a jealous god. Guide your followers through the ages and vanquish the unbelievers in the surrounding kingdoms. Send your armies to take over regions and expand your realm.

Name: Gobligeddon
About: Welcome to the world of VR games! We are a team of enthusiastic developers who've created a VR game! And it works! For now this is a demo version, but we hope that the game will find a response in hot hearts and shaking hands of gamers!

Name: Bullets Squared
About: Bullets Squared is a free, challenging minimalistic rhythm shooter, with colorful graphics, made up of 99% squares.

Name: Maneuver
About: Maneuver is a 3D FPP melee action game where you fight by switching characters you manipulate through 'Hacking'. Experience fast tempo combat with strategies through hacking.

Name: EXAPUNKS: TEC Redshift Player
About: The Redshift is a fictional handheld game console in the universe of the puzzle programming game EXAPUNKS. This player will allow you to play Redshift games made by other EXAPUNKS players.

Name: Aftermoor
About: Leap, roll, ride, fly, and fight your way through the world of Aftermoor as you explore this 2-hour long epic. After waking up dead, you must unravel a story of mystery and betrayal as you fight for the chance to return to your body.

Name: Pirates Of Heaven
About: Pilot flying boats and swing from island to island using your grappling hook in epic 100-player battles in the sky.

Name: Tenami
About: Watch videos together with your friends online!

Name: Who is the Defendant: Deliberately Rough
About: 'Who is the Defendant' is a mystery genre visual novel. Players take on the role of a prosecutor, investigating a case involving 'a game with rudimentary art published on STEAM.'

Name: SoundLites
About: Use your Lite tool to build and explore a Sonic Light landscape.

Name: 江梦潮音 J.M.Rhythm
About: J.M.Rhythm is a black-and-white style rhythm game set in the southern regions of Yangtze River of China. It is the first work produced by J.M.Arcady. In this game, you can use our “rhythm generator” to upload your own music and it will generate a corresponding beatmap automatically.

Name: Only Wish
About: Climb to the top and try to defeat Mister Mysterious! Be careful not to fall!

Name: Extravaganza Rising
About: Fortune favors those bold enough to collect and train tiny monsters.Three brave souls boldly descend into a town ridden with monsters, allies and everything in between. Driven only by the promise of powerful trinkets, unlimited treasure and almost certain death, they venture on.

Name: Perspectives: Aleppo-Helsinki
About: What would it feel like if Helsinki was the city of Aleppo and you were there? What kind of possibilities does virtual reality offer to journalism?Aleppo-Helsinki is an immersive journalism pilot project developed together with Yle (Finnish Broadcasting Company).

Name: Astrohazard Solutions Ltd.
About: Astrohazard Solutions Ltd. is an interstellar and interspecies corporation dealing mainly with removing and redirecting asteroids and other cosmic junk that threatens their Clients.

Name: Eros Raiders
About: Welcome to Eros Raiders, the ultimate fusion of waifus, sci-fi, mechas and hentai!

Name: Lithium: Inmate 39
About: Lithium Inmate 39 is a platform and 3D puzzle game for horror genre. It tells the story of a psychiatric patient who must find the way back to his origins, discovering his past and getting explanations to understanding what is going on in his mind.

Name: Saccharine Pale?
About: an Overslake Torrential beckons the soul of a lost and hopeless warrior. you deserve forgiveness.

Name: AstroBike
About: Prepare your mind and skills for a challenging and addictive motorbike racing game. Collect every emerald - or the one challenging diamond - in each track and then head for the black hole. Discover the fastest route through 70 epic tracks. AstroBike is the ultimate trial of skill + strategy + speed.

Name: Hockeysplit
About: This game is fast-paced arcade hockey style game about learning the mistakes and techniques!

Name: Okashi Towers
About: Okashi Towers is a Real Time Strategy game with Tower Defense elements. Gather candy resources to build tower units or go on offense and summon creatures to attack other player bases. Join with up to 8 players and choose one of the four factions that fits your play style best

Name: Prophet: Prologue
About: Long after the last war, a knight must defend his home against an invading force and uncover a dark truth. Prophet is a short, story driven souls-like experience created by a single developer. This game is just the prologue to a larger story that has yet to be told.

Name: Porsche Hall of Legends VR
About: The Hall of Legends is an exciting VR brand experience based on momentous stories: Witness iconic moments from the history of Porsche Motorsport, discover the secrets behind the success of Porsche, and collect the Porsche DNA to unlock the new Porsche Formula E car.

Name: ALEON's Nightmare
About: Aleon is a young girl who is looking for a job. One day she found a job but things didn’t go well as she wishes. You have to find out the odd things happening in the mysterious house and You need to survive in the middle of psychopath puppets. And remember... You are in the middle of nightmare.

Name: TETRAGUN
About: TETRAGUN is quadrant-based shooter where you're surrounded on all sides. You'll gain powerful upgrades as you progress, but so will your enemies.

Name: Wardens of the Amber Cage
About: A cooperative action dungeon crawler. Support Virtual Reality headsets. Become a warmage and keep the horrors inside the Amber Cage !

Name: The Great Emu War
About: The Great Emu War is a fun, frantic couch-competitive experience. Choose a side, humans or emus, in this brutal battle between species.

Name: UFHO2
About: Play an alien navigating a maze of hexagons in this competitive mix between strategy and board game. Plan your next turn, think fast, act faster, and outmanoeuvre your opponents by predicting their moves. UFHO2 is strategy at its finest.

Name: 7D Game （VR for VIVE）
About: It's a game player could use voxels to create different WORLDs. It's a virtual reality game on SteamVR(HTC VIVE). Though the game is highly inspired by such great games like Minecraft and Besiege, it's specially designed for VR equipment, in which there are a fully developed physical system and more importantly an open-source product...

Name: Canek: Quest for Corn [Demo]
About: Canek: Quest for Corn is a single player action platform game (under development). Meet Canek, a legendary hero on an epic quest to save the Maya civilization from the curse that threatens its people.

Name: Tokyo Re:Connect Prologue
About: Spring is the season of first meetings. Begin your new life in the city of Tokyo as Shindou Touki. Meet many colorful characters, forge romances, and live out your high-school days, in this interactive story with cutting-edge artwork and a moving soundtrack.

Name: Money Maker
About: Stuck in a simulation with only two hours to complete the game. Failure will result in the exit closing forever...

Name: Assignment 42
About: Assignment 42 is a strategic, puzzle-based experience set in a maze of superstructure interiors. Progress by programming a machine to handle fried electrics and fires while you, with the guidance of your partner operator, evacuate every civilian and investigate who is behind the disaster.

Name: Timewalk Tower Defense
About: An asymmetric Tower Defense/Third Person Shooter

Name: Betrayer: Curse of the Spine - Prologue
About: Betrayer: Curse of the Spine - Prologue is an Action-Adventure Metroidvania. This is just a taste of the full game which will feature decision making, crafting, fast-paced combat, multiple endings, intricate storytelling, an open world to explore, and more!

Name: Eldritch Lands: The Witch Queen's Eternal War
About: Dive into a dark fantasy world and fight against the endless undead horde. Unlock, upgrade and deploy units in a simple to understand yet engaging strategy gameplay loop. Grow plants that grant exp bonuses and converse with each unit to learn more about their character and backstory.

Name: 사괴야행
About: Let's escape from the shrine to find the five beads sealed in the red box to avoid various goblins.

Name: Huge Enemy - Worldbreakers
