About: Huge Enemy is a horizontal Shoot ‘em up that takes place in a dark sci-fi universe with Japanese influences.

Name: Hold 10 Seconds
About: Hold 10 Seconds is a fast-paced precision platformer game. Just hold 10 seconds. Sounds easy, right?

Name: AI Stories
About: Three AI Lifeforms used to live here, thinking and dreaming about their existence. Three AI Lifeforms went on into a higher reality and left everything behind. Three AI Lifeforms stories are left to unfold… Can you understand and unravel their past? Their AI Stories? Made by Emir Akyazi

Name: Savage Offroad
About: SAVAGE OFFROAD is a retro-inspired truck racing game set in a post apocalyptic future. It's part racing, part gladiatorial combat and ALL ACTION! Join a tribe of irradiated savages that FIGHT and RACE for the future!

Name: Rail Recon
About: Delve into the underground facility of Rail Recon, a Twin-stick Shooter with a Rail System. Navigate through its network of rails in search of its crystals, while maneuvering and fighting through the facility's defenses.

Name: Beetle Ninja
About: Saving the world sure gets stressful sometimes!

Name: Temple Trashers
About: A couch co-op tower defense game, in which the towers you build can hurt you and your friends just as much as they can hurt your enemies. Build towers, aim them towards your foes and collect the crystals that drop in order to build more turrets and survive the endless hordes of enemies!

Name: Adventure Boy Jailbreak
About: Puzzle your way through the small town of Estivale, brought to life with a range of characters who all have a problem to solve. With each person you help, Benson gets one stop closer to breaking his friend Mike out of the county jail.

Name: Mahjong Riichi Multiplayer
About: Japanese mahjong, also known as Riichi mahjong, is a 4 player tabletop game based on the chinese original mahjong. Compete against individuals from all over the world in the online multiplayer mode. Build sequences and tripplets within your hand and complete your hand faster than your opponents!

Name: MANIC
About: MANIC is a thrilling and brutal action game where you must fight off swarms of enemies whilst seeking vengeance against the mysterious group that murdered your family.

Name: The Curious Study of Dr. Blackwood:  A VR Tech Demo
About: Explore a room full of magic and mystery in our free VR tech demo! Experiment with spectral power, reveal hidden secrets, or just chill . . . in The Curious Study of Dr. Blackwood!

Name: Great Utopia
About: Sci-Fi Retro RPG in which you become humanity's last child, and last hope. Interactive storytelling, puzzles and turn based combat will give you around 2 hours of gameplay to complete this futuristic epic journey to save mankind.

Name: Kenopsia
About: Follow Amelia, a stressed and overworked gamedev (or as people in the industry call it... Just a gamedev) through a surreal trip with three distinctly different game modes.

Name: Cronous
About: Cronous Online is a large MMORPG that features character growth and confrontation as its main features. Players can enhance their own strength in various ways to confront the demons of Cronous continent.

Name: Rapid Fire
About: Rapid fire is a virtual reality game that combats the villains as a gunman in the west. Fight quickly to remove the villains and keep the town peaceful.

Name: Defend Earth: Xenos Survivors - Prelude
About: You are Earth's last line of defense in a relentless alien invasion. Experience intense 3D top-down roguelite action. Outsmart, outgun and survive smarter, increasingly menacing foes with a versatile arsenal in diverse landscapes. Every run escalates the challenge - adapt, evolve, dominate!

Name: Jump Puzzle
About: A platform jumping puzzle game, Reasonable use of various abilities of different animals, Keep the unicorn from falling into the abyss, Find your way home.

Name: Eggplant
About: Who doesn't love aubergine? You can never have enough of it! Try the interactive aubergine clicker. Click on aubergine and get even more aubergine!

Name: Team Up VR (Beta)
About: Immerse yourself in the world of ultimate war between Terminators and Humans. Choose your hero from different playable characters. Fight and claim your victory in an epic VR death match.

Name: Grid Legion, Storm
About: You are a conjurer voyaging Mythos. Explore an easy to learn but difficult to master strategy card game.

Name: Gundy
About: Welcome to Gundy, a short and sweet 2D platformer made by d4rkd0s. Your mission as Gundy is to find a weapon, eliminate the enemy snakes along your path. Try to find access to the boss room. Once you enter the room prepare for a difficult fight, only those with true skill will win!

Name: Crimson Hell
About: Crimson Hell is a survival-horror game in which you play as Sae, a journalism student determined to find her missing sister. Traverse through three nightmarish realms, collecting limited resources, fighting monsters, and solving puzzles in order to escape and uncover the truth.

Name: Table Ball
About: Table Ball by Lockyz Media is the ultimate virtual arcade game! Compete against friends or the computer in exciting matches of top-down Ping Pong. This game is perfect for players of all skill levels. Start playing today and see if you have what it takes to come out on top!

Name: 15 puzzle
About: A classic game of puzzle 8 (3x3), 15 (4x4), 24 (5x5) or 35 (6x6) in which player has to move pieces on board so they are from 1 to 8, 15, 24 or 35.

Name: Root Connections
About: Digging deep into the root of his world, you play as the hallucinations of a man struggling with psychotic depression. Puzzling your way through the darkness of alcoholism and the fear of losing loved ones, it is up to you to root connect this man’s life back together again!
The game consists of finishing several levels, solving by clicking with the mouse or using the keyboard to complete the tasks.

Name: AntiPodal
About: Trapped in a strange parallel world, face ruthless challenges using wit and skill. Run, jump and swap your way out of tricky situations in this super-tight action puzzle platformer. Will you be able to find and rescue your poor lost chicken?

Name: Golden Moon
About: Golden Moon is an old school, 3D Third-Person puzzle platformer game about finding treasure and working your way past ancient robots, booby-traps, and other menaces.

Name: Your Turn to Disembark
About: Your Turn to Disembark is an episodic narrative game about a weird train and the passengers that are trapped inside of it. Will you make it out of the train or will you be trapped onto it's route for the rest of days?

Name: King Rabbit - Race
About: Race with friends through dangerous obstacle courses in this action-platformer. Hop quickly to survive obstacles, compete with friends, and win prizes. Enjoy infinite replayability, leaderboards, customizations, cross-platform support, and perfect controls.

Name: From The Grave
About: Zombie Survival Game

Name: Jamie's Toy Box
About: Jamie's Toy Box is a VR playroom simulator heavily inspired by toys and child-like imagination. Interact with all the fun toys and mystery buttons at your disposal or build your dream structure. But do not be fooled, this is more than just a simple room. Let your imagination run free!

Name: Speedway Ringer
About: Speedway Ringer is a top-down racer inspired by American stock car oval racing and the real-life challenges of Motorsports. Drivers will need a balance of aggression and patience to perfect their technique and succeed in a chaotic online multiplayer environment.

Name: Escape
About: You're on a camping trip with some friends. They go missing, you can hear something in the woods. What would you do? You must Escape by yourself with nothing other than your flashlight. You cannot bring your friends back but you can Escape.

Name: EGG DROP
About: Flutter around to dodge falling eggs from chickens above, and collect corn and power ups to drop eggs on the unlucky fowl below!

Name: DUMB: Treasure
About: Use a remote-controlled robot to find the treasure lost under the bed.

Name: Chromatic
About: An original and challenging survival arcade game with a color twist ! Your Chromacore is stranded in the depths of space and the only way to survive is to show to the universe the True Rainbow Power!

Name: Speed Mazing
About: Exciting racing party game for up to 4 players. Quick game sessions, hundreds of maps and eye-catching visuals. There's also a challenging speedrun mode for single player.

Name: Super Nate Adventure
About: A challenging collectathon platformer. You play as the character Nate attempting to save the kingdom from it's new invasive species. Play through 12 different levels spanning 3 unique worlds to reach the Starleon Kingdom and defeat Abaddon.

Name: Time Break 2121
About: TIME BREAK 2121 is the new Sci-Fi/Cyberpunk FPS where you control time. Whenever you stop, time flows; you move, it stops. So you better keep moving! Tune your reflexes, unholster your revolver, grab your knife and hop on to a fast-paced experience like few have ever seen.

Name: Kunai Strike
About: A cyberpunk-ninja FPS 3D-platformer. Throw kunai and teleport to them across 5 individual levels. Chain teleports with wall-runs and jumps to reach the goal in the fastest time and avoid falling to certain death along the way.

Name: Magic Mouse
About: Magic Mouse is an action-adventure top-down dungeon crawl set in a fantasy world where the player fights their way through dangerous enemies, overcomes powerful bosses and survives perilous traps all while honing magical powers.

Name: crazy maze ~疯狂迷宫 ~ 狂った迷路 ~ Laberinto loco ~ Labyrinthe fou ~ Verrücktes Labyrinth
About: Have you challenged the real maze? Welcome to the 3D maze game, take you into a huge maze world to find a way out, we have carefully designed 12 labyrinths, one is bigger than one, one is harder than one!

Name: The Sink Gods
About: The Sink Gods is a modern adventure game. You play a poor villager who lives in the Sink Valley. When you are evicted from your home, you realise your only hope is the Sink Gods of the Great Basin. Journey to each of their temples, and pass their test to gain revenge for what you have lost.

Name: 9SHOT
About: This game is purely for catharsis; there's no main storyline and it will never conclude '9Shot' is a first-person shooter game set in a zombie-infested Tokyo streets. Your objective is simple: survive against waves of zombies for as long as possible. Earn points by killing zombies to upgrade weapons

Name: Prismatix
About: Prismatix is a fast-paced endless-runner where ones main objective is to beat the high-score. It is a small, yet solid and re-playable game, that you can play while waiting. Try not to fall down the Spectrum Lake, as you jump on the platforms, and shoot down the enemies.

Name: 三国：我是主公
About: A war strategy game set against the backdrop of the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms, where you can collect many famous generals from the Three Kingdoms for cultivation, meet other players to form alliances, collaborate and conquer the world, and write your own legendary epic.

Name: NENA
About: Botley can't do many things on his own. Good thing he has telepathy.

Name: Rainbows, toilets & unicorns!
About: Rainbows, Toilets and Unicorns is a fast-paced shoot 'em up / bullet hell where the only option to avoid pooping yourself is to face your greatest fears in a fight to the last splash.

Name: Across The Line
About: Across the Line is an immersive virtual reality experience that combines 360°video and computer generated imaging (CGI) to put viewers in the shoes of a patient entering a health center for a safe and legal abortion.

Name: Colour Box
About: Colour Box is a puzzle game about colouring boxes. Made by Daniel Michaneck with music by Jonathan Krieger Rozenberg.

Name: Angelus Brand VR Experience
About: Enjoy the Angelus Brand VR Experience with a few games and a show room. Look at Angelus products while playing basketball or running through a challenging dodging game. Try to get the high score on both games for bragging rights!

Name: Quantum Legend - VR Experience
About: A sneak action game,This software only provides visual and survival mode experience.

Name: Rollers
About: Multiplayer / Singleplayer Action platformer with customization, progression and custom PvP / races maps

Name: Crush Link TD
About: A Tower Defense game with new mechanics in virtual setting about online dating. Your task is to protect your base preventing spam from getting into your inbox. Build towers in marked places to stop spam.

Name: Love love demon ji-恋恋妖姬
Trash Time
About: Trash Time is a virtual reality game that can teach you how to recycle in a fun way. Burnt trash accumulates CO2 gas, that is one of the leading causes of global warming. Try to save the Earth by playing as a alien robot with flexible hands, recycle trash using powerups and power tools.

Name: Dinosaur Safari VR
About: Go on Safari and explore a tropical island filled with awe-inspiring and dangerous Dinosaurs. Discover their secrets and experience first-hand how these wonders of a bygone world lived and died right before your very eyes!

Name: Project Unknown Designation
About: Meet your friends at their cabin in the woods. What lies ahead?

Name: BattleSteam
About: Free multiplayer team shooter. Join a group ready to break all laws for the sake of wealth and glory. You are waiting for team battles in various locations. Build fortifications, buy ammunition and shoot, but remember that not everyone is destined to get to the goal alive.

Name: Crashed
About: Crashed is a third-person stealth game where you play as B.O.B., stranded on the quirky planet SnamSam. The mission? Rebuild the craft and escape! You’ll sneak through restricted areas and take daring routes. A splash of humour as B.O.B.’s detachable head knocks off the Snailmen's heads!

Name: Pyramaze: The Game
About: Kill lots of enemies while listening to kick-ass metal and get the highest score!

Name: Captain Backwater
About: Captain Backwater is a fun puzzle game.

Name: Protect My Cheese
About: A stunning and chaotic tower defense strategy game where we play as cats to defeat the cheese-hungry rats. Survive against waves of enemies and guard the cheese.

Name: Dreams and Nightmares
About: Dreams and Nightmares Public Beta, A CGDC Community game, is a purely free multiplayer Action RPG where 4 modern-day friends share in the dreams and visions found in the Book of Daniel developed by highly motivated volunteers in their spare time over 9 months.

Name: Phonetic
About: Phonetic is a casual brain teaser game. A simple game in which the player deciphers the phonetic spelling of various words. Try it out and see what highscore you can set!

Name: Block Heads: Instakill
About: Shoot and double jump your way through fast, kinetic, and blocky action in this one-hit, one-kill FPS as you secure your score. With customization galore: skins, hats, outfits, guns, maps, music, so much that you can't ignore! Co-op map editing, need I say more? Oh, and there are active ragdolls.

Name: Playing God
About: An interactive narrative, FMV, sci-fi VR experience.

Name: Auto Battle Royale
About: Kill or run away, and the last survivor is the winner!

Name: Timension
About: Timension is a puzzle game in which players are able to reverse time to 15 seconds ago to finish the mission impossible.

Name: Juban Shotengai ~ Escape the Japanesse Shopping Street ~ [beta]
Decay - a real time interactive experience
About: Decay, a real time interactive experience.

Name: Macabre
About: Macabre is, at heart, a NES/SNES-inspired JRPG that tells of a post-apocalyptic tale set in medieval times. Despite the old school feel, it does feature some modern mechanics; such as in-game achievements, crafting, and a unique random encounter system.

Name: All is Fair in Love and Vore: The Tavorion Collection
About: Vore visual novel! Vore! Sex! Complex characters! Profound thoughts! Women! Well-researched historical settings! Cannibalism! Never before has it been so easy to play all 6 iconic masterpieces, now with extra content!

Name: Exoplanet: A Project Coreward Demo
About: Embark on an epic journey across the stars while encountering foes, friends and forgotten stories. Build your ship. Recruit and train your crew. Exoplanet is a demo of Project Coreward, a full open world RPG.

Name: Three Kingdoms：Ancient battlefield | 三国古战略
About: 这是一款三国开房间即时联机游戏，玩法上你可以想象以前我们所玩的《三国群英传》或其它单机攻城类三国游戏的一种联机化改编，游戏可以多人对战，混战，组队打电脑等，一局时间在10~60分钟之间，具体视不同模式而定，比如混战会久一点，因为你要打败大部分对手，争取高分，而对战就短一点，因为对方一旦弱势可能就认输了。总之这个游戏玩法经过我2年多的折腾，现在结构算比较合理，当然里面也包含了一般的养成元素，游戏免费，但充钱玩的舒服无法避免，不过我尽量控制平衡（作者提示里说的内容），总的来说游戏倾向玩家自身技术硬实力，花钱为辅助，游戏中最强的玩家一般是弱氪，但很擅研究的人，整体比例是（技术70%）（氪金30%），我不隐瞒任何收费情况，真实坦荡，所以喜欢的就请加入进来吧。

Name: Forest of Frequencies
About: Forest of Frequencies is a single player music adventure-strategy game where you must guide spirits back to their bodies. Explore a world filled with dangerous creatures and breathtaking flora.

Name: 5Leaps (Space Tower Defense)
About: 5Leaps is a retro-futuristic strategy game 'Tower Defense' style.

Name: Fingernail Floss
About: A short spooky-fun visual novel where you are a special guest for a special test! Is death a game to you? Do you like color schemes that involve the color black? EXPERIENCE FINGERNAIL FLOSS! !

Name: Yuligans: Christmas is Coming!
About: Yuligans: Christmas is Coming! is a couch co-op, choice driven game that puts you and your loved ones in the role of Santa’s Elves in the mad dash to prepare for Christmas Eve! Will this year’s sleigh ride go off without a hitch, or will it be another year without a Santa Claus?

Name: Cards We're Dealt: Prologue
About: Wander haunted halls as an office temp and collect magical cards with supernatural abilities to fight demons and and explore the underworld in this horror, deckbuilding, roguelike game.

Name: Sprite Sequence Chapter 1
About: A short wacky adventure that is somehow about the creative process. In this first chapter, follow a nameless hero trying to make sense of the world he's been thrown in.

Name: Chrono Club - Race Against Time
About: The biggest karting tournament throughout history is being held, dragging in racers from all over the timeline in order to determine one thing and one thing only: Who is the best racer of all time?

Name: Siren's Call: Escape Velocity - Prologue
About: Welcome to your endless summer! Escape its influence before the town of Siren's Call erases you completely. This version of the game is a free prologue and covers the first part of this story.

Name: Unfinished
About: a game, in pixel art.

Name: Skeletal Skism
About: War has broken out between the undead... All for one sole purpose: to determine the ONE - TRUE - SKELETON - KING. Do you have what it takes to claim the crown?

Name: Mate
About: Mate is a third-person story-based game with a multi-ending game with puzzles and physical controls.The protagonist, the perpetrator of school violence, is anxious that his actions will be revealed to others, which leads to psychological hallucinations and nightmares.

Name: Not A Banana: Capybara
About: Hello! Welcome to the wonderful world of capybara clicker! Here you will become a true friend of the capybaras, clicking on the screen and calling the cutest and sometimes special capybaras! Don't forget to keep clicking to attract even more capybaras to you!

Name: Two Colours
About: Jump from platform to platform, red to blue, blue to red, timing your jumps precisely, and dodging falls and blocks which kill you over the course of 40 levels, grabbing the 20 collectibles to unlock a secret at the end of the game. Don't lose your focus, don't lose your patience.

Name: Объемная История
About: Free game project about the history of Russia!

Name: Carpe Noctem - Yuri Visual Novel
About: A yuri visual novel about a vampiress and a monster hunter falling in love in Victorian England.

Name: Uncharted Ocean 2
About: Time to set sail! This is destined to be a journey full of opportunities. Open new trade routes, accumulate fortunes, and establish a maritime empire of your own! It is also a dangerous journey, you must defeat the evil pirates and other mystical dangers the ocean offers to a captain.

Name: Cemetery Warrior 6
About: Cemetery Warrior 6 is a dynamic 3D shooter from the first person, with incendiary Heavy Metal

Name: 死亡投票_Death Voting Game
About: 当红女星沈依然参加商业聚会不慎被人打晕，醒来发现被关在一个密闭空间，和她一样遭遇的还有另外五人，“囚禁？”“绑架？”还是有什么不可告人的阴谋？在神秘人的提示下得知出去的方式是投票，其他人是敌是友？真实情况是否又如神秘人所说？策略性文字冒险游戏，通过谨慎的选择，找出幕后真凶吧！

Name: Maze And Dagger
About: You are alone. Lost in a maze. Defenseless... One wrong step and you're dead... But there is hope! Find weapons, potions, and armor hidden in the maze to aid you on your quest to find the exit!

Name: Fly By Knight
About: Fly and fight your way through the magically altered tree you once called home! Free your friends from the prison gems that bind them! Find all your friends to open up an escape portal and get to safety!

Name: Warfare : Battleground™
About: Join Warfare: Battleground, an arcade multiplayer first-person shooter! Fight in a variety of modes using a large arsenal of weapons and destroy your opponents with helicopters and air strikes. Are you ready for battle?

Name: Lies of Astaroth
About: Classic Strategy card battle game,collecting cards and enjoying the battles between map stages.

Name: Project PULSE
About: A co-op rhythm action game taking the rhythm elements of combat and pulling them into a thematic world. Play with your friends as characters that represent Melody, Bass, Harmony, and Percussion. Fight your way through your city and complete missions to build different musical weapons!

Name: Alphabet
About: Alphabet is an exciting clicker that will immerse you in the world of letters and words. In this game you can get letters of different rarity for the time spent in the game. Collect letters, discover new words and use them to create unique items.

Name: Glitchball
About: Glitchball is a 2D Vaporwave party-game that's like soccer.... but the ball kills you. Use your jetpack and shield to deflect the incoming glitchball to score goals, kill players, and compete for dominance in a chilled out dead mall.Key Features

Name: 失落的猫猫 Lost Cat
About: 'Lost Cat' is a single-player, adorable, healing, adventure game. Try to collect enough fish while avoiding traps and monsters, and use your wits to clear the levels.

Name: Coreless: Prologue
About: Coreless: Prologue is a roguelike action game set in a sci-fi world, featuring a unique meta-progression system for deep customization. Experiment with diverse avatars, abilities, and powers to tackle challenging bosses in this dynamic adventure.

Name: Ultimate pirates
About: Abandoned MMO set in Pirates world. Absolutely FREE! NO in-app purchases, you can find gems by killing monsters. NO premium content. Official ABANDONWARE: no updates, no bug fixes, no improvements, no support, no empty promises. The game provided AS IS.

Name: Tomorrow
About: ‘Tomorrow’ is a VR experience about how humans have evolved through language over time. It takes us on a mesmerizing journey from prehistoric caves and the Amazonian jungle to the top of the Himalayas. We finally approach ‘Tomorrow’, our next phase of evolution where VR is the new language.

Name: Path of the Sramana
About: ‘Path of the Sramana’ is a fantasy platformer game, following a young shaman journeying through the spirit realm, as she searches for her father’s soul.

Name: Andromeda One
About: Andromeda One is an First Person Shooter video game. The game take place in the far future where spatial exploration of galaxy is possible. The hero is in the military and try to bring order in the Andromeda galaxy.

Name: Poly Quest
About: A Virtual Reality dungeon adventure. How many crystals can you collect?

Name: Chicku
About: Chicku is a nail bitingly hard platformer in which the player has to escape the evil Barrington farm. You'll be forced to dodge saws, spikes and many other deadly traps in order to save your brethren and rise against the evil Dr. Barrington.

Name: Project Xenoflora
About: Someone thought it was a good idea to create the world's first sentient plant. It wasn't. Now there's a mildly dangerous and very angry plant making a mad dash for the exit, the only thing that stands in its way is the near-infinite number of mass-produced robot sentries programmed to destroy it.

Name: Get off Work
About: After coming home from work, the usual atmosphere is different. Suddenly, someone appears and starts giving you terrifying and strange tasks.

Name: Era of Celestials
About: The next-generation sound and graphics beyond the host, take you personally feel the magnificent turmoil of the magic continent!Wings feathering star, attributes soar to activate a new appearance; more 'war god hall' blood competition, PK king race strong, free combat, fame and fortune!

Name: Amicade
About: Three classic Score Attack games with online Leaderboards. Blast, Chomp and Swerve your way to high scores!

Name: VERGJORN
About: Vergjorn is a citybuilding strategy game. Vergjorn takes place in the Viking era, where you build your city, grow your population and go raiding for treasure. You have to build ships, train vikings and forge weapons to be able to conquer foreign lands.

Name: Ilhumia
About: Enter the world of Ilhumia populated by pretty creatures. Build your deck and fight other players alone or with a friend in this colorful multiplayer card game. But becareful ! Angel the possessed girl rules on this world.

Name: Lights Out
About: Blessed by the light, Soona is the last hope of Jiruho. With might and agility, she has to face the dark forces and traps of the Netherworld to save her people from the apocalypse. She will venture inside the city’s temples to recover the fragments of the sacred mirror.

Name: Reckpunk
About: Reckpunk is a platformer/endless runner where you control level elements rather than the main characters.

Name: Lonely Astronaut
About: Pilot the corpse of a long-abandoned astronaut floating in a cosmic graveyard in this one-button arcade game. In the process, you might find out something about the human condition. But probably not.

Name: Diesel The Pug Warrior
About: Help Diesel as he joins forces with his best friend Fred, as they try to save the Kingdom of Everlyn from the evil Luna and bring peace to the land once more in this adventure RPG!

Name: Loot Box
About: Loot Box Clicker is an addictive and rewarding clicker game where your goal is reach the highest number of clicks!

Name: Orion: The Eternal Punishment
About: Orion is a frantic first person shooter where you fight the void creatures in mysterious planets and advance using your special abilities and gadgets.

Name: Five Minutes Till Christmas
About: Race against the clock in Five Minutes Till Christmas, a fast-paced holiday arcade game! Sprint through a bustling mall to gather last-minute gifts, evade vigilant security guards, and complete as many whishes before the time runs out. Perfect your strategy to top the global leaderboards!

Name: Time Raiders
About: Delve deep and explore the vast eastern undergrounds. Treasures? Monsters? Who knows what awaits you...

Name: Valis: The Fantasm Soldier Collection Launcher
About: The legendary action game Valis: The Fantasm Soldier appears on Steam! Please note: This is only the game launcher and does not include the games themselves.

Name: Soul In the Chamber
About: Bound to the soul of an assassinated emperor and equipped with only one bullet, traverse and fight through the stylized world of Soul in the Chamber as you try to uncover the mysteries of a fallen empire and survive the collision of two dying worlds.

Name: Rig or Skill: PC Brawl
About: Free to play, air hockey style arena humorously referring to internet culture. Attack your opponent’s computer by decreasing its FPS capability. Defend your own virtual PC. Climb the ranks online and compete in league seasons!

About: A free survival horror game set in a cornfield. Sneak around on the farm, solve puzzles and uncover the mysteries of the past! Try not to get lost in the corn...

Name: Smiling Misery
About: Smiling Misery is an interactive tale that introduces us to the story of Margo, a jester who, weary of a comfortable life, embarks on a journey to seek misery. Join Margo on a brief adventure through a Mediterranean medieval kingdom and bring the story to its conclusion.

Name: Delirium
About: Woken up in a strange and seemingly abandoned house, you discover what insanity has prevailed as you uncover the remnants of its past guilt-ridden inhabitant.

Name: Peter's Journey
About: Embark on a journey of this text anime quest with RPG elements! Walk through beautiful locations, overcome challenges and make Peter’s dreams come true. Every step you take matters. And don’t forget to take the diary - you’ll need it!

Name: Lionfish Reef Patrol
About: A realistic lionfish hunting game that saves reef fish from the invasive lionfish. The life like motion, sound and visuals gives you the feeling of being underwater and hunting the lionfish. Scuba your way around 3 dive sites and explore what its like to save the reefs! Go on Lionfish Reef Patrol...

Name: Streets of Chaos
About: Streets of Chaos is a unique strategy/board game where you become the leader of a resistance in an apocalyptic world. Features a randomly generated world each game, high-res graphics and original music, and an open-ended strategy model that evolves and encourages thought and planning.

Name: Against Great Darkness Prologue
About: Against Great Darkness Prologue is a brick-breaking, roguelite where you play as a pagan trying to escape Hell's maw. Trigger relics by keeping your disks bouncing, experience unique events where you can obtain incredible loot, and battle hellish bosses while always keeping an eye on your disks.

Name: 天若有情
About: 《天若有情》是一款全新3D爱恋MMORPG游戏！游戏拥有次世代完美画质，清新细腻的地图场景，恢宏大气的3D无缝大地图，重现端游视听感受，丰富的社交玩法成就相伴相守；专属DIY捏脸，千万组合，彰显个性；自由立体飞行坐骑，带你畅游四海八荒！百变灵殊任你选，可爱小鸡，喵狗全齐。特有的王权交互系统，助力成就帝王梦。

Name: J-Town: A Visual Novel
About: A friendly crash course in Japanese American history, culture, and community! Inspired by the real stories of the three historic Japantowns of California: San Francisco, San Jose, and Los Angeles's Little Tokyo.

Name: Paralyzed
About: Paralyzed is a challenging precision platformer with a simple objective: reach the end of each level. The challenge is that you have no input on your movement, only the color of your cube. Match your color with whatever approaches or you'll quickly meet your end. Timing is key!

Name: Raybound
About: Everyone is born with an appearance of some sort, but you simply don't seem to know what you are... It's time for a sweet adventure, one taking place in a civilization obsessed with a star in the sky... Run, jump, and cast your rays to uncover the puzzles and mysteries of this world...

Name: Ziggurat 3D Chess
About: Ziggurat Three Dimensional Chess(TM), is a true three dimensional environment which combine the familiar movements of standard chess and exciting new moves never seen before. The rules of movement are easy to learn so beginners will be playing their first game in minutes.

Name: Crucible
About: Dodge your way through the crucible of fire! Crucible is a 2D, high-action, top-down shooter game.

Name: I Have More Hours Than You
About: I Have More Hours Than You is an Idle game with a loose abstract story about acceptance. But you'll probably just use it to brag about how many hours you have to your friends.

Name: Witan
About: What would you do if you were accused of being a witch? Would you just accept your fate, or would you fight? Oldskool rpg meets 3d walk/runabout and some other stuff, this is their pretty but deranged child.

Name: Who Are You?
About: A girl had done the unthinkable, taken her own life. You travel through the key moments of her life that have lead her to take her own life. But only after she travels through all these important moments of her life again does she realize she had made a huge mistake.

Name: Derpy Dino
About: Unleash your primal roar! Conquer the different stages in Adventure Mode, where different enemies will try to stop you. Or test your limits in Endless Mode, where the sky is literally falling! Meteors are crashing down, and the action never stops. Can you beat your highscore?

Name: Magirune
About: Oh no! You got stuck trying to get the chest. Find the way out.

Name: WellTown
About: Have you ever wanted to take a trip to the creative heart of New Zealand? Grab your headset and join our exuberant guide on your own personal virtual tour of Wellington!

Name: Command: Chains of War
About: 20 minutes into the future, a spark erupts in the Korean peninsula that will lead to a theaterwide conflagration embroiling the entire Western Pacific and drag all major powers into it.

Name: D.N.A: Do Not Answer
About: 'D.N.A is a short first-person, story-driven horror game developed by a small idipendent studio. Players navigate an eerie, abandoned hospital, uncover clues, manage limited light sources, and face a dark presence. Featuring multiple endings, realistic graphics, and immersive sound design.'

Name: Overdrive Warfare
About: Overdrive Warfare is an FPS shooter developed by the indie developer known as Dynamite. Immerse yourself in the narrative of a harrowing modern-day conflict unfolding as global coalition forces unite against the insidious and unyielding Zarya Group.

Name: OFFICESCAPE
About: OFFICESCAPE is a first-person puzzle-platformer adventure game. In OFFICESCAPE you play as yourself, you are stuck in a dream and you are trying to wake up.

Name: Last-Hit Defense
About: Defense game in which you build towers to block enemies from approaching.Action game in which you control a hero to eliminate monsters.An innovative 'Action-Defense' game created by merging two game genres !

Name: Crimson Shift
About: You control an Assassin trying to break free and learn the truth. Your choices can help her, or take her down a different path.
1990 is a fun, casual RPG with turn-based combat.

Name: Aeronaut
About: Aeronaut is an interactive VR music video centered around the lead singer of Smashing Pumpkins, Billy Corgan.

Name: 天羽传奇Online
About: 《天羽传奇Online》是一款Q版仿3D即时战斗类MMORPG，温馨可爱的东方武侠画风，丰富的纸娃娃变装，发型、头饰、衣服、背饰、尾巴自由DIY自己喜欢的造型，超萌宠物、骑宠设计，充满温馨的门派、部落，仿3D即时战斗、队伍群P、部落战争……

Name: Chase
About: You control a space ship trapped in a forcefield with 3 other players, a missile, and a tracking beacon. Be the last man standing by shooting the beacon, and sticking it onto the other players, so they die in a glorious explosion.

Name: All We Need
About: All We Need is a first-person horror exploration. Uncover supernatural mysteries, face chilling encounters, and navigate haunting landscapes. Unravel the consequences of Jack's fateful decision. Survive the psychological challenges that await. Can you escape the horrors?

Name: The Cup
About: The Cup is a fast-paced rogue-like dungeon crawler, where adventurers fight off hordes of enemies to find the ultimate prize, the Cup of Life. Can you fend off countless minions and slay the boss?

Name: Goddess Of Swing
About: Play as the Goddess of Swing, dance through the Roaring Twenties and convert foes back to Electro Swing in a fast-paced, action-packed party!

Name: Shu's Misfortune
About: This is a sample game created in 'RPG Maker MZ' by Moonana, the creator of Virgo vs the Zodiac. As Shu end your father's haute couture legacy by unraveling his empire of fashion

Name: Forest Heroes: Prologue
About: Forest Heroes Prologue combines tower defense with roguelike deck building. Enjoy intense battles and diverse strategies with simple controls!

Name: Touhou Meijinka ~ Song of Divine Tempest
About: A thunderous concert appears...

Name: Tiny Hero Idle
About: 'Tiny Hero Idle': An Idle RPG on PC that allows simultaneous play with other games. Join a unique adventure with daily rewards and cool actions

Name: Tsukai Furushita Kotoba Ya Uta Wo MV
About: It is a game that allows you to watch the song “Tsukai Furushita Kotoba Ya Uta Wo” by Shippu-P in VR space with particle effects.

Name: Roost
About: Roost is a First Person Exploration Game where you attempt to unravel the mystery of your new apartment.

Name: プロトリジゲン
About: 3D x 2D action with multiple shifting game genres! What awaits you after crossing the worlds?

Name: Bridge of Dawn
About: Bridge of Dawn is a free, open-sourced 3D arcade/racing style game for one or two players. Follow the story of Vulpes the Fox as he rushes to catch the sun and find out the secret to everlasting life in this lighthearted and fun game for all ages.

Name: Freelancer Life Simulator: Prologue
About: Freelancer Life Simulator: Prologue - a free game that contains events before Freelancer Life Simulator. In this story, you play as the uncle of the protagonist. You will find out why uncle left the city.

Name: Battle Forever
About: Battle Forever is an arcade Beat 'em Up which reminds you of the good old days in the penny arcade. Fight your way from left to right and leave no face unpunched! Four characters, 13 levels, a survival mode and a ton of fun awaits you!

Name: Ivorfall
About: Ivorfall City is in danger and only you have what it takes to save it! Ivorfall is a Steampunk, roguelike, twin-stick shooter where you take up the mantle of Detective Flintlock who must face off against hordes of enemies in destructible environments.

Name: Besert Bydra
About: An exciting spin game where players collect gun skins of different rarities. Spin to get random skins, from common gray to ultra-rare red. Track your collection in real-time and test your luck as you aim to collect all skins and find the rarest ones!

Name: PUNCHERMAN!: First Day
About: PUNCHERMAN!: First Day is a first-person comedy physics dad simulator where you play as a retired FPS hero/generally manly man trying to become the best dad ever. One problem: the only way he can interact with the world is with an incredible punch. Use your fists of fury to prove your heart of gold!

Name: A Few Days With : Valentina
About: Embark on a sensual heart-hunting adventure with Valentina, a charming young woman. In this hidden object game, explore each location to discover what lies beneath Valentina's enticing layers.

Name: Desktop Pets
About: Brings your desktop to life with adorable, interactive pets. Watch as they idle, play, and interact with each other, creating a lively and charming environment. Collect unique pets by hatching eggs and customize your desktop.

Name: Prison Wars
About: Prison Wars is a well known classic that will let you experience the harsh life inside a maximum security prison. Earn some quick cash, smuggle items and get as much respect as you can from fellow inmates. Make sure you join a gang, take control of the prison and watch your back!

Name: 白娘子
About: 'White lady' is a 3D stand-alone role-playing game developed by broken DuanQiaoCanXue studio. This game adopts the full real-time combat mode, and the combat experience is free and refreshing. The game depicts the legend of the White Snake, one of China's four major love myths and legends

Name: Amends VR
About: A journey through the reflections of an upbringing with a now estranged mother.

Name: Connect Far Away tale
About: Leap to evade!! Action game!!

Name: CREAM SODA CLUB
About: Welcome to the world of fantastic parties with CREAM SODA! In this universe, suggested by the ideas of the band, you are the promoter of the club where their new album is premiering. The success of the party is in your hands — arrange a complete soldout!

Name: Saving Punyville
About: Saving Punyville is an indie dungeon crawler RPG. Fight monsters and bosses in a classic 2D top down shooter style. Explore dungeons and caves to find treasures and rescue your townspeople.

Name: Asteroid Fight
About: ASTEROID FIGHT is an online multiplayer action real-time strategy game. Use your commander with uniquely modified special abilities, build a strong economy to be able to quickly grow a strong military so you can stand a chance against your enemies and destroy their warp gate.

Name: The Lone Chameleon
About: A 2D puzzle-game about cooperation and empathy.

Name: Get Over Here!
About: It's a krazy fusion of Mortal Kombat + Flappy Bird. Impale enemies while dodging deadly flying saws. Disintegrate the queued up enemies with the flying saws, but doing so requires great precision and courage. Absorb enough blood to engage Fatal Drive mode and destroy everything.

Name: Ananas - Pineapple Idle Game
About: Ananas is free Play-to-earn relaxing clicker game where you're gonna get pineapples to trade! Dropped/bought items has their use and have a fair chance to get bought for random value by dev on upcoming live streams, that's where Ananas differs!

Name: Dynamite Joe VS The Deep Sea Invasion
About: Sea-food and beat it!

Name: Magi: Mind Game
About: Magi: Mind Game takes the essential elements of a fighting game and turns it into an easy to learn difficult to master turn based strategy game. Focus on manipulating and predicting to outsmart your opponent. No need to memorize combos and difficult controls.

Name: Firework War
About: Use a variety of fireworks to fend off misfortune and protect your family!

Name: Antadin DX
About: A dark jrpg with tough choices that change the story. You play as the last of the antadins, the protector of the queen of your colony. You have to traverse bleak, corrupted caverns, inhabitated by a myriad of different insects. Trying to protect your ward.

Name: Self-knowledge VR
About: A virtual reality experiment that aims to promote awareness on the benefits of self-knowledge to our brain. We present a series of tasks based on real-world psychological theories that collect and interpret your data while playing, providing you with insights about yourself that you can further explore.

Name: The Adventures of Eggbert
About: Help Eggbert grab eggs, dodge foxes, and hatch chicks in this retro arcade challenge!

Name: Shattered Legacy
About: Start an exciting journey through a magical world, where the familiar idea of nudging blocks and solving puzzles combine to offer an amazing adventure puzzle game. Discover a magical world. Explore difficult puzzles and cryptic challenges in unique levels.

Name: Space Needle VR
About: Set at Seattle, Washington's most iconic man-made landmark, the Space Needle VR experience offers an opportunity to explore the famous structure like never before.

Name: Cat Boy Creator
About: Ever wanted to create your very own cat boy? Now you can with the official CloudNovel® Cat Boy Creator! Customize your cat boy or 'neko kun' to create the cat boy of your dreams!

Name: Oathbreakers
About: Oathbreakers is a multiplayer fantasy VR RPG that incorporates a unique blend of strategic precision-based realtime action combat, with unrestricted player vs player competitiveness, in a relaxing survival RPG themed environment.

Name: Bread
About: The Royal Bakery welcomes you to Bread, a fun simple clicker game. Stay a while, have some fun and click a crumb. Careful too much bread makes you fat.

Name: Ahri and Bear
About: Ahri and Bear is a 3D puzzle adventure game, where players will take control of Ahri the cat and Bear the dog who embark on an emotional journey together to find their true home. Use Ahri and Bear's unique abilities to navigate through the daunting human world so they can find their way back home.

Name: Asterball
About: Enter the galactic gridiron field as a Sportsman to beat your opponents in the fast-paced sport of Asterball. Play in a PVP setting where two teams battle it out in the field to see who can win with the most touchdowns.

Name: Corporate Cut: The Hair-Raising Adventure of an Office Employee
About: “Corporate Cut” is a satirical adventure set in a bizarre hair-obsessed magazine company. As the new intern, you’ll experience the struggle to fit in while exploring the boundaries between conformity and innovation. Expect intricate lore, experimental game design, and of course… many hair puns!

Name: ENEMIES
About: Venturing into the exciting work of Lollygag Labs, a game developing corporation looking to breach the barriers of what can be achieved with gaming, then things take a dark turn...get ready to jump into the crazy world of ENEMIES!

Name: Marius
About: This VR experience is good choice for all who want to see a great artificial cartoon-style environment in VR. The library beams you into new world where Marius, the librarian, lives between a really disorganized magic library. It’s the first demo of the newly founded VR Studio “Granola Studios”.

Name: Monsters!
About: Monsters! is a dual stick shooter with a retro feel complete with pixel art and leaderboards to achieve that good ol’ arcade feel.

Name: Star Rogue
About: Star Rogue is a sci-fi roguelike platformer. This pixel indie game will challenge you with a randomly generated spacestation full of deadly traps, collectable items, nasty enemies and strong bosses, each time you play it.

Name: MalovMetaArt Metaverse
About: MalovMetaArt is a Metaverse of World Art. VR Digital Museum with 100% accurate 3D copies of sculptures, paintings, artworks. You can touch and see the artworks from all sides.

Name: Chess Opening Repertoire Builder
About: Learn chess openings and try them out against an AI instantly!

Name: Virtual Rogue
About: Virtual Rogue is a top-down action roguelike shooter set in a computer controlled by a cruel and merciless User. You play as a text document file named “Note” who, after being accidentally created by the User, is thrown into the Recycle Bin.

Name: Antipsychotic
About: Nontraditional, eccentric, art game experience. 10 - 15 minutes, nonlinear free roam. This immersive experience aims to help destigmatize mental illness by allowing the user to journey through the mind of an individual with bipolar disorder.

Name: Day at the Office - Prologue
About: Try to escape from the office, make your decisions carefully, and keep your cool to get home safe and sound... Do you hear that...? The phone is ringing, and it's for you.

Name: Dodge the Wall!
About: Use your brain and your dexterity to fit through the hole in The Wall!

Name: Subscribe & Punch!
About: Subscribe & Punch! is an easy to play versus fighting game based on the wacky YouTubers universe. Roast the face of your opponents and experiment various humorous interactions inside with YouFight: the virtual platform hosting the craziest fights!

Name: Retro Vaders: Reloaded
About: The original Retro Vaders game rebuilt from the ground up with a brand new engine, complete graphics overhaul and a heap of new content.

Name: The Hunt - Rebuilt
About: 'As you blink the grogginess from your eyes, you remember what's happened and why you are here.'Trapped within a forest of death, a white stag must find his way out before the hunter chasing him gains his prize. That is, unless the forest kills him first.(READ DESCRIPTION BEFORE PLAYING)

Name: Where's my kitty
About: Do you like playing hide and seek with cats? Come and find them.

Name: No Seat?
About: No Seat? is a unique trial bike game.

Name: Hobo Knight
About: Adventures of forsenE: The Hobo Knight is a platform style game where the title and content were decided by you, the bajs. The star is Forsen, a dishevelled hobo streamer whose girlfriend and snus are unexpectedly stolen by a ‘transparent figure’.

Name: Journey to Luonto
About: A RPG game that involves killing monsters, bosses, and completing the main quest line as well as the secondary quest line

Name: NAIRI: Rising Tide - Prologue
About: The story continues in the highly anticipated second chapter of NAIRI. In this graphic adventure, Nairi pushes onward on a perilous quest to save her family. This prologue is a playable demo that gives a sneak peek of things to come in Rising Tide!

Name: Indeep | The casual dungeon crawler
About: Play this casual classical dungeon crawler anytime and anywhere and save your progress for later. The dungeon is waiting for you!

Name: Bandit the game
About: Bandit the game is an RPG-survival with an open world and elements of tower defense, where you can build own base, gang and vehicle.

Name: Power Link VR
About: The Power Link game reforms the traditional wire loop game in a rather creative way. This game requires you to pick up and guide the metal piece from top to the end of maze without it touching. In virtual world, we can design mazes unlimitedly which makes the game more interesting and exciting.

Name: Flight League Series
About: FLS is a Scifi Sandbox Racing game.

Name: Wild Castle
About: Run away from snakes and rats, be quick to avoid traps , wild castle brings back the fun and charisma of retro platform games.

Name: Distant
About: Imagine yourself diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease. How would you see the world? What emotions would you experience? What would your symptoms look like? Answer these questions yourself by playing in the shoes of someone with the disease, first-person.

Name: Dispersio 2
About: Dispersio 2 is a retro-styled metroidvania. As you progress through the game, you will gain new abilities, such as dashing, wall-jumping and more. There's even a hard mode for hardcore players. Can you beat the game with only 1 HP?

Name: Beached
About: Stranded on an uninhabited island. Completely removed from civilisation. How long will you survive? Step up and challenge your new environment. Do you have what it takes?

Name: Risnuch
About: Slash the enemies, improve yourself, join to arena, kill monsters, skeletons, golems.Join the infinity adventure of the Risnuch!

Name: Their Radiance
About: Their Radiance is an unconventional walking simulator about love.

Name: Illegal Race Tuning
About: Go to the street and become the most wanted racer dominating the Underground.

Name: NecroCatic Clicker
About: Increase the number of clicks while stylized miniatures fall from the sky and the background changes color in this brand new CLICKING game!! Features 'peaceful & colorful clicking action', a NecroCat icon, rotating characters, music (from other amazing NecroCatic Games) and more!!

Name: Only Fortress
About: Become the hero of your own fortress! Defend, customize, and explore in this PvP & PvM strategy game. Unleash your skills, lead your troops, and dominate in the battles. Build, fight, and conquer on the open world cross-platform online game!

Name: Seeds of Paradise
About: A mini side story set in the same universe as 'Sylvie's Bar' featuring a different flavor of monster girl brothels. You play an overworked man who's all but run out of luck, but the sadistic strawberry girl who keeps the business running may just take pity on you, yet.

Name: The OmniGallery
About: The OmniGallery is a VR multiverse of art exhibits

Name: Super Turbo Sudoku
About: Welcome to 'Super Turbo Sudoku', a game not about love, trust, hope or bravery, but about solving Sudokus. No matter if you prefer to just relax solving easy riddles or if you want to prove yourself with insane challenges, this game has it all!

Name: Brawl
About: Mass Brawl!

Name: Mec Me Loffa
About: Choose the right weapon for the right enemy and defeat Mec, the Final Boss... entra?

Name: Dominator Idle
About: Dominator Idle is the ultimate idle game for world domination. Train troops and purchase magical upgrades in order to takeover the entirety of earth. With a powerful prestige system you can grow your power to unfathomable standards allowing you to conquer stronger versions of Earth.

Name: Hotel VIP
About: Welcome to Hotel VIP, a very particular and secret place in Heaven City. Discover the hotel, meet the residents but don't say a word...

Name: Knock
About: 'Knock is a Clicker game that challenges you to accumulate points by tapping on the lid of your coffin. Get ready to immerse yourself in the eerie yet captivating world of Knock!'

Name: HexoJago
About: Singleplayer Story RPG Action Game

Name: Ambition
About: Ambition is a 2D strategy RPG game that explores a village with teleporters to dangerous dungeons. In this strange and quirky world, battle bosses like a one-eyed turtle with a fancy tophat, a giant centipede that lurks quietly in the desert, and many more!

Name: Ornament Express
About: Investigate strange oddities in Ornament Express, where you’re hired to recover your client’s belongings from an eccentric thief and his train of stolen artifacts. Explore a cabinet of curiosities throughout the train, visit carts holding odd puzzles, odder objects, and find hidden away secrets.

Name: Tale of the Singing Peaks
About: This game is a 2D Pixel Art Narrative Puzzle Platformer created by Quantum Lemon Interactive in cooperation with the talented artists at Xueshu Game Studios. Game Features: 2D Platforming; Single Player Co-op Gameplay; Puzzle-Solving; NPC Interactions;

Name: 先端恐怖症
About: このホラーゲームでは、プレイヤーは先端恐怖症になった看護師として、病院内で業務を進めながら彼女の先端恐怖症の原因を探ります。 しかし、深く掘り下げるにつれ、驚くべき事実が明らかになり、衝撃的なラストへと導かれます。 小規模ながらもプレイヤーを引き込む深いストーリーと、緻密な演出による臨場感あふれる恐怖体験を提供しています。

Name: Circuit Slinger
About: Circuit Slinger is a VR rhythm game where players purge corrupted code to a beat.

Name: Zombie Hobby VR
About: Zombie Hobby is an atmospheric action VR shooter where your weapons - the most affordable objects from your daily life. Train to be a shapshooter and kill as many zombie-aliens as you can.

Name: Five Nights at Roner's 2
About: Searching for fast money, you stumble upon an ad for a paranormal investigation. Upgrade your office, maintain your systems, and above all else: don't let them get to you. It's easy work, right...?

Name: Drawkanoid: Review Breaker
About: Smash through Steam reviews at hyperspeed, then guess which game they came from. Key resellers are bad for the industry, support developers directly!

Name: Vacation: dayOFF
About: The Destiny of 6-people in the island

Name: Crystal Cave
About: Can you focus and conquer the trials set by the three wizards? Don’t waste a moment—dive into this unforgettable adventure now!

Name: 无名录
About: “Nameless record”is a retro style strategy war chess game. The play takes the stage of the Empire of insalam on the land of irolan. The player will play the role of emperor of the Empire, take over the ancient empire with many scars, and revive the glory of this great empire.

Name: Sky Shepherd
About: Sky Shepherd is an atmospheric adventure game where you play as the lone survivor of a skyfaring tribe. Use your flute to round up a herd of mysterious creatures and explore the sky with them.

Name: Sphere Frustration
About: Sphere Frustration is an arena based item collection game. You must use the surroundings to your advantage, evade the human that is chasing you and collect all the items in an arena.

Name: War of Conquest
About: Share a vast game world with thousands of players! Your nation is deep in the fray, carving out a place for itself and fending off usurpers. Develop technologies and defenses, battle for resources, and forge alliances. Search the terrain for Orbs, relics that can imbue your nation with great power.

Name: Mages of Osmea
About: Mages of Osmea is a top down spellslinging RPG where you create your own spells to defeat corrupted monsters. Fight through waves of monsters and bosses, completing objectives in singleplayer or with friends.

Name: Abyss Seeker
About: Recipient of the RPG Maker FES Official Event Grand Prize. This RPG involves character growth and quest progression as you seek treasures hidden in the 'Grand Labyrinth,' aiming to reach the deepest part of the dungeon.

Name: SurviBall
About: Dive into SurviBall, a competitive 3D platform-puzzle game where speed and strategy merge, challenging you to master dynamic levels and climb the leaderboards.

Name: Cosmopoly
About: COSMOPOLY - is a multiplayer board game for 1-6 players. Play with friends, buy planets and space stations, participate in auctions and trade, build upgrades and become dominant in space.

Name: Invisible Wings: Chapter One
About: Help Dawn, a young woman of faerie descent, with her first steps into loving and accepting who she is in a modern world where faeries and humans were supposed to live in harmony.

Name: In The Shadows
About: Embark on a short yet captivating journey in 'In The Shadows'. Player must manipulate abstract objects, harnessing the power of light and shadow, to cast silhouettes that form familiar shapes and objects.

Name: Spark
About: Spark is a creative, combo-centric, Shoot 'em up game. It's a 3-in-1 old-school arcade game fueled by the competitive urge to climb the leaderboards. The unique shooting system hooks the player as they discover more and more ways to create beautiful and effective combos.

Name: A.V.I
About: Explore the halls of a decrepit mansion and discover it's horrifying secrets from the lens of a missing man's smartphone, revealing his fate and the fate of the family that populated this ominous manor.

Name: Paper Planes
About: Fly, shoot, and even nuke your friends in Paper Planes! This 2D arcade style shooter is played with up to four players, control a plane or maybe even a wizard all while trying to eliminate each other from out of the sky. Come fly with your friends and crown yourself the victor.

Name: Stock Market Tycoon: Challenge
About: A competitive multiplayer real-time stock market investment game where players compete globally to achieve maximum investment returns. Trade live stocks in a simulated economy and manage your portfolio in a real-time virtual stock exchange.

Name: The Call
About: The Call is a horror puzzle game where you are in the role of an american police officer who gets a domestic disturbance call while late on patrol. Once you arrive things get a little bit unusual...

Name: D.V. Ex Agent (Episode 1)
About: 'D.V. Ex Agent' is a narrative game with elements of horror, telling the dramatic story of the main character. You will have to come face to face with skeletons in the closet along with him. The events unfold in the post-Soviet era.

Name: Haunted Hell House
About: Horror action ADV to enjoy the fear.

Name: Ooga Booga Battle
About: Raise your Ooga Booga Baby for greatness in Ooga Booga Battle, a half virtual pet, half horde defense arcade experience! Train to evolve into a fierce cryptid and take down as many Ooga Booga Baddies as you can! Can you battle with the Ooga Booga Best of 'em?!

Name: Drift 4000
About: Drift 4000 is a new take on the old asteroids-style space shooter. You will find yourself in an increasingly difficult fight for survival against waves of enemy fighters, with periodic breaks to refit your custom ship with weapons, ammunition and unique abilities.

Name: Aggregator Elevator System
About: Challenge your logic and strategy in new ways in this deductive tile-placement puzzle game. Master a rich system of logical rules where you must arrange blocks within a grid to make everything add up perfectly.

Defeat the planet’s corrupted Core Wurm, save the planet, and get rich before time runs out!

About: Cavera - Island of Apes: top vacation spot for Apes and degens. Socialize, dance with up to 99 others. Explore, swim, chill on this multiplayer game.

About: Pixel Trading Card Game with over 170 cards to play! Build up your Deck and defeat your enemies because it's time for BATTLE!

Name: Night Escape

Name: Eggsplorer

Name: Hot-air VR Balloon trip over Russian Primorye

Hand recorded sounds and fine-tuned physics bring 60+ dice sets to life with materials like glass, plastic and metal. Use advanced features like Dice Analytics or the Dice Calculator

In a city of smuggling and crime, Rose, an upper class girl, joins the Irish mafia to fight off Rusty Jack's robotic mafia, using advanced weapons in a frantic adventure to write her story in Old Town.

Name: Hidden Cats: City
About: Go on a short but sweet adventure into the black and white world of an urban area! Enjoy the search for cats and recreate a colorful picture. 150 cute cats are waiting for you! Play and relax!

Name: Starwalker - The Last Cylinder

Traverse the untamed land, overcome countless perils across each and every dip & hill, mountains, lush meadows and serene lakes, make new allies and build a reputation among the stars.

Name: ArchaeologyX
About: Archaeology X is an open world Archaeology exploration game where you dig for ancient treasures, relics. Discover items hidden for 1000's of years, also explore long lost caves or tombs.

Name: Heart of the Kingdom: Rebellion
About: Heart of the Kingdom: Rebellion is a multiplayer online strategy where you have to discover the talents of a wise governor or a great conqueror.

Name: Aria
About: Aria is a narrative-driven adventure game following a young girl - Aria and her travelling companion, a “Dolki” (Half Dolphin, half Kiwi). A recent tragedy has left Aria adrift in her own imagination where corruption has begun to intrude upon the lands.

Name: 桌球大比拼

Name: Natal Perdido
About: Brazilian Indie JRPG with biblical perspective. Turn-based battle system. Developed solo. The only Christian RPG on Steam.

Name: World Mahjong
About: This board game is a mahjong game played by 4 people or computer.learn and play by this App about the [Traditional Chinese Mahjong] and [Japan Riich Mahjong] Game.

Name: VR Trivia Battle
About: Compete to be the ultimate game show champion in VR Trivia Battle, a social VR trivia experience filled with big choices and crazy shenanigans!

About: 'Alcatraz Island Lofts', an experimental VR short, is a dark comedy monologue set in 2025 San Franciso that imagines a rather cynical solution to San Francisco's housing crisis: converting the historic prison on Alcatraz Island into over-priced lofts. Run length is 1 min 30 secs.

Name: Toon TD
About: Toon TD is a free to play Tower Defense from Gee Studios. Defend your castle. Explore new environments. Face fierce bosses. Develop new and unique strategies for every level in this next evolution of the Tower Defense genre.

Name: Return to Northbury Grove

Name: Robots, Death & Venice

Name: Project Sphinx

Name: Doomba

Led along by the snarky ship AI, you'll pick up tools and upgrades along the way. Just be careful- In space, no one can hear you clean.

Name: Dice
About: Click dice, collect dice!

Name: Deadly Tropics
About: Zombie apocalypse on a tropical island. Deadly Tropics is a third person shooter with stealth elements. Kill as many zombies as you can and get out from the island.

Name: Tale of the Fragmented Star: Single Fragment Version / 星の欠片の物語、ひとかけら版
About: Help a stranded girl escape with just your eyes in this puzzle game designed specifically for VR. From the stationary convergence point between the two worlds, use the 'Focus Lock' to tell her the steps she has to take in order to put the star back together.

Name: Adorimon : Arena of Ancients

Name: Six Feet Under

Start by finding yourself in an open grave with options to enter The Crypt, The Pyramid and The Mine. Battle rising water levels, mummies and giant spiders.

Name: Tag Royale

Name: Lethal Application リーサルアプリケーション

Another player controls The Overseer, attempting to kick the Mutineer off the ship before it's too late!

Name: URLate

Trying to keep his friendships afloat before it's too late. And just wondering what the future has in hold for him...

Navigate through desert, encounter prehistoric creatures, and brave the frozen icebergs of Antarctica, all with stunning courses based on real-life greens and precise physics. Enjoy solo or multiplayer modes with friends for a fun-filled VR experience.

Name: Termite

Name: Cragls

Name: SpaceWalker

The doll always tries to advise her, but Rosie never listens. Eventually, Rosie decides to end her life, only to find herself trapped in a terrifying world.

Destroying the bio pod in which he was trapped, Z notices the laboratory equipment all around the room. Something horrific has been done to him in this laboratory space station.

Name: DEFENDit

Name: Cute Monsters Battle Arena

Name: AESCULAP® OrthoPilot®Elite VR Palpation

About: float champions is an intense skill based platformer where players race to become the king of the hill. Knock down those who oppose you by launching anvils or dishing out slaps as you fight to stay at the top.

Name: Ghost Castle
About: Defeat the ghosts who live in the castle! Make full use of the ninja weapons and skills to aim for the top floor where the ghost boss Yamatanoorochi is! Weapons such as shurikens, bombs and swords, and skills such as fire and freeze will surely help. Keep the peace of the village!

Name: Super Mayor
About: A 100% free, feel-good 2D platformer where you play as a councillor to a rural farming district in New Zealand! Solve problems, meet the public, and become MAYOR in this hilarious, story-rich adventure.

Name: Salto
About: The best adventures happen as you dream: Jump from between high ledges and buildings to explore the world above the clouds! Single and Two-player local Coop.

Name: Draw Near
About: Huge meteorites suddenly collided with your space ship. Due to that shock, your ship is drifting in outer space now. Let's take various actions and survive in the lonely universe! Can you finally return to the earth? Your survival life begins now.

Name: Cop Academy
About: Cop Academy is a VR party game where two teams battle it out through a series of challenges. Cooperate with your teammates or ruin your opponents' game...or both! Earn the most points to prove yourself and help your team join the ranks of Otterwa's police department, the proud graduates from Cop Academy.

Name: Zone4
About: Ultimate 3D Fighting Online Game

Name: Inside The Computer
About: This is a game that takes place in computer hardware. It's about you fighting against computer viruses. I'm a 17-year-old senior high student. I love computer programming or making and playing computer games. This is a game that I made it all by myself. I hope you enjoy it.

Name: 捕鱼大玩咖
About: 《捕鱼大玩咖》是一款刺激有趣的捕鱼游戏，让您沉浸在海底的奇妙世界中，探索栩栩如生的鱼种，体验精彩刺激的玩法，享受极致的捕鱼乐趣，金币爆屏的爽快体验！亿万金币免费拿，万倍炮台轻松打，问鼎捕鱼榜首，承包整个海洋！游戏不仅保留了经典街机玩法，还增加了核爆战场、摇钱树等全新玩法，爆率更高，福利更多，画面更炫酷。

Name: Necrosphere64
About: An adventure that will test your skills using only 2 buttons!

Name: Blockdown
About: Roll around on a wibbly wobbly grid through space. This peaceful puzzler is a 3D twist on a classic 2D game.

Name: Don't Wake God
About: Take on the role of Tieface - a dream figment, whose goal is to prevent his dreamer from waking up - if he wakes up, you die! Acquire abilities, outsmart your enemies, and most importantly... Don't Wake God.

Name: Mayhem Survivors: Animals
About: Mayhem Survivors is an action rogue-like game, where you feed cute animals with various different foods in order to Survive. It is inspired by Survivors-like games and features 3 different game modes.

Name: Lennod Jump Game
About: A new and innovative retro jump game with simple gameplay to soothe the heart.

Name: Zigglox
About: Team up with friends or get online and find blocks to build the highest and prettiest tower before the other team! Beware though, some blocks are... specials!

Name: Mushroom
About: Mushroom is a clicker game. You will see the visions after eating poisonous mushrooms. You will get a mushroom every x hours. Collect more to win the world.

Name: Seaside Racing
About: Drive down a mountain with your friends in this chaotic cult classic kart racer!

Name: Sidereal
About: A tall man with a black hat wanders across desolated worlds, stumbling beneath the endless stars.

Name: Fireflies
About: Fireflies is a First Person Psychological Adventure. The core mechanics revolves around exploration, survival from the enemy and a bit puzzle solving elements added to it. You open drawers, doors, inspect objects, unravel the mysteries of the unknown, meet interesting characters.

Name: Fantasy Gladiators
About: Still playing “Rock Paper Scissors” when it comes to who is doing the chores? Not very lucky in coin tosses? Have you ever though it would be much cooler to settle your disputes, in a trial by combat? Then Fantasy Gladiators is what you were looking for! Challenge your friends to a gladiator duel!

Name: Hyphen
About: Spin your way to victory in this devilishly hard, ultra-cool action/puzzle game for PC. Dim the lights, pump up the volume and prepare to rage!

Name: Knockout Daddy
About: Knockout Daddy is an action speedrun game where you go through the levels as fast as possible killing all of the enemies in each. As the game goes on the enemies get harder and harder. You can punch, kick, smash, and pickup the enemies to use their abilities.

Name: Relic Hunt
About: Relic Hunt is an exciting clicker game where each click earns coins and gives you a chance to obtain rare items for your collection. Gather unique artifacts, participate in mini-games, including poker!

Name: AFTERLIFE
About: Be permeated by the adrenaline-pumping gameplay worthy of the most famous shooters and survive the rise of madness! Experience the chaos and human perversion firsthand. This adventure will take you from the dark streets of DreamCity to the higher floors of the corporations that control it.

Name: rotatePDF: A Corporate Tale
About: Explore the liminal corridors of a company that only... rotates documents? This short artistic Indie title combines 2D exploration with paper physics to create a truly unique experience.

Name: Clash of Stars
About: MMO Real-time strategy star game.

Name: Jigsaw Pieces - Romance
About: The puzzles in this special Valentine Edition are all about love. Choose from a great amount of romantic puzzles in HD-quality and adjust the way you would like to play to your own preference. You get to decide for yourself how many pieces your puzzle may contain.

Name: The Legend of Tango
About: The Legend Of Tango is a short comedy JRPG that tells the story of how Tango Fiesta was born through the medium of a classic fantasy JRPG.

Name: Alchemy
About: Discover what lies beyond our reality with Alchemy. A portal-like experience that will challenge you to think with potions while trying to solve the mysteries of this strange new place.

Name: No Work No Life
About: This game is a roguelike horror game. Beyond the door lies a completely white space where you must pick up items, offer them as sacrifices, and survive for as long as possible.

Name: Son of Aral
About: An experimental game that combines sandbox survival and tower defence. Expand your island from scratch and build it any way you want, also defend the enemies from destroying island's core.At last escape from this fake world!

Name: Cyphers Game VR
About: It is the end of 1920. The Polish-Bolshevik war has been going on for almost two years. The battle for Korosteń – a key railway junction and technical supply base – is underway. Break Bolshevik cyphers, ensure radio communication, and neutralise the fearsome armoured trains - now in Virtual Reality.

Name: Magic Lantern
About: Magic Lantern VR is a cozy virtual room for the whole family, where you can watch your favorite stories, play games, draw pictures, and generally have fun. Journey into a magical, spellbinding world!

Name: Monster Tower Quest
About: You play as a hero on a quest to reach the top of a mysterious tower filled powerful monsters. You will need to use your puzzle-solving skills to match 3 or more of the same colored gems together to defeat your enemies as you make your way up the tower.

Name: Rezzil Index / Lite
About: Rezzil Index Lite is built on the same soccer simulation technology being used today in soccer clubs around the world to coach elite Premier League level players. Step onto the pitch and give it your best shot in Rezzil Index Lite's drills and challenges - VR soccer just got real.

Name: The Cyber Masquerade
About: Degenerate loner jailbreaks a stolen android.

Name: finland corruption simulator
About: experience boring life in simulator game and this will just is it finland corruption simulator and then you can just play it nothing intresting so do what ever you want in game what you will can so basically nothing

Name: Anti Gravity Warriors VR
About: Fight alien space robots and mutant monsters in this immersive, Sci-Fi, zero gravity environment. Battle to the death in this vr game!

Name: Snake-a-roni
About: A couch co-op or couch multi-player game. Each player controls a snake and eats powerups to get longer.Snake AdventureA casual mode to roam and explore several different areas. Up to 4 Snakes for multiplayer. Eat to get longer, then find the door to the next area. You will meet many other snakes on your adventure.

Name: The Lands of Eldyn
About: Eldyn is a dark, medieval hack and slash MMO where you conquer territory from other players to gain Valor, unlocking new abilities and powers along the way. Team up with friends for a massively coop experience or fight it out against other players.

Name: Rage Night
About: Embark on an epic journey, conquer levels for prizes, recruit unique fighters, wield new weapons, and engage in online multiplayer. Customize your fighters and bet in esports arenas for added excitement and rewards!

Name: Strid
About: Strid is a fast-paced 2.5D online shooter with support for up to 64 players. Weapons and vehicles are extremely deadly and spawn-times are short.

Name: The Flying Feathers
About: Nia accidentally goes into her best friend—Alice's past, the only way to escape and go back to the real world is to help Alice to solve all her problems. When you can go back to the past, do you want to do everything you can to save what you've lost?

Name: Rise of Koreth
About: Uncover the mysteries of Koreth's resting place in this exciting hack n slash, dungeon crawler, platformer adventure.

Name: 作为游戏和诗歌的世界
About: 优尔·阿莱夫和妹妹安雅·阿莱夫在幼年时因病被父母抛弃，后被爱尔兰都柏林的一家酒馆的老板娘西尔莎收留。在一次出差过程中，优尔意外的邂逅了自己梦中来历不明的少女，后得知对方的名字叫做艾尔温。面对这个熟悉又陌生的少女，优尔和她踏上了收集手稿和解开过去真相的旅程。

Name: HOSPICE Vol. 1
About: Hospice is a kinetic visual novel game about pure brother without his little sister, a men with no hope, a place with no home.

Name: Maxix Robotics
About: Survive the night in this Survival Horror environment as you navigate a Historic Robotics Facility by solving puzzles in various wings of the factory. By utilizing a Robotic companion called 'DOTT' you can open doors, activate terminals and more... Just make sure to look behind you.

Name: Spider Slingers
About: Play as a web-slinging spider and struggle your way to the top in this unforgiving rage platformer.

Name: Frostflame
About: Frostflame is a Brazilian Soulslike developed by a single person. In the game you control Chihiro, disciples of the great master Hori Masashi on a mission to advance to the lowlands and bring back peace, ending the war of the five kingdoms and eliminating the power of the Frstlame.

Name: Sarpedon
About: Explore an island at the edge of the world, converse with Greek Gods and Goddesses, and confront monstrosity in this modern reimagining of a classic myth.

Name: The Conqueror of Battles
About: Be ready to join epic multiplayer battles PVP or PVE. Create your team of heroes and improve them to annihilate your enemies and win battles. Discover also a unique and exciting progression system. Join the arena now!

Name: Buried Shards
About: Get Inmersed in the intriguing narrative adventure of BURIED SHARDS, progressing through the story chapters while alternating between day and night. Guide your sleepwalking self with house lights during the night and confront the traumas of your past in this unique blend of storytelling and puzzles.

Name: ParryRobot
About: PARRY ROBOT is a 3D action game where you play as a tiny but agile robot, “PAR 12-H”. Using the game’s “Parry System”, you are tasked with overcoming the mysterious, hulking “TB 001-L”…a massive automaton who’s set its eyes on your metallic hide!

Name: Mine? Sweeper
About: In this twist on minesweeper, find all treasures while avoiding mines to clear stages. Use items, deduce from nearby counts, or guess to identify tiles. Features a large-scale mode with multiple stages leading to a final treasure, and a small-scale mode focused on deducing a single stage.

Name: 三国志奇侠传
About: 《三国志奇侠传》是一款收集养成类的开放式角色扮演游戏,玩家扮演一个身世坎坷的小道士在乱世中寻找失散的妹妹。 在此过程中小道士不断探索世界,经历种种或熟悉或陌生的事件，看到了很多潜藏在历史脉络之下的隐情，他试图通过自己的不同选择推动着历史车轮向不同的方向滚动。 然而经历了红尘中的喜怒哀乐，悲欢离合，会尽了天下英雄，却还是无法憾动天道，迷雾之中仿佛有一只大手在操控着一切，小道士心中惘然。 迷失了自己心中的“道”，成道成魔便在你一念之间！

Name: Embers: Return to Dragonland
About: Save your legacy from the goblins by embodying legendary dragons in this cooperative twin-stick shooter action.

Name: Dustgrave: Prologue
About: Dustgrave: Prologue will let you experience the first hours of Dustgrave: A Sandbox RPG, which is set to release later this year! Start your journey in the Prologue, change the world with your choices, and then continue playing with your save once the game is released!

Name: CRUST SHMUP
About: CRUST PUNK SHOOT 'EM UP. BLAST BEAT BULLET HELL. HARDCORE ANARCHO ARCADE ACTION. BRUTAL, BLEAK, SHORT AND INTENSE. NO SCORE, NO LEADERBOARDS, NO GODS, NO MASTERS. CAVE MEETS NAPALM DEATH.

Name: Desert Strait: Operation Online
About: Desert Strait: Operation Online is a team-based tactical first-person shooter based on battles in a mountain strait with various dynamically changing weather conditions and multiplayer gameplay with a focus on capturing a point.

Name: Into the Wild
About: Into the Wild is a tense yet tranquil survival game where nature holds nothing back. Inspired by the Norwegian hinterlands, the haunting valley of Jegersdal offers a faithful survival experience. Witness the magnificent aurora and search for answers amid the ruins of yesterday.

Name: Before The Sun Rises
About: Re-growing a dying land with kindred spirits of the forest.

Name: Olive's Art-Venture
About: Olive's Art-Venture is a spell-slinging arena and mobbing game. Use the paper on the right side of the screen to draw shapes which then cast spells, damaging enemies and protecting you.

Name: SMYS : Classic
About: SMYS : Classic is a 2-4 local multiplayer stairs building race game. This version of SMYS is what the game was planned to be when it was first designed, the Classic version.

Name: Journey To Planet Earth
About: A GAME ABOUT FUN, HOPE AND URBAN CONCIOUSNESS...This game takes place in a real world location, a small village called Fornovo, on the Taro River.It’s a game about lot of things...like everything happens around you from childhood to human extinction.World could be Different.

Name: Laboratory
About: The game is all about the challenge. It has no in-between levels, only boss fights. Each boss is unique and will challenge your instincts and reflexes. Every boss you defeat will grant you a valuable upgrade.

Name: Records of the Flycatcher
About: The empire of Hadria has turned its war machine against the vulnerable eastern hinterlands of Altheim. With only your sniper rifle on your back, and a few strips of rabbit meat in your pocket, you must defend the motherland and wage a lone guriella war against the overwhelming tide of invaders.

Name: Гордость Улыпа. VR-легенды Чувашии
About: A fabulous VR quest will take you to a magical forest, where folklore merges with real history. Meet face to face with the giant hero from folk tales and challenge the Elder of the Chuvash oak forests. Solve the riddles of the ornament and hear the legend about Khan Kubrat and the Silver Bulgars.

Name: Bookend
About: Harness your child-like imagination to interact with the pop-up book, “The Little Witch”. Explore the book's world and help the protagonist, the little witch, Abigail, as she's pursued by an angry mob trying to stop her mission that could either mean saving the world—or ending it.

Name: 6 Feet Behind
About: Your pursuer is your only weapon.

Name: The Sych story: Human Being
