About: Визуальная новелла с глубоким сюжетом о парне, который не умеет жить эту жизнь. Помогите ему разобраться со своими тараканами, познакомьтесь со множеством интересных героев и узнайте, в чём смысл жизни!

Name: Colorfire Redux
About: Well, the physpace is being destroyed, glitching by numerous hordes of malicious duplicating codes from the bitspace. People are panicking, we must send our final attempt to fix the issue, you must be trained to fix the bitspace and survive in it during the process, in its current, decaying status.

Name: K Station
About: It's New Year's Day, 2319, and the happy denizens of K Station are disappearing, one at a time. You are Maya, a lab assistant, trying to find a way out as she weaves her way through the altered lives of the friends and colleagues that remain.

Name: RocketGO
About: RocketGO offers entertaining ways to pilot the rocket for the universe exploration. Six planets with unique landscapes and extreme conditions will challenge your piloting skills. You can upgrade the rocket using alien artefacts you discovered in the hidden places. Get ready for the space adventure!

Name: Coffee VendoR
About: Tired of paying for VR mini games? Well now you can enjoy some mini games for FREE with Coffee VendoR.

Name: CatBallGravityMaze
About: Help our cat ball find the fish in a gravity controlled maze.

Name: Green Fairy VR
About: Follow the Green Fairy’s adventure as she learns to appreciate her unique green glow by finding refuge at the traffic lights in the Big Little City.

Name: Kyklos Code
About: Kyklos Code is a first person action puzzler where you are reset to your starting location every 10 seconds. You can toggle the reset state of other objects in the world to solve puzzles. By activating new reset locations you can advance through the game.

Name: Pixel Happy Game Girls
About: In this cute kinetic visual novel: Your childhood friend Masako invites you to work at her indie game studio, and help accomplish her dreams. You soon learn that making a game is harder than it sounds.

Name: Boba Boyz
About: This all-new video game musical centers around a bubble tea shop with a secret: their boba actually brings happiness to its customers! When the boys need a new employee after their last crew member mysteriously disappears, boba won't be the only thing you fall in love with.

Name: Simkea
About: Ein Online-Rollenspiel mit umfangreichem Crafting- und Wirtschaftssystem. Sammle, handle und produziere oder erledige Quests und Event-Aufgaben. Die herzliche Community und der direkte Draht zum Entwickler machen das Spiel zu etwas Besonderem.

Name: Crazy Critters - Combat Cats
About: Run, jump, scratch and fight to be the purrrfect combat cat! Choose from a variety of different characters each with its own unique ability and skills. Shoot weapons and throw grenades at all those that dare to stand in your way! Fight in the craziest, silliest and most random arenas ever!

Name: The Rush
About: The Rush is a horizontally scrolling shoot 'em up with graphics inspired by classic space shooters of the MSX. Buckle up and see if you have what it takes to master the highly adaptive Chameleon Quartz space fighter and single-handedly obliterate the alien invaders!

Name: Romans from Mars (Free-to-Play)
About: You are a Roman Soldier, and you and your crossbow are all that stands in the way of the God of War, Mars, and his invading Martian army. Luckily, Jupiter has endowed you with awesome and terrifying elemental powers of Fire, Ice, Earth, and Lightning.

Name: ForeVR Cornhole VR
About: ForeVR presents the definitive VR Cornhole game! Take part in the all-time classic American pastime of Cornhole and enjoy realistic bag-tossing action with Friends or against worthy Bot opponents. Play using official ACO rules in two exciting locations, with more to come.

Name: Obscura
About: Obscura is a puzzle-platformer in which the player uses different cameras to find colorful solutions to problems in a monochromatic world.

Name: Mint Dodgers
About: Mint Dodgers is a simple game where this weird world that you're stuck in doesn't want you there! Dodge falling and flying mints, toxic rain, rocks, spikes, and so much more to come. Are you able to stick around long enough to defeat King Mint?

Name: Lil Johnny Goes Home
About: Welcome to the world of Lil Johnny, a thrilling 3D platformer adventure designed by our high school class! Get ready to embark on an extraordinary journey alongside our courageous protagonist, Lil Johnny, as he finds himself in an unknown realm after falling through a mysterious portal.

Name: The Love Boat - Second Chances
About: Get ready for a new time management adventure with the Love Boat crew!

Name: BirdLingo: A birdsong learning game
About: Welcome to BirdLingo, a game designed for honing your bird song recognition skills. Immerse yourself in a cute and relaxing atmosphere as you learn the songs of the 44 most common birds in Europe.

Name: Luckie Ball
About: A short precision platformer where nothing is fully solid. Roll, float, and air jump your way through zany worlds and bonus challenges!

Name: B-B0 The Delivery Bot
About: A 2D puzzle platformer where you play as a robot whose sole purpose is delivering packages on time! Your package is your only means of defense and attack, use it wisely to navigate levels and reach your goal, like a good little delivery bot :)

Name: Hopeguard
About: Hopeguard is a third-person dark fantasy game about loss and acceptance. You have been chosen to eliminate the Dragon Queen, but the confrontation will not go as expected. Journey through caves, ruins, and forests to solve environmental puzzles and fulfill your quest -but with a new perspective.

Name: Wizened Dream
About: Withered Dream is a 2D story exploration game based on card stacking and limited-time operation. By modifying the stacking relationship between the cards, new cards can be generated and the story can be advanced. The game contains three stories: going to school, going to work, and being unemployed.

Name: Bowling at the Lake
About: Bowling at the Lake is a nice getaway game to play the popular sport of bowling. Surrounded by a lakefront park, enjoy and relax with the sights and sounds of nature as you bowl that perfect game.

Name: Archipelago
About: Archipelago is a fast paced movement roguelike set on a cluster of floating islands. Slash, slice, and dash your way through the sky to challenge the final boss. Will skill alone allow you to prevail?

Name: Parabellum Beta
About: A semi sci-fi online PVP FPS shooter game with multiple maps, various weapon categories to master, incredibly fast paced movement with cool futuristic jetpack and jumppads around the map. Pickup armors and take control over enemy spawn to completely annihilate them

Name: Urban Nightmare
About: Urban Nightmare is a Found Footage like First-Person Parkour game where you are trying to get to the heart of the city as fast as you can! Replay levels to see how quickly you can get to the end of each map in this 15 min experience game!

Name: 珍珠梦
About: Cthulhu style AVG. Main gameplay is exploration and selection.

Name: Atlas Online
About: Welcome to Atlas Online, the 2D MMORPG pirate game! In this exciting pirate adventure, fight for your own glory, conquer islands with your alliance, embark on new adventures, and rule the seas!

Name: Gulping snake
About: Gulping Snake is a simple, but not easy, 2D puzzle game.

Name: Burndown
About: Burndown is a post-apocalyptic vehicular combat action without compromise. Pick your death car, get to the track, and pancake everyone who gets in your way. Shooting, crashing, and dirty tricks! There can only be one master of the track—snatch victory whatever it takes.

Name: Deep Below
About: Experience the tireless journey of a lone survivor caught deep underground striving to reach the surface using a unique and mysterious gauntlet that allows the impossible at your fingertips.

Name: Are You Happy
About: Short psychological horror experience

Name: Folgore
About: 1959 - Olimpia, South Italy. Play as Giove Scadenza and save your fiancée from the Inferna mafia with your newfound powers. Can you survive the Folgore ?

Name: Love and Guillotines
About: A visual novel video game which allows you to woo the most powerful figures of the French Revolution. Be careful to stay on everyone's good side, or you might just lose your head.

Name: Dystopy
About: DYSTOPY is a hybrid game mixing elements of a beat em’ up action game and a platformer. The journey focuses around Sasha, a young mechanic and her robot R0-X4-N3.

Name: Chili The Chipmunk Pinball Adventure
About: Chilis home is in danger when an evil millionaire kidnaps her animal friends. Help Chili by guiding her across and over the pinball table to score points and free Chilis animal friends from captivity. Up down all around even off the glass its up to you to help chili.

Name: Grimstone Valley
About: Grimstone Valley is a third-person supernatural action game set in the wild west. Utilize a lasso-like eldritch arm to control your enemies and your environment, taking advantage of deadly and alien objects to defeat your foes in fast-paced, tactical combat.

Name: Ember Point
About: Ember Point is a red-hot, combat-focused, third-person action game. Play as a disgraced defector, Gravitus, from a militaristic mega-corporation. He is stuck cleaning up the mess his former employers left behind — all while wielding a top secret “cure” for a gruesome disease.

Name: Infinity R
About: Welcome to Infinity R, an IDLE where the road is endless, the drops are regular, and the only thing standing between you and victory is... well, a bunch of pesky tolls and a never-ending fuel gauge!

Name: Aohri's Uprising
About: Embark on an adventure, driven by vengeance, to hunt down your former god and put an end to his reign to restore balance to the world!

Name: Unscramble Heroes
About: How do you like your English words? Scrambled? Then you're going to love this one. Save the generic fantasy setting from scrambled word monsters using the best weapon you have -- a keyboard. Type words, gain experience, level up, upgrade skills, unlock achievements, and post to leaderboards.

Name: H.I.V.E.
About: H.I.V.E. is a roguelite autochess game where the player leads the Clone revolution. It's the year 2424 a technology corporation has created the H.I.V.E. clones to take care of sanitation tasks. But now these beings have gained awareness and are taking over the city. Lead the clones to victory.

Name: Frontline Heroes VR
About: An incident in an experiment on a hadron particle accelerator opens a portal to alternative realities, horrible creatures from different realities emerge throughout the solar system and must be destroyed.

Name: Idle Dino
About: Click to grow dinosaurs and earn gold to unlock upgrades that enable you to purchase new dinosaurs and fill out the viewing scene. Explore the viewing scene to play minigames and unlock powers.

Name: SuperDungeon MegaCorp
About: Welcome to SuperDungeon MegaCorp, a puzzle game where you have to use your logic skills to tidy some huge dungeons full of monsters with unique abilities and personalities.

Name: GUNPYRE
About: Hold your Gunpyres akimbo in this fast-paced twin-stick shooter, set in the Crypt Alchemist’s semi-procedural dungeon. Remember, Vampyres are your guns and blood types are your bullets, so be assured to brutally steal them from your enemies in order to collect upgrades and take down your target.

Name: Virtual Becomes Reality: A Stanford VR Experience
About: With Virtual Reality technology widely available, it’s more important than ever to understand its impact on people and society. Explore highlights of nearly two decades of research from Stanford's Virtual Human Interaction Lab and discover how we can use this medium to enhance our everyday lives.

Name: Distant Garden
About: An exploration and building game inspired by games like 'Minecraft', 'LSD: Dream Emulator', and more.

Name: Ball Control
About: You are a ball, and you have to use your finger skills to reach the green zone, where you win and move on to the next level. The ball has gravity and you have to be careful that you might not be careful and break it.

Name: Forest Ranger Simulator - Apprenticeship
About: This is a free prologue of Forest Ranger Simulator. You have 45 minutes to explore, and have a glimpse of the story and game mechanics. Take care of forgotten nature's treasure. Build, craft, feed, clean, and manage your forest.

Name: Mini Mania
About: You are young man, whose grandfather has shrunk down to use a ‘lab rat’ in his size changing experiments. With the crazy genius grandpa constantly watching, you must complete all of the puzzles in front of him if he is to ever to return to full size – and normal life!

Name: Circuit Warz
About: The hardest electronics game you will ever play, only good engineers need apply. Test your understanding of electronic circuits to save the planet in a desperate race against time. The laser protection system has been sabotaged…You have minutes to fix the circuits, repair the generator by solving the circuits correctly, fire the laser...

Name: Totally Shmup
About: Beginner friendly 2D vertical and horizontal retro-style little shoot 'em up. Colourful stages with sound and vision inspired by the golden age of video gaming. Totally free introduction to the world of Shmups and Bullet Hell Games!

Name: Death Fighter
About: This is a simple side-scroller made by one person. It's my first game and I would really appreciate any reviews from you !

Name: Dark Matter
About: The Space Pirates are planning on destroying the Earth. They have stolen many space cargo vessels in order to gain the supplies to blow it up. You play as Dark Matter, a hired bounty hunter who works with the Space Federation in order to stop the pirates. You must stop the pirates, save the space cargo vessels, and save the Earth.

Name: Rise of the Slime: Prologue
About: Rise of the Slime: Prologue is a free snippet of the first zone in Slime's adventure. Be the hero that no-one saw coming. Help Slime defy the odds by playing insanely powerful cards in this charming, relaxing and strategic deckbuilding adventure.

Name: Shrimp Keeping Simulator
About: Grow, feed and care for your shrimp pals. Watch your shrimp multiply and sell your colony when they become too numerous.

Name: Bat Tap
About: Bat Tap is a game in which you click on the bat and get points for each click. Accumulated points allow you to get a random bat in your inventory. However, the points themselves cannot be spent on anything else. You can get full information on our discord server.

Name: Winning Putt: Golf Online
About: Join the ultimate free-to-play PC golf experience. Perfect your golf game across ten beautiful courses. Play with friends worldwide anytime, anywhere.

Name: Grape Juice City
About: A friendly but competitive couch party game for all ages! Play as tropical birds competing to splash pedestrians with your team’s juice in this match-based party game. Bounce around a tropical metropolis, gather fruit and recyclables, craft juicy drinks, and splash the people of Grape Juice City!

Name: MR 333 II: Planetbirth
About: Fight back entities and run from those they persuade as you seal the portal before MR 333 is given access to the world of your home.

Name: Monster Showdown: Prologue
About: Monster Showdown: Prologue is the first 3 maps of an action packed VR shooter. Increase your chances of survival against an ever growing horde of monster by exploring your environment and strengthening yourself by picking up Perks, Ranged Weapons and Melee Weapons.

Name: World Leaders
About: Lead your nation to victory in this multiplayer turn-based war strategy game!

Name: Ice Caves of Europa
About: Ice Caves of Europa will challenge your reflexes and your mind, blending free-flowing precision flight with confronting science fiction ideas about the nature of humanity. An inquisitive flying robot exploring the hazardous caves beneath Europa stumbles upon a sinister interplanetary conspiracy.

Name: Kittens' Maze
About: Destroy the terrain with cute kitties and gather as many coins as you can! Play solo or in a local PvP!

Name: Floaty Fighters
About: It's fight or flight! Battle it out in the sky as four unique combatants in this free movement fighting game. It's anyone's game, think on the fly! Play with up to four players locally or online with Steam Remote Play Together!

Name: Chainless
About: Escape from prison and swing your way through the city in floating chains, avoiding various obstacles, trying not to fall and not to get caught.

Name: Incarnation
About: A mouse-only reverse roguelike platformer. After each level, you must lose one of your celestial powers until you are completely transformed into a human. Will you be able to reach mortality?

Name: BattleParty
About: BattleParty is a survival topdown game in an apocalypse world.

Name: MonsterAmongUs
About: 《人中怪物》是由九头龙工作室独立研发的一款恐怖策略解谜类游戏。迷途的你误入一段阴谋满满的事件，跌落不同的时空，探索所遇之人的纷纷纠葛。所有的故事等待真相，而你便是揭露真相的那一人。

Name: Deathmatch Soccer
About: Deathmatch Soccer is fast paced soccer mixed with brutal bloody combat. During a match, the crowd will throw weapons onto the pitch to spice things up. The winner is the team who has scored the most goals... If they can survive until the final whistle.

Name: Night Of The Abattoir Man
About: The story of Michael D'Amato, a young 23-year-old man who flies to New York with the intention of starring in his uncle's new horror movie. However, he finds himself in a real-life horror scenario as he becomes the target of a 10-foot-tall maniac known as the Abattoir Man.

Name: Block Pooper 9
About: Ride a high velocity stream of blocky effluence to glory in this local multiplayer brawler.

Name: Up All Night: Daybreak
About: Nick just can't let go of the people he's killed.

Name: Project Zero
About: Immerse in Project Zero's fast-paced FPS action. Master movement, choose your weapons wisely and engage in six game modes.

Name: Balloon Blast
About: Face off against friends and foes in this vacuum fighting arena.

Name: Retro War
About: Retro War is a 2D shooting videogame. In this game you must pilot a ship, dodge obstacles and enemy ships to finally reach your destination and move to the next level.

Name: legions battle
About: We've fused Card Gaming with the Battle of Total War to create the ultimate multiplayer strategy game. Combine a unique deck from different factions, rally your legions, and charge to defeat all your opponents!

Name: Breathe Peace World
About: Enter a Virtual Reality storybook world and learn how to Breathe Peace. When you're ready to return home, you'll know exactly how to Breathe Peace in any situation, anytime, anywhere!

Name: Krax Ca-caw's Concoction Chaos
About: You are Krax Ca-caw’s new intern. Learn the craft of potion brewery, memorise the recipes, and become the next best potion maker. Fill the cauldron with the correct ingredients and stir. Don’t let it overflow!

Name: Ancient World War
About: This is a Sandbox + Moba Third-Person Game, Players 2 vs 2 compete with each other; Players can create flame towers , city walls and soldiers on the map and You can kill enemy merchants so that enemy players can't buy items.

Name: 心の闇の先に Trial VersionⅡ
About: Life style set in the realistic life of modernity is drawn, and the vector of contents differs greatly from general game, It is a sound novel of an undeveloped market that does not apply to existing game genres.

Name: Max Massacre
About: A visual novel set in a monster-filled fantasy world

Name: Maguntsche Chapter One
About: Darkness closes in fast on the town of Macungie, Pennsylvania. Explore the depths of the Realmverse and put a stop to the Superior's demonic forces. The Maguntsche Demon is on the hunt. Will you be able to stop this entity once and for all? Or will it find new victims to take in your place?

Name: El Ministerio del Tiempo VR: El tiempo en tus manos
About: ¿Do you want to delve into one ol the best TV series? ¿do dou want to become a member of the ministry of Time as a patrolperson? Dare you live a virtual reality experience to test your expertice as a time-traveller.

Name: Not Heaven
About: Not Heaven is an interactive world built as a platform for Wealthy Relative's 6 song rap EP with the same title. The game experience contains 6 music videos, multiple art galleries, god-like abilities, and more. Not Heaven is the first Rap record to be released as a video game.

Name: Digital Janitors
About: Digital Janitors is an action-packed desktop defense game where hackers have taken your employer’s network hostage, which means the player must go to each computer in the company, excise the virus, and beat the hacker threat.

Name: Homeward Duck
About: Your mission is to guide a family of ducks through outer space by strategically placing a trail of breadcrumbs. But look out for the dangerous space foxes and black holes that will try to stop you from getting the ducks home to Earth.

Name: Otome Romance Jigsaws - Midnight Cinderella & Destined to Love
About: 'Otome Romance Jigsaws - Midnight Cinderella & Destined to Love' is a jigsaw puzzle game featuring many illustrations of 'Midnight Cinderella：Ikémen Royal Romances' and 'Destined to Love: Ikémen Samurai Romances' those are very popular Otome romance novel games in Japan.

Name: トトのおもちゃばこ
About: さあ、おもちゃの世界を冒険しよう！！ このゲームは、仕掛けがいっぱいの子ども部屋を冒険して、様々なキャラクターとわちゃわちゃしながらゴールを目指すアクションアドベンチャーゲームです。

Name: Shinobi Bad Buddies
About: Shinobi Bad Buddies will reveal the mischievous ninja in you, as you make your way through the story and the co-op missions or challenge your friends into a local battle!

Name: Return to Sector 9
About: Spread across a campaign mode and 8 mini games, take on a variety of missions from bug hunts, protection detail, desperate last stands and rescue missions!

Name: Rune Seeker
About: Uncover the secrets of a world created and destroyed by Runes.

Name: Boofle's Home
About: Hello, my name is Boofle! Come and join me in my virtual world – there’s lots of fun things to explore and interactive activities for you to do! You can watch me on the swing, help water my flowers and catch butterflies!

Name: Nonogram Nights
About: Nonogram Nights is a spooky puzzler where you use logic to uncover a mysterious picture.

Name: Phantom of Zana
About: Swing, dash, slide and slice your way through this retro style 2D side scrolling platformer! Blast, hack and slash your opponents or bounce off their heads! Power up Fantastic Fania to finally confront the Phantom of Zana!

Name: Slime Simulator Games
About: Slime Simulator Games & Putty Simulator - Super Calming Recipes for Slime Games, So Fun!

Name: Ortheo's Interdimensional Jam Session
About: Get lost in the musical madness of Ortheo's Interdimensional Jam Session. Groove to unique beats, create custom levels with drag & drop or play-through charting, and share your creations with Gamebanana support. Experience trippy visuals, challenging gameplay, and endless fun.

Name: Always Forward
About: A very short tap-and-jump game that brings along some personal complaints.

Name: Metagalactic Blitz
About: Metagalactic Blitz is a sci-fi dodgeball brawler. Choose your fighter, grab a ball and blast your opponents away in this competitive online arena game!

Name: Zero Days VR
About: Based on the Oscar short-listed Participant Media documentary Zero Days, Scatter's Emmy Award-winning, immersive documentary Zero Days VR visualizes the story of Stuxnet in a new way: placing you inside the invisible world of computer viruses, experiencing the high stakes of cyber warfare at a human scale.

Name: Bulkhead
About: Bulkhead is a dark, gritty third-person tower-defence game. Playing as the Soldier, build towers, wield your frost cannon, and protect the last thing you have left from hordes of iron-clad monstrosities.

Name: The Great Deer
About: The Great Deer is a point-n-click adventure game where you play as an intrepid explorer searching for an artefact of great value. Journey into an ancient and long forgotten temple, discover the secrets within, and uncover the dark truth behind a sinister ritual taking place within its walls.

Name: Kaz Ball
About: Kaz Ball is a fast-paced, 5v5, team space-sport similar to hockey, rugby, or football. The core objective is to grab the ball, and shoot it into your opponent's goal more than they do it to you.

Name: THROUGH
About: Through is a multiplayer arcade hack and slash with social cooperative mechanics in which players face challenges in different dungeons to reach the exit.

Name: BeefeaterXO
About: Have you ever thought what's inside the mind of Dabiz Muñoz? Would you like to experience dreamlike from your seat? Immerse yourself into the Odyssey of Dabiz Muñoz with virtual reality.

Name: Go Go Zombies
About: Sweet raging fast zombie revenge!

Name: Peek a Boo
About: Multiple boy-scouts get pushed inside an abandoned house to pass courage challenges. What they don't know though is that Ethel, the girl that organizes the challenges, hides a monstrous secret inside the house.

Name: Chaordic
About: Fight a horde of dark creatures that do not want you to get out of the underworld.

Name: CRAZY DOG DEMO
About: 'CyberDog' is a fast-paced multiplayer skating battle game. Defeat rivals and become the champion with strategy and skill. Compete online for endless excitement!

Name: Delila's Gift
About: Delila's Gift is a VR Picture book created using Tilt Brush! It tells the story of a small sea creature named Delila and her struggle to understand belonging, ownership, fear, othering, and the darkness surrounding her.

Name: Raging Ball
About: First finish the game, then improve your speed.

Name: Pupa
About: • Simple gameplay: just click on the screen for a chance to get new skins. It's easy to learn, but hard to put down!

Name: Shoot! VR
About: Shoot! VR is a first-person shooter simulation game using virtual reality. The game simulates the environment of an indoor shooting range. The game has different modes and offers a choice of different weapons.

Name: Garda
About: Garda is a 2d pixel art tower defense and exploration game. Protect your totem that is keeping your world out of the darkness. Wander across an immense desert. Learn about the weird laws of this world by using technology and energy systems to power defense turret against the numerous enemies…

Name: Zombie Camp
About: Zombie Camp is a room-scale VR shooter! Experience 360 degree virtual reality shooting in a desperate attempt to protect your campsite from crazed ZOMBIES!!

Name: The Forest of Conx
About: The Forest of Conx: A spooky noir styled survival horror tower defense game

Name: Haunted Record
About: A 20 minute story about a mysterious ghost and an even more mysterious journalist.

Name: 莫西比亚岛
About: 《莫西比亚岛》是一款怀旧、剧情向的RPG游戏。以少年冒险为主轴，氛围轻松、明亮鲜快。跟着本作一起，畅游架空的大陆斯可维，在帕尔斯王国来一场愉快的冒险征途~重温少年时代的感动~

Name: Tobor Party
About: A local multiplayer racing game where you play as Tobors driving around the UTD campus!

Name: シニサギ
About: オリジナルドット絵のオリジナルキャラクターの物語！ ゲーム型小説物語です。分岐などはありません。 あなたは死にたいと思ったことはありますか？ 死にたい人を殺す殺し屋と依頼者の物語。 殺されるまでに残された時間を 依頼者であるあなたはどう生きるか。

Name: Signs of the Sojourner: Prologue
About: Try out the first trip! In this narrative card game about relationships and communication, navigate conversations in a colorful world reminiscent of our own. Learn and grow through the cards you choose to play. Who will you become? What will you leave behind?

Name: Bridge Trek
About: Face your fear of heights! Bridge Trek provides you with a safe environment to conquer your gephyrophobia or acrophobia in virtual reality. Build your way up from the pillow padded first bridge, to the perilous glass bridge in the sky!

Name: VIDEO GAME
About: VIDEO GAME is a local-multiplayer action arcade game. Curve the ball past your opponents and dash to save a goal at the last second!

Name: EmbodyMe Beta
About: Make a real hologram of Princess Leia from Star Wars! EmbodyMe is an application that lets you easily create a realistic avatar of yourself from a single photo of your face and communicate with people in various ways as if you were really talking to them in person.

Name: Above the Stars
About: Discover new worlds and build up mighty defences as you find your new home Above the Stars!

Name: Eternal Space Battles
About: Eternal Space Battles is a classic wave-based side-scrolling shooter with bullet hell elements.

Name: Dogs
About: Dogs is a relaxing and fun game where you click on adorable dogs to increase your score. Featuring a variety of cute dog breeds, simple gameplay, and charming visuals, it's perfect for dog lovers and players of all ages.

Name: The Courage to be Disliked
About: A Healing Journey to Find Yourself

Name: The Princess's Dragon
About: Traverse the winding dungeon of the dragon as you attempt to reverse the curse that has been set upon you by the cursed sword.

Name: Me and myself
About: Lily, a little girl who lost her parents in a car accident, lives in a big empty house. She really wants to have a friend with whom she could pass the tough time. One day, she finally get a friend, from mirror...

Name: Haunting Memories
About: Haunting Memories is a psychological horror, walking simulator, platforming and puzzle game. You play as a middle aged man that has made a deal with the devil and must now face the consequences. The game takes place in an old mansion with occult themes and a rich story ready to be uncovered.

Name: Farm Fatale
About: Go head to head in high energy games to be the last standing who isn't an animal, and win!

Name: Ecto
About: Play as bunny-hopping wizards with flower guns in a highly-randomized wonderland. Hold a frog in your left hand and a stick gun in your right as you jump around at 25 miles per hour, picking flowers and shooting robots with your friends.

Name: Hans
About: Step into Hans, a visual novel set during World War I, and play as an alien who bakes magical pastries to help the residents of a small town.

Name: BVRGER VAN
About: BVRGER VAN is a frantic and fast-paced Virtual Reality game where you are tasked with the upkeep of your burger van business. Cook burgers, hotdogs, and much more as you journey your way to becoming the best burger van in town!

Name: PolyFight
About: Duel your adversary and prove your skills to be superior.

Name: Collapsed
About: Challenge your mind with a 3D physics-based puzzle game. Take control of a cannon and use your limited supply of cannonballs to bring each level crashing to the ground. Using gravity, momentum, and logic, plan how to knock down each structure and leave nothing standing after the collapse!

Name: Whale Well
About: Whale Well is a short adventure game where you play as a duck. Collect and trade items while exploring a civilization in the belly of a great whale.

Name: Pixelite Online
About: Explore and conquer the world of Pixelite Online! Dive into a pixel-perfect world of adventure, connect with friends, and complete epic quests to prove your worth.

Name: Dancing Angel
About: Dancing Angel is a place where you can select a cute anime character. Lets dance along to hot songs, find your couple and celebrate weddings.

Name: The Backrooms: Anomaly Containment Unit
About: A first-person horror game with bodycam gameplay and tight controls. Explore the eerie, randomly generated Backrooms, catch anomalies, solve puzzles, and face atmospheric horror. Survive endless corridors in this intense PC survival experience.

Name: Dino Scourge
About: Fly a space ship, kill Dinosaurs, level up, find loot, save the rabbits

Name: Eviron's Chronicles
About: Eviron's Chronicle - a free collectible card game with elements of RPG. Under your command will be six commanders capable of engaging in battle, hundreds of cards that can be improved and developed. With this might you’ll pave the way to the heights of glory and power!Eviron waits you!

Name: Animals
About: Animals is an engaging clicker game where every click counts. Explore unique habitats like Aerial, Arboreal, Terrestrial, and Aquatic, and collect diverse animals. Earn regular and rare drops influenced by your click activity. Join our community to help shape the game and build a vast metaverse.

Name: Ski Doom VR
About: The classic ski survival game is back - and this time, in virtual reality. Pick your ride, hit the slopes, and outrun the mountain monster as long as possible. Compete for the #1 spot on the global leaderboards

Name: CIPHER-8
About: CIPHER-8 is a brain-twisting minimalist arcade puzzler where you push numbers into a grid and manipulate them with randomly drawn special abilities! Play blitz mode for frantic combo streaks, or analyze every move in puzzle mode. Both scale infinitely in their difficulty. How far can you go?

Name: Go Go Electric Samurai
About: Go Go Electric Samurai is a competitive multiplayer arena shooter. It's hockey, in spaceships, on an obstacle course, with psychedelic visuals and a pulse-pounding soundtrack.

Name: Disarmed
About: A satirical fantasy puzzle game about healthcare.

Name: Scarlet and Blank
About: An award-winning, fully-voiced sound novel. In 1888 in Yoshiwara, the pleasure district of Tokyo, a man meets a woman. Soon after, the illustrious escort Hakuhi dies. So begins a tale of the events leading up to her death, told from the perspective of two men with nothing in common.

Name: MAZE
About: Maze 'is a game that simulates you in a real maze environment. Without map navigation or guidance from any auxiliary tools, you will be completely lost in it. The only thing you can rely on is your own intuition and memory. Let's see how long it takes you to get out of the helpless maze.

Name: Memory Quickie
About: Embark on a nostalgic journey with Memory Quickie, the classic card-matching game reimagined for the digital era. Test your memory and concentration as you uncover pairs of cards in this timeless pastime.

Name: Cashew Clicker
About: Cashew Clicker is a simple idle game with prestige, upgrades, boosts and unlocks. Unlock the stars and take flight on your cashew production dreams.

Name: Joy Flight
About: Joy Flight is an open world arcade VR flight game where players will explore, unlock runways with daring landings and complete missions across a large chain of islands! Free to Play

Name: Galacticverse
About: Free to Play! Galacticverse is an single player game. Discover and join the special events! For now just open for what we are building! Don't forget this is early access!

Name: Empire City Simulator
About: Become a ruler and build the ancient city of your dreams in Empire City! Unlock new opportunities for your city's prosperity, gain the support of the gods, construct grand buildings, and create unique infrastructure. Transform a small settlement into a magnificent center of civilization!

Name: Legena: Union Tides
About: Solve the mystery of the Narrator! A new take on the classic RPG featuring choices, ability equipping and harnessing the weather.

Name: Tube Tussle
About: Prove your pool party prowess in this family-friendly battle royale! Grab your tube and water sprayers to push your friends into oil spots to knock them out. But keep your eyes peeled not to push yourself into danger as well.

Name: Unbeliever
About: Traverse through a broken world and recall your memories. With each step you take you regain your lost powers. Develop your character however you like and find your true self.

Name: Quest Master's Realm
About: Realtime Action Combat MMORPG. Battle Foes and Complete Quests to Level up your Skills and Equipment. Prepare to face the most Mythic of Enemies. Swap between different Skill Sets whilst playing the Same Character. Craft and Discover New Items of Increasing Rarity. Open World - No Instances.

Name: Small Kingdoms Prologue
About: Rule a small fantasy kingdom and conquer your rival as you build up your cities and armies on the world map and command your troops on the battlefield. Small Kingdoms is a streamlined grand strategy and real-time strategy game, the Small Kingdoms Prologue is a free introductory campaign

Name: Unfolded : Camellia Tales - Prologue
About: The first chapter of a hand-drawn 2D point-and-click adventure, Unfolded : Camellia Tales. Follow the journey of Herman, a boy who lived through the most tragic times in the history of Jeju Island, Korea. Explore the beautiful wilderness and experience the coming-of-age story.

Name: Blood Kiss
About: The job I barely managed to get is in a dungeon filled with vampires? What would you do, if you had to work together with dangerous and mysterious vampires who hate humans? Experience the secret romance in interactive otome game with these ikemen vampires, in Blood Kiss!

Name: Block Tower TD 2: Prologue
About: Block Tower TD 2 is a strategic game in the roguelike style with original innovations. Build worlds from blocks, choose random upgrades, each game will be unique.

Name: Fruits & Vegetables
About: Fruits & Vegetables is a clicker game. You can merge fruits and vegetables to get new ones!

Name: Alpha & Beta
About: Alpha & Beta is a 2d platform game for those who love old platform games but with a few touches on this old style, the most important features are the high degree of difficulty and the promise of a satisfying gaming experience with a long gameplay time

Name: City of Ages: Picture Supportive Text MUD (server and client included)
About: Two windows applications install to any Windows Computer: Ansi compliant telnet text MUD Server and Client and their VB6 source code, heavily SQL coded with support and admin commands. I run my server on a 1000Mhz x 2 processor 7nm HP fanless laptop.

Name: 捕鱼娱乐城-真人千炮3D捕鱼
About: 《精品捕鱼》是一款3D全新品质捕鱼，巅峰制作，震撼来袭！炫酷场景全面升级，带来极致海底体验，超多关卡完美还原街机玩法。劲炫炮台享受视觉盛宴，超高炮倍，满屏暴击带你沉浸式捕鱼。

Name: 盖世豪侠
About: 《盖世豪侠》是一款武侠题材回合游戏。游戏以南宋时期为背景，以青龙会和侠客岛正邪两大组织的冲突为主线，融入了大量个性鲜明的武侠人物，表现了引人入胜的情节，塑造了一个充满爱恨情仇的武侠世界。 《盖世豪侠》在策略、养成、画面方面均有重大创新。

Name: Squirt's Adventure
About: Squirt's Adventure is a word game designed to help children associate new words with letters of the Alphabet. Tag along with the cheerful pirates Squirt and Captain Dungee on their quest for treasure. Use your alphabet and vocabulary skills to help them find the golden loot.

Name: Langton's Ant
About: Based on simple inputs, amazing patterns can be achieved!

Name: Soul Harvest
About: Soul Harvest is a fast paced local multiplayer strategy game set in the depths of Hell! Play as Archdemons fighting for the domination of the underworld, harvest souls to summon armies of minions or to cast unholy magicks and send your enemies into oblivion!

Name: Ahlman Mansion 2020
About: Ahlman Mansion 2020 is a huge collection of games made by the Game Industry students at Ahlman Institute. Some content was created by Literature, Music and Art students. All games were made during our 10 month long school. The game developments ranged from 1 week to 2 and one took 5 weeks.

Name: Nuclear Arms Race
About: Nuclear Arms Race is a revolutionary turn-based game that allows you to produce resources, spy on and sabotage your opponent in order to acquire the nuclear weapon before they can eradicate you.

Name: Henchman For Hire
About: Henchman for Hire is a VR game designed by students where you drive, jump and sabotage Peace City for the super villain Dr. BAD while traveling on a surprisingly resilient moped!

Name: World Annihilation Operations Parts I-IV
About: Explore this set of 4 distinct short experimental games and experience impossible worlds filled with audiovisual and narrative contradictions.

Name: REVEREX: DX
About: REVEREX: DX is a 2-player asymmetric experience that blends platforming action and microgames on a visually stunning trip through the mind. Don the roles of Lab Technicians operating an experimental Coma Treatment device, explore the deepest reaches of the subconscious and rescue your patient!

Name: Jinni : Haunted House
About: Can you escape this haunted house? Or will you become a hostage of the mysterious creatures? It's up to you! Find your way out of the haunted house and save your life!

Name: MAVR3D 八般武艺
About: Martial Arts VR 3D (Immersive Duel, Cultural Treasure Demonstration) MAJOR UPGRADE Boss TacticalSim. Inch-longer the stronger! Inch-shorter the deadlier! Duel your Foe (or friend), Arena players, or Boss femme fatales using different pairings of Eight Martial Arts. Real-Time Strategy Action Slasher

Name: Dances with Butterflies VR
About: Conduct clouds of Monarch butterflies in the forests of Mexico.

Name: It's Raining Acorn!
About: An idle, drafting pachinko game that slowly distracts you from work while you watch the acorns rain from the side of your screen!

Name: DeltaBlade 2700
About: Fight as a Rogue Cyberpunk Ninja-Robot in DeltaBlade 2700: an Action-Packed, High-Energy, Competitive Local Multiplayer Brawler with Explosive, Fast-Paced Sword Combat... and Jetpacks. Think on your feet, react quickly, fight cleverly: take advantage of every moment to turn the tide.

Name: No Recollection
About: A mystery visual novel following a boy who awoke in a strange building, with no recollection of where he is, how he arrived, why he’s here, or how to leave. Discover the answers to these mysteries as you search for a way out. Meet a small but colorful cast in your journey, and escape together!

Name: The Cube Factory
About: Shoot your way through evil cube-like robots while running along walls and jumping across platforms!

Name: 雷雨漫漫Endless Thunder
About: 《雷雨漫漫》是由龙科游戏使用Ren'py引擎制作的文字类游戏。游戏中，你将扮演A市一名办公人员，在你的下班路上，你察觉到背后有人在不断跟着你。通过重重选择，活下来。

Name: Ah, Love!
About: Love, People, Date... - it's beautiful!!!

Name: Time Killers: Spot Race
About: Spot Race is a little simple pair based puzzle game, which can been played when you are short in time.

Name: Lesson Learned: Cult of the Elizabeth
About: Help Amelia defeat Elizabeth Bathory's henchmen in this amazing Tower Defense game. Enter a bizarre daydream world in co-op or solo mode. Gather resources, build defense towers, and manage your classmates. Take up the challenge and defeat the incoming enemies!

Name: Renters Revenge
About: Renters have gone mad and they are coming to kill you. And why would they want to do that? Haven’t you always been a fair LANDLORD? Ah…nope! So call it justice, call it a cruel taste of revenge, or maybe just a terrible nightmare. Either way your life hangs by a thread.

Name: VRWorkout
About: Fitness rhythm game with full body engagement. Transform your living room into a personal gym on 4 square meters.

Name: 欧酱的迷宫大冒险
About: OuJiang's Labyrinth Adventure is an action-adventure game that features exploration of labyrinths, battles, and collecting, as well as a technical test of our Houdini-based level creation.There are various monsters, bosses, and props in the game. We hope everyone will enjoy our mini game!

Name: The Seabed's Shining Star
About: Under the hazy moon, a shrine maiden meets a star. A short visual novel of a two person conversation. Cup ramen recommended.

Name: Square garden
About: This is an easy and simple building game. Build your own garden.

Name: Ball Bulét
About: Ball Bulét is an isometric, Bullet Hell, twin-stick shooter in which a girl searches for revenge by fighting security guards with...a bouncing ball?! Progress through the building by performing ricochets with your spherical weapon against walls and enemies to reach the top.

Name: BrainRot
About: A party pvp game based on brainrot trends.

Name: A Long Stroll
About: The game that an old woman walks in a long straight road.

Name: Flatspace
About: Flatspace is a top-down space trading game with the emphasis on freedom and exploration. You become captain of a spaceship in a living simulation of a distant galaxy. As a space pilot, you decide how to earn a living; command your crew, buy new and better ships and equipment, and explore.

Name: After School
About: If you've ever dreamed of taking on your school teacher with your water gun, After School is for you! Play as a child in his playground in this dynamic third-person shooter!

Name: 灵剑奇缘
About: 《灵剑奇缘》 is an epic MMORPG action xianxia (immortal-martial) game masterpiece, featuring stunning scenery, exquisite graphics, a prolonged storyline, and intricate romantic entanglements.

Name: Colorful Life
About: In the dark, colorless dungeons underground there remains only four blobs of color who struggle to survive as they attempt to escape. That doesn't mean that they've lost their personalities though!

Name: A Summer in Our Hearts
About: A slice of life VN about three very different young adults, from very different backgrounds, trying to put their best foot forward and find their own ways in life. Will a short summer, away in a foreign town in the middle of nowhere, enough to push your way towards happiness?

Name: Wanderlust: Bangkok Prelude
About: Take your first step toward a great adventure. Play the introduction to the Wanderlust: Travel Stories anthology. See the many faces of Bangkok in a narrative game from the makers of The Witcher, co-created with real-life adventurers.

Name: Cecelia
About: A mysterious island. A giant baby made of stone awakens. Learn to trust each other if you want to explore the perilous terrain, seeking answers from the island's enigmatic call and an ominous force awaiting you in the distant lighthouse.

Name: Porcelana
About: Isabella, your classmate, is someone you were never close to but someone you certainly noticed. One day however, you notice that Isabella stopped coming to class. You start to discover how important you were to her despite never even having a conversation with her before.

Name: Signal
About: Signal is a third-person adventure game full of unknowns and dangers, where the player takes on the role of a father searching for his daughter, facing extreme life and death decisions, the player must rise to the challenge of finding clues and solving puzzles in order to have a chance of survival.

Name: Useless Box
About: Useless Box - first person arcade game, where is sly villain who wants to take over the world, destroying the country and appropriating them in the game.

Name: Tale of BaGua
About: Stack BaGua spells and travel through space and time! Tale of BaGua is a mind-bending top-down puzzle adventure where you guide a Chinese teenager on a quest to recover his family's lost treasure, the BaGua mirrors. Overcome obstacles along the way to unveil the secrets of his ancient lineage.

Name: 怪話2
About: 全15話で送る都市伝説がテーマのオムニバスストーリー

Name: VR Triber
About: VR Triber is a VR online multiplayer social platform, where you can meet, communicate with and play with users from all over the world. You can also share your panorama with others to let them experience your world here.

Name: 街机休闲捕鱼-Classic Arcade Fishing
About: A masterpiece of classic arcade fishing shooting game with many expanded ways to play! Picture upgrade, explosion rate upgrade, welfare upgrade, everything upgrade! Super high gun magnification, super many bosses, super high magnification, super explosive, and make you rich in one shot!

Name: Mebula
About: Mebula, seal Mebulies, train them and fight to be the best!

Name: CargoRun
About: Cargo Run is a fun platformer 3d Third Person game where you have to pass through different obstacles to get to your goal.

Name: Pohinki Simulator
About: Pohinki Simulator is a survival game set in a polish neighbourhood, where you need to explore the open world in search for trash in order to survive and gain power. Build structures, experiment with found items, and become the most powerful bum alive!

Name: Career of the President
About: Economic simulator based on late 1980's game President

Name: Eidolon
About: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to exist merely for the purpose of entertaining someone else? Have you wondered whether, since a purpose was programmed into you, you should pursue it, even if it seems wrong? Talk to the ladies of Eidolon University to learn their thoughts.

Name: Cardiac Unrest
About: You're a Combat Exorcist tasked with ridding a school of its evil. Armed with your Holy Gun and a Ghostometer, you must locate and exorcise the shadowy spirit terrorizing this school before you get overtaken by its dark evil.

Name: Potato Vs Potato
About: Potato Vs Potato is a fun and addictive game where you click on potatoes to grow your potato empire! Join us and participate in exciting events, and collaborate with fellow potato enthusiasts. Together, we’ll cultivate the ultimate potato paradise and grow into something truly awesome!

Name: The Children of The Woods - Lost Tape
About: Playable trailer for the upcoming horror found footage movie 'The Children of The Woods'

Name: Crazy Shipping
About: In space, no one can hear you SCHEME! A free-to-play space transport management game where your fleet of feline pilots deliver anything, anywhere - no questions asked!

Name: DeathTolls Experience
About: With DeathTolls Experience, virtual reality artist Ali Eslami is seeking to resensitize the general public to the reality behind the abstract statistics on the hundreds of thousands of deaths in the Middle East.

Name: 不思議の大冒険 チルノ見参!
About: ⑨回遊べる不思議のダンジョン！　紅魔郷～星蓮船までの50キャラ登場。全キャラ＋10の60曲のBGM。東方Project二次創作ゲームです。

Name: Mission Biotech
About: Stop the spread of deadly viruses using real biotechnology concepts, procedures and tools.

Name: The Bears And The Bees
About: The Bears And The Bees is a debut adventure that follows the heroic exploits of Beesworth, a baby bee who hasn't got his wings yet. Bounce through a hand crafted world in which bears have kidnapped the queen bee, and everyone is relying on Beesworth to get her back!

Name: Pixel Puzzles Trivia
About: Pixel Puzzles Trivia is an informative question questing puzzle game.

Name: 无上道
About: 《无上道》是款东方仙侠题材的ARPG网页游戏，主要讲述了主角聚集神州和四荒改造为永界，领导众生走向全新文明的故事。 游戏画面大场景绘图、特色打斗效果设计、丰富的人物造型，将角色的英雄儿女气概展现地淋漓尽致，高度展现唯美仙侠世界。 玩法方面，伴随着剧情推进，各类高级神器、神秘灵宝将不断升级解锁，玩家战力也会随之提升，远古神物、威武坐骑、激萌伙伴，都将一一来到，并一直陪伴玩家战斗。

Name: Steer Madness
About: Save animals in this fun and original game! Play as Bryce the Steer in daring missions which help make the world a better place for all its inhabitants!

Name: Glitch Escape
About: A Surreal Puzzle-Platformer Adventure Game.

Name: Ransomware Dating Sim
About: Do you feel listless, underappreciated, or inarguable? Then it is time for you to revitalize your soul with the diaphaneity of love! Romance awaits you in Physiosoft's curated virtual environment. Physiosoft: We put the 'Alpha Experience' in every release.

Name: Dead Transmission
About: Play an experimental asymmetric co-op multiplayer with your friend! Have one person move through a FPS horror level while the other be the eye in the sky. Can you and your friend communicate well enough to make it through all the difficulty levels?

Name: Sharing Lights
About: Gather all your grey matter and enter the dungeon. Sharing Lights is a 3D isometric puzzler in which you control multiple Ghosts at the same time. Manage their lights and use their abilities cleverly to reach the Architect and find the exit.

Name: HeartWare
About: Yours decisions matters, leading to multiple unique endings that reflect your influence on Iris’s fate.

Name: Myth Bearer
About: An open-ended adventure game that seamlessly blends RPG mechanics and puzzle solving.

Name: Puppet Blaster
About: You wake up in the desert and find yourself surrounded by some not too friendly ghouls. Blast your way out with your twin blasters! A unique control method lets you control a violent little action figure's arms and shoot Ghouls (not Zombies!) right in their dumb looking faces!

Name: JUMPER : SPEEDRUN
About: JUMPER : SPEEDRUN is a new Type of FPS Platformer crafted for the hardcore audience. Jump your way through insane levels, solve puzzles and try to finish fast.

Name: Priest With a Gun
About: A late-night vending machine run is cut short when a demonic outbreak occurs in the park. Little do the demons know, Father Garcia is never unarmed.

Name: FPS1
About: A short game about using an explosive bolt gun. Pin enemies with the bolt gun, then when the time is right, explode them!

Name: LAZERZ
About: The smoothest, free to play, movement shooter. Master the art of hydraulic power movement, fly like an angel through the arena and shoot with powerful ricocheting lazerz to obliterate your enemies with style!

Name: Wise Escape From Prison (현명한 감옥 탈출기)
About: This game is made by Korean TEENS! In prison where aliens crashed, people are infected with unknown viruses except you! Escape from prison by throwing THE STONE! This game is 'UP&DOWN shooting GAME'.

Name: Physics Lab
About: Test Physics Through Multiple Labs And Push The Limits Of What Physics Can Do In A Sandbox Environment!

Name: Skip's Sanity
About: Play 5 second micro games to unlock mini games. Beat mini games to unlock even more!

Name: Cartoony Cars 2
About: Cartoony Cars 2 is a physics-based puzzle game about getting the car to the flag with limited resources. When you hit 'GO!' the car drives by itself. Use sticks, boostpads, portals and the (not so) realistic physics engine to guide the duck to the flag!

Name: Eat Fish, Get Achievements
About: Eat Fish, Get Achievements is a relaxing arcade-style game where you eat fish and unlock new playable characters. The game involves moving around a 2d environment and eating smaller fish than yourself. Some fish have abilities and some change the rules of the game. Get achievements and high scores!

Name: CAGE-FACE | Case 1: The Mine
About: Escape from the mine tunnels while hunted by an unstoppable beast and slowly being affected by a mysterious illness.

Name: Poly
About: Simplistic roguelike shooter, Blast your way through countless enemies while earning powerful upgrades which turn you into a shape obliterating machine! 50+ upgrades with countless synergies and stacking effects!, Unique enemies which have unique abilities

Name: 凯旋岛
About: 《凯旋岛》是一款由独立游戏团队“君悦互动工作室”所开发的一款PC枪战游戏，集战场、冒险、休闲于一体的游戏世界。采用了虚幻4引擎制作。玩家可以在战场上多人对战，竞技人数40vs40，可以选择多种战场参战，可以使用多种武器，可以驾驶多种车辆飞机坦克，含有完善的社交系统、评价系统、荣誉系统。

Name: AstroViking
About: AstroViking is a horde-survival shoot em' up with RPG elements! Forge your own superpowered Viking with 60+ upgrade nodes and take on an endless swarm of aliens!

Name: Hidden Protector : ROADTRIP (Preface)
About: A cinematographic visual novel, that tells the story of a roadtrip between a man and an artificial intelligence.

Name: Infernal Bloodrush
About: As demons threaten to spill into the world, it's up to you to protect the Realm by burning every demon to ash.

Name: Dark Desire Mute 1
About: This VISUAL NOVEL continues the life of the girls in the Cindy universe, even at different ages. This way you can explore all kind of kinks and pleasures and topics.

Name: Ciggy World
About: Ciggy World is a clicker game where you click on a cigarette to earn rewards! In Ciggy World, every click brings you closer to a treasure trove of drops, or butts.

Name: Fly of butterfly
About: Fly, butterfly, fly. Relaxing game for those who do not like stress and like when everything is simple and easy.

Name: We Are Terror: The First Days
About: Four chapters, each drawing closer to the great worldwide war between Man and Myth. Each allowing you to experience how the war begins! A reading adventure where you make choices to help the protagonist of each chapter survive, but at the same time, the wrong choices offer their own rewards.

Name: Discrepant
About: Discrepant is a psychological adventure game set in a dystopic sci-fi world that is slowly unwinding. It's dark, deadly, and unsettling. It explores the meaning of existence and purpose, challenges reality and emotional connection through a complex plot, and comes with a twist around every corner.

Name: Project R.A.T.
About: In this 3D puzzle game stick slide and sling an escaped experiment to sweet freedom!

Name: B. Braun Future Operating Room
About: Experience how a surgery can look like in the future. Enter an innovative nanobot simulation and remove as many damaged vessels from inside your patient's body as possible.

Name: Digital Audio Wasteland
About: In Digital Audio Wasteland, the apocalypse doesn't have to be bleak. In this comedic first person exploration game, you'll explore the wasteland, collect music from your surroundings, and mix it all together to bring bodacious beats back to the people-- all in the name of the GROOVE!

Name: Galaxy Combat Wargames
About: Galaxy Combat Wargames is a head to head multiplayer PvP space shooter that engages you in challenging and intensely competitive space combat matches against other fighters from around the world. Engage in tough wargames on exciting planetary arenas and become the best commander.

Name: Neongarten - Prologue
About: A minimalist cyberpunk city builder inspired by Islanders and Luck Be a Landlord.

Name: ZAMB! Biomutant Extermination
About: Play solo, or draft in a loyal friend for epic Co-op action. Use everything at your disposal in order to eliminate the mutant army and put a stop to their evil before it spreads across the universe.

Name: Auto Kingdom Crunch
About: Pick the best team, level up your units and battle other players in this relaxed auto-battler. Can you get 10 wins?

Name: Monster Knockout
About: An ever present threat has emerged from the darkness, it is up to you to travel through monster filled galaxies and defeat every single foe in your path. Choose from a range of super upgradeable bird nodes that allow you to unleash multiple attacks on any enemy

Name: Coin Pickers
About: Running across this maze-type of environment, you will have to open doors and avoid dangers to pass through the final door. Simple but cool. Classic but fresh at the same time.

Name: My Day Challenge
About: A short, atmospheric horror experience about daily life.

Name: Pepa's Adventure
About: Pepa's Adventure: a papercut point-and-click book. The characters and backgrounds are crafted from handmade papercut art. Pepa, a paper fairy girl, lived with book fairy Lex. One day, scissor fairy Slash cut and stole his pages. Pepa embarks on an adventure to recover stolen pages.

Name: 声锁 Sound Lock
About: 'Sound Lock' is a multi-ending puzzle RPG game based on the perspective of a girl without a mouth. The story takes place in a world with hundreds of similar rooms, where the decorations are nostalgic. Explore rooms full of death traps and try to clear the fog to find the buried truth.

Name: Typical Cliche
About: So obvious and typical story, just puzzle and dodge traps. (English version will be provided soon.)

Name: Mini Slide - Animal Race
About: Mini Slide is a demo of Slide Animal Race; Play together with your friends in this couch multiplayer racing game with cute sliding animals. Dive and jump to avoid obstacles, use bonuses and master the sliding mechanics on the crazy tracks to outrun the horde!

Name: Blacken Slash: Prologue
About: Experience the beginnings of Blacken Slash – a tactical roguelite RPG where the items you choose define your character. Create powerful builds from an abundance of loot as you try to save a corrupted retro computer system in bite-sized tactical puzzles.

Name: An Odd Tale
About: Venture into a bizarre kingdom plagued with great evil and dry humor. Explore a vibrant open world and fight through a campaign of crazy characters and wild quests to save the world.

Name: Grand Battle
About: In this intense fully featured Action RPG, players fight with multiple heroes to save the world. And sometimes they chill and do some crafting!

Name: Fatal Delivery
About: A short horror game about a delivery driver in a semi-apocalyptic world tasked with the delivery of a strange package to a nearby city.

Name: Jesus Sacred Heart
About: But whosoever shall deny me before men, him will I also deny before my Father which is in heaven. JESUS. Matthew 10:33

Name: Chicken Duty
About: You've agreed to watch over the neighbor's chicken while they're away, and now you must lead it to safety as quick as possible!

Name: Slime Knight
About: Use an extendable slime arm to “dissolve”, punch, grab, and throw enemies in order to save your slime brethren and navigate through the decrepit insides of an ancient Worm in this top-down hoard battler.

Name: DropDisk
About: DropDisk is a F2P Idle Clicking Game for collecting Floppy Disks. Click to gain XP, battle to gain more XP, the more XP the higher your level, the higher your level the better your Disk drops to collect and trade!

Name: S.A.I.A.'s Awakening: A Robothorium Visual Novel
About: Discover how it all began and explore Robothorium's universe through the eyes of Agent 22, a spy commissioned by Jaklov to stake Alan out. Will you carry out your mission or defy the established authority? Your choices will be crucial.

Name: Abstract
About: Abstract is a third person, cooperative or player versus player online action game set in an evolving sci-fi world. Yes, we have rockets and lasers! Yes, we have kill-streaks! Of course we have zombies! Why not?

Name: Orc Hunter VR
About: In the roomscale VR wavegame Orc Hunter you have to defend yourself against endless hordes of orcs. To do so you can either use swords in close combat or fight them with a bow or magic staff from a distance.

Name: Imposters: Countdown
About: Complete tasks & mini-games. Report bodies. Call voting sessions. Hack the station. Overload the reactor. Betray your friends. An online party game of teamwork and betrayal for 4-12 players...in third person! Escape the ship before the countdown runs out! Don't get fooled by the rogue AI.

Name: 全城警戒-世界大战一触即发，跪求指挥官！
About: 《全城警戒》是一款以策略战争、现代军事为题材的战争策略游戏。在这里，能源耗尽、危机丛生，只有王者才能恢复世界的秩序！全面发展基地、抢占资源工厂、突破敌方防线，攻占中心城市，惩恶除奸，扬我国威！

Name: The Balls
About: The game 'The Balls' is perfect if you're stuck in comp sci class, killing time at work when the boss isn't watching, or even just to get your brain fired up. But dude, make sure to play it with friends, 'cause playing solo is kinda lame...

Name: Kletba Vlčího Moru
About: This is an indie 2D hand-drawn platformer game which takes place in fantasy environment set in Czechia. You will embody a creature consumed by hatred and get revenge on your enemies in this short game.

Name: 여우불
About: A platform game where you collect items to clear the stage, avoid or defeat enemies, pass through traps, and clear the stage with a system (operation) that uses the natural principle that creates a shadow when light does not pass through an object.

Name: Clark | HOOVA VR
About: Hoova, a room-scale VR experience, explores a dark, dystopian future and investigates topics of isolation, dependency and identity in Virtual Reality.

Name: 木偶公馆
About: 是一款以调查木偶杀人案为目的而展开的2D冒险解谜游戏.你将扮演一位'足智多谋'的小警官潜入公馆调查案件,挖掘不为人知的真相.

Name: Last Dawn
About: Last Dawn is a short first-person atmospheric exploration game set in the year 2082. You will explore an open world map, hide from guards, and find a way to escape.

Name: VR Golf Online
About: When Golf meets the limitless possibilities of Virtual Reality, the green is only inches away! Practice your swing and develop your techniques to improve your handicap. Step onto one of the 36 realistic holes, with additional courses planned for the near future.

Name: Inner Abyss
About: The world is riddled with monsters beyond our understanding, from horrors unknown. It is now your task to find out why they are here, and how to get rid of them before it is too late.

Name: Farmer's Shop Simulator: Prologue
About: Start restoring your old family farm and managing your new shop in this free prologue. Grow your crops, sell your goods, and get the taste of what's to come in the full version. Did we already mention it's free?

Name: Book of Beasts — The Collectible Card Game CCG
About: Book of Beasts is a strategic collectible card game, with cards representing the eponymous beasts, inspired by myths from around the world. In the game, two beast summoners compete against each other with their decks of cards and try to outwit each other.

Name: Neon Force Pushers
About: Battle your friends in this competitive action platformer by casting concussive waves of energy that push your friends into hazards!

Name: Other Submarine
About: Trapped at the bottom of the ocean, you only have your trusty flashlight and a reliable submarine. Can you reach the surface before what lies beneath takes you?

Name: Eleonor's Nightmares
About: A fractured family, a lonely little girl, a mystery beyond the walls of dreams... Something is happening, and it doesn't seem to be good. Explore Molly Eleonor's nightmares, find the truth and, more importantly, do not die. Enjoy this new and scary adventure, you won't sleep again.

Name: Dot
About: The purpose of Dot is to ascend to the next world in the least number of actions possible. You can play as a dot, heart, cat, penguin or union. Enjoy this game as a free experience. Relax and calmly navigate these worlds.

Name: Grim Seventh
About: Grim Seventh is a 3D Arcade Hack 'n' Slash game with a unique geometrical art style.

Name: Treasure At The Top
About: Slice monsters. Release energy balls. Uncover mysteries.

Name: Cyborg Rage
About: Cyborg Rage is a multiplayer space shooter featuring cooperative online action. Work with your brave wingmen to destroy all hostile starships before they destroy you. Master the advantages of your ship and defeat your enemies!

Name: Space Beastz
About: Space Beastz is a cooperative multiplayer music and rhythm game. On a music-playing spaceship, players must time their actions just right to keep multiple instruments running and make the most amazing music the galaxy has ever heard!

Name: Rise and Fall
About: An action-sports game where players can change sizes at any time. Small = Fast. Large = Strong. Medium = Balanced. Shrink and grow to win!

Name: B-RAIN
About: It is a game that must survive as long as possible by matching the color of the player with the bullets flying from all directions.

Name: Entangled
About: As a scientist sucked into a conflict playing out across parallel universes, you'll have to solve puzzles to teleport yourself between alternate versions of your lab and stay one step ahead of pursuit.

Name: The Short Bread Game
About: The Short Bread Game is a cozy platformer where you help a piece of bread get to the bakery for breakfast. Though your path there may not be the most direct, you'll get to explore charming places. Jump high, run from enemies, and engage in witty dialogue with your odd new friend. Adventure awaits!

Name: Genting Party
About: Genting Party is a VR social hub， loaded with a variety of free VR games, continually updated and ever-expanding!

Name: AevumCore
About: AevumCore is an action role-playing game that embarks a grand journey with Marcus and his companions. Join them as they fight through a series of challenges and uncover the truth of the world of Eirensia and its existence! They are set in a mission to restore and save the world from its demise.

Name: In Memory
About: Step into the memories of a prisoner of war and let the story unfold.

Name: Lift/Shift
About: In Lift/Shift, you're a research agent documenting a strange apartment where objects constantly change. Use your specialized camera to stabilize reality across multiple floors.

Name: Bubblegum Bandit
About: With the power of gravity manipulation and bubblegum, the Bubblegum Bandit wreaks havoc and takes revenge! Steal from evil robots and blow up their ships!

Name: Crimson Sword Saga: The Peloran Wars
About: Crimson Sword Saga: The Peloran Wars is a visual novel with turn based RPG combat. Times are hard in Pelora and many faction fight for its dominion. Which faction will you choose to side with? From this important decision, the story splits into many very contrasting possibilities.

Name: Pug and Seek
About: Pug and Seek is a hide-and-seek game: clever pugs run, hide, and cause chaos, while Jack, the unstoppable streamer, must find, catch, and return them to the pen. Challenge friends online and prove who is the master of hide-and-seek!

Name: Red Spider2: Exiled
About: 'Red Spider2' is a Hong Kong Noir-themed Visual Novel. There are 6 story routes with the different characters(approximately 200,000 words in total).

Name: Zeitghast
About: Run, dash, shoot, and slash your way through a mechanized prehistoric world in this fast paced platformer-shooter. Keep your eye on the clock while trying to stop an evil mad scientist from disrupting the timeline!

Name: Underground Waifus TCG
About: Underground Waifus it's a CCG, Deck Builder TCG with PVP Card Battler F2P Game

Name: Jasper and the City of Lights
About: Listen, my friend, to this tale. It's about Jasper's journey into the whispering forest to find his sister, Nora. In the darkest shadows, an old spirit is hiding, but hope is on the horizon: the City of Lights. Join the adventure!

Name: Decoherence
About: Build robots, devise a battle plan and fight alongside them!

Name: INFEES
About: Infees is a singleplayer voxel game. At the moment it has only one playable mode where you have to kill zombies and survive as long as possible, there are many weapons, and upgrades at your disposal to make this task easier!

Name: Death Duel VR
About: Welcome to the world of Death Duel VR, where players can immerse themselves in intense VR duels to the death. HEMA-Friendly Combat: Death Duel VR embraces historical European martial arts (HEMA). Real-life guards and techniques can be seamlessly executed in PvP matches with physics of leverage.

Name: Defiled Survivors: Prologue
About: Slay the night creatures and save the church, you are the last hope! Defiled Survivors is a time survival medieval game with rogue-lite elements, where you choose your character's path and slay hundreds of enemies on your way.

Name: The Surfeit: Episode 1
About: Control the fate of Planet Naizyr, in this four-part Adult science fiction drama! Your choices change the events of this visual novel. Broker peace, instigate war, incite romance or ruin friendships. You are change and change is coming.

Name: 夢獸之島Isles of Monsters
About: 由臺灣文學館推出的《夢獸之島》，從葉石濤、張深切、龍瑛宗、林海音、姚一葦這五位作家取得靈感，設計成各種不同關卡，為第一人稱射擊VR遊戲。

Name: Furballer
About: Furballer is an arcade game where you take on the role of a puppet football player. Navigate the stage, kicking the ball into the enemy puppets to rack up points and secure the best show. The public will rate your performance live so be sharp, don't miss and keep on kicking ass... or heads !

Name: Winnie-the-Pooh's book writing speedrunner
About: Write the complete 10 chapters of the original 1926 Winni-the-Pooh's book as fast as you can and compete for the first place in the leaderboards.

Name: Posthaste Emporium
About: Posthaste Emporium is a chaotic first-person shop management game where you must run your master's magical goods shop while he's off on vacation. You're responsible for stocking the shelves after the morning delivery arrives and sending all the customers' orders out on time before the shop closes.

Name: Pavel Repin's Collection
About: Try games of various genres and styles, from sports, to games with a deep plot. Discover new game universes and explore them alone, online or in co-op mode on one screen.

Name: Beardy the Digger
About: You play as a gnome digger who wants to collect all the diamonds in order to return home. It will not be easy for him to do this, because at every step he is in danger - from red-hot lava to poisoned darts. Be careful and attentive, and you can help the dwarf collect all the diamonds!

Name: HuaBing
About: Pictorial Pie is a large multi-person online role-playing game in the Xianxia sandbox. With the growth of martial arts, the construction of the Zongmen and the Cave, and the free PVP battle, dangers and opportunities can be seen everywhere.

Name: The Library
About: It's a very simple game where you can escape from the library on the 8th floor!

Name: The Youthdrainers
About: In an unknown location, pregnant women are being held and monitored against their will by a race of Little evil humanoids, They want the babies for their heinous experiments. but you, as a mother, see no alternative but to take your own life to save your baby’s soul.

Name: Dull Acres
About: You strayed from the path. Now you are doomed to wander the woods.

Name: 王者战车
About: Kingchariots is a blockchain electronic competitive game, which takes chariots as the main operating body of the game and carries out 5-5 antagonistic competitive games. In the game, there are various types of chariots. From the type of tracked tank to the type of wheeled car, each chariot will carry different weapons and skills.

Name: The Adventures of Alvis
About: In the Adventures of Alvis, you play as a boy who discovers that his destiny lies outside the walls of his sleepy village and is somehow connected to the fall of the kings centuries ago...

Name: Cars Arena
About: Cars Arena is an online 2-8 player deathmatch action game.

Name: Cubic Neon Nightclub

About: 'Run your own döner restaurant in Döner Master Simulator! Prepare delicious döner, satisfy your customers, and grow your business. Become a master döner chef and own the most popular spot in town!'

Name: Interstellar Shore VR: I LIVE
About: This timely avant-garde transdisciplinary work pioneers the concept of 'life intelligence' with a metaphysical space odyssey. Surging atop the AI explosion of 2022, it elevates discourse and provokes thoughts on human-machine relations, even arrays alternative futures.

Name: Divan Chronicles
About: Divan Chroniclesshould we sit on the couch while others decide the fate of Meme Power?You will be a true Meme Son, of Sofa Island! Choose history of your meme country, build it

Name: LOR - League of Runners
About: You will fight for the title of best runner in a beautiful fantasy world. You will need to pick up the scope to activate the portal and enter it. The main task - to pass as quickly as possible given the track.

Name: Darkside
About: An online hacking game with no limits in a multiplayer only world. The objective of the game is to increase your wealth by any means necessary and upgrade your gear but beware, people will rip you apart

Name: Hotel Tome ws
About: Hotel Tome ws is a short Point-and-Click adventure set in a pop-up book. Puzzle your way out of the hotel room you’re trapped in by combining items cleverly and don’t mind the amnesiac protagonist breaking the 4th wall!

Name: Wasteland Rangers
About: Wasteland Rangers is a fast-paced first-person shooter where you fight for survival in post-apocalyptic wastelands. Choose from four unique classes, battle across diverse locations, and prove you're the best ranger!

Name: Sweeping the Ruins
About: Sweeping the Ruins is a 3rd person action adventure game where 2 players must cooperate together to defeat a powerful monster. There are no swords or guns - players must strategize and use traps and the environment to ensure their victory!

Name: Basic Car Repair Garage VR
About: For car shows, trade shows and car people. A basic auto repair garage where you can run vehicle lifts up and down, look at animated transparent engines, install transmissions, and interact with mechanic tools and automotive parts.

Name: TOY BOX
About: A pull-apart puzzle visual novel whose fragments stitch the story together.

Name: Word Crystal
About: A daily word guessing game with four linked words of five letters apiece.

Name: Morkredd Prøve (Demo)
About: Experience a taste of the award-winning, mysterious physics-based puzzle game, Morkredd. Play two full chapters of the game and get a glimpse of the dark secrets that await you in this challenging balance of light and shadow.

Name: Caislean: Paranormal
About: A dynamic survival-horror game featuring gadget setup and point-and-click sequences. Investigate the castle during the day and place cameras, sensors, and snares throughout the explored environment. Locate paranormal hotspots and read clues about countering enemies.

Name: Goblin Dungeoneer
About: Prepare for 'Hell in Video Game Form' in this brutal, tough as nails, retro, platforming-adventure game! Save your starving tribe by collecting riches within a spike filled dungeon!

Name: HeapVR
About: HeapVR is a block stacking experience with two game modes. Stack as high as you can or just casually snap blocks together to build any 3D structure you want.

Name: 鯤島行者 Echoes of Formosa: Agent Reborn
About: Embark on a journey through Taiwan’s rich history in 'Echoes of Formosa: Agent Reborn.' Play as Li Bin, a secret agent awakening in the prison of Stad Zeelandia, on the brink of war. Unravel mysteries, explore ancient streets, and reclaim lost memories in this immersive adventure.

Name: Roles & Dice
About: Roles & Dice is a dynamic online virtual tabletop RPG! Dive into worlds you create, assume roles, and strategize in turn-based battles. Real-time exploration and imaginative map creation await. Ideal for Game Masters and players seeking dynamic, interactive adventures!

Name: Gods Of Isekai
About: - Summons mighty heroes that use lethal powers to bind, stun, burn, and poison players. - Select and organise your team's stat allocation to create an incredibly strong and unique raid team comprised of tanking/attacker/wizard roles.

Name: Invasion: Family Ties
About: Rick travels to Indiana to visit his mother, but during his stay, unexpected events occur that lead him on a thrilling adventure. However, little does he know that a major threat looms on the horizon that will change everything. Will Rick be able to save the day and protect those he cares about?

Name: Gods Against Machines Prologue
About: Your world is under attack by a ruthless race of machines, and you are its only hope. Cast epic spells, summon minions or buildings, and destroy the enemy before they conquer your home in this action roguelite shoot'em up game!

Name: Tiny Love
About: TINY LOVE! is a ride with colorful, cute main characters specially suited for introducing children to the VR realm and highly recommended for a fun family time. TINY LOVE! follows the adventure of Nefasto and Lubella who fall in love at first sight. Come experience the TINY LOVE of a life time!

Name: Cryptrunner
About: Cryptrunner is a hack and slash shooter with roguelike elements. Enter the Crypt, blast and slash your way through monstrous foes, and delve deep in search of ancient fortunes. Once you enter, there's no turning back. The only way out is found below.

Name: Welcome to Ukraine
About: I've come to the realization that there's so much about my own country that I don't know. In light of this, I've developed a game to share my journey of discovering Ukraine. Through this interactive experience, I hope to offer insights into the rich culture, history, and beauty of our country.

Name: ITRP _ Gas Prison
About: 10 minutes and you are free. Only 10 minutes and you will not be asked for anything else. Stay in these cells for 10 minutes and you don't have to come back here anymore. But at the same time, only one condition is required of you..... Be attentive.

Name: Sharp
About: Boot up and navigate a fractured digital world to uncover valuable data hidden amongst dangerous traps and viruses.

Name: Dino Tour VR
About: Dino Tour VR: Simulated T-Rex, Triceratops, Velociraptor, etc., can be seen on VR screen to view various dinosaurs on a dinosaur ride.

Name: 5 Minute Climb
About: 5 minutes to jump to the top. Fall and it's back to the start.

Name: Paper Enchantress
About: Paper Enchantress - это романтическое приключение полное магии, судьбоносных решений и прекрасных принцев. Что откроется за таинственной дверью?

Name: Z Arena
