About: Take on relentless waves of zombies in this intense FPS survival game. Level up, upgrade your weapons, and see how long you can survive.

Name: Bonk
About: A casual musical idler. Ideal for background sounds while focusing on study or work.

Name: Green Wounds
About: Craft, manage resources, fight enemies, and explore the unknown in this medieval RPG.

Name: Seat of War
About: Seat of War is a multiplayer team based shooter. Fight alongside your teammates in an 8-player war using a variety of iconic weapons. Be ready to kill all your enemies in this game of survival.

Name: Attack Of UNDO Zai
About: High definition furry anime characters in a non-stop action shooter with team.

Name: Kewter’s Showroom
About: A 2000s styled dress up game with a dark twist.

Name: The Last Tape
About: A hidden truth. For more than 50 years, Lurmont has been concealing incredibly disturbing secrets from the public eye. During an exploration, tapes are discovered showing all the atrocities they've committed.

Name: BCI VR Horror Attraction: The Mad Trail
About: Meet BCI VR Horror Attraction: The Mad Trail created by members of BCI LAB room. This game gives you optimized fear by measuring brain waves during play. Also, you can check your shooting skills by scoring right after the expedition. Welcome to the tense BCI VR Horror Attraction: The Mad Trail.

Name: Slime Corp
About: A minimalist top down shooter with slimes.

Name: The Visitor
About: In 'The Visitor' you will play as an author named Rachel. Your goal is to complete your book chapter by chapter before the deadline that is coming up. The longer you sit and type, the more you will slip into a schizophrenia state of mind. Complete the chapters and return to a normal average life!

Name: Last Spirit Origin
About: Play solo or with up to 4 players in Last Spirit Origin, a fast-paced roguelike adventure. Crash-land on your former home, now an alien-infested world, and battle relentless machine foes. Combine loot to power up and master each character. Use sharp combat and smart strategy to conquer the chaos.

Name: Vanakatu
About: A surreal story-driven game that uses puzzle-solving, turn based battling, and open world navigation to help Van Cat track down his evil uncle and put an end to his nefarious plans!

Name: Redline Ultimate Racing
About: Ever dreamed of owning and managing your own car racing team? Redline Ultimate Racing allows you to make your dreams come true! Take control of either a randomly generated racing universe or load your own custom-created universe into the game.

Name: Time
About: Time is a musical experience designed for Virtual Reality where geometry and materials react to audio while using 3D sounds to increase the immersiveness.

Name: Project Stocks
About: A darkly humorous and wacky trading simulator. Engage in market manipulation, insider trading, and ruthless deal-making as you battle AI tycoons and human traders. Short, speculate, form alliances, betray, and bend the rules to build your fortune.

Name: The Secret Life of Dorian Pink | Prologue
About: Prologue chapter of Dorian Pink, a choices-matter narrative RPG set in an alternate universe of the Picture of Dorian Gray by Oscar Wilde. Save your boyfriend Basil from the Devil by making questionable choices, gaining allies, and making doughnuts explode.

Name: Crypto Rush
About: This game is a parody created under the influence of the hype of crypto airdrops in clickers. Click on a coin to mine coins, sell coins for other coins, buy video cards to automate mining. Buy chests for mined coins to try to get new types of coins or get it on market or by exchanging with friends.

Name: Touhou Multi Scroll Shooting
About: A derivative work of Touhou Project. This game is also a derivative work of other derivative works. Play as Konpaku Youmu to fly and shoot enemies.

Name: Editarrr
About: Challenge yourself and your friends in this pixel-perfect pirate platformer! Create your own levels and compete for swashbuckling supremacy on the leaderboards.

Name: Blood Lust
About: Fight against your friends in this multiplayer arena combat game and choose between different characters with occult skills.

Name: The Machines Arena
About: The Machines Arena is a fast-paced hero shooter where players engage in intense 4v4 PvP battles or take on solo challenges in PvE. Experience combat mayhem from a top-down perspective, with precise and smooth gameplay that must be played to be believed!

Name: Whisperstring
About: Whisperstring is an 80s inspired text adventure game that takes place inside a “chat room”. You’re connected to Adam, a 'jock' with a severe fear of strings, who seems to have been the victim of a supernatural kidnapping. Will you be able to help him escape?

Name: 天书江湖
About: 《天书江湖》是一款以文字类江湖MUD为蓝本的江湖游戏。简化了繁琐的命令操作方式，优化了UI界面，提升了玩家感受度。包含多个门派，技能装备系统。在这个开放的江湖世界内请你来闯荡！

Name: Aria Skies
About: Soar to new heights in Aria Skies, a non-traditional, 2.5D indie fighting game featuring free-flying movement that anyone can pick up and enjoy!

Name: Special Force Legion of Monsters
About: [Special Force Legion of Monsters] is an innovative 3rd-person battle-royale shooter from Dragonfly GF Co., Ltd. You must hunt cruel monsters, root valuable items to get stronger, and protect yourself from relentless enemy players to become the last survivor in this unpredictable field.

Name: Invasion From Space
About: Simple remake of Space Invaders adding destructions and physics

Name: Hide & Crab
About: In Hide & Crab you play as a crab on Crustacean Island. Hide & Crab has vr movement inspired by gorilla tag. Be a crab in Hide & Crab.

Name: Double Damnation
About: Kill fast. Die faster. Abuse Immortality! Together...

Name: The Super Pie Throwing
About: A 3D Slapstick Gag Action Minigame!!! Throw pies, avoid weights, and all other sorts of things to earn HUGE POINTS!!!

Name: Bask: The Alchemist Frog
About: Once human, now frog. Begin this unexpected journey into the land of the unknown in-search of a cure for your froggy state. Explore the world around you while helping others in need as you find new ingredients and potions to help you on your path.

Name: Inklings
About: Inklings is a beautiful Lemmings-style puzzler featuring artsy hand drawn and painted levels. Use your ingenuity to guide the otherwise hapless Inklings into the goal with an array of fantastical items including the portal gun, flip gravity, and more.

Name: Hyacinthus
About: Hyacinthus is a 30-minute AVG game with a painting system. Players help people in the city achieve their wishes through painting.

Name: Would You Call Him a Bad Man?
About: This game is the official music video for Ian Hinden's 'Would You Call Him a Bad Man?' It's a fast-paced indie musical minigame collection that is part pixel art, part anime visual novel. Are you skilled enough to unlock Ava's Happy Ending?

Name: Birdcage: A Tale of Sorrow
About: After a robbery, you find yourself trapped in a stranger's apartment and must escape without being seen by the police. To do this, you will need to gain the help of its strange resident and unravel the mysteries surrounding her.

Name: 一梦封神
About: 《一梦封神》是一款基于封神演义为背景的回合制战斗游戏，以姜子牙的视角游历封神演义中著名的经典战役！并且玩家可获得各种知名英雄，养成自己最强大的队伍。

Name: FreeDraw
About: This game is an app that allows you to draw 3D pictures using brush tools in the virtual reality world.

Name: LocoMotives
About: LocoMotives™: Town Building, Track Laying, Gun Slinging

Name: Arcane Fighters
About: Arcane Fighters is 2D platform PvP where you can fight against your friends using magic, strategy and ... MAGIC! Choose from many unique spells and set up your build to outsmart opponents.

Name: Knights of Legends
About: CLASSIC TURN-BASED STRATEGY GAME 1.DIFFERENT RACES DIFFERENT HEROES 2.BUILD YOUR OWN KINGDOM 3.RECRUIT POWERFUL UNITS 4.EXPLORE AND CONQUER 5.CLASSIC SIMULATION RPG

Name: FireStarter 2
About: FireStarter 2 is a simplified forest fire simulation game that offers a first approach to fire science for all.

Name: Grimrush
About: Grimrush is a top down action game in which you must face off a gauntlet of seven brutal boss fights. Utilize three characters and a large selection of active and passive abilities. Balance offense and defense to take down the bosses and maximize your score!

Name: Shiki
About: 2.5D fantasy adventure homage to 'The Little Prince '. 2.5D world consisting of 3D sphere model and pixel art. A Fantastic world view with subtle original graphics.

Name: Ghost Only !
About: 'Ghost Only' is a RTS game of ghost to resurrect ancient demon. Let's defeat the disturbing heroes with the skulls and bring the ancient demon resurrect to create chaos in the world!

Name: Bug Attack!
About: Bug Attack! is a game inspired by arcade classics including Missile Command and Space Invaders. Players are tasked with protecting their building as long as they can. Bugs emerge everywhere from the ground at an increasing rate. Which is the greater enemy? The bug horde, or your own nerves?

Name: Cat Rescue
About: A desperate woman fights to rescue her cat from a paranoid streamer’s lair of twisted experiments, puzzles, and lurking horrors in this psychological thriller.

Name: Immortal Hero
About: This is 3D RPG Game. You can level up by defeating monsters, or grow through specific equipment and skills. And you can also see hidden stories through interactive elements found in the middle of the game. Defeat the Demon King and become a world-saving hero.

Name: がんばれ！受付嬢！~Guild Receptionist~
About: Become a guild receptionist and save the world! Or pay back your debts! This is a simulation game of a receptionist. Serve the King or turn to the Demon King, the future depends on your choice!

Name: Leave The Red
About: Puzzle based first-person horror game set on escaping an isolated castle from a powerful red-dressed witch. Features sound-oriented stealth mechanics and physics-based puzzles to escape her bloody clutches.

Name: Puzzle Garden
About: A short, casual puzzle game where you utilize unique land layouts and crop abilities to maximize your profit.

Name: Technofumer
About: FPS Action Arcade Game.

Name: Gambol
About: Gambol is a wall-hopping, ceiling-slapping jaunt of a platformer with straight forward controls, and buttery smooth movement. You control the Gambol Gumball through a gauntlet of levels designed with flow and rhythm in mind to test your platforming grit.

Name: Heroes Of Avranche
About: Enjoy the endless fun in endless dungeons! Uncover the truth about the destruction of the Guild and rebuild it from the ashes. Embark on epic, hand-crafted adventures as well as the random ones! Gather the best gear and defeat the toughest monsters and become the Hero of Avranche!

Name: Blackout - Early Access
About: A single-player zombies experience. Players are armed with diverse weapons, unique abilities, bullet types, and more to face relentless hordes of cunning enemies. Navigate the in-depth DnD-style progression system, in this riveting journey through an ever-increasing wave of undead threats.

Name: Keep it Cool, Man
About: Keep it Cool, Man fuses the funky style with typing arcade-shooter gameplay. Add to it a mix of a stereotypical American movie like Independence Day as story and there you have it... man.

Name: Total Seclusion
About: Total Seclusion is a FPS/Tower defence survival game set in the 1950’s. Play as Roy, A stranded survivor in the middle of the ocean after a fishing trip gone wrong.

Name: Routine Soul
About: An RPG adventure game with Souls-like style. It features free exploration in a vast world, turn-based battles, collections of various equipment and skills, multiple endings and playthroughs. Under its magnificent and fantastical plot, there are countless Easter eggs and surprises hidden.

Name: Ninja?
About: Ninja? features a variety of movement abilities to help you traverse a procedurally generated level for endless runner fun.

Name: Outgun
About: Outgun is a multiplayer capture the flag game, with minimalist graphics in 2D top-view.

Name: Rags to Liches
About: A small, third-person, action, tower defense game where you play as a peasant who gets tired of adventurers breaking into his house. Place down towers and fight off waves and waves of 'enemies.' Progress through the story and see just how far one man will go to protect his beloved llama.

Name: 立ち絵が変なポーズの恋愛アドベンチャー　あるいはオリジナリティの無い卒業までの日々
About: Standing pictures is strange! The story is also strange! Novel game where you can enjoy chaos!!

Name: Meteor Shower
About: It's time to step up and show your skills. Save your loved ones and planet earth from the evil swarm of meteors. The fate of the humanity is in your hands.

Name: Together Synergy
About: Together Synergy is a 2 player local co-op game where one player controls the left wheel and the other player controls the right wheel. The two players must work together to complete the levels without falling off the platforms.

Name: Super Stupid Game
About: The ultimate low budget stupid game that has created a big topic in Japan, the English version of 'Super Stupid Game' is finally here!

Name: Smash Cup
About: Dive into the Smash Cup universe! This genre-blending top-down shooter allows you to craft your own base, combining MOBA, tower defense and deck-building elements for a unique battle experience!

Name: COMPLEX a VR Puzzle Game
About: - A puzzle game for HTC VIve and Oculus Rift

Name: Bits at Work
About: Build the perfect workplace in this tiny office management sim and keep the lines going up and up and up!

Name: Cool People Club
About: Join the Cool People Club in an epic quest to prove their coolness to the world! Dodge bullets, fight powerful foes, and determine your fate in this surreal 3D bullet hell adventure.

Name: VolleySmash
About: Fast-paced 3D volleyball game, perfect for casual gamers, competitive players, and volleyball fans

Name: Сollision Hero
About: The typical hero travels to typical locations, killing typical enemies with typical weapons. Kawaii ? Sure, UwU.

Name: CDB6: A Maldição dos Zumbis
About: Prepare-se para correr, arrasar e se destacar no mundo das blogueiras no game oficial do Corrida das Blogueiras!

Name: Ease Out
About: A 5/4/3/2/1 key rhythm game with fixed key rather than tracks

Name: Moon Rider
About: Moon Rider is a road adventure not only through picturesque landscapes but also within the depths of the human soul. You are a motorcyclist fleeing from your problems. Encounter strangers in visual novels and answer soul-searching questions.

Name: Space Travel Jigsaw Puzzles
About: Space Travel Jigsaw Puzzle is a free jigsaw puzzle game featuring beautiful images from NASA. Full range of difficulty settings to satisfy those looking for a challenge as well as an auto mode for those that just need to zone out and watch.

Name: Refill your Roguelike
About: Refill your Roguelike is a casual run and gunner, in which you battle against enemies created by the community. Traverse through procedurally generated levels filled with platforming gameplay and chaotic shootouts. Or build enemies for other players to encounter in our advanced creature editor.

Name: 2099 Gravity Havoc
About: Shoot at enemies in a WEIGHTLESS space station to save yourself from burning alive in the atmosphere!

Name: Echo Royale
About: Surf the net. Flip your foes. Swim to freedom.

Name: StreamerBeater
About: It's free, try it ;) Third person souls-like featuring a solid combat mechanic, 5 explorable levels, 3 big boss fights, mobs, cutscenes, unlockables, and a main story.

Name: My Dear Delirium
About: Within this fully voice-acted Visual Novel, meet Elliot, and the vortex of conflicting truths he has become trapped in. Reach each ending to discover reality for yourself.

Name: Rogue Continuum
About: A wise-cracking space marine, an ice cold sniper, a homicidal robot and a chainsaw-wielding aristocrat travel back in time to save Earth from destruction in a co-op roguelike planet-crawler. Now with online multiplayer.

Name: Yokai Rescue
About: Ascend through a futuristic tower in this fast-paced action platformer. Use your Yokai abilities to move swiftly in the air and pierce through your enemies to defeat them. You are the last Yokai capable of saving your people and liberating your homeland from the Selvo robot control.

Name: Beyond DAWN
About: In a world where time is the most precious commodity of them all. You must guide your team of D.A.W.N agents in the epic struggle against the band of rebels led by their charismatic leader Manes. It’s up to you, will world order prevail or slip into the chaos that awaits…Beyond Dawn?

Name: Cut Master Spades
About: Quick, seamless, and HIGHLY engaging Spades matches between real people. Play with your friends, enjoy the classic game in immersive 3D with quirky characters. Match up online and climb the leaderboards or just have a chill session with your buddies. There's a table for everyone!

Name: Cat Got Your Tongue
About: Cat Got Your Tongue is a horror point-and-click game where you have to escape from the Home Cat by exploring the darkest corners of the house.

Name: Aurora
About: Aurora is a precision platform game about how the Night takes her lost stars back to the skies.

Name: The Professor Presents: #GotHandles
About: Have what it takes to go head to head with one of the greatest ball handlers of all time? #GotHandles puts you on the court with streetball legend The Professor to see if you can match him move for move. Interact, dribble, and compete to see how many of The Professor's moves you can complete.

Name: Bat Bots
About: Enjoy a modern take on timeless arcade action with Bat Bots, a nostalgic shooter inspired by the classics. Take down waves of robotic bats using precise aim and quick reflexes. Engage in solo play, challenge your friends and family, or work together to defend against the oncoming waves.

Name: Simplex Mundi
About: Your spaceship shattered on an unknown alien planet. All around you there are harmful robots. Will you find a way out? Explore a stunning world full of dangers in this unique FPS and fight for your survival!

Name: Culling of Normality
About: 'A very short psychological horror Visual novel. My first ever game made for a gamejam.'

Name: Apollo 11 VR HD: First Steps
About: To mark the 50th anniversary of the iconic lunar moon landing, you can now relive humanity's first steps on the Moon in Apollo 11 HD : First Steps.

Name: Notified
About: The notifications are endless! Use Airplane Mode to clear all notifications when they become overwhelming. Use Battery Drain to stop your opponent's movement. Use Quick Charge to speed up your own movement. Quick reaction times and anticipation are the key to victory!

Name: AN OUTLAND VILLAGE
About: Father and mother visited their daughter's home in Beijing to discuss their father's understanding of life and memories of their past relationship with their mother. The Story of Chinese Families

Name: FLOW
About: FLOW is an extremely short psychological horror adventure video game. Wake up in the shoes of Flo, a 19-year-old, and embark on an adventure into a strange and wonderful world. The more you investigate, the more you can learn about the truth behind the universe.

Name: Appetite for Detestation
About: Appetite for Detestation is a reverse-horror action platformer where you take the role of a monster awoken from a stone statue. Embark on a bloodthirsty rampage through randomly generated selection of a fictional Victorian era city locations into the Church to satiate your hunger with holy blood.

Name: Oh My Wrench
About: Oh My Wrench is an endless driving game where you dodge obstacles and collect bonuses like extra lives, time-slowing hourglasses, and score-boosting coins. With increasing speed, dynamic weather, and a weekly global leaderboard, every run is a fresh challenge. Can you reach the top?

Name: Really Dog
About: You see a dog. It pees the sea. You smash it! This is a refreshing small single player game.

Name: Hot Candy Land
About: A 9 to 5 desk job is not really your thing? Go grab your smart phone, start filming and get ready to fulfil your destiny as the King of the Adult Industry in this crazy classic tycoon parody!

Name: Voxel Crusade
About: RTS and RPG in one game! Build your castle and see it from the view of your villagers. Design your character - build and defend your castle - get an army - fight back

Name: Cross of Auria
About: Cross of Auria is primarily a story and battle-driven classic style turn-based RPG. Play as the Lightning Warrior Ruby and her companions to her reclaim their memories from the malevolent forces who cursed the realm.

Name: Rebound Gun
About: 'Rebound Gun' is an indie game with shooting and bullet rebound as its main theme. In the game, players will play as the protagonist Hyakka, exploring the imaginative world during sleepless nights.

Name: Sneaky Kitten
About: Play as a fluffy cat and sneak around your mortal enemies, The Dogs! Steal their trinkets and work your way around their mansion without being seen! Sneaky Kitten is a non-violence game, that focuses on problem solving and sneakiness!

Name: Northern Lights
About: Travel through the Northern Lights, D.Tiffany's song as imagined by Jack Rothwell.

Name: Sakura Battle
About: Relive the fighting of the 'Sakura Arms' with cute animated SD graphics!

Name: Distorted Illusions
About: Distorted Illusions is a free and relaxing block puzzle game featuring 2 modes, 6 puzzles, and many environments. Upgrade to Distorted Illusions Premium for more puzzles, difficulties up to 12x12, and the ability to import your own puzzles!

Name: Gabriel's Auditory Playground
About: Gabriel's Auditory Playground has no graphics, no visuals, no way to experience the gameplay with your eyes. In Gabriel's Auditory Playground, your eyes have no use. Put your ears to the test and play through mini-games designed without sight in mind!

Name: 宫三国
About: 《宫三国》是一款以三国武将收集和策略搭配为主要乐趣的放置卡牌游戏，游戏采用新派的水墨国风美术风格，将传统风格与现代技艺相结合，为玩家构建出一个极具沉浸感的魔幻三国世界!

Name: Frontier: Battle Royale
About: Frontier is a battle royale game featuring simple mechanics and cartoony graphics. No microtransactions, no payments... play Frontier purely for fun. Host games, join public matches, or play against bots to get the epic Frontier Victory!

Name: Duru – About Mole Rats and Depression
About: Follow the story of Tuli – a story about the struggle with insecurities, depression and friendship, told in a colorful, accessible way. Run, jump and paint your way through puzzle filled tunnels while also dealing with an unhelpful AI companion you just can't get rid of.

Name: ATNRPG
About: Go through the Persistent Realm of your character. As they get deeper and deeper into the artificial dream, things start to go wrong.

Name: Loving Life
About: Originally released in 2012, Loving Life is a non-fictional auto-biographical visual novel about Zhenghua Yang (Z) and the near-fatal incident which led to the founding of Serenity Forge. This is where it all began.

Name: Hero Hours Contract
About: Magical girls are real, but the pay sucks! Join the Union of Magical Girls in a tactical, turn-based adventure, as they fight to protect the city from evildoers by day, and fight to become unionised by night.

Name: Rudra: A Tale of Time
About: Rudra: A Tale of Time is an action RPG inspired by Hindu scriptures. Embark on a journey of self-discovery by unlocking chakras and using mantras to save the universe from the forces of evil. Are you ready to unleash your inner warrior and restore balance to the universe?

Name: 三界
About: Experience the love and hate of cultivators in a completely fictional world.

Name: Consolation: Board Meeting - Anthology Edition
About: Welcome to Consolation: Board Meeting. This game is an anthology series of stories told through multiplayer party games. Hunt down geese as a disgruntled experiment, or participate in a board game- in a board meeting- for a promotion! No matter why you are here, welcome aboard!

Name: Idle Grid
About: Build and optimize your industrial empire in this grid-based idle game. Place factories, power plants, and research labs strategically to maximize efficiency through adjacency bonuses. Upgrade your buildings, manage power consumption, and watch your profits soar while you're away.

Name: Inner
About: Face your subconscious in an ever-growing anthology of mini-games dealing with psychological and surreal concepts.

Name: SPY ESCAPE
About: 二人で協力する脱出ゲーム。 エージェントとハッカーに分かれ、ギミックを解除しながら脱出を目指す。 一人じゃ出来ない、二人だからこそ体験できる新感のオンライン協力の覚脱出ゲーム。

Name: Secrets of the Past: Dion
About: Become an archaeologist and lead an excavation at the ancient city of Dion! In this casual simulation game, your goal is to unearth and exhibit the real treasures of the Villa of Dionysus. Will you manage to do so before the heavy rain season?

Name: Sorbetta: Gravely in Debt
About: When Sorbetta owes her cousin Sherberta a sizable debt, she has only one option: to follow the advice of her mimic friend Key-Anu and find four rare and valuable treasures. Follow along with her exploits in this comedy RPG!

Name: Escape From Castle Matsumoto
About: Two shinobis race against each other to recover stolen items and escape a Japanese castle, using their wits and tricks to outsmart the opponent. Retro split-screen duel arcade game using pixel art in 3D.

Name: Ultimate Fight Manager 2016
About: Welcome to soon to be the most realistic, in-depth and immersive simulation MMA management game! Ultimate fight manager is the definitive MMA management game. Build your gym and stable of fighters from the ground up, in the pursuit to become the premier MMA gym in the world.

Name: Arkhaanis One
About: In this mechanically challenging 2D hack and slash game, survive through waves of enemies in an ever increasing difficulty, having the satisfaction of feeling your improvement as you learn the enemies and adopt new strategies to deal with them.

Name: 傲剑情缘
About: 纷纷江湖路，萧萧武侠情。有人的地方就有江湖。我辈人才倍出，在江湖上呈现出了新的一场百家争鸣、八仙过海各显神通的精彩竞争。《傲剑情缘》是一款全新的以武侠江湖题材背景的RPG游戏。 精美的人物刻画、丰富真实的江湖场景、热血刺激的打斗渲染，给你身临其境的直观游戏感受。天纵英才群侠出，铁血豪情论英雄。这里有上百个极具特色、风格迥异的武侠等待你的召唤，与你一起结伴而行，共闯天涯路。

Name: Atropos
About: 'Atropos' is a visual novel in which you will learn about the story of Atropos, the prince of Capernaum.

Name: Gallic Wars: Battle Simulator Prologue
About: Time to conquer ROME! Become a commander of Gallic Warriors and destroy Roman Empire in this Rogue-like strategy game.

Name: Avenger Sharks
About: Avenger Sharks is a retro twin-stick shooter. Featuring sharks. OUT FOR VENGEANCE. Save your fishy friends! Destroy the evils of the deep! Collect power-ups, health potions and upgrades! Invoke the sheer fury of FISH FRENZY or your dinosaur friends to even the odds!

Name: Pelagos: A Marine Adventure
About: Dive into Pelagos: Snap, Learn & Explore Marine Ecosystems!

Name: Mythical
About: Mythical is a new online deck-building game featuring animals, characters, and creatures from the world’s mythologies. Do you acquire more powerful creatures, or do you seek to gain lands? As your deck becomes stronger, determine the best time to strike and grasp honor before your opponent does.

Name: Starship Traders MMO
About: A sci-fi sandbox MMO where players explore galaxies, hunt aliens, and form corporations to combine forces for larger opportunities.

Name: Childish Life Prologue
About: The game tells the story of a girl with a special fate who meets a cat and a mysterious talking body in a different world. The body and cat help the girl return to the real world. The girl has special skills in the other world, which can better avoid monsters and traps

Name: Molementum
About: Molementum is a 3D party action game where you assume the role of a mole criminal to rob mines of their precious gems. Grab up to 3 friends and scramble your way through mines while engaging in various acts of competitive mischief as you try to become the most notorious mole criminal.

Name: Super Cube 3D
About: Explore beautiful worlds and make new friends in this 3D MMO Platformer.

Name: The Colony
About: The Colony is a city building game where the player must manage their resources in order for the population to survive and thrive. Constructing buildings and assigning jobs to villagers, you can gather resources like wood, food, stone, tin, and copper and use them to grow your village.

Name: Cures & Curios
About: Cures & Curios is a virtual reality game for the HTC Vive. In the game, the player works in a medicine show cart in the Weird Old West, full of ingredients and tools. Players will concoct potions and elixirs, barter and trade with customers, and perform acts of magic.

Name: Enid
About: Help Enid stay aflame while exploring the forest and playing minigames with woodland creatures!

Name: Halod's adventure times
About: Hero Haload received a request for beating the king of monsters, but there are Five of them! How does Haload complete the quest, and what will happen on his journey?

Name: Quiet Thoughts
About: Follow Asha’s journey as she jumps, dances, and attempts to escape from not only her home, but also her mind. Join her in discovering new things about herself and the delightfully colorful world around her. Wander and wonder through Quiet Thoughts, a narrative driven challenging platformer.

Name: Karina Katana
About: A 'Sidescroller' Adventure with Fight Mechanics and Leveling System for your skills and items.

Name: Ball Animals
About: Animal Ball is a local party game, where 2 to 4 animal balls fight against each other...Use your bouncy belly to bounce others away!

Name: Ranocta
About: Ranocta is a note-drop 2D rhythm game in a space that crosses straight and circular shapes. In an emotional and beautiful world full of colors and sounds, experience your own performance to recover lost light.

Name: CAT'S DREAM
About: CAT'S DREAM is a pixel-style puzzle game in which players take on the role of Cat Meow that turns into a human, on a fantasy one-day adventure. The reason for all this seems to have something to do with her owner Song...

Name: Mix-Sign: Girl with 3 Signs
About: Mix-Sign: Girl with 3 Signs is an RPG game with a mix of adventure and thriller. It's the story of a girl named Luna. She woke up in the park and discovered that she's gained the powers of the signs.

Name: Bifröst: Through the Realms
About: Bifröst: Through the Realms is a fast-paced multidimensional platformer with Norse and Sci-Fi themes. Use the power of the Bifröst to save the realms from Ragnarök.

Name: Master Pyrox Wizard Smackdown
About: Master Pyrox Wizard Smackdown is a fast-paced arcade-style multiplayer game for up to 8 players. Avoid the fireballs, knock your opponents down, collect power-ups and cast spells. The game offers single player, competitive and cooperative game modes and a built-in level editor.

Name: The Way Down
About: Absurdist Interactive fiction. Talk to the beings that inhabitant the world at its end. We forgot how to die.

Name: Puzlkind Jigsaw Puzzles
About: Multiplayer jigsaw puzzles with voice chat! Play with original art puzzles on your own or while you laugh, learn, and love with fellow Earthlings.

Name: A Heart of Butterblue
About: A horror visual novel with farming mechanics. Investigate, farm and woo the villagers while trying not to die at the hands of the mysterious dogs that roam the lands at night. A complete game that is free.

Name: Midnight Renegade
About: Defeat the chief of a corrupt task force, and bring peace back to London in this 2d action platformer.

Name: Gekraxel
About: In this post-apocalyptic world, sports has been redefined. Big skyscrapers previously housing thousands stand empty and are now the hot-spots for people competing in death-defying parkour.

Name: Familiar - Battle of the Labyrinth
About: An autobattler where you traverse a mysterious labyrinth. Summoning familiars to fight enemies and finding collectables along the way, as you delve deeper to find what lies at the end.

Name: Lumberjack VR
About: Experience the thrilling life of a Lumberjack in virtual reality with Lumberjack VR, an arcade action game for the HTC Vive. Fight your way through waves of logs, lumber and bombs with nothing but an axe in your hand.

Name: Hello World
About: Hello World 是一款以复制道具和推动NPC来与场景交互为核心的横版解谜游戏，背景设定在有中传校园和动画学院元素的幻想咖啡园中，你将扮演一位某天发现咖啡树枯萎的小机器人，于是带着NPC小伙伴们踏上了一路解谜拯救咖啡树的旅程。

Name: Slay All Goblins
About: Casual hack and slash with bits of visual novel elements! Free to play 2D hack and slash game, with pixel art and animations. This is a mobile to PC port, with high res images & XBOX controller support (recommended).

Name: Under the blue horizon - Aquarium
About: 'Under the blue horizon - Aquarium' is a game for those who want to enjoy watching fish. Observe fish in the sea and in aquariums. Discover more types of special fish. Enjoy it while working, relax, or clear your mind.

Name: Gravity Game
About: A physics based, multiplayer melee shooter. Based on the classic game of sumo, your goal is to claim the ring in the middle. Use grenades, rockets and explosive melee weapons to push your opponents off the stage.

Name: Midnight at the Red Light : An Investigation
About: When a young woman goes missing, a private investigator must trace the clues to find her...but is he ready for what follows him ? Evil eyes are waiting.

Name: Nighthaw-X3000
About: Nighthaw-X3000 is a classic, arcade shoot'em up. Shoot everything on sight and don't get killed. Do it by yourself or in local, couch co-op.

Name: Cartridge Monsters
About: Cartridge Monsters is a VR Creature Collector. Capture and train over 65 unique monsters and navigate through four expansive dungeons, two in each town. Defeat formidable bosses and thwart the evil Django.

Name: Delete Virus;
About: Let's become a computer vaccine 'CCAV' to fight computer viruses and aim for A+! Rhythm action game DELETE VIRUS; for passing the virus practical test.

Name: Flappy Octane
About: Flappy Octane is an endless level, speed increasing game. You pick a car, and jump through rings. The rings are generated at random heights and the speed of the game increases. ​How far can you get? Can you get #1 on the leaderboards?

Name: Protocol: Children of War
About: Form your team with up to 5 friends in Task Force Gaming's® Protocol: Children of War and enjoy the unique variation for military shooters based on real experience of US Army Soldiers who fought in Afghanistan.

Name: 侠义九州
About: 《异侠传：侠义九州》是一款非常有自己特色的传统MMO即时战斗武侠独立手游。 我们只想干干净净的做点自己想做的玩法，用于致敬这个伟大的游戏时代，在中国游戏的崛起之路上，贡献自己的一份赤诚！ 说实话，我也不知道怎么用简单的话来描述这款游戏，因为我们想拥有好玩独特的内容实在太多！不如我来简单说说“异侠的江湖”里没有点什么吧！ ①没有一键自动 ②没有内购商城充值及一切点卡，月卡，会员卡 ③没有玩家与玩家的任何“交易限制” ④没有上班打卡“一条龙” ⑤没有战力 ⑥没有任务设定“卡进度” ⑦没有职业 ⑧没有坐骑，没有任何现代元素，没有大翅膀也没有宝宝！ ⑨没有等级 ⑩没有数值挖坑

Name: More than words
About: Marian Anderson is an experimental android created by Soul Shell Corporation. However, she was abandoned in the laboratory facilities. Your mission is to contact her, persuade her to trust you and escape from the laboratory.

Name: Mysterica
About: Experience VR combat as if you were an anime character with special abilities!Draw a magic circle with your own hands! Swinging the sword sends a slashing wave into the air.PvP and PvE VR action game. Enjoy the speedy and tense combat.

Name: Lumber Party
About: An online or local multiplayer space monkey racing platformer. Fight your way to the top to grab the banana with tons of different ways to play.

Name: 曙光之诗
About: 一款以恋与制作人万圣节主题为背景的回合制角色扮演游戏，游戏中玩家可以操纵人物与NPC互动、行走于森林、小镇及荒野等游戏地图中，与驱魔师白起一起冒险解谜。

Name: Pulse Jumper
About: Pulse Jumper is a Precision-Platformer where you can jump with guns!

Name: Local Paper Small Town
About: Local Paper Small Town is a 2-player co-op puzzle game about spreading happiness around a quirky papercraft town. Team up with a friend, using a physical newspaper and VR, to discover Smalltown and its charming cast of characters by communicating and relating between both formats.

Name: D.R.I.L.L.
About: D.R.I.L.L. is the first part of our VR wellbeing platform DynamixVR, made available to the public. Ship your space cargo through the galaxy, protect it from pirates, defend your base while completing a pain-relief VR exercise specially good for your shoulders and upper back. No more routine, just fun.

Name: Monsters Attack
About: Hordes of Monsters have taken over the world. Your mission is simple, destroy all monsters and save the planet! But make sure you do it in style while listening to groovy tunes.Kill them all and survive.Good Luck

Name: Parkour Chief: Chapter Secret Agent
About: In the future, you must retrieve a stolen hyper-advanced CPU from the CyberQuark Corporation before they use it to create destructive AI robots. In Parkour Chief: Secret Agent, you'll use your parkour and stealth skills to infiltrate CyberQuark's headquarters and recover the CPU.

Name: HappySnowMan
About: The purpose of this game is to travel through various platforms to the last island. Run to the stable on the last island. Depending on which platform you step on, the speed of movement and jumping power will vary. Don't forget to save your progress by pressing the 'E' key on the island's landmark.

Name: Butterfly Moment
About: Catch pretty little butterflies while admiring great views. Relax, unwind and let your rhythm guide you.

Name: Dave Dave Dave
About: Dave Dave Dave, is a retro style hardcore platforming game set in an unknown world for you to explore with a single goal, reaching freedom.

Name: Hyper Scuffle
About: Hyper Scuffle is a decidedly bizarre fighting game with fluid gameplay and a vibrant, minimalist style. Play as one of nine unusual fighters and brawl to be the last thing standing.

Name: Corleone Online
About: Corleone Online is a MMORPG 2D game full of guns!

Name: The Hunt
About: The name says it all - in The Hunt, you get, well, hunted by hunters who will do everything they can to hunt you down. In order to survive, you must explore, scavenge, craft, and fight in order to survive. And if you survive and scavenge for long enough, there might just be a way to escape.

Name: Flip the Table
About: Flip the Table is a physics-based, ultimate stress relieving virtual reality game where your objective is to Flip the Table and break as much stuff as you can. After a long day or just for fun you can now destroy things without getting a huge bill!

Name: 【NekoGakuen】《MatthiolaReverieVerse:LostIsland》
About: This is a love story about a girl who is bullied and how she survives in this seemingly isolated world. Players can experience the situation of an isolated student and how she interacts with others at school.

Name: Surreal Experience
About: Surreal Experience is a job simulator blending elements of horror, dark humor, absurdity, and insane difficulty. What may seem like an easy gig holds more secrets and challenges than what initially meets the eye. Can you finish the job and escape with your life?

Name: Gutasaga
About: Gutasaga - 2D Strategy RPG pre-viking era game. Immerse yourself in the 550 - 600 AD saga. Be the Viking who opened trade routes with Constantinople. Encounter over 40 nations with unique cultures on your journey. Succeed in trading 205 historically recreated goods. Or try raids and piracy.

Name: Galaxity : Beta VR
About: Galaxity is a wonderful virtual world. In this game, you can create an avatar and customize it with a variety of costumes. You can also talk to people and become friends with them. Join Galaxity, and enjoy various mini-games and fun videos together!

Name: Rubble Rush
About: Rubble Rush is a FREE competitive local multiplayer arcade game, but also a cheap assets pack, created for developers and creative souls to be used to their heart's content!

Name: Overgrown
About: Overgrown is a fast paced resource management game in which you have to keep a multitude of houseplants alive. Move and water your plants to keep them healthy while avoiding obstacles such as cats and swarms of bugs! Keep your plants in these overgrown houses happy and healthy!

Name: Splash
About: Splash is a fast-paced arcade-style game where you try to withstand waves of enemies and rack up a highscore bigger than all of your friends. All while listening to a killer 80s synth-soundtrack by legendary Koto.

Name: Frozen Free Fall: Snowball Fight
About: Frozen Free Fall: Snowball Fight is an epic matching puzzle game now featuring 375 challenging levels, a local multiplayer mode, stunning HD graphics and more.

Name: Plunder! All Hands Ahoy
About: Streamers are pitted against their viewers. Streamers sail to various locations in search of gold to plunder. As the viewers watch, the streamer raids the locations and the viewers choose to aid in the defense. With cannons, spells, and teamwork, the viewers can fend off the streamer's attack.

Name: Apocalypse Island
About: As an ex-scientist on a mission, you find yourself in a toxic and infected island, where humans are no where to be seen. Build, explore and survive.

Name: Brew-Ha
About: Walk in the shoes of an alchemist for a medieval town. As a player fulfill orders of potions and throw them at the patrons for a high score in this VR game. Beware the witch she’ll curse your customers and make everything more complicated! Save the citizens of the town and become a master alchemist!

Name: Arboreal
About: Play as a lizard climbing to the top of the tallest tree in the forest!

Name: Premortal VR
About: Premortal VR is a medieval VR-only game. Explore and survive the procedurally-generated wilderness. Gather resources and craft gear. Build formidable bases. Overcome all boss trials to ascend!

Name: HordeFighter 2D
About: Challenge yourself to see how long you can last against endless waves of enemies, and discover hidden areas by completing tasks. Use the souls of your slayed enemies to unlock permanent upgrades to help you survive longer each run.

Name: Puck Bash
About: Experience the frenzy of Air Hockey pushed to its extremes as the puck reaches lighting speeds.

Name: BLEED RUNNER
About: BLEED RUNNER is a 2.5D cyberpunk beat-em-up in which a lone knight fights an encroaching plague! Suddenly stricken with the disease, seek the cure on the mysterious spaceship and survive by grabbing, throwing, and pummeling enemies for blood.

Name: Trans Ops - Transitional Operations
About: Trans Ops, Fun, Fast Paced, Third Person, Tactical Shooter with 9 different Game Modes, and 11 All Original Maps!

Name: Meowmunitions Prologue
About: This game gives you a roguelike bullet hell experience where you play as a cat whose eggs were stolen by the birds. Do your best to retrieve the eggs by Picking up Crafting components to Customize your own gun, and Shoot down the birds.

Name: Astral Disorder
About: As the lone maintenance worker on an unkempt space train station, navigate the chaos unleashed by a catastrophic crash and evade a relentless beast. Armed with scattered tools and state-of-the-art equipment, outsmart your pursuer and secure passage to safety aboard a distant escape pod.

Name: Bulls and Cows - Wild West
About: On the farm, amidst green pastures and picturesque meadows, our little heroes will meet Vanessa – a clever and friendly cow-guide. She will enthusiastically explain the rules of the game and help children develop their logical abilities.

Name: Cyber Soldier
About: Fast-paced competitive online multiplayer and offline survival mode, guns and overpowered skills, you and getting cash!

Name: Monster Evo
About: The Player will play the role as the Pet Trainer, who can capture the wild Pets in the field and advance them to higher stats. The Upgrade system in this game is called “Evolve”, which will help the pets to learn new skills and obtain stronger BP!

Name: Rift World
About: Rift World is a hardcore FPS game full of action-fueled magical encounters set in a surreal parallel world.

Name: Ragnarök TD
About: Ragnarök TD is a 2D top-down tower defense game created as a case study of Ninja Kiwi's Bloons TD 6 by the University of Michigan's WolverineSoft Studio. Follow the story of a small village in the North as they fend off the beasts of Ragnarök in this revamped Steam iteration of the original project.

Name: Go For A Walk
About: Go For a Walk through a world made of music with your canine companion!

Name: Crashers of Aetheria
About: Crashers of Aetheria is a strategy card collecting game. Players use Crashers to strategically take out their opponent in the arena online.

Name: cell
About: You will start from a weak life, defeat all the enemies, eat all the food, and become stronger. Maybe your strength is too weak, but thinking makes you incredibly powerful.

Name: Bitty Knight
About: A fast-paced, challenging 2D top-down mini-roguelike with random levels and 30+ powerups. No two plays are ever the same and completely free-to-play. Avoid the many perils, collect copious loot and slay the final boss to escape the mini dungeon in Bitty Knight...

Name: Expedia Cenote VR
About: Explore the Cenote in Expedia Labs VR. The experience takes you into the caves of similar cenotes that are found in the Yucatan Peninsula. Although a simulation of the true experience, you can learn facts and where you could find real cenotes if you wish to travel in the future.

Name: ANNOYING ball game
About: In the ANNOYING ball game you play as a ball. As the ball you go through the obstacle course trying to reach the end. There are 3 endings, it's up to you to find them.

Name: READY AIM FIRE
About: What if you are on an elephant toy battling around in your child-hood toy room? Operate your favorite toy tank mechanically but easily to explore through the cartoon-styled world. Search for the targets, and Ready, Aim, Fire!

Name: Zero Gravity
About: Zero Gravity is a beautiful first-person/third-person puzzle-platformer simulation game where you will undergo four types of game modes. (Zero Gravity is being recreated, find more info in the 'Early Access Description')

Name: Adequately Ever After
About: Save a princess! Kill an evil mage! Solve puzzles! Or just argue with the narrator and marry someone inappropriate. With dozens of different endings, adventure is yours to command in this satirical fairy tale.

Name: 流離之歌
About: Clency and Livia is a strategy game. You will control a pair of brother and sister who strayed from their father because of a war. They are starving and chased by soldiers. Could you help they through the difficulties?

Name: Ami's Room
About: An exploration game set in a surreal dreamscape full of projections. Piece together past recollections and elusive memories. Make a choice as the reality and dreamed world begins to blur...

Name: 树莓战记
About: 这是一款游戏时长约2小时的回合制SRPG游戏，可以利用游戏中各角色的特性，采用不同的战术来战胜敌人。

Name: Kingdom of Piss
About: Join two punk-rock royal heirs, Pretty Piss Princess and Asian American, as they dodge their royal duties in favor of adventures. This hilarious visual novel, inspired by TROMA films, follows the duo as they navigate the absurdities of royal life, and embrace their rebellious spirit.

Name: Bullet Rain
About: This Game is a classic First Person Shooter. As it is still in development features and weapons will be added step by step. We hope you will enjoy our work!

Name: ScrapDown
About: Scrap Down is action shooter arena in the style of a 2D shooter set in a space theme. It offers casual and fast-paced shooting mechanics that are easy to understand. It enhances the fun by allowing players to prank each other with in-game items.

Name: Astral Coconut
About: A skating based adventure in a vast alien world.

Name: Delta-G
About: Tired of classical FPS? Delta-G is here for you, with its gravity bending, ultra fast-paced mechanics. At its core, freedom of movement, and unforgettable in-air gunfights.

Name: Purgation
About: You awake gradually. You are in a dark cell. You are drifting in and out of consciousness between bouts of violent hallucinations. You are physically weak and have no memory of who you are or why you are here. You are alone and you are scared, very scared. The voices in your head tell you that you should be.

Name: Porcupine's Fate
About: Porcupine's Fate is an atmospheric first-person sci-fi horror shooter with puzzles, mysteries, and melancholic undertones. This is Chapter 1 in a six-chapter game.

Name: Buddi Bot:  Your Machine Learning AI Helper With Advanced Neural Networking!
About: Buddi Bot is an isometric puzzle game where you must (re)train Buddi Bot, an advanced AI with neural network technology. With just a click, Buddi will complete tasks like washing dishes or cooking a steak, by learning COLORS and SHAPES. Are you prepared for the future? Play and find out.

Name: Moose Invasion
About: Moose Invasion is a classic style arcade game in which you take on oversized native Canadian wildlife that use magic crystals to harness the powers of force fields, telekinesis and shooting lasers from their eyes.

Name: Bad Thoughts
About: Bad Thoughts is a runner-adventure game, that you play with a psychopath weird person and punch random people.

Name: Mencia. A never was tale.
About: Mencia. A never was tale, is a styled rogue-like, 2D platform, in which you will have to face agains an invasion of cute aliens using the properties a magic sword will give you. Let's go!

Name: Chris Isn't Alone
About: Can you convince a demon from another realm to spare your life? Chris Isn't Alone is a visual novel horror/comedy game that gives players freedom to choose their own path towards their fate. This is a student project!

Name: Asmodeus's Hell: Devil in the Sunshine State
About: A young boy finds himself tied into something sinister while pursuing the girl of his dreams. Total of 10 different endings!

Name: Elevator Ritual
About: Yup! Yup! It's here!! The new Horror-RPG game has arrived!! Talks about Naysilla, a maid, who has to deal with unusual things after she does a strange ritual. Can she find out what has happened and get out from all those bizarreness?

Name: Soul Challenge
About: After people died, the soul will go to its destination, or will be punished and reborn. In the game, you will play a lost soul in hell and his girlfriend, and you will face a series of challenges. After completed the series of challenges, you will reach the victory of eternal life.

Name: ForeVR Suck It! VR
About: You’re invited to Suck It! … early! Suck It! is the ultimate intergalactic vacuum simulator. Suck up coins, bananas, the cat, the sofa… level up to grow as big as a house! Capture stars and head to the teleporter to claim your win! Fire the contents of your canister at anyone who gets in your way.

Name: Forgotten Souls
About: Turn-based strategy game based on the classic Lost Souls.

Name: WarGround
About: 'Warground' is a turn-based strategy that aims to be casual. Use 26 units of 6 troops to win the battle.

Name: The Last Friend: First Bite
About: The Last Friend: Prodog is a paws on experience of the first act! So join Alpha and T. Juan on a dynamic adventure that has you battling hordes of baddies and bosses on their mission to save all the Doggos!

Name: Scrunk
About: Scrunk is an online team-based building and raiding game. Fight off mechs and infiltrate the enemy team's base while building up and defending your own.

Name: Minimum Wage: Influence The Election
About: Nail biting mischief. Manipulate the powerful with every decision you make.

Name: Dark Descent: The Blue Rose
About: An eternal war has been waging between the Light and the Darkness. Demons from the Abyss have attacked Skyworlds impenetrable gates many times over the centuries, every attempt had failed. Dameus, leader of the Abyss and all the demons that dwell in it, devised a plan to open a gate that leads to the Human world.

Name: Friendly Fire: Arena
About: Friendly Fire Arena is a free-to-play 1v1 arena FPS that features parkour, combat and vertical mobility with intense gunplay. Enter the simulation as Sam or Vince and get ready to fight to the death, but don’t worry, no ones really harmed, after all… It's just Friendly Fire.

Name: Hamstörm
About: Hamstörm is a turn-based puzzle game where you play as a dwarf hamster who must go warn his people of the imminent invasion by the Chedd'Ore clan. Help Hamstörm make his way through the various mines, now infested with terrible rats!

Name: Arbeit Man in another world
About: Limited time maze adventure game

Name: Coolmath Games: The Game
About: A point-and-click adventure where you get to play the role of a Coolmath Games intern! Talk with the crew, solve puzzles and help us launch our game!

Name: Irradiant
About: Silence the shrine. Irradiant is a small score-attack action game by a solo developer, where you're faced with destroying mischievous spirits bewitching a shrine as fast as possible.

Name: Up until the end - Otome/Visual Novel
About: This was supposed to be an ordinary day, in an ordinary life. But it isn't. You were in the town library, reading a good book when…You don't really remember. You know you passed out. When you wake up, you are surrounded by flames !

Name: Nameless - The Departed Cycle
About: Follow the red star to the Umbral Forest and unravel the mysteries within, in this gay, romantic, dark fantasy visual novel.

Name: My Shadow
About: Explore the enigmatic world of My Shadow, a 2.5D Horror Puzzle Platformer where reality blurs. As night descends, illusions materialize, luring you into the intricate depths of your own mind. Unravel the mysteries where the boundaries of reality haze and imagination takes control.

Name: ネクロサーガ
About: The story of you and the immortals begins in a kingdom about to be destroyed by a necromancer. You can give someone mercy, or you can take someone's precious things away. This is an action RPG where you decide the ending of the story.

Name: The Moonflower (Alpha)
About: The Moonflower is a cooperative horror-survival video game the game is set in an abandoned forest island, where there is the known demon 'Moonflower' and the players will have to block it as much as possible / hunt it via an underground laboratory.

Name: N.a.N Industry VR
About: N⸱a⸱N Industry is a VR puzzle game where you build a 'factory' by placing action blocks in space, arranged so that the inputs move towards the expected output location—their blocks possibly modified, split or combined along the way.

Name: Split Personality Doctor: Prologue
About: A doctor who suddenly gains the ability to shrink his body enters the patient’s body to treat them.

Name: Pumpkin Death Garden
About: Action-packed bug shooting game! Grow your pumpkin patch ever larger by defending it from the swarms of insects! Try out guns to find your favourite. Shotgun, sniper rifle, or assault rifle? Each has a unique play style with pros and cons, and different mods to choose from as you level up.

Name: The Capture Worlds
About: In 'The Capture Worlds' you will travel to other worlds to fight monsters which you've never seen before. Capture them, train them and fight back! Become the new ruler of the monsters! Start your new journey now!

Name: Dungeon Runner XZ
About: Dungeon Runner is based in a Hub city and from there you will choose your quests and dungeon runs. There will be a lot of Game mechanics when the game is released.Quest SystemParty System Class change systemAnd much More!

Name: Adrift Arena
About: A difficult arcade 3D platformer where you have to overcome various platforming challenges.

Name: Orienteering Simulator
About: Orienteering Simulator is a Singleplayer-Game that focusses on the same-named sport 'Orienteering'. Use a compass and a map to find your targets in a friendly 3D-Environment.

Name: Bullet Art
About: Create and Play bullet hell!

Name: We Surround You
About: Your orders are to surrender, but you prefer death to dishonor. As you take on the enemy, their general will devote more resources to the fight in hopes of crushing you. He will send helicopters, tanks, planes, artillery barrages, and eventually grab his shotgun and come after you himself.

Name: Commander '85 Prologue
About: The Prologue version explores the origins of the Commander computer, explaining how a military-grade technology appeared in a small suburban house. Meet the characters from Commander 85 on your own birthday party, and receive a gift that will change your life forever.

Name: Moonshot - The Great Espionage
About: Moonshot is a stealth puzzle platformer that puts you in the role of a spy of a fictional country in the 'moon race' era. In competition with the USA and the Soviet Union, you will have to use espionage and sabotage to make sure that your nation will be the first on the moon.

Name: Submerged Mystery: Takodachi
About: Brave the Labyrinth and obtain lost powers to overcome great challenges in this Roguelike Dungeon-Crawler adventure.

Name: The Collection: Chapters of Fate Prologue
About: A First person, Short story indie horror game with an immersive atmosphere.

Name: 擱淺地 - Dream Antique
About: 「拼湊夢想的碎片，尋回最初的夢想」 跟隨引路之人，一同解開貓咪失蹤之謎 2D橫向文字冒險遊戲「擱淺地 - dream antique」

Name: RoboSports VR
About: RoboSports is a vast collection of online multiplayer sports games!Our first game, “Crazy Dodgeball”, is all about attacking your opponent with an energy ball to score points. Dodge your opponent’s throws or go for the catch and land a devastating counter-attack!Play in an arena like no other!

Name: Imperil
About: 'Imperil' is a ruthless retro inspired platformer with puzzles. The hero must save the land that has been corrupted by evil. Place platforms or shift the world around you, move objects with telekenesis or burn enemies with fire to best the many obstacles you come across.

Name: Wings of Virtus
About: Wings of Virtus is an indie shoot-em-up that is all about minimalistic but challenging retro arcade gameplay.

Name: The Pauser
About: 'The Pauser' is a narrative adventure game, developed by a student who drop out to make games. Player can stack blocks or 'pause' them mid-air to help the character pass levels.You can choose to watch 'ads' to 'speedrun' the game. But, is that really what you want? It all depends on you!

Name: 蓝星舰策略
About: In a certain sea area in the future, when your fleet is invincible, you will praise yourself for discovering this game!

Name: Zombiflux: Sleepless War
About: Survive and create your own civilization!

Name: Takara Cards: Academy
About: Takara Cards: Academy is a free Prologue version of Takara Cards, a unique tactical deck-builder RPG. Chase space dragons and create your deck as you explore sectors, fighting your way in deep puzzly combat. Join the Federation Academy!

Name: Ghost Hospital -in Thousand Horror Hill-
About: It is a exploration adventure in which the protagonist roams around a magical hospital in search of a friend who has disappeared into another world. The genre is based on a comical atmosphere, with a bit of horror awaiting as you progress deeper into the story.

Name: GunBoxing
About: GunBoxing is a free-to-play, fast-paced multiplayer shooter with a heavy focus on fighting game mechanics like melee combos/air juggles, parries, ducking and sidestepping attacks to punish, meter for super attacks, etc. combining long range shooting combat with crazy close range melee combat.

Name: Banana Step
About: Let's lifting monkey and smash them!! Fresh lifting action!

Name: Space Rescue
About: Space Rescue is a special space adventure game.You will navigate a tiny spaceship to slip into the puzzle where the Energy Spinels hidden. They have to glide up and down, avoiding a series of obstrucles, and eventually carry the Spinels back to their mother planet.

Name: Poker Clicker
About: Earn chips by revealing randomly generated poker hands and unlock gems for powerful bonuses. And don't worry if you're not getting any goals or feeling like you're missing a strategy. It's all about the endless clicking, and it's the perfect way to relax and unwind.

Name: I AM FLY
About: A fly lives a short time, so collect poop and become a fat fly OR Eat rotten poop and die before you are satisfied!

Name: Dairy Dave
About: Dairy Dave is unlike any endless runner you have come across yet!

Name: Grace
About: Grace is a short story-based game about two field technicians working in the Sierra Nevada of California. They're tasked with monitoring the nests of the Ruddy Quail but discover that the study design won't work because of human impacts on the ecosystem.

Name: HexenHold
About: Protect your Boss, a necromancer, from waves of incoming enemies in the deepest of dungeons. Buy Towers. Upgrade your abilities. Throw your enemies. Do whatever you can to keep the ritual going!

Name: Hentaimon Prologue
About: Hentaimon is a old-school classic monster-catcher with a special lewd twist. Bond with Hentaimon and explore a broad world filled with thrilling turn-based battles, a mysterious threat awaiting defeat, and lots and lots of hentai. It's time for you to explore the wonder world of these monster girls!

Name: Blackout!!
About: Blackout!! is a Tower Defence Action-RPG where you must defend the land of Suwemba from the evil Olrinds! Select one of two heroes to fight back wave after wave of enemies by summoning defences while participating in the action-packed combat!

Name: The Story Is You - Look Within
About: A freely navigable and open first-person real-time 3D reflective experience. Come see what you see in you. Explore a beautiful and immersive environment that touches on lots of areas of life. See what resonates.

Name: Flatline
About: Play as Scarlett, a freelance cyborg ninja, in a neon city filled with corporate drones. Use her top of the line sword and bio enhancements to dash throughout the city and chain your dashes through drones. Make sure to watch your health, too many mistakes and you might Flatline.

Name: Portal Defense
About: Our game is a basic tower defense game where monsters are coming in through a portal are trying to destroy your tower! The only way to stop them is to send out your units, level up your tower and try to outwit them!

Name: ia scatter city
About: ia scatter city is a level made with unreal engine and the 'ia scatter' add-on where you can fly through a small part of a sci-fi city.

Name: Friend Sighting
About: Play as Mothman at a college for monsters with a cruel and unusual financial aid plan. Team up with the Loch Ness Monster to steal the school's mascot in the ultimate act of revenge, but try not to drown in student loans!

Name: YangBo Adventure
About: YangBo Adventure是一款結合劇情、遊戲和3D環場影片的方式來介紹朝陽科技大學特色的校園導覽遊戲，遊戲內容是在學校的六棟大樓裡闖關，每一棟大樓都有不同的遊戲內容、劇情和環場影片，玩家可以在遊玩中就可以了解到朝陽科技大學的特色。

Name: Game Of Thrallan
About: Game Of Thrall'an is action RPG developed by CGArt, Jsc, inspired by the iconic character Thrall from the World of Warcraft universe. Players will take on the role of an Orc character named Thrall'an on a journey to the icy land of Alterrac filled with enemies to destroy the Ice Lord - Lookholar.

Name: Mystical
About: Mystical is a new kind of puzzle game. Collect hundreds of items in five mystical places and combine them all in a given time.

Name: Foxhaven
About: Foxhaven is a gripping 3 vs 1 3D action multiplayer game. Among the four villagers, one is an Impostor, THE FOX. To avoid getting killed, the villagers must find six keys and escape from the village!

Name: Endangered
About: Aliens are invading Earth and are taking out Earths military assets. Join them in the conquest of planet Earth.

Name: Elo Hell
About: Elo Hell is a one-of-a-kind game that employs a 3 part user experience: Play the narrative, play the minigames, climb in Echo Star. You ain't never played a game like this.

Name: Text Your Life
About: Who did you kiss that night? Text Your Life is a mobile phone chat simulator that lets you put yourself in the shoes of our protagonist, a female university student with a group of eccentric friends and a love life that has suddenly turned somewhat... complicated.

Name: Ambient Channels
About: Enjoy Ambient Channels episodes using passive cinematic and positioned cams or FPS scavenger hunt modes. Enjoy synchronized music via our included Infinity Jukebox application. Ambient Channels is delivered as a rotating set of free episodes and the ability to collect more episodes via DLC.

Name: Opening Night at the Großen Schauspielhaus - Berlin 1927
About: Visit Berlin 1927 and explore the VR-reconstruction of the famous theatre. Three storytellers, Walter, Fritzi and Otto, invite you to share their anticipation of the opening night – behind the scenes and on stage. Our digital theatre opens new perspectives; cultural heritage comes alive virtually.

Name: Secret Of Dungeon
About: SOD is an Indie MMORPG strategy game based on PvP combat as well as Co-Op, with dungeons and Boss to be defeated in a group so you can have lots of fun and laughter.With several aspects of RPG like Trade between Players, Party System and Guild System[/]

Name: 蜀境传说-回合
About: 《蜀境传说》是一款仙侠题材回合制策略游戏，以精致的画风、多线的剧情和炫酷的技能，为玩家呈现蜀山世界的众生百态。游戏讲述了六大门派幻境探险、诛妖除魔的故事，玩家可以自由选择门派，通过百种技能搭配、多种阵容组合，畅享策略战斗的过程。游戏专注人宠合作战斗体系，多样的玩法系统，让志同道合的大侠能建立一个联盟共同抗敌。快快携手好友邂逅属于你的蜀山世界！

Name: element
About: ✨ Element Clicker ✨In Element Clicker, you click on elements to gain even more elements! Every 3 hours, you get a new element added to your collection. Each element is crafted by our amazing community on Discord. Come hang out with us and let’s grow into something extraordinary! 🌟

Name: The Lovebirds
About: Welcome to Saint Marionette's theater! Tonight's show is all about love and faith... Our life here m̷a̷y̷ ̷b̷e̷ ̷a̷ ̷s̷i̷m̷u̷l̷a̷t̷i̷o̷n̷, ̷f̷u̷l̷l̷ ̷o̷f̷ ̷s̷t̷a̷t̷i̷c̷ ̷p̷a̷i̷n̷, but our feelings are very real! 🕊️🖤

Name: Wild West VR
About: Wild West VR is a first-person shooter unfolding in a western setting. Two gamepads are used as weapons. The interface is maximum smooth. Game features have been enhanced with the introduction of the waves of attacks of various levels of difficulty.

Name: SugarWinds: Prologue
About: If those days had not been cut short, no one would survive, but for the sake of the elect those days will be shortened. Matthew 24:22. The Catholics discovered the Americas. Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you. Matthew 7:7. Christian game

Name: Castle War
About: In this real time strategy game, defeat your friends by destroying their castle. The last player with their castle still standing wins! Players must manage their economy, build their base and defenses, while producing and upgrading their units.

Name: Scranny
About: It's your first day as a PIZZA delivery boy and you get to deliver your first PIZZA at Scranny's house but when you arrive at the House they lock you up in a Prison Cell to later use you to achieve ultimate powers, Try your best to escape the House before Full Moon.

Name: A Step From Insanity
About: A Step From Insanity is a 2D platformer-shooter where you play as a man with many psychological illnesses searching for the end to his insanity. Guided by an unfamiliar friend, search for the mysterious sanity powders told to be able to cure any mental illness.

Name: Twisted Lovestruck
About: A romantic date with the devil! Run for your life!

Name: Rise Of Enigmas
About: These are series of enigmas games. Enjoy thinking about puzzles. This 1.6.0 version contains an Eulerian Graphs series (with online time challenge) But more types of enigmas are coming soon...

Name: MORSOMNIA:0
About: Interacting with the unidentified life form “Kuon”, we move forward with the pain. A surreal, mysterious fancy adventure.

Name: Hunted: Kalevala
About: Get your knife, get your spear. There is a monster on the loose. Shout Perkele, and kill the beast.

Name: 长征1934-1936
About: his is a role-playing turn-based game based on the history of the Red Army's Long March. You will play a mass,soldier or cadre and follow different Red Army units to experience the Long March!

Name: Thorns: Police never sleeps
About: Thorns. Police never sleeps is a kinetic visual novel about an alternative future. After global warming, cities were separated by a giant ocean. Our story begins in one of these cities.

Name: Desktop Cube-Man
About: This is a free multiplayer PC desktop game, you can simply place on the desktop or enter challenge mode. In challenge mode, you can just idle casually, or try to challenge higher difficulties with friends. You can gain experience through idle time and unlocks more behavior modes.

Name: 2 Minutes 16 Seconds (2分16秒)
About: This is a 2D Pixel Top-Down Space Shooter Game. The game implemented Rogue-Lite elements, like the survivor series.

Name: Hollow Remnant
About: Journey through the shadows of medieval fantasy as a Hollow Remnant. Forgotten to life, yet unbeknownst to death, you proceed along a veil of fragmented souls. Bump back against that which dwells in the dark, with instruments crucial to your survival.

Name: Randy And Teddy Adventure Road
About: A game of friendship and skills! Check Randy and Teddy as they walk on the Adventure Road. They take on challenges and puzzles and learn along the way. Have a try, the game is free and superb!

Name: Float Gallery
About: Float Gallery shows the work of artists working in the digital realm and supports aesthetic and cultural practice in virtual environments. By nature, we define ourselves as a global endeavor, resolving boarders and blending realities in the search of new forms of being, discourse and organization.

Name: Intrusion Protocol
About: Intrusion Protocol is a classic challenging retro 2-D platformer. Play as a computer virus tasked with infiltrating an enemy network to retrieve mission-critical data. As you find the data you will uncover a story that reveals the secrets of your mysterious purpose.

Name: Mega Maze
About: Enter the virtual labyrinths of Mega Maze and challenge your spatial awareness capabilities to not simply find the exit, but to also find a way to unlock the path to it.

Name: Stellar Reflections
About: Aurelia is a nobody living out her life on a space station orbiting Earth, spending her days working in a junkyard, frequenting a bar, or retreating to her cabin. She will confront a life-altering decision that challenges her perception of the world. Can she change and grow, or is she too far gone?

Name: Asteroids 44 (For Four)
About: Remake of one of the oldest arcade classics. Challenge yourself and advance through the levels filled with asteroids, power-ups and virtual bitcoins, that you can spend in the shop to get ready for what's coming. Get your friends and share the adventure together in co-op mode!

Name: Farmer Pug Dash
About: Your animals have all gone missing and it's your job to get them back! Find your animals in adventure mode and collect coins to decorate your farm! Find them all!

Name: Triplicity
About: Triplicity is a fast paced and dynamic collectible card game in a stylized world of puzzles.

Name: Xploquest 2
About: Xploquest 2 is a tiled based role-playing game based on the exploration and management of your character, which takes place in an open world.

Name: Tiny Battles: Prologue
About: Tiny Battles is a tactical action auto-battler where battles take place automatically in the arena. Prologue is a demo version of the Tiny Battles game, where 2 of the 5 factions and 3 of the 15 enemy opponents are available to play.

Name: Until the Night
About: Economic strategy about building a toy factory for Santa Claus. Until the Night is a small economic strategy game that was inspired by Anno and Tropico game series.

Name: Over My Dead Pixel
About: Over My Dead Pixel is a top down shooter where you command antivirus software to defend your computer from malware. Beware, firing your weapons will shrink your playspace. Maneuver deftly to avoid the enemies and the walls, as one single hit means restarting.

Name: Sympathia
About: 『Dodge × Beat』 Enjoy the world of sympathia in rhythm!

Name: WATCHER
About: WATCHER는 PC 싱글 플레이 기반의 공포게임 입니다. 2가지 스테이지가 준비되어 있습니다! 사무실과 밀실을 돌아다니며 퍼즐과 스토리 아이템을 모으고 다가오는 적의 추격을 피해 살아남으세요. 적은 넓은 범위로 배회하고 당신을 집요하게 추격할 것이며 플레이어는 적을 피해 달아나야 합니다. 피폐해진 주인공의 악몽 속에서 악몽의 발생 원인을 스토리 아이템을 통해 알아내고 결말에 도달하세요.

Name: 次元探索簿
About: Adventure Book in Dimension is a turn-based RPG based on the novel Wonderful Dimensional Journey. In the game, you as a new member of the human wizard team 'Tribal Clan', experience the main adventure story of the 'Tribal Clan' in a magic book given by your predecessors.

Name: Southside Racing
About: Race and battle using weapons and karts themed after Vtubers and content creators! All characters in game can be found livestreaming on Twitch. Race through different Vtuber themed levels like TomaKey's Liminal Spaces or Meat's Silly Safari and slow each other down with weapons!

Name: Nuclear Wipeout
About: Classic Wipeout but with bigger destructive stakes. Play 31 challenging 3D platforming levels where you are testing the new kind of Nuclear weapons. This game is a short school project of Ahlman Institute students.

Name: Skill Up!
About: It's time to jump and run! Skill Up provides an extremely satisfying 3D Jump & Run experience combined with exciting colorful stages that wait be mastered... with nothing but pure skill and the might of your hands!

Name: Escape Initiative
About: Run, jump, and shoot lasers in this difficult and aesthetic action precision platformer. Built for fast play but not required, you will enjoy hand built levels with an immense variety of challenges. Customize your colors and realize your initiative. ESCAPE.

Name: Lotia®
About: Dreamer Reef O’Meara and his crew on the Surprise journey across Lotia, trying to avoid entanglements with the dreaded Dominion who rule the seas.  The nature of their latest enterprise embroils them in a desperate conflict, one whose outcome will determine the fate of all who dwell in Lotia.

Name: A Story In Space
About: Take on the persona of an intergalactic bounty hunter to try to save yourself and the people of the mysterious warring planets of Hakarr and Pahnbuk!

Name: House of Jigsaw: Happy puzzling, Happy home
About: Welcome to the House of Jigsaw: Happy puzzling, Happy Home an immersive world of puzzling delights that will leave you captivated and craving for more. This free-to-play game offers a treasure trove of Jigsaws, with the option to enhance your experience through exciting DLC packs.

Name: Pogo-Gogo
About: A game about pogoing up skyscrapers.

Name: Battle Strike World War
About: An epic platform fighter for up to 8 players online. Try casual, or invite friends to a private room. Play cross-platform with millions of players on Android and Steam! Frequent updates. Over Many Characters.

Name: Cellosseum
About: Cellosseum is a bullet heaven following the progress of a lone cell as it battles a variety of enemies on its quest to guide the evolutionary process of life itself. Upgrade your attacks, shields, health, and speed to understand your role in the creation of life on the planet of Ceres Prime.

Name: 欢乐金蟾捕鱼
About: 经典街机捕鱼风向标，开启捕鱼新纪元，海量金币每天领，豪华礼包送不停！游戏匠心巨作，扩展超多玩法！画面升级、爆率升级、福利升级、通通升级！超高炮倍、超多BOSS、超高倍率、超级好爆、一炮暴富、祝您成壕！

Name: 絶体絶命少女 虚空の方程式
About: 少女の絶命まであと30分…。 『絶体絶命少女』は、'冷たい方程式'や'トロッコ問題'をオマージュした短編SFビジュアルノベルです。 母親に会うため宇宙船に密航した少女か、宇宙事故に遭い救助を待つ遭難者たちか、あなたは命の選択を迫られます。 救う命を選び、少女の運命を見届けましょう。

Name: StretchBot
About: StretchBot is a retro platformer with tonnes of action, a compelling story and an ear warming soundtrack that will keep players coming back for more. The adventure is set in a rundown world where both steam-punk and cyber-punk aesthetics collide in stunning 16-bit pixel art.

Name: Des racines et des graines
About: A garden game where you will explore a calm and peaceful island. Gather some seeds from the vegetation and re-plant them close to each other to get hybrids. Day after day, you will cross-breed the plants to create some new ones, to finally find and restore the ultimate tree: Yggdrasil.

Name: Idle Saga
About: Welcome to the world of Idle Saga, a magnificent world of swords and magic! Enjoy diverse gameplay, splendid equipment, and transformations into gods and demons that allow you to dominate all realms. With cool elves and powerful mercenaries by your side to battle ferocious bosses!

Name: Little Obedient Robot
About: Take control of a little obedient robot that you program with cards you find. Learn new cards to outmaneuver your enemies. This is our experimental strategy/2D side-scrolling hybrid.

Name: KoreanWarMemorial
About: A country that has been at war for over 70 years, Korea. There are countless battles that the country has fought, some famous, but others forgotten. The Korean War Memorial is a metaverse memorial hall established to publicize forgotten battles and forgotten battles.

Name: The Epic of Inanna
About: A linear visual novel voice-acted by Louise Porter, Richard Browning, Krissy Koellia, and others, The Epic of Inanna is a challenging and thought-provoking exploration of the meaning of life and morality.

Name: Galaxy Forces VR
About: Fly around in space caves with evil enemies, race or do pick up missions. All to the tunes of interactive music. 55 levels, online world records.

Name: End Of Life
About: End of Life is a third-person shooter that takes place in a city that is fragmented and in constant motion. These fragments that make up the city rotate as if it were a Rubik's Cube, creating different gravitational directions that allow the player to traverse the city.

Name: Town Defence
About: Town Defence is a Tower defence RPG.

Name: exp!A
About: For 'you' , played the hero.

Name: Hand2Hand
About: The Hand2Hand project is a fighting game... OF HANDS ! Use everyday object in everyday places out of boredom in epic battles between... yourself.

Name: Spirits of the Unloved
About: You, Youtuber James Pink, go into a haunted orphanage in order to get footage for your upcoming video. You are faced with paranormal activity in the orphanage while recording your footage.

Name: Groove that Goob
About: Abduct the Milky Way’s Oracle Jukebox located at the top floor of a penthouse party as the shapeshifting, absorbent Goob, fully equipped with a ravenous appetite for melodies, mankind, and mosh pits.

Name: Dummy Guyz
About: Dummy Guyz is a multiplayer physics sandbox with no predefined rules. Get creative by building or breaking things your way. The game is bare-bones with no theme and minimal graphics, focusing solely on physics interactions!

Name: Bond Blues
About: It's 2026, and you're a bail bondsman in Burlington. A fully voiced visual novel exploring the obligations of duty, and what justice really means.

Name: AnimuJump
About: A short anime jump game where you just jump and... well jump

Name: Arcadium
About: Arcadium is an action packed brickbreaker game where you destroy bricks, enemies and bosses using your ball and powerups. Fast reflexes, aiming and avoiding simple misstakes is required for beating this game, choose between three difficulty settings to adjust the challenge.

Name: Zombiolence
About: A rotten world, in which despair and extreme survival come together in order to end the largest plague of Zombies ever seen. Face them all, in order to save humanity from its end. Buy, improve and plan a strategy to kill each and every one of them. Do you have what it takes to get it?

Name: Scary Buddies
About: A multiplayer murder party game in VR, taking place in a mysterious mansion hiding many secrets...

Name: Fowl Magic
About: Fowl Magic is a 2D vertically-scrolling arcade action-platformer where a chicken navigates a perilous wizard tower.

Name: The Way of the Badass
About: Join Scarlet, Princess of Badass, in her crusades against the takeover of aliens, monsters, hybrids, and 'Cancel Culture' as she brings toughness back to humanity.
