Lead desperate allies, from a Nazi to a hobo and other Special Ed students, in liberating humankind from the satire of the Far Left.

Name: VR Hero Sentry
About: This VR ARPG makes you take up arms and choose your hero, class and your own build as you fight off hordes and titanic bosses and offers you infinite gameplay and endless customization. Upgrade your spells, buy armor and weapons, build your army and increase your hero stats to stop the underworld.

Name: Lumien
About: Lumien is a fast-paced third-person platformer in which you explore the ruins of an ancient civilization and breathe life back into it. On your way past the various defenses, you'll be helped by the Orbs, fueled by the mysterious powers of the civilization.

Name: Darkless
About: Get ready for an adventure as Nameless, a clever spirit trapped in a lamp by a curse. Regain your form by exploring the Silent Mansion. Uncover secrets in this platform and puzzle game.

Name: Drain Runner
About: Survive the ever-evolving hazards of The Drain as you rail grind, magnetize, blast and ground pound your way through this fast-paced action roguelike!

Name: Snowday
About: Engage in VR snowfights that capture real snow play like no FPS (First Person Snowbrawler) you've played before! Throw, dodge, and sneak your way to domination of the neighborhood snowfield.

Name: Prisme 7
About: The first video game on modern and contemporary art. Produced by Centre Pompidou.

Name: Water Rain
About: On another planet in the future, you set up shop in order to try to rake in money, but you aren't the only one who has the same idea.

Name: Pantazil
About: The Pantazil is a 2D exploration and platform game with a pixel art style.

Name: Dark Days : Devil Hunt Prologue
About: Fight with many demon goblin golems that invaded all over the Middle Ages Use your special powers.

Name: CSC
About: Challenge yourself in this tiny and incredible game!

Name: Wizard's watch
About: You are a wizard and your village is under attack! Push back the enemy forces with powerful spells. Burn, freeze, shatter and crush the enemy soldiers with your magic powers. Gain XP as you kill your enemies and unlock upgrades for your spells.

Name: Syndeo-Complex
About: In Syndeo-Complex you will explore five different environments connected by a hub. Each level has its own mechanics, weapons, enemies and bosses. The Keli, small droids, will (probably) guide you in your quest.

Name: Operation Blackout
About: Operation Blackout is an atmospheric first-person shooter where you venture into an abandoned industrial facility to eliminate unknown monsters. Use your skills, scavenge for weapons and supplies, and uncover the secrets lurking in the shadows of this dark place.

Name: GEOTRA
About: In this colorful twin-stick shooter inspired by 2000's-era Flash games, survive several waves of uniquely deadly enemies with your wits and skill. Choose wisely from a tree of upgrades after each wave to refine your strategy and bring down your foes. Live to see what lies at the end of the horde.

Name: Twitchoos RUN: Socks & Stream
About: Twitchoos RUN is an interactive platform game where your Twitch viewers can activate traps through comments. Easily playable online or offline.

Name: The Bard for Her
About: A visual novel, dating sim with map exploration. Play a womanizing bard with a lute and romance and build a relationship with five attractive women.

Name: NetGunner
About: NetGunner delivers intense multiplayer competition in the style of a twin-stick shooter, with a theme based around computer hacking. Players have access to multiple types of weapons to damage and throw opponents around the map. The last surviving player wins the round.

Name: Castle Fight
About: Castle Fight is a strategic building game. In this game, players will use a combination of blocks to build the most structurally-complete and powerful castle. When building is complete, players will see who is the last castle standing!

Name: Iron Line
About: Iron Line is a tower defense game where you are one of a few, train conductors capable of traversing on the Iron Line. Will you survive the onslaught, or get an express ticket to the afterlife?

Name: Starlights / 별빛 아래
About: Starlights is a visual novel focusing on the character Fletcher. It tells a story of a protagonist who had to move schools because of an unforeseen circumstance. At the new school, he meets Fletcher, his roommate, and the story between Fletcher and the protagonist begins.

Name: Deepest World
About: Deepest World is a coding sandbox MMORPG where you can write your character's AI with JavaScript. Explore a 3D open world, hunt monsters, gather resources, craft deep builds and items, acquire programming skills, grind 24/7.

Name: Elemental
About: Fire and Water what is that an online game made up of players ?

Name: The Last Shape
About: The Last Shape - is a hand-drawn 2d platformer game, which gives the player an amazing opportunity to sink into the breathtaking atmosphere of a destroyed alien world. The player has to pass all the floors of the game accompanied with a little cube and finally see what happened.

Name: Pirates Of Gensokyo
About: Marisa rounds up a most unlikely crew, in search of adventure, and of course, treasure! Interpersonal conflict ensues among the crew, but in the end, their stark differences bring clarity to their personal lives. The real treasure is the one you find within yourself!

Name: Al Bassel
About: Al bassel is a turn-based puzzle game where you play as a soldier trying to save his kingdom from foreign invasion. you will strategically maneuver around the battlefield and try to outsmart and outmaneuver your enemies.

Name: Feed the Animals
About: Dear fellow Players, Please do not purchase the game anymore because it will become free anytime soon! If you have already purchased it, thanks a million. I do hope you liked it!

Name: The Rainsdowne Players
About: A creativity-driven RPG about a rundown theatre and pleasing its unruly clientele. Help the Rainsdowne Players become the premier (and only!) theatre troupe in town!

Name: adventure_with_firefly
About: a nonsenscial story about Matchstick Men

Name: >Mars Taken
About: Mars Taken is a TPP Shooter with aliens on Mars. Explore red planet and follow a deep story. This is not a story about aliens...it is a story about life and love.

Name: Moonatees
About: Moonatees is the most realistic VR space manatee simulator. You play as a freshly recruited, clumsy manatee in zero gravity playground. You face mundane tasks and an incoming asteroid that you have to beat without opposable thumbs in a zero gravity environment.

Name: Dissent
About: A visual novel with mild choice-based progression. In this prologue story, follow an inquisitve college student into the depths of deceptive corporate lab: Moniker Innovation. Begin to unravel a mystery larger than the young journalist looking for answers and even this game itself.

Name: LastRo
About: LastRo is a top-down shooter roguelike where you play robot, which mission is to clear up a lot of floors against different enemies. Your enemies are 'evolving', which means they become stronger with each floor and difficulty you beat. Try out different weapons, abilities and upgrades to beat them.

Name: Agent of Chaos
About: Agent of Chaos is a top-down wave survival game about an avatar of chaos using powerful elemental weapons to defeat hordes of heroes.

Name: The hardest game in the universe
About: Why are you getting to know one of the most difficult games in the universe, Embark on this challenge with the new casual game, platform that aims to become one of the games most hated for its difficulty,

Name: Farlight Commanders: Prologue
About: Farlight Commanders: Prologue is the first mission of an upcoming cooperative sci-fi shoot'em up. Play with friends up to 4. Drive a spaceship where each player has an unique role.

Name: Fight! Olyn Island
About: Explore the mysterious Olyn Island! Play against other players and use cute animal heroes towards victory!

Name: Diorama Tower Defense: Tiny Kingdom (Prologue)
About: Diorama Tower Defense: Tiny Kingdom (Prologue) is a cute tower defense game with currently three different dioramas, as well as three difficulty levels. The objective is to stop the enchanted creatures from reaching the king of Tiny Kingdom, since he is allergic to those creatures.

Name: The Bridge to Yesterday
About: Step into a beautifully crafted world, where you'll embark on an emotional journey filled with intrigue and danger. Explore the touching relationship of two sisters, their struggle for survival, and their unwavering determination in a world where the past crumbles and the future is uncertain.

Name: Xploquest 3
About: Xploquest 3 is a turn-based role-playing game where you explore an open world and manage your character.

Name: Fanite
About: A remake of Magicite, same gameplay loop just a tad bit harder, with new stuff added, but without multiplayer.

Name: Bouncers
About: Bouncers is a single player retro styled action game that has you avoiding enemies to climb the leaderboard. The bouncer will bounce around the screen in random directions and multiply over time, but more enemies for example the asteroid will appear.

Name: Erroneous
About: Join the Battle with your Friends in this futuristic First-Person Shooter with Team Deathmatch, Free-for-all, King of the Hill, and more!

Name: Didactic Jesus Game
About: An ideal game to read the Gospel in an original and fun way. You will play the role of Jesus to save the world from evil, and you will learn how much he loves you. Are you ready to know his path full of Truth and Life?

Name: Born Tubi Wild
About: Control 4 different pigeons to track down unsuspecting pedestrians and present them with falling surprise from the skies.

Name: Audio Forager
About: Feel the magic of Machine Learning in this new experiment that combines over 44,000 sounds from Freesound.org, a data set created by Kyle McDonald and a touch of Cabbibo weirdness. Run your hands through a cloud of sound, select your favorite clips and make a drum set from this aural smorgasbord!

Name: The Benza RPG
About: The epic quest to fix a broken toilet seat and save the world is now in your hands! The hit Japanese comedy series 'The Benza' continues in this FTP retro JRPG!!

Name: Gordian Rooms 2: A curious island Prologue
About: Locked and left to your own devices once again! Muster your wits and find a way out of a yet undiscovered part of your recently inherited mansion. The Prologue takes place between the events of Gordian Rooms 1 and 2.

Name: 0Gravity
About: 0Gravity is a game whose action takes place in zero gravity (predictably). Confuse your opponents and anticipate their actions to win in pixel 2D levels. There can be only one space marine!

Name: Spacen: The Beginning
About: As Gary Rogers, the player battles through hordes of enemy spaceships in several missions, evading projectiles, asteroids and defeating powerful bosses. Gary collects debris from destroyed enemies and exchanges them at the home base for ship and weapon upgrades.

Name: Augma II - Arc I
About: The prelude to exquisite chaos. A sci-fi, psychological horror, and action VN that sets the stage for a grand opera.

Name: Essence Bloom
About: Essence Bloom is a linear, story-focused indie visual novel that allows the player to experience a world with beautiful cherry blossoms and fun times with friends....

Name: Skeletery
About: Living as ordinary skeleton is hard - you are dead, but now you need to defend your cemetery against evil humans.

Name: 皇帝
About: 《皇帝》是一款王朝养成模拟游戏。

Name: Bugger Off!
About: The fun and refreshing tower defense, tasked with controlling and commanding a squadron of specially trained frogs, your mission is to thwart the relentless bug invasion. Brace yourself, as each wave increases in difficulty with bosses that tanks damage for days.

Name: Dwarven Realm
About: Explore an epic fantasy medieval world where dwarves fight for survival in a hostile universe. Guide your colony of dwarves through unique challenges, tough moral choices, and unforgettable encounters. Explore, mine, build, trade to ensure the prosperity of your people.

Name: Creeping Deck: Pharaoh's Curse Prologue
About: Creeping Deck is a strategic roguelite deck-builder with RPG elements. Build and refine your deck as you progress through each dungeon, facing off against bosses and enemies. Upgrade, and unlock new skills, options, and artifacts to protect all of Egypt!

Name: 有所思 Yearning
About: “Yearning” is a visual novel type of game, telling the story of the protagonist Tan Kai’s ordinary and extraordinary life in the modern Chinese university campus.

Name: Yeah Jam Fury
About: Yeah Jam Fury tests your speed and ingenuity in over 40 levels of smiling face blocks. Utilize all three of your egos to create blocks, scale walls, and destroy everything in the way of your righteous fruit!

Name: Secret Girl
About: This is a pleasant and relaxing casual game that contains various mini-games. Play and discover new girls. Buy new pictures for points and look for hidden levels.

Name: MEGAMiX
About: MEGAMiX is a rhythm-action-platform game. Move to the beat to clear platforms, fight enemies, and save the world! Did we mention it's free-to-play?

Name: Ultimate Fighters
About: 2D Fighting game

Name: Pillars
About: Pillars is a 3D platformer where the environments are put first and foremost to provide a fun, relaxing experience climbing all six levels.

Name: Mortmentum
About: Fight endless waves of different enemies using your grappling hook in clever ways while trying hopelessly to stay alive just a little longer so you can get a higher score.

Name: Waifusitter 🔞
About: Waifusitter is a NSFW clicker where you collect and grow a waifu collection! Earn a random waifu every 3 hours, recycle unwanted ones, and aim for the rarest waifus. Trade waifus on Steam Community Marketplace.

Name: Voidwalkers - Soul Hunters
About: Embark on a quest for redemption in the breathtaking realm of old Earth, where battles for glory never cease. Soulhunters is a high-octane dueling simulation that pits you against fierce opponents in a variety of arenas. Join the fight and become the ultimate champion of Astora today!

Name: Planet
About: On this Planet, you can watch models, like, comment And you can upload your own custom model, share it with others and change the planet

Name: GibblePETS
About: GibblePets is a cozy monster collector game where you find a pet once every 3 hours. You can play with them, decorate their room and have them on your screen to keep you company!

Name: Champi
About: Prepare to defend your village in Champi, a captivating Tower-Defense where your mission is to repel a invasion of mutated mushrooms.

Name: Makiomino
About: Tile-matching puzzle game based on mix of classical mechanics.

Name: Offenders
About: Make deals with people to identify and distract your enemies in order to eliminate them one by one and clear the areas from them until you reach their leader.

Name: A Bad Clicker
About: Some games are good, a few games are great, most are alright. This is not one of those games. Come explore this labyrinth of menus that make number bigger. Watch number get big, only to get small, to get big again, faster this time even!

Name: Koliseum Soccer VR
About: Koliseum Soccer VR is the most epic game of table soccer in VR. Also called Babyfoot, Foosball or Kicker, it is one of the most iconical arcade game ever. We recreated the gameplay that everyone knows but with a twist. Now you can dribble your way to the goal, manage to keep a clean sheet when 3 balls are on the pitch... and many more!

Name: プリンセス×オーディエンス
About: 選択肢を間違えると即エンディング！？ドS狼プリンセスから質問攻めされる短編ゲーム

Name: 三国梦之队
About: 《三国梦之队》是一款Q版三国养成策略网页游戏，玩家将招募三国群雄，打造属于自己的三国梦之队，和其他玩家展开极致烧脑的策略对抗。 优秀的武将是我们攻城掠地最大的助力，在《三国梦之队》中，我们可以通过去酒馆招募、VIP奖励来获得三国时期的武将，增强自身的实力。 武将根据品质不同会获得不同的天赋技能，品质越好的武将所携带的天赋技能越厉害， 各位主公要根据武将的属性和对阵要求给武将搭配更合适的技能，让武将发挥出最大的威力。

Name: Little Moneybags
About: Little Moneybags is a business simulator for money lovers. It's super simple to play yet hard to master. Now, you can experience an adventure journey from moneyless to a super billionaire. Just start your business, maintain it for a while and let the cash flow to your pocket.

Name: Politon: Prologue
About: 'Politon: Prologue' is the free prologue version of 'Politon'. This prologue includes a tutorial, game mechanics, and the prologue of the main story inside. Only Single-player modes are available.

Name: Seena VR (Beta)
About: Seena VR [Beta]: The game features a Deserted map, characters, weapons, and game modes.Feel the VR Experience, Grab your weapon, wear your Armor, and prepare for war.

Name: Invention 6
About: Invention 6 is a 3D shooter with Scrollshooter elements, as well as a small share of logical puzzles that must be solved to complete the level. Learn the story of Casey and Dorian, shoot robots and zombies, and fight powerful bosses to the fiery Heavy Metal.

Name: 大家一起包饺子
About: Dumpling Together is a very easy click casual game.You can complete the level all the way with just a few clicks of the mouse.

Name: IDeal
About: Welcome to IDeal, a 3D horror game where you have to escape from a school with unknown anomalies. Follow the peculiar guidelines and rules of conduct, and never forget to approach everything with caution.

Name: The Beanstalk

Name: Aliens and Asteroids
About: The legendary journalist sets out to investigate an incident that occurred in a laboratory for the study of extraterrestrial technologies. But this trip is not complete without unexpected guests...

Name: Invention 5
About: 3D first-person shooter with Scrollshooter elements. Complete levels, kill zombies and fight bosses to defeat the main villain - Casey.

Name: Osminog Adventures - The Lost Island
About: Dive into the fantastical world of Karawark and accompany the Pirate Crew of The Osminog on an adventure they were not prepared for.

Name: Versus Vampire
About: Take part in the eternal battle between Vampires and Humans. Choose your camp and fight in this new online multiplayer action game.

Name: Dead Abyss
About: A short first-person horror experience that places you in the rusted out hull of a mysteriously abandoned shipwreck. Search for clues, solve puzzles, and uncover the mystery of the wreckage, but beware of the evil that lurks within.

Name: The Cat and the Coup (4K Remaster)
About: In The Cat and the Coup, you play the cat of Dr. Mohammed Mossadegh, the first democratically elected Prime Minister of Iran. During the summer of 1953, the CIA engineered a coup to bring about his downfall.

Name: Ghosty
About: Ghosty is a lighthearted top-down action-adventure RPG that features tons of puns, witty dialogue, charming story elements, and a pixelized art style. The game experiments with a splash of unique mechanics that are used both in and out of combat.

Name: Chrysalis Inc.
About: Slipping between the past and present, a child puzzles their way through a crumbling toy factory filled with the remnants of its child workers and the grudges they bear.

Name: Drinking in the hot spring!
About: 'How about a drink?' In this heartwarming, conversation-driven visual novel, you step into the role of the leader of a hot spring drinking club. You'll help its colorful members navigate personal troubles, sometimes with the aid of a drink or two, and see their challenges through to resolution.

Name: Shifter
About: Explore this strange world using portals to shift between the light and dark dimensions. Navigate the world, transforming it as you progress. Illuminate the void to reveal what has been abandoned in the shadows. And remember, don't linger in the darkness...

Name: A Little Time
About: A Little Time is a first-person interactive story. You play as a young but determined detective investigating a man's disappearance. You will travel to a variety of locations and pick up clues while experiencing the story, dialogue, and atmospheric visuals.

Name: Gothic Virtual Tabletop
About: Gothic Virtual Tabletop is a virtual tabletop application that can be customized to support nearly any TTRPG or Wargame.

Name: Haunting Hijinx
About: Outwit your friends as the ghost or cooperate to catch it in this spooky minigame for 2-5 players.

Name: Failed Ninja Academy
About: In this 2D platformer Ninja game slash through falling objects and pass each level to get closer to becoming a certified Ninja once again!

Name: Midnight Dash
About: Midnight Dash is an difficult 2D platformer. It tells the story about Sean and Piu the light source.

Name: Shroom & Doom
About: A top-down tower-defense game where you play as a little robot that has crash landed on an alien planet. Defend yourself against waves of bug-like enemies using towers made from the local mushrooms. Find a way to repair your ship and escape the planet!

Name: Nanoscape

Name: WANTED: Yokai Uprising

Name: Axecutioners

Name: Treachery in Beatdown City U.N. Trouble

Name: Gravity Box

Name: Nuclear Drifter

Name: Creature Rumble

Learn to control your newly discovered power to harness energy from the sun and battle against robots on your journey up the mountain to find your captured sister. Made by students at Full Sail University.

Name: Super RPS

Name: Escape The Room

Name: Protoplanet Express
About: Embark on an exciting journey to explore distant star systems and witness the fascinating process of planet formation. In this immersive video game, you'll have the chance to learn about real protoplanetary systems based on simulations crafted by professional astronomers.

Name: The First Step

Name: Ice Demon
About: How long can you survive? In this arcade-style game, employ hand to hand combat and freeze your enemies to get as many kills as possible before you are defeated.

Name: El Pasante Elementalista

Extract elements, cast spells, interact with the environment, and combine spells to create new ones in this mystical adventure!

Name: Bery'sCase 贝里的案件

Name: Melon Clicker
About: Click the melon to accumulate points. Ideal for short breaks or unwinding.

Name: Aegis Online

Name: Net VR Theater

Name: Note Brawl
About: Go head-to-head in a game like soccer, but filled with colorful monsters! Note Brawl is a free-to-play fighting soccer game where you play with a diverse roster Every map and character is completely unique so there will always be something new to find out.

Name: Fanatic Zeal
About: Rogue-lite Quarter View Hack&Slash. Bosses have randomly chosen traits, and you will get different treasure in each play. Online score ranking board (for each difficulties)

Name: Spirits' Creek
About: Spirits’ Creek is a third-person horror adventure where, following an avalanche, you play as a father looking for his daughter. Battle supernatural creatures, tame the elements and solve the mystery surrounding the events in order to survive the night.

Name: Century of Anticipation
About: Locked away at home, time slows to a crawl. Enjoy our gift to you, this delightful adventure with an unforgettable soundtrack by Brazilian artists.

Name: Playtime with Hoogie
About: Hoogie hates visitors, perhaps? Find yourself in a dark forest where you must find different of number keys around the forest for a week before Hoogie finds you. Collect them all before then and after.

Name: Reality patrol: Prologue

Name: PACTUM + EPISODE 1

Name: Noah Please!

Name: labyrinth Trials

Name: Myrmica

Manipulate the routines of 5 unique characters to achieve your goal, create your situations trapped in a time loop, and uncover the truth of Complex B13B

Name: AMBUSH tactics

Name: Power War:The First Men

Name: The Great Exhibition of 1851 in VR

Name: Project N3T

Name: The Slaughter: Magdalene

Level up by clicking monsters or passively over time, increasing your chance to encounter rare Shinys that reward you with Steam Marketplace items.

Name: PLEASE KNOCK -before entering my room-

About: Get ready for a tale where every cup poured is a step closer to unraveling the mysteries that bind the afterlife. Take on a soul-stirring quest as you serve lost souls, piece together your forgotten past, and unveil the chilling secrets of the Stygian Keep.

Name: Cats Fishing for Cats
About: This game is about fishing with your cat, surrounded by the sounds of nature. Just hang out with your cat and you will get a new cat at regular intervals. You can earn Paw Points by petting the cat or convert the cat you have into Paw Points to get a new cat.

Name: Blackstorm
About: Born as an university project, Blackstorm is an online multiplayer Battle Royale where players form crews of three pirates and face each other in deadly combat. Sail with your spaceship in a three-dimensional environment with total freedom of movement and rotation.

Name: Romanizer
About: Immerse yourself in Roman history with this management game! Gain acceptance of the goddess Cybele into the pantheon of Roman gods, influence public opinion, and go through many historical events. Will you be able to get Cybele adopted by the Romans?

Name: Zombie Battle
About: The doctors would like create new humans. Stronger, faster humans. But the humans will be zombies. The zombies killing the doctors! Your name is 'Joe'. You are Soldier. You travel the helicopter to Zombie Land, you must save the doctors and kill the zombies.

Name: Bridge Creator 2015
About: Use your skills as an architect and build your bridges using different materials such as iron, steel and wood in a variety of thicknesses and lengths. Make use of a variety of engineered parts including working hydraulics, rotary plates, winches, rope and support cables.

Name: A Better Tomorrow
About: Join the green revolution! 🌱 Relax and learn about clean energy in this cozy, minimalist 2D city-building strategy game. Build windmills, solar panels, and more to provide energy to villages and cities while protecting the environment. Let's work together to make 'A Better Tomorrow'!

Name: 100% Wedding Mission!
About: 100% Wedding Mission! is a real time strategy game playable only for a streamer with 45~ viewers. Gather gold and upgrade chat viewer's Unit! Collaborate with chat and streamers to capture the ❤️Love❤️

Name: Culture Warz
About: In a world not too dissimilar from ours, social media has rotted minds of the masses turning them into zombies driven by a primal urge to be the most insufferable versions of themselves whilst feasting on brains of the rest of humanity. Who will defeat these social stereotypes? It can only be Chad.

Name: My Friend Aki
About: A horror-tinged puzzle and exploration game set in an abandoned mall. Improvise tools, uncover secrets, and stumble upon something strange and bright in the darkness.

Name: 刺沙
About: 《刺沙》是一款还原传奇单职业特色的游戏。游戏中主角色战士，带领宠物征战玛法大陆。野外地图BOSS，副本BOSS，各种精英BOSS等你去挑战。野外战斗，激情PK，炫酷觉醒，各种玩法带你领略传奇不一样的体验！

Name: Senet: Households
About: Prove you're blessed by the gods in this Online Multiplayer Ancient Egyptian Board Game.

Name: Starboard
About: Become Cillian Cade, a pirate thief who’s in over his head after a heist gone wrong. After stealing a magical gauntlet possessed by the spirit of a pirate lord, the duo set out to find an ancient vault. Outwit and outplay the crew of a malicious pirate captain who wants the treasure all for himself.

Name: SlingStar
About: SlingStar is a casual 2D Space puzzle adventure, journey your way across 3 galaxies in this relaxing experience!

Name: Crea Run!
About: Run, jump, and gather building blocks...Craft vehicles using the collected blocks and recipes!An action game of running, jumping, and crafting.

Name: Rambell
About: Rambell is an online and local multiplayer party game for 2-8 players. Beat up your friends in a variety of absurd games and destroy friendships in the unique collection of mini-games.

Name: Ovine Replica
About: A fantasy visual novel featuring action, horror, and multiple endings to a tale of suspense, intrigue, desperation, and desire. Part I of The Enonoia Saga.

Name: Whisker President
About: Whisker President is a comedic, casual point-and-click game set in a cartoon style oval office. Armed with only a laser pointer and some glue, help the purresident achieve political success by making him stamp the bills, all while ensuring that distractions don't get in the way.

Name: Messorem
About: An emotional journey about death, family and acceptance. Step into this thrilling narrative driven Action-RPG to experience an exciting combat system and a story tackling deep themes.

Name: Merk Mayhem
About: Get ready for a thrilling semi-futuristic multiplayer shooter game! Choose from three kits, master movement speeds, and restore armor with drops from fallen enemies. Casual or competitive, suit up for a battle like no other.

Name: Detective Kiwi
About: 'Detective Kiwi' is a free to play multiplayer puzzle game that designed up to 6 players, featuring a simple rule: There will be 4 images every round. You need to find them as fast as you can.

Name: inFINIte Robotics
About: inFINIte Robotics is a visual novel game that is set in a fantasy world filled with modern technology. The premise of the game is to find out the mystery of the world and learn about electronics by solving puzzles!

Name: Timo's Adventures
About: Timo's Adventures is a nervous and demanding 2D musical runner. You will have to be sharp. Especially to avoid the traps of Divinity. 3 rows, 3 lives, it sounds simple, it is not. A dive into a hand-drawn universe. We dance there, we die there ... Come and make a highscore in music!

Name: Mirage
About: Jump through mystical desert ruins and shoot the bird-like guards to steal their treasure.

Name: NOTHING TO LOSE
About: A retro horror and adventure game.

Name: Bugs N' Guns
About: Bugs N' Guns is a cooperative third person shooter. Player will need to combine their weapons firepower to eliminate enemies and obstacles as players try to protect a train called MARC - OS from hostile flora and fauna.

Name: Descent from Arkov's tower Prologue
About: Highly moddable retro roguelike. Descend from Arkov's Tower - or die trying!

Name: Chamber's Reunion
About: Following a message from an old friend, you visit abandoned estate. Suddenly, you're knocked out. As you wake up, your only job is to escape as quickly as possible..

Name: Turbo Tempest
About: A Multiplayer Speedboat Battle Arena where you fight to be the last boat standing using a range on weapons on the map.

Name: Duckball
About: Duckball is an action-packed battle royale game where up to 100 players compete to be the last duck standing. Play with friends online and collect wacky items to knock your opponents off the stage in an ever changing 3D environment. Do you have what it takes to be truly glorious?

Name: GiAnt
About: What is one small step for a human, is one GiAnt adventure for an Ant....Join Adam in this fun filled first-person platformer from the indie solo developer at 'Wreck Tangle Games'. Roam vast human sized worlds as a tiny little ant, but this is no Ant Simulator! This is an AntVenture!

Name: System Override
About: System Override is a first-person, single player heist game where you play as a hacker clearing a route through a variety of traps that block the way of your non-playable companion on the field.

Name: 激战王城-三国
About: 《激战王城》突破传统策略游戏的束缚，快速开荒橙将开局，范围连地快速铺路，独创模拟比武，无需战损也可验证阵容。组建自己的阵营，义结群雄共创大业；亦可勇战各路豪杰，夺取无双荣耀；还可剿灭异族捍卫九州，一统万里江山。100万格多变沙盘恭候各位主公的降临，谁又是下一位天下之主？

Name: SpellBit
About: Prepare to immerse yourself in a dynamic and spellbinding world of magical mayhem. As a powerful mage, you'll engage in intense battles against other skilled sorcerers, wielding an arsenal of enchantments and elemental forces.

Name: Ferromon Together
About: Journey with your friends in the free to play world of Ferromon Together and take on the 10 towers with over 140 Ferromon to save the world's inhabitants from the Tainted!

Name: Samurai war era Hunter
About: 'Samurai war era Hunter' is a mini-game in the process of making a simulation game during the Warring States period in Japan.

Name: 黑貓：逆光｜Black Cat：Back Light
About: 〈黑貓：逆光〉藉由冷戰期間，臺美密切合作《快刀計畫》的過往，帶領玩家以「古董底片相機」探索「前空軍桃園基地設施群」，在黑貓的指引下，拍攝並收集指定影像，追尋冷戰歷史的軌跡。

Name: UNILOGUE
About: Adventure with your unique friends and defeat powerful enemies! UNILOGUE is a new tower defense game with elements of a build-your-own roguelike. Form the best party you can think of and set out on a rugged adventure!

Name: Seeds
About: Plant seeds, and reap valuable plants in this relaxing idle game. Collect rare varieties and build your virtual garden empire, then sell your bountiful harvest on the Steam Marketplace!

Name: Gaop
About: Use the up, down, left and right buttons to control the player to push the box to the designated position to pass the level. If you want to restart the level, please long press Left Control. If you want to quit the game, please long press ESC.

Name: The Hand of Glory - The Blowtorch Files
About: A young girl, Erica Thimber, vanishes into thin air overnight. Is it a classic teen runaway? That's not what Lazarus Bundy, renowned serial killer hunter in charge of the case, believes.

Name: HeadLight
About: A stealth horror survival game

Name: Catastrophic Cat Command
About: Command thousands of cats on their journey to find a new home! Catastrophic Cat Command is an arcade-style game where you manage multiple mini-games at once! It’s the perfect game for a quick 5-minute break from work!

Name: Stream Animals: Free For All
About: Stream Animals:Free for All brings you closer to your streaming community. You and your viewers try to be the last one standing as the land falls into the water.

Name: Heavy Memories
About: Classic top view, destructible walls, powerups, environment and enemies, as well as the ability to complete the game with various types of tanks!

Name: Crystal Reign
About: Battle hordes of woodland creatures, strategically place weapon towers across the landscape, enter your weapon tower and unleash a rain of fire on your enemies, and annihilate your enemies with your ultimate attack in hand-to-hand combat!

Name: Legend of Cina
About: Raise a band of heroes and defeat the evil empire!

Name: Monolithic
About: Monolithic is a free to play real time strategy game about two warring pantheons of gods. Grow your cult of followers, claim new territories, fight against the enemy with divine abilities and lead your civilization to the end of the world.

Name: Prism Collider
About: In this adventure your objective is simple: reach the end of each level. While it may be simple, it's not going to be easy. Using both the white and red layers you'll have to travel across all 30 levels as the game turns from basic puzzles to the hardest challenges you have ever faced.

Name: JumpStream
About: JumpStream is a competitive platformer built in real-time by an audience, using Mixer Interactive! The goal is to work with your audience to construct an emergent path to complete challenges in the fastest possible time.

Name: ArchRobo - Robotic Annihilation
About: This is ArchRobo, a top-down shooter. Featuring incredible visuals, 28 intense levels ranging from easy to incredibly challenging, with 5 large Bosses, dozens of enemies, and a plethora of creative weapons such as the Laser Sword, and Juggernaut power-up.

Name: Gelldonia
About: Gelldonia is a world full of secrets and dangers. You, armed with a musket and a saber, must face them. Travel, gather resources, craft items, trade and fight for glory and fame.

Name: Sanctuary VR (Also contains non-VR version)
About: 'Sanctuary VR' is a first-person puzzle solving and exploration game designed for Oculus Rift, it has a strong narrative that is fully voice acted. The game is a seated VR experience played with a controller.

Name: All City King
About: All City King is a stealth game where you take the role of an up-and-coming street artist. Your target is the subway trains and your goal is to make your art travel all over the city.

Name: Chronoraptor
About: Use time-travel clones to return artifacts stolen from the past by a futuristic time-traveling raptor.

Name: Your Human is Sick
About: Your Human is Sick and it’s up to you, a Naive T Cell, to solve puzzles, fight off Bacteria and Viruses, and learn about the Immune System. Make your human healthy again in this dungeon crawler adventure!

Name: 灵魂交响乐【Soul Symphony】
About: A Trippy Physics Based RPG. Make your way around a maze and try to figure out what is happening between different NPCs as they tell you things based on an Eastern Philisophy known as Ling.

Name: DanCop - Daniela on Duty
About: You are Daniela the cop. Sneak inside a guarded building full of terrorists and get through the floors without being detected.

Name: グランドインテンション・アジャストメント
About: Back to the roots of a 90's style JRPG! Depending on the player's actions, the shape of the game changes in various ways. This is a full-length RPG with a combination of scenario and freedom. This game is in Japanese only.

Name: Command: The Silent Service
About: Submarine warfare from post-WW2 to the present day! Lay mines, strike land targets with cruise and ballistic missiles, creep up to surface ships to take hull shots undetected, sniff sensitive electronic emissions, tap undersea communications cables, covertly deliver special-forces teams ashore, and of course hunt down anything on the sea...

Name: TendyTrainer
About: TendyTrainer is a VR app made for goalies to refine their skills in VR space. The goal of TendyTrainer is to provide the most realistic off-ice training environment possible. It is designed to build good habits that directly translate to the ice.

Name: Drunkenpants
About: Drunkenpants is a game where ordinary heroes who got drunk in their underpants at home (Kalsarikänni) try to solve mundane problems with excessive violence. The game is an action based, fast-paced multiplayer battle game, where you compete in different game modes and try to beat your opponents.

Name: Old Adventure
About: Run, Jump, Shot and DIE! Explore the world of Old Adventure, a 2D retro-inspired puzzle-platformer where the goal is to help others...but why?

Name: Soulslinger
About: Soulslinger is a challenging auto runner in which you must reap your way through the Underworld! Destroy obstacles, eat pies, and get blessings to defeat threatening foes with the help of your powerful soulblaster.

Name: Penny's Path
About: In this voice-acted, hand-painted visual novel about women and witchcraft, a brush with the coronavirus sends Penny back in time to the New England witch hunts. As Penny meets strong female characters who challenge past and present stereotypes, she discovers her own special role in the changing seasons of time.

Name: SBX 5K
About: PVP turn-based strategy sci-fi arena shooter

Name: Defend Your Kingdom
About: Fight legendary monsters, customizing your defensive strategy with different spells and equipments! Throw lightnings to your enemies, summon stone guardians, rise the mercenaries of darkness from the dead to fight on your side to save your Kingdom from the mystic shadow!

Name: Ghostly Horizon
About: Ghostly Horizon is an intense 3rd-person spell-caster on round planets. You enjoy crazy battles with over 30 different spells, preferably together with your friends. Focus is placed on both player-skill and teamwork in this matchbased game with quick rounds. Can you top the Leaderboards?

Name: Orbitron
About: Control Orbitron. Collect all the orbs. Make it to the final platform and 'Rainen' will advance you to my art Gallery. If you make it to the final platform in the art gallery you have beat the game. And, get ready for Orbitron II. It's Coming Soon.

Name: Maxi Pool Masters VR
About: Maxi pool Masters takes you inside the action in a fun and innovative pool game.

Name: OMG: One Million Guns
About: OMG: One Million Guns is a fast-paced, 2D, top-down, twin-stick shooter set in space, with LOTS of guns. Blast your way through waves of enemies with a multitude of weapons at your disposal. Full controller support included.

Name: Larkin building by Frank Lloyd Wright
About: The Larkin Building build by Frank Lloyd Wright in 1904 is one of the most famous office building off all time. It has been demolished in 1954 and there where no color picture of the building till now. In this VR experience you can walk through the building and explore the spaces, furniture and atmosphere.

Name: Blade of Acrimony
About: Blade of Acrimony is a Psychological Horror RPG where you take control of Sora Loyalar and follow her on her downward spiral into insanity.

Name: Night shot
About: This is a very fun, fast and simple game, both adults and children can play it. Each of the players has his own cowboy for whom you need to collect ammunition in order for him to shoot at your opponent.

Name: Battle Bandits
About: Battle Bandits is a top down tank shooter with customisable tanks and 30 levels to complete!

Name: KYOTO TANOJI QUEST
About: 'KYOTO TANOJI QUEST' is a role-playing game set in the 'Tanoji area' in Kyoto city. Your goal is to enjoy the trip at 12 shopping streets! The player himself becomes the main character of this game, aiming at a high score while enjoying conversation with people and overcoming the fight with myself.

Name: 云城异闻录
About: 这是一款参考豫章书院真实事件改编的恐怖游戏，采用了全新的虚幻5引擎打造，这是一款独立游戏，由于我们没有开发经验所以可能一些地方、功能做的不够完美、完善，目前游戏依旧处于持续更新中，后需将推出更完善、更精彩的游戏内容、更大的地图、更丰富的场景，敬请期待

Name: Arosia
About: Arosia is the Tile Map game based on Strategy and Luck. Use your strategy skills with best of luck to occupy World! Don't stop untill the World is yours.

Name: SICKO ISLAND
About: SICKO ISLAND, is a survival, horror game where you'll need to find essential items, solve puzzles and fight your way to the General to put an end to the nightmare.

Name: MouseWars
About: MouseWars is a real time multiplayer cursor war game. The cursors have to fight until only one remains.

Name: Surface Runner
About: A narrative driven-platformer that puts the player in the shoes of an AI that is becoming more and more sentient.

Name: Make Route: Escape the police
About: Make a route, collect coins and manage to shake off pursuit, avoiding collisions.

Name: KIRO
About: KIRO is an indie developed horror text adventure game that plays in real time while your player is controlled with text command inputs providing a unique intense experience that combines modern action game play with classic text adventure games.

Name: Dead Herring VR
About: Dead Herring is a VR-Experience in which you solve a murder case.

Name: Project Myriad
About: Project Myriad is a tower defense strategy game. You build towers on a map of hexagons that will attack and defeat oncoming waves of enemies. Towers can be upgrade and some have varied upgrade paths. The goal is clear as many waves as possible. How far can you get?

Name: Out Of The Shelter
About: Out Of The Shelter is a multiplayer session shooter with quest elements. You must first of all get out of the big bunker using one of the methods. Act quickly before you get ahead of you!

Name: brainCloud Bombers
About: It's Bombin' Time! Climb into the pilot seat! Team up, shoot down your opponents, collect their bombs, then bomb their ships to smithereens! The first team to sink all enemy ships wins the round. Supports 8 player simultaneous matches with empty slots filled in by bots! It's time to get bombin'!

Name: Oblivion Tesseract VR
About: A potential girl with the curse of blood...finally awaked from the slumber...A mysterious cube unveiled all the secrets of her thrilling dreams, Family's history, paranoid space of time and eternal curse…

Name: UNHERD
About: You have 9 hours to find your way out and defeat The Unherd. Are you up for the challenge?

Name: Tom's Mansion
About: Escape or Die. Not in real life, of course. It's all just a simulation, in a mansion, with 20 minutes to escape.

Name: The Horror Story: Rebirth
About: Welcome to The Horror Story: Rebirth, a remake version from the original Horror Story powered by Unreal Engine 5. Like all horror games, it contains jumpscares, flashing lights, and loud noises.

Name: Run Blob Run 2
About: A Casual, 2D Platformer in which the player must overcome obstacles to beat the level as fast as possible.

Name: アルティメットダンジョン「紅」
About: Form a party with your favorite Touhou characters and challenge the dungeon! Characters from '紅魔郷' to '輝針城' are lined up! Are there anyone who will walk through the ultimate dungeon of all 51 areas !?

Name: Disc Golf VR
About: Disc Golf VR is the video game rendition of frisbee golf with the intention to give a realistic and wholesome experience in a virtual environment. The target audience is ages 10+ as to assure they can appreciate the game for its skill, and be an appropriate player for virtual reality.

Name: Devil Seeds
About: Explore a ghost island dominated by mystical creatures. This game offers an experience that mixes horror and RPG, allowing you to explore every dark corner, solving puzzles, finding files and meeting strange characters.

Name: Victim Complex: Part 1
About: Use your wits and iconic ghost hunting equipment to uncover the mystery of what happened to the residents of an abandoned apartment complex in this narrative-driven horror experience.

Name: Rainy
About: 「雨の日は好きですか？」ステージは全４ステージ。傘を持った父を操作して雨から娘を守りながらステージクリアを目指そう！

Name: Fart Fiasco Premium
About: Let it go! Use flatulence to fly!

Name: How to Win: Season One
About: How to Win is an anarchic adventure/gaming experiment where players decide the rules. Whatever you decide, that’s what happens next in our story. No matter what chaos it creates. Play through all 5 chapters of Season 1, then send us your ideas for Season 2!

Name: Motor Assailant: Betrayal
About: Fast-paced vehicular shooter. Drive a secret vehicle on a mysterious icy planetoid in a remote star system to uncover what new and unusual threat is looming over the entire humanity.

Name: Siphonopolis
About: Enter a surreal, rotting, underwater world. Chat with some creatures. Murder a lot more. Find the heart.

Name: Apollo 11 VR
About: Apollo 11 VR is a first person experience of the interior of the 1969 Command Module. Explore the cockpit firsthand in an authentic model of the interior based on scans from the Smithsonian.

Name: Lu[Idle]
About: Lu[Idle] is an Incremental game with Idle and Clicker elements as well as pixel art visuals and music.

Name: Super Foosball
About: Super Foosball is an arcade inspired Foosball game. Play with a friend or against a bot!

Name: The Polynesian Cultural Center VR Experience
About: Experience the Polynesian Cultural Center in 3D 360VR!

Name: The Bounty V2
About: The Bounty V2 is a retro-inspired competitive RPG, with an East meets West approach, deviously combined with an arcade high score sensibility. An experience that will challenge your wits as you push to survive, uncover a multitude of secrets, and earn the high score.

Name: Sybil is Haunted
About: Sybil has a very scrambled mind. Some days she just needs you to push her along. Help Sybil navigate the horrors of her bedroom and see what adventures await. Find every ending to see what lays in her future. HYIPHYOP

Name: Welcome To... Chichester 0 : Preview
About: When the self-proclaimed 'best secret agent in the world' starts his week-long holiday, he is anticipating nothing more than a simple hiking holiday with a grizzled guide up an unnamed mountain. Unfortunately for him, his enemies decided that would be far too boring...

Name: Lost Borderline
About: Lost Borderline is a retro pixel-art, hack & slash puzzle-crawler where the boundaries of reality are broken, giving you creative control over the sides of the screen to solve puzzles and defeat enemies.

Name: DR MILOS REVENGE
About: Tread lightly in the ice cold heart of fear. DR MILOS REVENGE is a challenging horror experience with suspenseful stealth gameplay, light puzzle solving and minimal hand-holding. Unlock Nightmare Mode after beating the game, a much more challenging and definitive way to experience the game.

Name: Food Decisions
About: FOOD DECISIONS is an educational game for healthy nutrition. Explore food in a lab, a restaurant, a supermarket, a kitchen, and more. Battle your friends in mini games like Food Olympics and Health Chess. Live a day in an open world and get feedback on your diet at the end of the day.

Name: Bhavacakra Maco
About: Not wanting to contest a title with her elder brother who is 11 years senior, she chooses to leave her hometown behind.

Name: Dimension Of Gameth
About: Turn-Based RPG board-Game where you can bring varius of hero into your squad to fighting together against opponent.

Name: Fisticubes - One Button Boxing!
About: FISTICUBES! THE ULTIMATE ONE-BUTTON BOXING BASHER! Fisticubes is a goofy physics-based one-button boxing party game where up to 4 players compete to destroy each other! Avoid anvils & bombs, eat vegetables and use springs to turn the tide of the fight!

Name: 디시인사이드 중붕이의 모험(Joongboongi's Adventure)
About: The game genre is a modern role-playing game. You can move around the village using the arrow keys, talk to people, and open treasure chests. You can experience the life of a young person that could happen in reality.

Name: 3D Joys
About: 3D Joys will be a collection of VR games that will use a 3D Joystick.

Name: Hellcraze
About: Hellcraze is a bullethell dungeon crawler game, your mission is simple... KILL THEM ALL!

Name: Yōkaimaki
About: The blood moon has risen once again, meaning the yōkai (cryptids) have emerged from the murky depths of the sea. As the heir to the family restaurant, use your fishing and cooking skills to serve up some delicious yōkai sushi!

Name: Planet Mort
About: Adapt and live

Name: 天神印（THE BLOCKADE）
About: Tenshen Print is a fantasy single-player role-playing game by Emeng Shanhai Studio, which uses a 2D perspective rarely seen in fantasy RPGS. In the course of the game, the player will set foot on the journey of cultivating the immortal as the spirited young 'Qin Xiao'.

Name: Lilith Was Dead
About: After being away at college, you meet up with two of your friends at a local movie theatre. What starts out as a simple reunion, quickly unravels to be a gruesome murder mystery with your friend as the victim. It is now your mission to find out who did it, and how in this visual novel style game.

Name: The Fall of Eskaria
About: 'The Fall of Eskaria' is an old school game in the finest tradition of action platformers with unique jazzy music and cartoon art style.

Name: Jetscout: Boot Camp
About: Boost and flip through 3 unique missions of various difficulties with a jetpack before your first real mission in the game Jetscout: Mystery of the Valunians!

Name: C&T
About: C&T is a Goofy Team-Strategy Multiplayer game where you play either as a cop or a thief in teams through a small town. Lets see who can rule between the crime and the law!

Name: POE
About: In this fast-paced difficult platformer, you assume the role of Bernard and his son Poe in an attempt to find each other. Enjoy the short, but sweet story of their paths to each other that are filled with friends, enemies and other obstacles.

Name: I Am Gooey
About: I Am Gooey is a top-down 2D atmospheric puzzle game where you must use your flame to light your way. As you ascend a certain ancient tower, time will pass, but you must reach the top by daybreak to fulfill your life's goal... To become the sun, so the world's daily cycle can continue!

Name: SAMUZA
About: Welcome to the world of SAMUZA! In this time attack obstacle course game, you play as one of the 'SAMUZA' series of robots who tries to restore the lost world by finding it's allies.

Name: A Day in the Palace
About: Travel to Poland in 1772, experience life as a servant, and solve a mystery at court!

Name: Tales Up
About: Your choices. Your adventures. Become the heroes of the Tales Up universe! You decide which path to take. Choose your team wisely and explore a new kind of role-playing game with Tales Up, the interactive multiplayer adventure video game.

Name: Capital
About: A non-linear action-adventure heist game with destructible buildings, use stolen loot to buy bigger explosives and access higher value loot. Buy and customize cars. Invest in military equipment such as helicopters and tanks. Get your mansion!

Name: The Life of a Magical Circle
About: The Life of a Magical Circle is a deceptively simple evade-and-collect game about following your dreams. Take control of a circular creature and see if you can figure out your purpose with only a little help from a mysterious narrator.

Name: Frog Hands Steve
About: Your hands are now frogs, Steve.

Name: The Legend of Chibi Ninja
About: CHIBI NINJA is a ruthless 2D Puzzle platformer. Play as The Legendary Hero and destroy hordes of mechanical beasts to save your world from a mind controlling extraterrestial parasite using detonable BOMB SHURIKENS. Be very wary though, you can only endure one single hit. Are you up to the task?

Name: The War Enders Evolution
About: The War Enders Evolution is an arcade style single-stage bullet hell game. Beat the game with the choice from three different fighters and two different styles.

Name: TimeLab
About: TimeLab is a VR platform for virtual time travel. Experience well-researched historical events and visit historical locations. Currently, you can relive the Apollo 11 moon landing and journey to Ludwig II’s dream castle Falkenstein, with more DLCs to come.

Name: Boom Boomerang
About: Master the skill of throwing and catching virtual boomerangs to destroy bombs before they explode in this challenging and unique arcade-style VR game.

Name: AG Legacy Builder
About: Welcome to Arcade Galaxy! Challenge players worldwide in a universe of classic kart racing fun! Use skills like lightning strikes and super jumps, customize your avatar’s appearance and abilities, and even design your own game modes. Unleash your racing dreams in a colorful, nostalgia-fueled galaxy!

Name: The First Odyssey
About: Face an Odyssey built on violence, horror, puzzles, challenges and human cynicism. Experience a truly atmospheric and realistic survival horror experience in a dystopian future.

Name: No More Noise
About: Survivor of a post-apocalyptic world, the dead have returned to life to make you regret still being among the living. Moreover, their hearing has evolved, and every sound they perceive makes them stronger. A small piece of advice: I think you should stay discreet!

Name: Dragon Clicker
About: Every click changes the color of your dragon, collect drops every 3 hours!

Name: Pincrediball
About: The Automata Pinball Wizard game! YOU design the machine and the Automata Pinball Wizard plays it to get a High Score. Earn medals to advance levels and build ever more extensive machines!

Name: 渔海
About: The protagonist, Fish Xiaoshan, returns from his studies abroad, but finds that his sister has disappeared for no apparent reason. ... He suspects that there is another reason for her disappearance, so he begins to investigate. ... In the face of the many obstacles, what should he choose to do?

Name: 安特卫普的尼洛 Nello in Antwerp
About: Nello in Antwerp is a free-to-play experience set in the world of A Dog of Flanders (in development). You will play as a young boy in 19th century Belgium, penniless but with an artistic dream of painting. You will use pencil and brush to record the landscape you see.

Name: Call Me Skyfish
About: Call Me Skyfish is a game about a fish, a stick-figure hedgehog, and a long tongue.

Name: 可可味大冒险
About: 在无尽的大海上，行驶着一艘叫做可可亚号的大船，然而有一天，可亚号遭遇了风暴......名为可可亚的少女，将会展开怎样的冒险？

Name: 真修世界（Fairy Land）
About: 'Fairy Land' is a massively multiplayer online game (MMORPG). The game provides players with a lot of different quality equipment, and the pursuit of high-level (or best) equipment is one of the most important goals for players in the game.

Name: Cyber Revolution
About: Cyber Revolution is a third-person shooter where you venture into a distant star system to stop an alien invasion. Fight for survival, collect energy from special boxes to destroy your foes. Get ready for fast-paced combat and the unique atmosphere of a futuristic war!

Name: 已下架
About: 《神鬼降世》是一款即时战斗类MMORPG网页游戏游戏 游戏整体上延用了经典的战士、法师、牧师三种职业，同时为玩家提供了三大职业神翼、十二星座守护灵兽、四大上古骑宠等玩法 。 是一款娱乐性，互动性都比较强的网页游戏，虽然画面较为简单，但游戏的PK方面还是做得很到位的。 一键精准敌人锁定击杀，满屏热血攻沙精彩，满足你的传奇体验。 复古写实的游戏画风，经典的传奇游戏玩法，带你重回记忆中的热血岁月。

Name: Pingers
About: Pingers is an addictive 'one-more-round' score chaser which is perfect to play solo or with friends. Ping your way to victory and see just how far you can get!

Name: Ur
About: The Royal Game of Ur, also called Twenty Squares, has a history stretching over five millennia with examples found across the Mediterranean! This is a 3D gameplay experience taking you into the ancient world! The game board set is a 3D reconstruction of an ancient example from a museum.

Name: Lone King
About: An experimental game. Simultaneous turn-based sci-fi combat. Simple controls, deep gameplay inspired by chess. Designed for randomised, 10 minute, low-stress, tactical matches to make you think. Play the first chapters and the arcade mode for free. Support development with feedback.

Name: Meta Star
About: Have you ever been playing a game and wondered, 'Why can't I fly!?' or 'I wish I could customize my spaceship!'? Well, Meta Star is your answer!!! Race the rest of the internet to beat the game, and the winners get to tell the developers what to include in the next update!

Name: Smackitball
About: Smackitball is a VR racket sport.

Name: Lost Age
About: In the mystical world of Lost Age, darkness looms, and heroes rise to reclaim the light. Embark on a captivating adventure where card-based strategy meets the excitement of RPG. Collect and customize powerful heroes, explore magical realms, and tackle thrilling challenges—all at your own pace.

Name: Bounty
About: A sci-fi first-person shooter with a dynamic deployable cover system. A demo level from our game Bounty.

Name: Fish 'N' Chips
About: A fisherman must find his cat “Chips”. Take up the challenge, swing through the levels, and save your friend!

Name: Cyber Surf
About: Cyber Surf allows you to race through the air and explore different worlds using your favorite VR headset.

Name: Survive 10 Minutes Please
About: Survive 10 minutes please is an action roguelike 2D zombie game where you have to survive a zombie horde by any means. Kill them, Upgrade yourself, Choose your abilities and try your best to survive in a challenging game.

Name: RaceTrap
About: Arcade racer that lets you choose to race as your top driver in a custom car or wield traps as the ultimate racing deity.

Name: SUPER LIFTPIA
About: Pick up the enemy and throw it! This is an action game drawn with dots that gives you a nostalgic feel.

Name: MagixHome™ VR
About: MagixHome VR is an experimental home design game where you can use your VR headset to explore and design your own virtual room. You can add new furniture, change wall and furniture material, teleport across the room, or even toss things around.

Name: Robo Rob
About: Robo Rob: Dive into this compact, rage-inducing puzzle adventure that's sure to test your patience and skill.

Name: Impersonal
About: Impersonal is a game about lights, about relationships and how these relationships can affect people.

Name: Planisphere
About: Rediscover lost constellations and build new ones of your own in the star placing puzzler Planisphere!

Name: Follow The Crown
About: Join a thrilling adventure with an Ambassador of the United States & a Hungarian Crown Guard to keep the Hungarian Holy Crown from Nazis and return it to Hungary during the Cold War. You can't trust anyone on this journey; only your wits.

Name: MINE!
About: This VR Shooting Gallery single player game has three levels of game play challenging you to defend the mine from invading forces. From your static vantage point you need to shoot as many aliens as possible, as fast as you can. Are you able to stop them stealing your crystals?

Name: The Crack (壳中之物）
About: Crack is a text adventure game that combines a profound emotional experience with elements of mystery and puzzle-solving. In this game, players embark on a journey to revisit the past, explore themselves, and uncover hidden secrets.

Name: Track Masters Pro
About: Track Masters Pro is a realistic racing simulator where you can choose from 5 unique cars with full external customization and upgrades. Compete with artificial intelligence. Show your skills on the track and become the best racer!

Name: The Exile Princes
About: A story focused, old school, procedural RPG: raise your banner and bring your house to victory in the unique medieval fantasy setting of the Exile Realms. Start out in questing service, gain companions, followers, power and influence, and ultimately through strength or guile learn to rule the lands.

Name: Mana Cycle
About: Mana Cycle is a fast-paced puzzle party game with a unique twist on falling block mechanics, featuring strategic cycle-based piece-clearing. Compete with friends locally in thrilling multiplayer matches!

Name: Foam Dart Frenzy
About: Foam Dart Frenzy is a 2D, top-down, online multiplayer shooter. Grab a dart gun and take aim at your friends!

Name: Satori
About: Satori is a Hack & slash game made as a final Master Degree project. Immerse yourself in a world of samurai and mystical creatures in this Japanese Hack & Slash. Master deadly skills as you unleash mayhem and honour in epic battles.

Name: Weirdest Thing
About: I made a weird game, for weird people, like me.

Name: ScarQuest
About: Raise armies to dominate, seize, and reign over the planet as its ruler.

Name: Soul Shifters: MMORPG
About: Take control, dive into battle, and become a Daemon Lord in Soul Shifters: Online! Download now to unleash epic powers and save humanity. The adventure awaits!

Name: Miniparty
About: Play against your friends in a group up to 4 Players or as a single player to beat your highscore. Either in a LAN Party or alocal in couch co-op mode. GAMES: Football, Car race, Tennis, Sprint, Parkour, Collect-it, Tower Defense

Name: Limits of intelligence
About: Create your own machine. Engineer it!

Name: RegicideX
About: RegicideX is a 3D Hack'n Slash that takes place in a dark fantasy world plagued with rotten and evil angels and possesed people who have invaded the castle of our Lord. You will have to fight in order to liberate your castle and overcome the invasion.

Name: Super Orbit
About: Reach your place in the stars!

Name: PentaZorg
About: PentaZorg is an intense arcade bullet hell that is quite difficult to describe in a single sentence.

Name: Apples And Bananas
About: Embark on an epic fruit-filled adventure as Jack the Apple, battling brainwashed banana soldiers in this top-down 2D pixel shooter to stop Dr. Banana's evil plans!

Name: Soul for two
About: Soul for two is a heroic JRPG about the life of two different people in different worlds, but with different destinies. Will two souls pass all the tests?

Name: Hail Britannia
About: Hail Britannia is a text-based game with lite RPG elements set in an alternate 1944 where the Central Powers won World War 1.

Name: Space Probes
About: Space Probes is a Shoot Em Up (SHMUP) inspired by productions from the 90s released on SNES, MEGADRIVE, NEO-GEO, PC-ENGINE etc.

Name: Recoil Control: The Adventures of Rico Ché
About: A low-poly first-person shooter with challenging combat, realistic bullet-drop physics, and cartoony characters. Navigate a foggy urban lot, solve puzzles to uncover secrets, and face quirky foes with bold personalities. Can you crack the mystery of Hobbe’s Gun Shop?

Name: The Battles of Spwak 3
About: A simple, fast-paced Game with 105 Unique Battles and Free Redistribution of Stats. Outmaneuver Enemies to get Flames, quickly switch between Skills to win Battles and defeat Bosses to gain new Skills.

Name: 生死狙击：战火重燃（国际版）
About: 「生死狙擊-戰火重燃」是在“生死狙擊”冒險模式基礎上，對武器、角色、數值、玩法等一系列模塊進行重置優化而成，在刪繁就簡的基礎之上全面優化玩家體驗、降低上手門檻，並在後續更新中新增大量全新冒險玩法，快來一起嘗鮮吧!

Name: Forest of Lesbians (Nymph's Tale Ep1)
About: A fantasy comedy hybrid visual novel. Simple fast paced action/puzzle gameplay between story elements. Anime/pixelart/jrpg style.

Name: Deck of Life: No Turns, Individual Card Permadeath
About: A card battler where cards are your health. No turns, individual card permadeath. Construct defenses while launching projectiles to destroy your opponent's cards. Beat enemies and events to win cards from unique card pools. If all your cards on the field are destroyed, you die.

Name: イーシャの魔法図書室
About: A rogue-like dungeon game where you fight using magic! Make full use of the spell book with the wizard Isha Let's capture the dungeon!

Name: WarKind
About: Turn-based strategy game with different races and heroes

Name: Xenture
About: Xenture is a short looter shooter game. Players need to destroy six hives located on the map then return to the spaceship to complete the game. We support multiple achievements for you to challenge.

Name: Pixel Puzzles Musical
About: Pixel Puzzles Musical, listen to your favorite bands as you puzzle.

Name: Realms of Darkness
About: Mix of realtime Strategy and MOBA in grimdark setting.

Name: Covid Chaos
About: Covid Chaos is an action packed space shooter where you don't only have to protect yourself but the entire country from the dreaded virus.

Name: Indentured Servant
About: In this VR experience you are stuck on a fishing boat, you must sort fish to pay of your debt.

Name: Hauma - A Detective Noir Story - Prologue
About: Hauma is a deduction visual novel set in Munich. Discover a conspiracy amongst the upper echelons of society alongside former detective Judith, while visiting real locations in a comic-inspired look.

Name: 猜拳为尊
About: A story-driven adventure -- 《Guess Your Fist》

Name: 星际神格
About: A turn-based story-adventure sci-fi role-playing game. It's not big, the player's operation is very simple, just watch the plot, operate the movement and quickly select it in the battle interface. There are some simple side differences, and the overall exploration is up to two hours.

Name: 吞噬追踪
About: 完全免费的休闲网络游戏,游戏中也不存在内购内容.作者承诺该游戏将一直免费.

Name: PRISON OF SON
About: Prison of son is a text based game and its purpose is to give a small awake to users about their knowledge in history and geography of the world. So have fun and enjoy it.

Name: Oxygen Caliber
About: Use recoil and grappling hooks to navigate in a dangerous deep space environment as a stranded astronaut.

Name: Birth of a Hunter
About: Birth of a Hunter is a metroidvania style 2D platformer, with the twist that a huge new map is generated every time you start a new game.

Name: N1L (No1Lives)
About: No1Lives, It's Your Turn to Die!

Name: Irang
About: Under the tyranny of the four-throated, magic collapsed and darkness fell. Irang embarks on a journey to find her missing family and uncover her birth's secret. In a Metroidvania-style adventure, she explores a decayed world, enhances envoy powers, and aims to restore the lost light.

Name: Jack In Town
About: Vous êtes un criminel en monde ouvert. Faites ce que vous voulez!

Name: FASTER
About: FASTER is a running game where speed kills and only the fastest survive. Race against other competitors on a winding track in the Arena Perilous, a vast, surreal urbanscape. Sprint, climb, hurdle, and dodge your way to the finish line. Many will run, few will finish, only one will triumph.

Name: Lolly Joe
About: A dog's journey to reunite with his best friend. Lolly Joe is a 3D-platforming adventure that takes you through the surreal worlds inside a boy's subconscious mind. With his magic lollipop, Joe must overcome a variety of challenges crafted from his friend's dreams and memories.

Name: Sugarcane Empire
About: Plant Sugarcane! Employ Pandas! Conquer the World! Sugarcane Empire is a story-based clicker game set in Chengdu, China and Kentucky, USA. Play as three generations of Chinese and American women. Experience how stories preserve us from death.

Name: Hypoxia - One Last Breath
About: A breathtaking sci-fi visual novel! Since the Z gas appeared in the atmosphere, it is no longer possible to breath outside the Dome. You play as Carl Thanavan, a young scientist determined to uncover the origin of the catastrophe. Which path will you choose?

Name: 伏魔
About: 'Fumo' is a 3D immortal MMORPG, set against the backdrop of ancient Chinese mythology, fairy tales, allusions, and history, depicting a magnificent and imaginative painting for players.

Name: Chaos Souls
About: Chaos Souls is a 2.5D side-scrolling action game where you play as Eris, who must fight her way through monsters across several different zones to save her sister from demons.

Name: Spaceship - Visual Effect Graph Demo
About: Spaceship is a small-scale technical demo showcasing high-end rendering of the Unity Game Engine. It presents a 5 minute long sequence of narrative first-person game play, You can also download the open-source project and open it using Unity Editor to learn how it was made.

Name: Flappy Horse
About: This is a game where you guide this crazy looking horse through hurdles to try and gain the best score you can! As you Flap through the game you collect sugar cubes which you use in the shop to buy upgrades to get even better scores an even more sugar cubes.

Name: Blackout: Director's Cut
About: Upon abandoning your previous life, you find your past has finally caught up to you. Your world has gone dark, and you aren't alone. You must use your eyes to navigate through the dark and uncover the truth of the Meyer City Prison. You can't escape your inner demons. Your end is near.

Name: Psycho Boys
About: Casual single or local co-op game (1-4 players). Throw bombs at enemies and try survive yourself or with your friend.

Name: 循环世界
About: Looping World is an independent survival simulation game in which you have to play a conscious world, survive in a dangerous void, and at the same time survive to create more species.

Name: Hololive Room Visitor
About: Hololive Room Visitor is a fan-made game allowing players to visit the 3D background rooms/environments used in Hololive 3D streams. Visit your favorite members' environments that were showcased in their 3D streams!

Name: Fury's Sky
About: Fly, fight, and survive in a flight action game like no other using the GZDoom engine!

Name: Tales of the Magic Ball: The Lost Sorcerer
About: Tales of the Magic Ball is a puzzle platformer where you'll experience an adventure in a fantasy world. Explore, puzzle, experience a story, fight and overcome obstacles. Solve the tasks given to you in an interesting and fun way.

Name: Gravity Lab
About: References to games Superliminal and Portal. Gravity Labs is a new first-person puzzle game based on gravity. Players will take on the role of a job seeker and try to pass the layers of tests set by the mysterious mega-company THE COMPANY.

Name: Vera Swings
About: Vera has always dreamed of going to the moon. Now her dreams can finally take her there.

Name: The Defender: Farm and Castle 2
About: You are a wizard tasked with defending the castle from invading monsters. Inside the castle, you can manage resources, harvest crops, gain experience points to level up, and learn new skills and abilities to battle increasingly powerful enemies.

Name: Lootfest Wars
About: A relaxing RTS

Name: Mortimer: First Launch
About: A whimsical stealth-puzzle adventure starring Mortimer, a curious raccoon 🦝

Name: King's Hand
About: Classic 1v1 Chess, but you also have unique cards that will help you with dethroning your opponent's King. There is no checkmate nor stalemate, just a brawl between two royal families.

Name: Super Walrus Entertainment System
About: A free collection of short-form indie games made using the OHRRPGCE engine!

Name: TheFighters Online
About: Online fighting game

Name: Night Spasm
About: Night Spasm is an open-world action-adventure RPG with an intense turn-based combat system, unique characters, and a philosophical story you'll never forget...

Name: Spinodrum
About: Spinodrum is a lightweight 3d drum simulator working on pc which allows users to play drums as a 3d drummer on keyboard with optimum key settings.

Name: Quantum Rail
About: Quantum Rail is a thrilling, fast-paced first-person shooter that takes you on an exciting adventure through a sci-fi-themed wild west world.

Name: Wordabeasts
About: Wordabeasts is a multiplayer party game for 3-8 players that rewards fast-paced wit! Players will receive words on their mobile devices, think of a single clue word that connects them together, and earn points for guessing other player's words!

Name: Quadle
About: Brand new arcade puzzler from Clickteam, Invoking the memory of classic arcade cabinet games but adding a new twist. Jump on the blocks as the titular character Quadle, changing the block colors till they are red. Once red they fall away. Eliminate all blocks on the screen to go to the next level.

Name: FlickSync - Mad Hatter VR
About: Players can take on the role of Alice, the March Hare, or the Mad Hatter in an Alice in Wonderland themed Flicksync experience. **This game requires a microphone to play**

Name: Don't Look Back
About: You've taken what seems like an easy task: find missing keys to unlock doors that will lead you to secrets of the abandoned house. What you don't know is the danger that lurks in the house.

Name: Curatours
About: Museum of Plastic 2121 is the first museum tour available on Curatours! Built 100 years from now in an imagined future where things have worked out well for the planet and for humanity. Visitors uncover the story of plastic - its history, science, industry, and impact on our environment.

Name: 사설탐정 프리즈
About: In 'Private Detective, Freeze,' set in futuristic Korea, you play as Freeze, an amateur detective, solving the murder of Hwang Jong-ha. Explore six rooms, gather clues, and unravel the connections between suspects and victim to uncover the truth.

Name: Yoshitaka Amano VR Museum
About: 'I love Mr.Amano's work!' Now you can watch them closer, marvel at the brush and lively moves! The space is designed to match each area, and more independent fee areas will be released, you can pay and watch what you want. If you haven't paid, you can still watch Mr.Amano's story in the lobby.

Name: Anti-Opoly
About: The property trading board game with a twist! Anti-Opoly is the property trading game that lets players choose free enterprise or monopoly, with different rules for each path.

Name: 蒸汽麻將社
About: 撮合金幣對戰、免費好友開房、外部貨幣與帳本記錄功能、昇段檢定賽，還可蒐集「一色卡」、「四喜卡」、「三刻卡」等十餘種大牌卡，在大牌房中感受做大牌的極限挑戰與緊張氛圍。完整國標麻將規則。

Name: Let Them Breathe: Hello Mother
About: Mrs. Chen is asked to pick up some documents; these documents reside at the University of Tokyo where she used to work. Upon her picking up these documents, she engages with audio recordings and diary entries that tells her what exactly took place in the experimentation room.

Name: Beyond the Marion
About: A 3D First Person walking simulator and puzzle game. You will interact with your alien crewmates and repair your spaceship in order to escape a time loop. Explore space in a ship straight from the 70’s, and meet your companions - brought to life with a funky claymated style!

Name: ConquestAreas
About: 👉 Capture flags to earn points. The first team to reach 300 points wins! (team of 5 players)

Name: Roll For Initiative
About: Roll for Initiative is a virtual translation of modern tabletop gaming, intended to be an introduction to the system for new players and a chance for experienced players to play tabletop games on their own.

Name: Panzer Girls
About: This is a fast-paced shooting game with simple operation. Together with the students of the girls' chariot academy, we forged the last line of defense to stop the monsters attacking like a flood.

Name: Rekindle
About: Rekindle is a Sokoban-like puzzle adventure game. Find your disappearing best friend in a Post-apocalyptic world.

Name: 望文爱生义
About: This is an auditor simulator game. You play as an ordinary auditor of the pen station. Check whether there are sensitive words in the live broadcast barrage. If there are sensitive words, press the space bar immediately to take them down. Omissions and misjudgments will deduct performance.

Name: The Witch's Cauldron Prologue
About: The Witch's Cauldron is a narrative roguelike game about being a medieval witch. Grab your cauldron and get brewing. Love, curses, laughter, wisdom for sale! Do what thou wilt shall be the whole of the Law. At least before the inquisitors come around.

Name: Snow Games VR
About: Snow Games VR is a single-player Virtual Reality snowball fight in a winter wonderland. Make and throw snowballs to hit targets, while under attack from the ever moving enemy snowmen.

Name: Rayadium
About: Rayadium is a 2D Platformer about overcoming weaknesses in which the protagonist, Raya, must save time-traveling miners from a cave after a radioactive explosion occurred from the innermost core of a mysterious new crystal.

Name: Carma
About: Out drive your friends in fast, arcade-style vehicle combat, using power-ups, killstreaks, and the environment to smash your foes! Battle across a miniature world, avoiding dangers and earning the gods favour to level up and unlock a wide range of customisables to help you stand out from the crowd.

Name: Descent of Man
About: Descent of Man is a stealth, survival horror game. Experience fear, a historically inspired narrative, and puzzle solving while hunted by intelligent and nightmarish enemies. Use deception to escape and unravel the dark history of a dystopian world's past and it's horrifying present.

Name: Cage of Etha
About: A story-oriented visual novel set in historical France. Play as Emile, a lonesome boy whose past has caught up with him. Witness as the choices he makes continue on a downward spiral…

Name: Esport Test Toolkit (ETT)
About: Esport Test Toolkit (ETT) is a set of testing tools for competitive gamers. Esport Test Toolkit includes ten different tests that will measure your audiovisual reaction time, memory and cognitive capabilities.

Name: MissPedaling Simulator
About: Destroy the Store Driving the Missile Car

Name: Null Gravity Labyrinth
About: Find and touch the golden cube to exit this abstract labyrinth. When touching a spinning cube all elements with the same color as the cube will disappear and new paths will form. When you touch a portal it will teleport you to the connected portal of the same color.

Name: Chess 'n' Blocks
About: Have you ever considered playing Chess and Tetris simultaneously? Guess what? My strange brain did for years; I don't know why. But I finally took the time to create this game. And that's how chess 'n' blocks was born.

Name: I Have No Nose and I Must Climb
About: Work with your hands to help Wally reach the top of the world to retrieve something dear to them.

Name: Helix
About: HELIX is a single player platform action game. Use your special skill of changing gravity and go on a platform adventure of a lifetime. Go fast as you can by upgrading your character and try not to die by dangerous spikes.

Name: Hoyle Official Casino Games
About: The fun never stops when you choose from over 20 casino games! Pull up a chair and deal yourself into Hoyle Official Casino Games Collection!

Name: Sovranti
About: Sovranti is an entire board game library that you can play from your PC, tablet or phone. Our rules-enforced gameplay helps folks learn games, keeps track of scoring and gives you the feeling of sitting around a table with friends! Discover our growing catalog of competitive, coop and solo games.

Name: Neon Wings: Air Race
