About: Want to race without the constraints of the ground? Then Neon Wings is your game! Neon Wings: Air Race is an adrenaline-filled, fast-paced air racing game with a lot of single and multiplayer fun!

Name: Bitsy
About: Bitsy is a 3D stealth puzzle game where you play as a mechanized spider completing contracts in a futuristic world. Climb walls, leap and web sling around tough obstacles, and above all: avoid detection.

Name: Egg Teacher VR
About: Test your reflexes in varied challenges requiring speed and precision during the classes as an egg lecturer!

Name: Toilet Zone
About: Pilot a flying toilet and avoid hitting the walls and enemies. Can you make it to the end?

Name: PsychShift
About: PsychShift is a unique take on the fast and frenetic First-Person Shooter/Parkour formula. With one core mechanic at its center, the ability to instantaneously swap minds with nearly any enemy you choose. Taking on both their current position and also their characteristics.

Name: Psychoballs
About: A mind-boggling action-puzzler that requires a sharp wit and quick fingers.

Name: Abyssal Shade
About: Abyssal Shade is a deck building roguelike where you dive into a dungeon of the mind. Receives the blessings of your emotions through unique puzzles and expand your deck to protect yourself from the Shades.

Name: Royale King
About: Win and be the royal king only you! Think right and jump at the right time.. Only one can win! Be it you!

Name: Slip 'n Dip
About: Slip 'n Dip is a local multiplayer game where up to 4 penguins fight for survival on rapidly melting ice. Jump and slide around the ice to knock off your opponents before they can knock you off!

Name: Go Outside
About: sometimes you should just turn off your PC and go outside

Name: Wintercearig
About: A bullet hell runner game about trying to find happiness from your friends, family, and most importantly yourself.

Name: Shapeless
About: A short action game set in a medieval castle with NPCs and enemies appearing in the form of different shapes. You must escape imprisonment and find a way out of the castle.

Name: Taxi Copter
About: Take on the role of a Taxi Copter driver. Pick up passengers and drive them to their destination, avoid pigeons, earn money, get stars and unlock more levels. Fight against the gravity, be gentle, it's a helicopter, not a tank! A city full of passengers (and pigeons!) is waiting for you!

Name: Boulders: Puzzle
About: Boulders: Puzzle is a game that challenges your logic and spatial thinking. You take control of a cuboid and must traverse the level in three dimensions to reach the goal cube and use the environment to modify the cuboids length to get past obstacles.

Name: Negative World
About: Jump your way up to the next layer of the sky, and discover what's on the other side of the clouds. Negative World is a 2D puzzle platformer where 'The Wanderer' has a limited amount of jumps due to the less than plentiful amount of oxygen.

Name: Bitdude
About: A VR game commemorating the arcade game everyone knows and loves from the 80's.

Name: Yunoia
About: Iris, a light spirit, tends to the color of her world with a prismatic mask. One day, darkness envelops the skies and it begins to vacuum away the colors of her beloved Eden. Set out on a journey together to restore this world by dispersing the iridescence that can be found within.

Name: For Whom the Stars Shine
About: 'Some stories are best told to none,' she whispered. Long ago, the stars disappeared. Then, a man returned them. Few would believe such a thing; fewer still can recall how he bent heaven's ear. However, you won't find the tale in books or archives—only in the hearts of those who were there.

Name: Cortex
About: The psychedelic tunnel-runner.

Name: Ankora: Lost Days - Prologue
About: The opening act of Ankora: Lost Days. Discover the beginning of this adventure and explore freely around this mysterious world full of promise and danger. Craft different tools, build structures and terraform yourself a new home in the opening act of this cute-as-heck survival game.

Name: The Cat and the Box
About: Built on no engine or external libraries, this game takes you through a 3D adventure rendered in a plain text window.

Name: Tribloos
About: Available on Steam for the first time - and for FREE! Originally released in 2011, The Tribloos was the first game in the series.

Name: Human Diaspora
About: Human Diaspora is a Retro First-Person Shooter where you fight your way to save the remnants of your family and find what is happening on the post-human colony planet. Take action against small and big enemies. Are you up to the challenge and save humanity?

Name: The Beautiful Island
About: A short visual novel about war, peace and hope. Explore a city after a devastating war. Talk to people, try to understand, try to help. The heroes of war are dead, but you can be a hero of peace!

Name: Project Z: The beginning of the end. Chapter I
About: Tower & Defense game, with TopDown view set in a post apocalyptic world of zombies

Name: Twisted Sails
About: Pick a team. Pick a ship. Compete against your friends on the high seas in Twisted Sails!

Name: Gunk
About: Gunk is a 2D Platformer inspired by games and it is quite possibly the best game ever made. From the creators of absolutely nothing comes 2019s biggest hit! In this game you play as a snail in a French restaurant.

Name: Journey to the Centre of the Cell
About: The Journey to the Centre of the cell takes users on a journey to the microscopic world. Explore the surface and interior of a cancer cell, exploring and learning about cellular anatomy and processes.

Name: Warriors Of Titus - F2P
About: Warriors of Titus is a first-person MOBA (Mutliplayer Online Battle Arena)for VR. Finally you can be immersed in a MOBA as you battle to reclaim Titus.

Name: Tilebreaker
About: Destroy blocks through 20 levels and 5 unique bosses with different mechanics. Do it in the best possible time!

Name: Astroe
About: Multiplayer player 2D space battle. Collect gold, team up and take over the other team's satellites.

Name: Gravity Dash
About: Embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey through the neon-lit streets of a cyberpunk city in Gravity Dash, a 2D infinite runner that will test your reflexes and strategic skills. Immerse yourself in the retro atmosphere, accompanied by a pulsating synthwave soundtrack that sets the tone.

Name: Night Of The Living Dead VR
About: NOTD VR is an exploratory experience that captures the original spirit of the film in black and white, immersing users in a 3D recreation of the film’s farmhouse set. Exclusive interviews with film experts and original cast and crew enrich the experience with insights into the horror classic.

Name: Attack of the alien thingies from lava!
About: Try to survive the increasing waves of alien thingies! Unlock and upgrade guns, pickup power-ups, get Steam achievements. Have fun with this brainless shooter game!

Name: Coffee Brakes
About: Battle your friends in an office chair joust to the death! Only one of you can be employee of the month, so battle your friends in a variety of game modes and levels. Get on your office chairs and take your Coffee Brake! Coffee Brakes is a 3rd year project developed at Media Design School

Name: Sue's Story
About: Sue's Story is the 'free to play' version of TerrorPhage, a classic sci-fi horror game in the spirit and tradition of a classic space alien thriller. Awakening on a cryo ship hurtling towards a star, you are thrust into a game of hide and seek to fix the ship, and dock at an orbital platform.

Name: Szybowcowa '87
About: Travel back in time to the 1980s and explore a secret printing house of Fighting Solidarity nestled within a residential block on Szybowcowa Street in Wrocław's Gądów district. Immerse yourself in virtual reality and feel the pulse of the underground movement during that tumultuous period.

Name: Sacrifices
About: Faith and blood! In this god-game-meets-city-builder, rule and guide a mesoamerican village through the trials and tribulations of everyday life in the heart of a ruthless jungle!

Name: Under Pressure
About: Flee or hunt? It’s up to you! Under Pressure is an asymmetric card game! To win you will need to strategize and guess.

Name: Take Care (of me)
About: My name is Lorena. I don’t know where I am or how I got here. I just woke up in a bathroom, locked in, but I will escape this place and figure out what’s happening.

Name: 开局抽取超级天赋
About: 概览： 设计

Name: Coffee For Robots
About: An atmospheric café simulation game. Run a small, peaceful café serving coffee to the robot denizens of the world.

Name: Build & Battle
About: Build&Battle is a turn-based tower defense with classic rts base building elements. Build your maze of towers, lay out your plan of attack and execute it with the next turn.

Name: I'm the Koala
About: In this extremely challenging 2D platformer, you'll be faced with many obstacles and enemies that need to be avoided in order to pass 10 different stages. But be warned, you only get a set amount of lives. If you run out of lives, you start at the beginning.

Name: Void of Heroes
About: Mech battle royale and team deathmatch! New type of battle royale mode, built around a vertically rising death zone, instead of the common constricting circle!

Name: Scare Girl
About: A Scary game In The Forest And Your Trying To Collect 10 Treasure Chest To Open A Door

Name: My little sister: Prologue
About: 😒😐🤨😉🥰😨😈 The girl of my dreams

Name: GOT Simulator
About: Hatsune Miku invades the earth in this action game. You can grow your hair and destroy the buildings and more...

Name: Dynasty
About: Dynasty is a singleplayer social deduction roguelike in which you must rule your kingdom through your untrustworthy advisors. Earn your advisors loyalty and grant them the power to administrate, but beware: the more power you grant them, the more they may use that power against you.

Name: モデルDEファイト(Model DE Fight)
About: 'Model DE Fight' (MDF) is a classic 2D fighting game. You can play online-fighting with using informal tool. MDF is a game made for beginners.

Name: Knightmares
About: Face yourself in an epic tale of honor, courage and fusions. Knightmares will make you see fantasy from... A different point of view.

Name: Loveland's Leap
About: Leap into the forest in this 2d puzzle platformer! Swing through the woods, find flies, and solve simple brain teasers. Let the trees envelope you as the water colored backgrounds and kalimba themed music create an unforgettable story book like atmosphere.

Name: Year 500
About: Year 500 is a third-person, hack-n-slash adventure game featuring swordplay, magic casting, and an engaging story set in a fantasy world. Reclaim your memory, oppose and defeat evil, and save the kingdom by any means necessary.

Name: Solenars Edge II: Champions
About: Create your character, pick your ally and assemble a powerful team of over 70 champions. Fight your way through the VR Arena and become the greatest champion of the entire universe.

Name: GEO-DEUX
About: Do not forget your cosmic origins! Travel the universe to find Jesus and save Christmas once and for all.

Name: There was something in that room
About: Move through the rooms of the lab in this short but replayable horror game. Debug the computers in each room, watch out for errors, and fix sabotages. Make sure you always know where you are... and where other things are.

Name: Pineapple Panic!
About: Have your games become bland and fruitless? Help Pina, the terrified pineapple, to dodge and leap over obstacles so that he can outwit the dastardly Chef Joe Colada in this rear-facing endless runner. Can you outpace his culinary madness, or will you end up in a fruity predicament?

Name: MiniBob
About: MiniBob is a 2D side view puzzle game, focused on exploring the enviroment, and getting to know the characters. Almost every object has something to tell, some times nothing important, but other times…

Name: LaughterLost
About: LaughterLost takes you through a surreal journey of work and family life. Face psychological twists, narrative choices, puzzles, and unexpected unique confrontations! Will you break this dystopian cycle of everyday life?

Name: Lifting Unlimited
About: Lifting Unlimited is a fun, fast-paced, strategic lifting game. Train in the Bench Press, Squat, and Deadlift to increase your total through difficult progression. Compete in state, national, and international competitions to set Earth-shattering Records! Start your weightlifting journey today!

Name: Downstairs
About: Developed and published by Levienze Games, this game is a short story based horror and thriller game.

Name: The Last Stand
About: The Last Stand is a 3D first person survival shooter game made in Unreal Engine. The player's objective is to acquire artifacts while defeating robots who have invaded earth to prevent the end of the world. The game features 5 unique levels created by the crew at nonPareil.

Name: Investigation Stories : gunsound
About: The peace of the town is shattered by a gunshot, and behind this spate of bloodshed is --?

Name: Tail Trail
About: Follow the story of a Private investigator hired to find a missing person on a mysterious island.

Name: Tomb of The Lost Sentry
About: A 2D Puzzle/Platformer about escaping a cult. Pay close attention to your surroundings to spot deadly traps and solve puzzles. Face the Higher Ups to get their keys, and open new areas of the stronghold, all in the hopes of finding an exit.

Name: NokNok
About: NokNok is a unique cross-platform open world idle game with elements of self-governance. As a player, you're tasked with earning coins and treasure chests through idle mechanics, which in turn allow you to unlock and upgrade a variety of rare hammers.

Name: Destiny Duel
About: Simple to learn, impossible to master. Destiny Duel is a battle of the mind: in order to win, you must predict your opponent's every move. Attack, Guard, Recover, or Dodge. The choice is yours, and every choice matters.

Name: Primal Slideee
About: Does this game seem easy and simple to you? It will require both your skill and luck.

Name: Retention: A Love Story
About: A short puzzle game with a big story to tell. Dive in to reveal the mysteries of Amy's past.

Name: Biodigital
About: Experience the singularity in this fictional story set in the year 2117. Biodigital tells the story of how humans decided to download their minds into machines.

Name: Achtung die Kugel!
About: A local multiplayer game with skill and tactics! Score by being the last player to crash in each round. Achtung die Kugel is a re-imagination of the classic game 'Achtung die Kurve'.

Name: Super Retro Rec League Racing
About: Race against the clock in Super Retro Rec League Racing! Perfect your lines, optimize every turn, time your pits, and push yourself to absolute mastery.

Name: THE GAP
About: An abstract interactive experience about a Gap

Name: Scare Girl 2
About: A game at a haunted house and you're trying to collect 10 radio to open an escape door from a killer.

Name: TCSTRIKERS1
About: The first game in the TCSTRIKERS series. The simple controls make it fun for everyone.

Name: TeeDee
About: A minimalist 2D tower defense game with 3 towers, 6 maps, and 4 monster types. Simple, fun, and perfect for quick strategy sessions!

Name: The Throne of Bernicia
About: A classic fantasy role-playing game, telling the tale of the kingdom of Bernicia falling into chaos as the forces of darkness encroach on every front. Answer Queen Amelia's call for help as a brave adventurer seeking fame and fortune in a troubled land.

Name: 心霊旅館
About: 「心霊旅館」は廃旅館から脱出する3Dホラーゲーム。 謎を解き、恐怖を乗り越え脱出を目指しましょう！

Name: Riftcast
About: A cyber companion for your desktop inspired by LCD virtual pets of old. Collect, train and fight all sorts of Reverians as you take on daring ventures, fun mini-games and fierce battles.

Name: Dichotomy
About: Im Jahr 2234 kämpfen die 13-jährige Victorique und ihre beste Freundin Zoé im überwachten Frankreich gegen die Human Rescue Organisation. Trotz ihrer durch Schizophrenie verzerrten Wahrnehmung verfolgen die beiden Hackerinnen entschlossen ihren Plan, die Menschheit zu befreien.

Name: Law Mower
About: Law Mower is a game about one man's journey to achieve his life's purpose - to cut every blade of grass in the world.

Name: Dato of Srivijaya
About: Dato of Srivijaya is Historical RTS about rise of Srivijaya Empire in 7th century from unknown power in South Sumatra’s river to strong maritime power in Asia for almost 3.5 centuries! Explore Southeast Asia in 7th-10th century and build the strong empire!

Name: Galactic Center VR
About: Explore the center of the Milky Way like never before!

Name: Invention 7
About: The game combines a first-person shooter with easy puzzles, as well as a scrolling shooter mode, where the player will have to fly a space plane.

Name: Spartan Commander Realtime
About: You hold the fate of Sparta in your hands. Stand as a humble Hoplite and earn your way through the ranks as you become King of Sparta and all of Greece. Change the fate of History as you fight against Xerxes oncoming hordes and fight to win the day!

Name: MechaLeague
About: High speed online multiplayer cross platform VR game. Immersive movement mechanics with arm swing and grapple hooks. Multiple revolving games modes and regular updates with more content.

Name: Friends of little Yus
About: Friends of little Yus is a speedrunning game, race to the flag as fast as possible to reach the top. New rounds start every 14 days resetting the leaderboard meaning fresh chances for everyone!

Name: Spectral Ascension
About: Spectral Ascension is a fast paced battle royale taking place in the spirit realm. Take part in 4 short rounds of non-stop brawling. Gain points through eliminating your foes and be the last one standing. Use those points to upgrade your abilities and further your rampage.

Name: Oedoshigusa
About: You are a kunoichi who sneaked into Oedojou. If you think it's not Japan, turn back. If you think it's Japan, don't turn back. Escape from patrolling soldiers.

Name: Gemstones
About: Casual Arcade-Puzzle game, where you move gems around to pair them together! Relax and get the highest score possible, earning cosmetics along the way.

Name: Orbit Puzzle
About: An astronomical puzzle game about discovering the rotational speeds and radii of epicycles.

Name: Dire Wolf Game Room
About: Collect your favorite tabletop and digital Dire Wolf board games in one convenient virtual place!

Name: Conquest!
About: A cross-platform multiplayer real-time strategy fantasy war game set in the Middle Ages. No ads, no P2W, 100% free since 1993. Also available for iOS, Android, and Mac platforms.

Name: Gunslinger Valley
About: Gunslinger Valley is a classical style fast paced arcade multiplayer shooter with western theme and modern weapons. It has multiple maps, many gamemodes and lots of weapons to choose from.

Name: Super Paul World
About: Experience a great adventure in 'Super Paul World' where you defeat many enemies while trying to retrieve the Cookie Nexus Core for Baker Tim. Earn experience points (EXP) to acquire various cosmetic items.

Name: Klondike's Hike: A Solitaire Roguelike
About: Klondike, a gold-panning otter, had a vision of golden shores up in the mountains. Help her reach this mythical place in this solitaire-based roguelike! Use items to modify your cards, bend the rules, and power through the many traps in your way.

Name: PvPillman
About: A topdown and 3rd person game for ideally 5 players.

Name: JUST DEFENSE
About: 'Just Defense' is a simple Topdown view defense game.Upgrade your weapons, build turrets and kill enemies.

Name: Whispers of Ancient Stone
About: Position blocks and solve ciphers to reveal the story of an ancient ruin in this puzzle vignette.

Name: ZOMBIE ARENA SURVIVAL
About: Survive in an arena where more and more zombies appear and try to kill you. Kill as many zombies as possible before they kill you.

Name: Church Art Of Sweden
About: A museum presentation of church artefacts and full size scanned medieval Churches.

Name: Pandamonium
About: Pandamonium is a single-player psychological horror game. You have been taken. The only way out is through three eerie mazes where roaming panda-suited strangers are on the hunt. Escape them, or become them.

Name: May's Journey
About: May’s Journey is a 2.5D puzzle game where players use pseudo code to solve environmental mazes and learn programming basics, guiding protagonist May to restore balance in a fractured, fictional world.

Name: Everlife
About: Everlife is a fast-paced maze game where you use mystical abilities to collect stars from several unique environments and escape them without being killed.

Name: Chapters 1-3 Little Kingdoms
About: Little Kingdoms: Chapters 1-3 is a prologue to Little Kingdoms, a medieval RTS point-and-click game with stylistic low-poly graphics and relaxing music. Outmaneuver other lords and ladies and conquer their land!

Name: Global Soccer: A Management Game 2018
About: In Global Soccer: A Management Game 2018 there are no restrictions, the whole world becomes playable! The 210 playable nations and the 4000+ playable clubs guarantees truly infinite hours to play.

Name: Quintaesencia
About: Quintaesencia: An open world of fantasy and magic

Name: The Warrior's Path
About: The Warrior’s Path is a singleplayer RPG, focused on your decisions in many different events. Those decisions can have longterm effects on other events. Prepare your character for hard fights with different crafting skills. How long can you walk on the warriors path? What's your story?

Name: SHADOWBOX: Mausoleum of Natural History
About: Experience the story of life on Earth like never before with SHADOWBOX: Mausoleum of Natural History, a virtual, interactive, and free-to-play museum featuring 3D scans of real fossils.

Name: Grandpa: Bread Adventure
About: Who said that old age is no fun? Grandpa: Bread Adventure is a crazy reimagining of the runner genre. Run around the city, overcoming obstacles, dodging hated scooter riders and geese.

Name: NOWV
About: This game is inspired by Ningning, a member of the South Korean idol group aespa. It conveys the message that even one's flaws can become strengths through inner growth.

Name: 欢乐消消乐
About: Fun games are suitable for players of all ages, and moderate play can enhance our sense of pleasure and relieve our physical and mental stress. Now join us to get the game props easily, and there are plenty of time-limited rewards for you to receive every day. What are you waiting for?

Name: Winged Raider
About: Save the Kingdom of Daanco from the curse of Turkzu in Winged Raider! Unlock the story by progressing in this goofy roguelike 2D shooter. Fly around the Winged Castle, find new weapons, unlock abilities with colored wings, kill your enemies, and DIE?! Try not to die.

Name: Chronicles of Lurra
About: The Chronicles of Lurra is a free to play RPG set in the fictional world of Lurra. You follow Trent, the main character as he is dragged from his home through time and space to the world of Lurra.

Name: Survive It: Frozen
About: Can you lead four different survivors despite threats in a hostile winter area? Join the strategic multiplayer challenge! Survive It: Frozen is a small indie game that comes with a new and unique gameplay concept combining survival and real time strategy.

Name: Golden Egg
About: A young knight is looking for a golden egg in a magic world. But countless dangers are lurking. 3D Jump and Run

Name: Bee-Man
About: Our Bee-Man's hives are scattered all over the place. Help it collect all of the hives in each level and travel to the next level in the bubble!

Name: Sporty Peppers
About: Play to move!

Name: Beyond Minimalism
About: This small experimental first person minimalistic style game gives one and only quest for you. Walking around rooms of strange labyrinth look for clues to reach nature.

Name: Hallowed Pumpkins
About: Hallowed Pumpkins is a simple survival light-horror with shooting and hiding mechanics. For the best experience this game is recommended to be played in multiplayer mode with your friends to fight with or against each other.

Name: Street Sweeper
About: Clean up the streets like they were meant to be swept. Midnight or dusk, in big cities and isolated boroughs, the Street Sweeper vacuums on. It's you versus yesterday's filth - and the clock! - in this single-player procedurally generated arcade experience.

Name: Angels of Amsterdam
About: Angels of Amsterdam; a truthful recreation of a 17th century Amsterdam-café, where you share key episodes in the lives of Maritgen Jans, Juliana, Elsje Christiaens and Pussy Sweet: four fierce angels who were not getting their fair share of the Golden Age’s gold and took destiny in their own hands.

Name: World War: Rome - Free Strategy Game
About: A turn-based strategy war chess game. You will play a commander in the Roman period, and command the generals and troops to complete the specified mission objectives and occupy important strongholds in the level. Rome, Samnite, Epirus, Carthage. Different choices will open different histories!

Name: Δ Time
About: Δ Time (Delta Time) is a third person game which takes place in space in a lit artsy pixelated style. Time moves only when you move, so prepare yourself for a thrilling slow motion experience. Take your time and fight in style! :)

Name: Hexen Hegemony
About: Hexen Hegemony is a TPS (Third Person Shooter) game that makes it possible to fight against other witches with hundreds of different magic combinations. Enjoy team strategy, competition and spoils in 4 vs 4 matches. Remember, winners takes everything on the world of hexen.

Name: Magic Puzzle King 2: Rolling Cat
About: In this free 2D puzzle game, piece together the items your feline friends have knocked off and shattered.

Name: 陌界·终末序曲
About: A role-playing game with multiple endings. Throughout the ten years of life from childhood to adolescence, the protagonist will experience encounters, sacrifices, choices and separation. Also: This game does not support English, please understand.

Name: Operation Space Force
About: Join Operation Space Force, a free-to-play team-based shooter that takes place in space. Explore weapon customization and different heroes, your base, fight against enemies, and experience different game modes.

Name: 牌师
About: 打牌，抓怪，强化，轻松娱乐爬塔探索

Name: The Lost Son
About: The Lost Son is a short but challenging indie puzzle platformer game tease. Have your wits about you and use both characters to decode the cyber ruins and find your lost son!

Name: Electoral Dynasty
About: A political-simulation watch-the-clock strategy game. Pass laws, executive orders, and deal with events, all while maintaining the balance of your nation's most important attributes. Will you manage to keep your coalition together or establish a dictatorship? Only you can decide, Prime Minister.

Name: Sands of Slumber: The RPG
About: Taking place in a highly magical and steampunk-esque world on the verge of all-out war. This follows four heroes as they join up in the 'Unnamed Guild' to complete tasks for the High King which will put all of their skills, loyalties, and abilities to the test.

Name: Dash Dash Run!
About: Dash Dash Run! The frantic VR arcade runner that has you pumping those arms, performing to the crowd, and racing at crazy speeds across a wild selection of vibrant courses.

Name: Forest Of Perdition
About: 'Forest of Perdition' is a horror and mystery game that plunges players into a tranquil park, progressively transformed by supernatural events. Each step forward is a step closer to the terrifying truth that awaits at the heart of this haunted forest.

Name: A100
About: This is a collection of five mini-games. Include： Weather Invader、 Stronghold Attack、 Guard Tank 、Heavy Artillery、 Space Miner

Name: Off Air
About: Jump, slide, and smash your way through an arena of blood thirsty robots in Off Air. A first person shooter where there are only two rule: Survive and Smile for the camera. Use your wits and speed and dodge around waves of enemies in an ever devolving world of chaos and lead.

Name: Throw The Ball In the Hole
About: Just how accurate are you? In this VR-game you literally have to throw the ball in the hole, that's it! You'll soon find out it's much easier said than done. With 15 unique puzzles, each one offering a different challenge. You will have to combine precision, speed, and a little creativity to even complete this game.

Name: Crabity
About: Embark on a cosmic adventure as a duo of two robot crabs stranded in the vastness of space. See the world from a different angle and utilize the power of gravity to escape the space station and return back to Earth!

Name: NanoWar: Cells VS Virus
About: Fight against the viruses and cure the entire body! A fast-paced real-time strategy game of cell conquest. Lot of players already got the bug... ready to defend your cells?

Name: Happy's Clocks
About: Run around an enormous mysterious house that once belonged to your dad, while running away from terrifying monsters and solving interesting puzzles. Discover what happened or maybe what was supposed to happen when you left.

Name: Shadows and Dust
About: 'In that sleep of death what dreams may come.' Shadows and Dust is a short ghost story about regret. Real horror. Anxiety and depression. Suicide. Choices that can't be taken back.

Name: Late'O'Clock
About: Late’O’Clock is an isometric stealth game in which you play as an office employee who is always late to work and must sneak to their desk. During the game players are able to bribe, distract, or deactivate enemies to avoid being detected. Every new day will bring many obstacles for the player to experience.

Name: Station 21 - Space Station Simulator
About: Build, Earn and Survive that's the aim of Station 21. Start from nothing and work your way to building a massive scale space station with crew to run it. Manage your station by keeping your crew fit and healthy, adding new modules and managing your incoming and outgoings. The possibilities are endless.

Name: 公主的逃脱日常
About: 你变成了一个公主，而且还是要被魔王抓走的公主！你要做的就是用你可怜的弱小技能把他们推开不让他们伤害到你，如果失败，那你就得等到你的“白马王子”来救你了……

Name: Set Sail
About: Set Sail is a western visual novel set in the modern day where the Golden Age of Pirating never properly ended. You get to meet characters interested in the world of piracy and choose how your days on the main land go.

Name: Glitchy Apocalypse Simulator
About: DISCLAIMER: Made by one dev and his kid. Uses lots of assets. Glitchy Apocalypse Simulator is a comical physics-based game. The game is a light-hearted, comical sandbox and makes no attempts at realism or strategy.

Name: Guilded
About: Guilded is a procedurally-generated guild management game. Complete quests, make gold, and lead your adventurers as they battle their biggest threat yet - interpersonal conflict!

Name: Roce's Journey
About: Roce's Journey is a game based on the Sokoban, with 20 different puzzles and 100 levels. Players need to understand the characteristics of each mechanism and interact to solve the puzzle.

Name: Primordium - Day Zero
About: Fight for survival in a sci-fi RPG! Take control of the Nexus' Commander and gather companions to grow your team, build bases using a vast array of AAA quality models, and customize your arsenal using countless combinations of modular attachments, items, armor, and weapons!

Name: Lunar Odyssey
About: Don your xEMU Spacesuit, explore the Orontius Crater, and Lunar Module in an immersive first-person VR experience with out of this world accuracy and interaction. Follow real-life procedures, launch the Apollo-era Lunar Module, play Space Golf, and experience the moon like never before.

Name: Adagio
About: A short VR experience, Adagio places the viewer in a dreamy, Celtic landscape in the brief moment of darkness right before dawn. Are they alone or accompanied? Some say that as dawn breaks, you can witness ghosts tasting the morning dew.

Name: The Doll Beneath
About: Awakened from a deep slumber, six students find themselves trapped inside an abandoned research facility, otherwise known as the 'Losinglight'. Escape into a war torn city, and discover the truth behind an otherworldly being like no other.

Name: Echo
About: 'Echo' is a puzzle/horror adventure game. Exploring the darkness, find your password and escape

Name: Project Nihilum - Zero
About: Project Nihilum Zero is a narrative-driven Visual Novel. Discover the twisted story from different points of views and make your own choices. Discover 1 or 3 abilities: Mind Glimpse, Shape Shift and Hybrid. Use your ability wisely to see the past, influence the present and shape the future.

Name: Lantern of Worlds
About: Lantern of Worlds is a game of storytelling and adventure based on European and Arabian mythology and fairytales.It is inspired by older games like the Quest for Glory series, Eye of the Beholder and Lands of Lore.

Name: Hoverboards VR
About: Hoverboards VR is a light-cycle-like game of 3D snake in VR! Hoverboards VR uses a unique locomotion technique that translates a player's movements within their play-space into movement of the board itself, mimicking the natural feel of surfing or snowboarding.

Name: コモラ・リアルワールドエスケープ
About: Vtuber「オシャレになりたい！ピーナッツくん」のキャラクター達が繰り広げる ACTRTSゲーム

Name: Awake
About: Awake is an isometric puzzle game about a young girl named Aya who is suffering from insomnia. Aya must navigate various obstacles in her path as she moves between different planes of consciousness. Join Aya on her journey to explore the depths of her dreamscape and uncover the root of her anxiety.

Name: 在捷南逃
About: 在捷南逃是一款2D橫向卷軸、角色扮演、探索的小品遊戲，以台灣捷運與生活事件作為靈感製作。你將在這趟短暫的旅程中遇見形形色色的人事物與由不同小遊戲組成的關卡，嘗試回到日常生活中...*Now the game is only available in Traditional Chinese

Name: Warspace
About: Warspace is a arcade space shooter game.

Name: Homemade TCG
About: Yugi-inspired card game -roguelike with an extra deck. Enemies use the same cards / rules as you. Reduce opponent's life from 20 to 0; by playing cards and attacking. Pick cards of 3-choices after each win. Currently 120 unique cards, 5 floors, and the final boss.

Name: Retro Karting 22

About: Thousands of years ago the mighty Sage fought with the people of the kingdom against the Demon King's army and sealed it away. Thousands of years later you will play as the Sage's heir and face off again with the Demon King who was sealed thousands of years ago.

Name: Mind Trap
About: Why do people lie? Try to find a way out of mind labyrinths!

Name: Spectralia
About: Spectralia is a free to play clicker game with collectible items. Get one every hour or by daily entering the game. Items can be deleted, traded or exchanged. Some items can be obtained through opening of a container.

Name: Vysions
About: Welcome to Vysions, a world made of dreams, where puzzles are truth and you must bring meaning to their madness.

Name: Tales of Novariel
About: Explore Novariel, a procedural generated land filled with various slimes. Fight your way through and gain rewards fitting your achievements.

Name: Died Of Fear
About: “Words have no power to impress the mind without the exquisite horror of their reality” Edgar Allan Poe

Name: Dafen Oil Painting Village: An Immersive Reality
About: Dafen Oil Painting Village: An Immersive Reality is a virtual reality experience about global creation, emerging technologies, and the future of media.

Name: Bungo's Bungite Collector
About: Collect all of the rarest Bungites and level them up so you can show them off to your friends! Gather Bungcoin to get rarer Bungites, debate them, and watch their stats grow to infinity!

Name: The Exaggerated Epoch of Edward O'Hare
About: The Exaggerated Epoch of Edward O'Hare is an action-adventure story game set in an imaginary toy world! Players will traverse the toy-filled landscape and story while combating enemies along the way. TEEEO takes players on an odyssey that will usher nostalgia and excitement for all!

Name: Block Dodge Challenge
About: Addictive arcade game

Name: ForRest Paper Doll
About: This is a dress up mini game made for all ForRest creatures! Thanks for all your supports ₍˄·͈༝·͈˄*₎◞ ̑̑

Name: JungleKnight
About: This is a casual puzzle game, there will be small monsters on the road, the knight in order to get food need to avoid these monsters in order to get food forward!

Name: Stickman and the sword of legends
About: Stickman needs to get the Sword of Legends to be able to leave his planet that is about to explode.

Name: Spring Dogs : Ultimate Multiplayer Battle Royale
About: Step into the frenetic universe of Spring Dogs and strive to emerge victorious in this locally focused multiplayer battle royale. Customize your character and challenge up to 17 AI-controlled competitors, 8 human players in split-screen, or 16 in team mode.

Name: Vectrix
About: Vectrix is a rhythmic, techno, top-down shoot 'em up with a synthwave soundtrack and a grid of enemies based on John Conway's 'Game of Life' cellular automaton!

Name: Dark Throne
About: Awaken as a knight in this 2D Metroidvania platformer. Explore, unlock abilities, and battle foes to escape a treacherous dungeon.

Name: ZomBay
About: ZomBay is a zombie shoot'em up game. Survive waves of endless zombies and gain exp to get the best guns!

Name: Brytag Studio
About: You are a filmmaker with big ideas and a small budget. With Brytag STUDIO, your story is the game. The free-to-play app gives you the power to bring your big idea to the screen.

Name: Stan
About: Obsessive fans are common for artists, but this one is different. He's found his way to the home of J.W. Eel slug, a piano player who just got a deadline from a record label, and is determined to get inside.

Name: Newton
About: Newton is a solo 2D pixel art Arcade-platformer. In this historical retro-fantasy game, you will collect apples, master gravity and set high score in this simple but challenging adventure!

Name: Pray And Spray
About: Pray And Spray is an online first-person action shooter. Grab a gun and defend yourself from the opposing team.

Name: Wall Force
About: Wall Force is a multiplayer sidescroller shooter that combines sidescroller shooting with vehicles and a destructible environment on a single battlefield. It provides a fun gunplay experience along with extensive weapon customization and building fortification.

Name: Splat!
About: Race your way your down a series of increasingly difficult levels avoiding obstacles and trying to reach the end without going Splat!

Name: CHUTNEY: Space Survivor
About: CHUTNEY: Space Survivor is a third person, hoard-shooting deck builder where you play as Chutney, shooting down hordes of enemies with his Omni-gun. Alter your attacks by collecting different cartridges and create unique synergies!

Name: Battle Squares
About: Channel your 4 corners and start aiming! Battle squares is an online 8 directional 2D Shooter. Pick your weapons, colored identity and embody the 4 corners! Tumble, Bounce, Recoil and FIGHT!

Name: Donut Adventure
About: A kids friendly platform game. Collect coins and jump to the destination.

Name: Royal Duality
About: Royal Duality is an immersive dark fantasy visual novel with 15 endings, various side stories and hidden Easter Eggs all set in an engaging lore-rich world

Name: Oopz-Oofs
About: A quirky, playful dog sim where you body-swap with a dog. Waking up from a sweet dream, John finds himself in his dog's body! Sniff, bark, beg, and use paw to interact with the townfolks. Can John find a way to return to his human form, or will this unexpected adventure change them forever?

Name: Requiem
About: Requiem stars Isaiah, as he relives his memories and must defeat the demons that inhabit himself. Delving through surreal realms pocketed throughout the cathedral, Isaiah must confront his deadly sins by warding them off in unique worlds and boss battles.

Name: The Cerberus Project: Horde Arena FPS
About: Most FPSes nowadays are just mindless clicker games with guns. The Cerberus Project rejects all of the dumbing down of the last 15 years, and instead builds on the greatest FPS games with unique features such as analog sword movement, original weapons, and new types of enemies. Free demo.

Name: Sorcerers Summit
About: An army of contraptions swarm the skies, and it is up to you, a lone sorcerer to defend the castle wall. LET NONE PASS! Move quickly, dash quicker, and bam, boom, blast them out of the skies with your magic. See how long you can last in this simple and stylish score attack game.

Name: Interactive Empathy
About: Two small experimental games made as part of a one-week game workshop in Zagreb, Croatia, as part of a project called 'Interactive Empathy - Citizenship & Storytelling in Video Games'. Inside is also a documentary video about the workshop, as well as a booklet about the whole project.

Name: Audio Party Pack
About: A party game designed around sound. Includes 3 mini-games featuring 'sound' focused gameplay!This party game is designed with visual impairments in mind as it relies strongly on sound. There are three mini-games, each focusing on a different challenge.

Name: Demonophobia Company
About: 'Angel of glory, Gloria' joined the 'Demonophobia Company' with disguising herself as 'Demon of vanity, Burbary.' Could Burbary finish her mission and go back to her home?

Name: New Century Galaxy Legend
About: New century Galaxy legend is a free to play barrage game where you avoid barrages from all directions and survive as long as possible. Players who have survived for a long time can gain higher ranking, so try your best to overcome this challenge and keep breaking records!

Name: Eye of the Beholder
About: Step into war-torn enemy territory in this immersive VR game experience based on the Oscar-shortlisted documentary MY ENEMY, MY BROTHER (2015). EYE OF THE BEHOLDER is a 20 minute beta experience that subverts the war-game genre as players must choose to combat or collaborate with others.

Name: SENTINEL
About: Explore, fight, and grow stronger as you progress through this 2D Metroidvania-style platformer. Can you uncover the secrets that hide on our moon?

Name: Toewr le Fence [DISCONTINUED]
About: meme and reference filled tower defense game (real) (also discontinued)

Name: Lanesplitterz
About: Lanesplitterz is a 3D arcade-style bowling game. Join Hiro as he competes in a brutal bowling tournament to become King of Neo Las Vegas!

Name: Pasajeros
About: Pasajeros is developed through a collection of urban and surreal stories collected in a taxi in Bogotá . It’s a four-night adventure packed with micro-stories of vampires, mariachis, and thugs. In addition to the opportunity to find love or madness in the night magic of a city.

Name: しんせいかつ
About: 何気ない日常、あなたは最後に気づくでしょう。

Name: Pixel Dungeon RPG
About: Welcome to Pixel Dungeon RPG, where every adventure is unique and thrilling! Dive into procedurally generated dungeons filled with hidden treasures, cunning traps, and fierce monsters.

Name: WhiteTrick
About: WhiteTrick is a turn-based multiplayer board game that pits police officers against second-hand dealer fraudsters. White evades the police and commits additional crimes. And the police deployed to prevent his further crimes investigate, find clues, guess his route, and apprehend White!

Name: Goblin Gladiators
About: Live fast, die ridiculously! The big brawl has begun, and you are invited to unleash chaos in the most thrilling battle arena ever seen through the eyes of goblins. Will your pack of cunning goblin fighters rise to the top and claim victory in this heart-pounding spectacle?

Name: Poker Train
About: Poker Train is a VIDEO POKER game where you play scoring hands to keep the wheels turning. Use your best combinations to build steam and run the train as far as you can. Complete quests and find all the secrets the railroad has to offer!

Name: FierceWind Decay
About: Endless guidance, endless reincarnation

Name: Pet Crossing
About: A cruiser came to a blue planet and found a planet with many ice-blocked caves, which contained frozen animals that were sent in before the catastrophe. Only paired animals could survive after thawing. The expedition team needs your wisdom to help match these animals and restore life to the planet.

Name: Kimi sae Ireba
About: Hundreds of years later, humans and Heflites coexist on a hidden planet near Earth. Finding a mate is the goal, but will something like that really help her break free from the deep darkness she experienced as a child? '...This feeling...is not an obsession...'

Name: AI Solitaire
About: AI Solitaire features Klondike Solitaire and Pyramid Solitaire, 18 different deck styles, and has password protected parental controls. The base game is offered for free and can be played as is without any cost forever.

Name: Hyperland
About: Pick up, fire and dodge the bombs! An action-packed multiplayer casual shooter with basic moves but still easy to play.

Name: Desolate Shores
About: Desolate Shores is a single player shooter game based in a Mars of the future. You have landed on one of the new islands that dot the land. Find your superior office and follow instructions to collect what you need and escape

Name: COVID 23 : Test Labs
About: Infiltrate hazardous facilities, plant explosives, gather vital evidence, and save survivors while battling against nightmarish mutations. Brace yourself for an intense and action-packed mission to overcome the unexpected horrors that await.

Name: Steel Century Groove: Midnight
About: Pilot mecha in rhythm-RPG dance battles in this free standalone adventure from the world of Steel Century Groove. Assemble a squad of colossal dancers, challenge every rival you lock eyes with, and groove your way through a neon city where it's always night.

Name: Fandominion
About: Battle it out as your chosen champion to prove who has the best fandom! 2-4 players can fight across multiple venues in this brawler party game. Attack other champions, avoid stage hazards, and win minigames! Decide which nerd will come out on top and which fandom is superior in Fandominion!

Name: MiniTrans
About: MiniTrans is a city building and traffic simulation game. Players independently build main cities and satellite cities, develop metropolitan areas and city clusters, and build various transportation facilities between urban areas to transport commuters to earn taxes.

Name: Dreams Of Adventure
About: Dreams Of Adventure brings you in a world of medival fantasy where you chose how to play and impact the world around you. Will you help a person in need? Want them to pay you for help? Perhaps... you end their life and take the bellongings...? The choice is yours!

Name: Fantasy Lands
About: A single player strategy game in the style of euro board games. Around 30 minutes per game. Collect resources. Explore. Recruit adventurers and fight monsters or complete quests. Improve lands. Research spells. Unlock races, adventurers, land & quest cards, spells and monsters.

Name: StartPlay
About: StartPlay is the free and ultimate game creator for kids, allowing young minds to bring their imagination to life without writing a single line of code! This free, user-friendly game builder empowers children to design, develop, and share their own games with players around the world.

Name: Space Mercenary Shooter : Episode 2
About: Space Mercenary Shooter is an episodic FPS inspired by early shooter games, featuring handcrafted levels and a fully voice-acted cast of characters.

Name: Terra Inferno
About: Humans are ruining the lush world of Terra Inferno! Embody nature's wrath in this Turn-Based Tactics meets Resource Management Game, evoke natural calamities to devastate the human onslaught!

Name: Island Assault
About: You Assault A Island What Is Under Russian Control and you need to destroy enemy vehicles and supplies and there will be mission to do or free roam around the map or you could build build a base with the money you will have to get the player is a a robot show is being controlled by human

Name: Kedemara - The Orphan's Ballad (Ch. 1-5)
About: The story details the comedic and inspiring tale of a girl trying to recall her past, all the while trudging forward with the help of her ragtag, whimsical friends. With the simple intent to find out who her parents are, Deirdre will unknowingly dismantle the largest conspiracy of her era.

Name: Towards the Unknown
About: Dive into the Rift and discover the various mysteries it holds. Between mystical creatures and legendary artifacts, you will have to be strategic on this expedition. Die, pass the torch to another explorer and head into the unknown.

Name: The Fantastic Adventure of Monsieur Grape
About: The Fantastic Adventure of Monsieur Grape is a 2.5D platformer where you play as Monsieur Grape: A high brow, high class, grape who is trying to save his friend Peanut from an evil piece of bread!

Name: Winter Wastelands
About: Winter Wastelands is a sci-fi fantasy action-adventure game about fighting bosses, exploring unique locations, gathering items that come with different costumes and special abilities, and trying to make it back home.

Name: One Night in Kawami
About: Meet a new friend in the dreamlike City of Rivers. One Night in Kawami is a short visual novel about meeting new friends in an unknown city and possibly reshaping reality as you thought you knew it.

Name: SafeHome
About: SafeHome - author's visual novel from a young storyteller. He is 9 years old. A game about survival in a post-world with limited resources and without hope!

Name: Streamer Future Wars
About: Questionable Gacha game where you can collect completely unique streamer characters!

Name: Master RNG
About: A simple 2d game where you roll for different items! These items you get will become rarer and rarer as you collect them.

Name: Room 54 - Horde Survival
About: Survive at Hordes of Creatures in this 'Spin-Off' modality of our Main Title - Room 54. Gear up , unlock new weapons / abilities and fight!

Name: Ecosphere - Prologue
About: The Pirate Princess must infiltrate a memorial to steal an orb with the power to control nature: Ecosphere. Will you manage to steal the precious loot?

Name: I was born poor
About: Cherubino is a boy who was born poor and he lives in village where TV is provided for free by local government. His life is truely surrounded by nothingness. But Cherubino is getting his way through poverty with the spiritual help of 'Brahmana' of Brahmanas.

Name: Impressions
About: WE'RE NOT ALONE. HOW DO YOU FEEL? Take on the role of a news pundit in Impressions. Give your thoughts on the discovery of aliens to the people watching and shape the world's perception on the newly discovered aliens.

Name: Slice Of Ages
About: A top down action rpg with rougelike elements. You'll encounter plenty of opposition trying to make your way to the Slice of Ages. Slice your way through hordes of enemies with unique relics in order to stop Dastardly Duck.

Name: Ready? Set. Haiya!
About: Ready? Set. Haiya! is a fighting-styled rhythm game, where players follow on-screen commands and try to time them as perfectly as they can, to try and beat their opponents to the beat in this epic groovy showdown.

Name: Cold Massacre
About: Cold Massacre is a survival horror game where you play as a person running away from himself. You have to find your way out of a seemingly endless nightmare that you put yourself into. A relentless killer is chasing after you and it doesn't quite seem human, how will you ever get out?

Name: Christmas Countdown
About: Join Santa's elves in a festive race against time to wrap presents and fill Santa's sleigh before Christmas Eve in this fun and cheerful game for the whole family.

Name: Clutch: The Drift Simulation
About: Clutch is an effort to create the closest to real life car drifting simulation but in a “game” form. The goal is to create a professional level game that closest simulates real driving with the largest support for modding. The secondary goal is to mimic the fun of real life drifting and community.

Name: Fiora Arc
About: Care for the island while fighting for your life to escape Cardigan.

Name: Cave Game
About: A simple concept with infinite possibilites. A procedurally generated 2D platformer.

Name: Mars Mission
About: The Mars Mission offers real companies and work processes for career orientation! Explore different professions and work processes and find your dream job! You can currently choose between 10 professions and simulate their work processes.

Name: Goddess Connect
About: Goddess Connect is a cute anime-style idle game where you dive into a never-ending adventure to collect Heroes, defeat Devils, and become a Legend. Your actions will influence the world around you—come meet these heroes now!

Name: Tarlis World
About: 'Tarlis World' is game where you rule the world with your own tactic or strategy to achieve your goals!

Name: The Ducksuckers
About: The Ducksuckers is a Kinetic Comedy Visual Novel about music, battling inner demons and the inability to let go. Taking about 40-60 minutes to read it's a short and sweet read, with some dramatic elements.

Name: Cooktopia
About: Cook and serve the best burgers in the world as fast as you can. Do you have what it takes to be the best chef in the world?

Name: Märchen Kanna
About: A free RPG that lets you travel through a world with a picture book-like ambience. The story takes place in a peaceful world where wizards live. In battle scenes, a unique system allows you to specify the shape of attacks according to the enemy's position. Fun for everyone from beginners to gamers!

Name: 悪梦er-mo
About: Record the buildings in which your dreams appear

Name: Starcade FACTIONS
About: Starcade FACTIONS is a turn-based strategy game that puts you in command of epic, fast-paced ship battles, perfect for quick bursts of action.

Name: Spider-Guy: Trapped in the Cheese Place
About: take the role of spider guy and escape the cheese place!

Name: The Real Laser Ball
About: A physics based, arcade, high score chaser with a progression system and a fetish for the 80’s. In The Real Laser Ball you’re a ball… with a laser.

Name: MISKATONIC
About: Miskatonic is a fantastical VR shooter game. The game will transport the player visually, as well as through their senses, while also navigating a meaningful narrative of the magical world of Miskatonic University.

Name: Two Clusters: Kain
About: Follow Kain's space adventure.

Name: Niva
About: Help Astri find his data cards and beat levels to reach his ship, in this hard-to-finish platformer. Complete all the hand-crafted levels, finish as much as you can and become a god of the universe.

Name: Stay Safe 2020
About: You’ve been stuck in quarantine lockdown for months now, but a phone call from a desperate, old woman forces you to risk your life to find her! Can you locate her in time!?

Name: Project Noah
About: Welcom aboard! You're now the crew of Revision, global leading company of space exploration. Operate Project Noah. Follow the manual. The destiny of space explorer dog Noah is on your hand.

Name: Minor Scale
About: Minor Scale is a rhythm-based tower defense game with a 2D / 3D hybrid whimsical aesthetic. You will conduct a band of cute little Critters to defend their jam session from the creepy Crawlies threatening their home with the power of music.

Name: The Nameless Braves: Heaven (Episode 1)
About: The Nameless Braves is a kinetic-style Visual Novel. Set in the fantasy continent of Ankh-Seah during a dour era referred to as 'The Dark Age', one young man strives through trials and heartbreak to accomplish his dream of becoming a hero.

Name: MYRNEscapes
About: A single player exploration game, with audio-reactive elements set to the music of MYRNE's Circles EP

Name: Bishi and the Alien Slime Invasion!
About: Bishi jumps and boomerang attacks his way through three worlds to stop the Alien Slime Invasion, and stop the appropriately named Doctor Evilworth!

Name: Golf Solitaire Simple
About: A simple Golf Solitaire game with several common rule variations and a challenge mode! Can you beat all of the levels?

Name: Goalienator
About: Start your journey into virtual goaltending. Train your reaction skills in multiple game modes and tweaks training settings to fit your skill level. Prove your skills by competing in leaderboards and collect achievements.

Name: Polygon Hell
About: A multiplayer PvE first person shooter where you have to kill hordes of animals and insects to save the world. Embark on a semi-Non-Euclidean journey to the unknown and make it difficult to follow your footsteps.

Name: BoboInvasion
About: BoboInvasion is a classic spaceshooter game. Face waves of aliens with increasing difficulty, dodge their attacks, and choose a ship upgrade that suits your style to win

Name: Square x Square
About: Battle friends in 2D arenas with looping edges, random power-ups, and over a thousand loadout combinations

Name: Water Defense
About: A strategy game that not only entertains, but also educates. Prevent pollution of natural resources with ACO products and score higher than others!

Name: Sanguo: War Under Heaven
About: Sanguo: War Under Heaven is a real-time strategy game set in ancient China, featuring rapid-fire battles and extensive customization.

Name: Supralympic Runners
About: SUPRALYMPIC RUNNERS is a first-person competition-focused endless runner. Experience the perfectly-shaped, fully mechanized, rocket-powered supralympian runner: the greatest athletes of all times! Step up to the Supralympic Games challenge and show off your skills!

Name: Memento Infernum
About: You are unpure, and you have to fulfill God's plan in Memento Infernum, tight top-down shooter where you have to face hordes of demons.

Name: Delivery Express
About: 'Delivery Simulator': Drive and upgrade your delivery vehicle to handle more packages and improve energy efficiency. Tackle increasing daily challenges to become the ultimate delivery master.

Name: Wheelbarrow Warrior
About: Steam's Pre-Eminent Wheelbarrow game. Defeat unique enemies. Execute insane wheelbarrow abilities. Solve complex bosses. Become the Wheelbarrow Warrior.

Name: Kreeps
About: Kreeps is a tower defense game where you choose how your towers and the enemies scale as the game progresses. Use any combination of 7 different types of towers and weapons to defend against the growing Kreep horde.

Name: Eddie Hill in the Curse of the Skull Medallion
About: Help Eddie to retrieve the Skull Medallion sitting atop a mountain walled by a perilous jungle and an ancient temple full of dangers.

Name: SuperJumpWorld Rage
About: Remember Super Mario Bros? Okay so this is game is pretty like the same, but with a twist. Hope you'll find a way out of this place...

Name: Magician's Apprentice
About: Craft your own powerful and deadly spells! You are Magician, an apprentice of most powerful wizard brotherhood and the only person who can save the world from mysterious warlock Yendor who claims to be equal with gods!

Name: Rogue Planet 1
About: Rogue Planet is a short action horror FPS game based on the Mayan Phenomenon of 2012. Made over the course of 3 years as my first game using GameGuru. A personal passion project.

Name: Audio Infection
About: Pew... pew... enemy goes boom! We give you exciting music, intense gameplay, smart AI and epic weapons. It is up to you to deal with the infections.

Name: Mémoire d'Arumac
About: Aidez Mia à suivre les traces de son grand père en retrouvant le trésor perdu ! Explorez, résolvez les énigmes et collectez d’anciens artefacts.

Name: Burger Wars
About: The clicker game that wanted to be an RPG

Name: Spire of Sorcery: Prologue
About: Lead a party of runaway mages through the dangerous lands of Rund! Combine spellcasting, alchemy and equipment to prevail over opponents. Unlock spells, discover recipes, explore the world. Spire of Sorcery: Prologue is a demo of the main game and contains its first chapter.

Name: Sketch
About: Enter the Land of Cere as a mysterious being, Am. Traverse through the mind of Taylor, an artist whose passion for art is dimming. Am wields a pencil, which can draw shapes to progress through levels and erase enemies to clear Taylor's mind and ultimately restore Taylor's passion.

Name: The Night Christmas Ended
About: Team up with the world’s biggest goblin on his quest for gold and be a total Christmas bastard.

Name: Celestial
About: Celestial is an Open world Space survival game playing on a Spherical world of roughly 700km2. Survive in a hostile environment with a variety of roaming creatures. explore ancient ruins of an alien civilization, learn their technologies and use them to find a way back home.

Name: The Stray Cat
About: Virtual Reality Games Pick up the objects on the ground to protect it, or watch the cute it falls

Name: Treats Please!
About: This is a retro-styled puzzle game about keeping a hungry pet happy with tasty treats. Choosing treats the pet will enjoy will reduce their hunger strength level and choosing things they cannot eat will only make them hungrier!

Name: Kilroy Was Here
About: You are stuck in an unknown place, completely alone for eternity. Every decision you’ve made, will make, and could have made somehow rattling around your head. The only thing you can understand is a rock, with a gratified picture and some text that reads ‘Kilroy Was Here’!

Name: Soul Rush
About: 「新感覚ランゲームアクション！」たくさんの方に楽しんでいただける簡単操作でプレイできるランアクションゲーム！主人公は魂（ソウル）の力を操る巫女。敵を倒すごとに魂（ソウル）が集まり、巫女の持っている力が強まります。多彩なスキルを駆使して、次々と迫りくる敵を敵を殲滅しよう！

Name: Mirrorscape
About: Mirrorscape is bringing the table back to virtual tabletops! Build and play around the table or around the world using authentic 3D terrain, miniatures, and dice from top companies you know and love. Cross-play on iOS and Android devices using the magic of augmented reality!

Name: My Pet Rock
About: My Pet Rock is a collection of mini games inspired by early arcade games and modern endless runners. If you are looking for a fun, aesthetically pleasing and relatively casual game to play then My Pet Rock is for you. Come and customize your newest pet, while earning the highest scores around.

Name: Anagraphs: An Anagram Game With a Twist
About: Anagrams with a twist! From the creator of the popular word game Synonymy, an addicting new word game where the anagram possibilities are greater than ever before.

Name: Chasemaster
About: A perfect blend of adventure, racing, strategy and speed. Chasemaster is all about completing your mission and escaping the city to your agency safely. Make quick decisions, outplay the police and get back safely!

Name: Rhythm Master
About: ‘Rhythm Master’ is a new concept rhythm game in which each stage proceeds in a battle format based on a story. Collect various characters and strategize using their unique abilities to fight against various enemies.

Name: Parts Unknown
About: Parts Unknown is an online fighting game aiming to recapture the spirit of old fighting platformers with a unique twist.

Name: Malatzshia
About: Malatzshia is a non-classical RPG that contains some very tricky riddles. The play time can vary between 4 and 10 hours. You start the game being told you are trapped in your own dream. In order to wake up you will have to find a code that is hidden deeply within the vast dreamland.

Name: Light of Mine
About: Light of Mine will leave your head spinning in terror. Experience 360 degrees of VR terror as you use your candle to explore an ancient temple with danger lurking in the darkness. Light of Mine is made by nonPareil Studios. We are a studio that provides better futures for adults on the autism spectrum. #PoweredbyAutism

Name: Space Ball VR
About: Play a fun game of Space Ball with your friends! Football and basketball: any mode you like is available in this sporty and dynamic game.

Name: Eat That Ice Cream
About: Eat ice cream with absurdly inefficient utensils in this silly and chaotic physics game with clicker elements. Get drops. Open chests. Recycle what you don't want. Progress further and further into the unknown.

Name: Tower Defense: Infinite War
About: In the far future, people build a base on a strange planet they don't know about to protect their limited resources. Protect your base from the incessant invasion of extraterrestrial beings!

Name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle - Digital Artbook
About: Immerse yourself in a world of adventure with the bonus digital artbook, included with the Premium Edition of Indiana Jones and the Great Circle™. This application allows players to view concept art of the game.

Name: Slime Kingdom - An Unlikely Adventure!
About: An adventure with the most unlikeliest of heroes. Gather support from unexpected places as you journey through an expansive, episodic story, full of cheesy humor, quirky characters, monologuing villains and TROPES. Many, many tropes!

Name: Health and Safety VR Training Bundle
About: Train your professional skills in GWPro VR Training safely and in correspondence with international standards! (OSHA, NEBOSH, ISO). All VR training consists of 3 modes: Study, Training, Exam, providing step-by-step control of all VR activities.

Name: Blackbox
About: Blackbox is an emotional rollercoaster ride through the childhood memories of Sami, a Syrian boy, who shares personal stories of happiness and joy intertwined with unspeakable moments of sadness and remorse.

Name: Barrett Foster : Prologue
About: Play as Inspector Barrett Foster in this exciting and immersive enigma game that mixes mystery and suspense at the same time. The expression 'The devil is in the details' takes on its full meaning in this game that will make you think and certainly more...

Name: Mandew vs the Forever Rain+
About: After 13 years, one of the first Suits & Sandals games is back with a fresh coat of paint! Help Mandew uncover the source of the mysterious never-ending downpour threatening his home in this 2D platforming adventure.

Name: NUNNA: Prologue
About: NUNNA: Prologue is the first act of a turn-based combat game with rogue-lite and deck-building elements. Defeat the enemies in front of Nunna and end her journey.

Name: Arkham Nightmares
About: Arkham Nightmares is an adventure game with rogue-like elements. You play Prof. Liebwerk the head physician of the Lovecraftian Arkham Sanatorium. Your task is to complete your journal with all the stories from the crazy inmates. But before they will tell you anything you have to win their trust.

Name: Volcano Eruption
About: A short and sweet VR experience of seeing a underwater volcano scene turn to an island chain. No moving required just sit back and enjoy the show.

Name: Head Over Heels

Name: Coffee Trainer VR

Name: The Mystery Fountain in Space

Name: El Ministerio del Tiempo VR: Salva el tiempo

Name: LIO

Name: Initiation
About: Lost for far too long, he’s drowning in his loneliness looking for a lean comfort by remaining close to the same rock. His feelings elude leaving him in oppressive despair. How to find the spark to lit the darkness? In which form will it come to you?

Name: Stick Bros

Name: Witch Loraine's Death Game

Name: Whoopi

Name: Critical Failure
About: This is a simple wave-based zombie survival game. The world's first VIDEO GAME CONTROLLED LIVE ACTION SERIES. Be prepared to directly influence the world of CRITICAL FAILURE.

Name: Temple of HUE
About: Temple of HUE is a 2D colour mixing puzzle game. Help the Jacklerats bring back colour to their dark world!

Name: Gates to Terra II
About: Simple, fast-pased multiplayer SRPG

Name: Slurpies FREE
About: Snake, slither, SLURRPP! Chill out with your friends in this free multiplayer arcade game. Relax as you grow your colorful space snake by eating lots of food and avoiding playful baddies and other players. How long can you grow your Space Slurpie?

Name: Captive
About: You wake up in a bright, but mysterious room. You don't know what is happening or how you got there.

Name: Obreno: Chapter One
About: An interactive novel. In the distant future, a search for a missing brother leads to a journey through an intergalactic civilization that may have reached the limits of progress.

Name: Deadlands Duel: Time Rift Rumble
About: Deadlands Duel is a wave-based zombie defense shooter that takes place throughout all of history via time travel. You will fight hoards of zombies with various weapons and armaments. Choose one of four class types to specialize your gameplay to fit your desired role in this team-play focused arena.

Name: The Tunnels
About: The Tunnels is a procedural maze environment, where everyone loses except grief What can only be the final truth is a mirror showing us what remains of our humanity. There is, however, an end to reach in this hallway.

Name: Neon Marble Rust

Units are built in batches, so if you play fast you can build massive armies and dominate the competition.

Name: Eggsplosion
About: Eggsplosion is a free local multiplayer twin-stick arena brawler with fighting chickens, bouncing eggs, tons of power-ups and heaps of fun. Eggcellent for a fun evening with your friends!

Name: One Last Time
About: Life can change in an instant, sometimes in the wrong way. After losing someone close, a mysterious person shows up to help you get your life back together. Overcome the stages of grief in this intriguing puzzle-centric, dialogue experience and see how the story unfolds.

Name: Pixel Flip
About: Embark on endless stages of card matching fun. Dive into a vibrant world, collect all the 'Pixels', strategize your moves and level up your character. Can you become the ultimate Pixel Collector?

Name: Slime Kingdom
About: A Slime kingdom been attack by evil wizard,now there king must save his kingdom.

Name: Axiallis
About: Tetris like sci-fi block puzzle game

Name: Scavenger's Deep
About: Scavenger's Deep is an underwater 3rd person action roguelike game, with an emphasis on player movement for traversing the game world and encounters.

Name: ZPlague
About: Armed militaries are requested to clean an area infested by zombies. On each round you don't now if you will be a zombie or a soldier, so use the skills and items that was given to you and keep alert.

Name: BobsleighX
About: You will feel the thrill of speed in the BobsleighX.

Name: Exiled Survivors
About: Dive into the heart-pounding world of Exiled Survivors! Experience relentless action, shape your destiny through strategic choices, and face monstrous foes. Unlock up to 30 characters, conquer bosses, and revel in the perfect blend of Vampire Survivors' intensity and Diablo's depth!

Name: Forest Below
About: Experience the intense tree action in Forest Below as you draw the paths of your tree roots over various turns in order to collect enough water to grow your tree to ever-increasing heights. Developed to satisfy any puzzle fan, this game has controls that are easy to grasp but difficult to master.

Name: Gobbo's Gambit
About: Jump, climb, crawl, push and knock enemies unconscious in this fantasy dungeon extravaganza! Players must meticulously outsmart their foes, or succumb to their brute force power. Can you escape the dungeon?

Name: What Would You Do?

Unlike some games, your decisions have a serious impact on the story and the events that follow. It is meant to resemble real time meaning that a no decision counts as an action, and can result in lost time or negative consequences.

Name: Pan's Survivor Chess
About: This is a auto-battler & vampire-suvivor like game.

Name: Sound of Slash
About: A rhythm action game in sync with the music, experiencing a variety of cool actions. A ranking system that allows users to compete globally while playing their favorite tunes. A free store system where players can share and play their own created music and notes with others.

Name: Carotic - Academic Version
About: Carotic is a top-down 3D couch-co-op hide-and-seek game for 2-4 players. Each player plays the role of a car in a very busy city. Their task is to drive like the other NPC cars while trying to identify the other players. In order to gain points the other players must be destroyed by dashing into them.

Name: Alcohol Empire

Name: 坦克世界：铁甲风暴

Name: Tin Tandem

Name: The Same Crime

Name: The Dragon Odyssey
About: Embark on an epic adventure in The Dragon Odyssey! Customize your hero and battle in dynamic ARPG combat. Explore vast worlds, raid dungeons, and uncover treasures. Play solo or team up in thrilling MMORPG gameplay. Begin your legendary journey today!

Name: Endustry
About: Endustry is a game about building, exploring and surviving. Build machines and conveyor belts to collect resources. Try to survive with or without enemy waves depending on which game mode you play.

Instead players find themselves entering a zen-like flow as they attempt to achieve maximum velocity.

By stacking energy, the player can use cool wind and fire abilities to defeat the Poker King, Suoha, reclaim the Wheel of Fortune, and save their plundered homeland!

Name: Experiment Of Being
About: Escape the room game with a story

Name: LingerToAlive
About: A TPS survival game with a pixel level stream. There is no archiving system. Let's fight for a lifetime to pass! And you can also customize a battle!

Name: Train Operator 377 Free Version

Name: Infrared

Name: Leyline Knights

Name: Dot Debugger
About: There are too many bugs!

Name: Afterbern Democralypse
About: Brawl for a brighter future!

Name: Metal Strike

Name: 英雄坛说X之宗门风云

Name: Hero Academy 2

Name: Weaponry (Experimental)

About: God Test
