Name: Capsule Jump
About: Capsule Jump is a difficult Jump and Run platformer Game. As a caspule you need to pass the level, that are very difficult. There are 55 level by now, which have different environments. Will you get through that game?

Name: The Istrys
About: Cubistry™ is now 'The Istrys™'! Start playing for free Cubistry™ and its sibling 3D match 2 puzzle games dubbed the Istrys by fans in one place. Arrange the games to suit how you play and check back often since new Istrys are coming soon!

Name: Fight for Eden: HEAT
About: Fight For Eden is a fantasy action-RPG VR game where you will follow the adult story of a young orc enrolled to fight against the half elves' oppression. Make friends or lovers, fight enemies, explore lands, all in an adult setting.

Name: Bug Blast
About: Fight and dodge through hundreds of space bugs in Bug Blast! Go through each space station to protect from the hoards of bugs that come their way.

Name: Just Spin
About: A minimalist arcade game with a challenging twist.

Name: Fallen Stars
About: Fallen Stars is the story of a astronaut called Thomas Jackson who travel to I.C.E.S 1 space station to perform several duties along side with his crewmates. They worked together to perform several duties on the space station. During their journey back earth, unexpected things happen to them.

Name: Prophan Escape
About: In Prophan Escape you have to get five coper statues which are in random places around a labirynth to complete each level, it's that simple... Oh, yeah, there are also two antropomorphic weird cubes with realistic extremities that want to kill you, so you will have to avoid that weird guys.

Name: Amulet of Iovar
About: Amulet of Iovar is an oldschool roguelike inspired by Nethack. Delve deep into the Dungeon of Iovar, steal the amulet of the divine and ascend to godhood!

Name: Paraiso Island
About: Travel to Paraiso Island, make new friends and build your own paradise.

Name: 擒贼先擒王
About: This is a race against time game, in this game, you can collect gold to restore your health and improve your combat ability, the time to defeat the boss is limited, if you don't beat the boss in the allotted time, the challenge will fail

Name: CampNight
About: Take care of your fire or you freeze to death!

Name: MITTIN: Clean Flat Surfaces
About: Learn how to clean a variety of surfaces in the kitchen and living room of your home with MITTIN: Clean Flat Surfaces. MITTIN is a library of dynamic modules that foster the development of independent living skills in the home and community.

Name: Birthright Cataclysm - Overture
About: A shamelessly difficult and strange RPG aimed at speed runners and masochists, or anyone who enjoys a bizarre and deep story. Birthright Cataclysm - Overture marks the beginning of a new series by Hisoka.

Name: On The Brink
About: Use Capri's gravity manipulation to slingshot across the universe as she embarks on a mission to liberate a forgotten dimension from the clutches of an all-powerful being. Solve puzzles, uncover mysteries, and shatter space-time itself in this snappy sci-fi action platformer.

Name: STONEBOND: The Gargoyle's Domain
About: STONEBOND : The Gargoyle's Domain is a multiplayer gothic combat game. Fueled by our love for pixelated classics and 90s TV series, it is a 4-player couch game in which you form a fragile bond with another player, and win by protecting it together.

Name: Battle Babes
About: Battle Babes is a fast-paced, free-to-play single-player turn-based strategy card game. Collect, strategize, and battle your way to victory with 3+ hero powers! Experiment with 600+ unique cards, each with their own special abilities. Customize your decks and challenge AI decks to a fight!

Name: Trends
About: For 2-5 players. Trends is the one and only game powered by the Internet. Players pit search terms against each-other to see which is more highly ranked by search traffic.

Name: Beer'em Up
About: Duffer and Amber, Gods of Beer and Dance, will get themselves involved in a frantic chase after Raisin, God of Wine. In an act of arrogance and envy, Raisin has stolen The Sacred Barrel, the only source of beer for the whole Island of Maltisa.

Name: 잿빛의 행성
About: is an adventure game where you meet the Big Dipper, a star that grants wishes, and save the planet that has turned gray.

Name: Fishing With The Homies
About: Begin your fishing journey in this surreal angling experience! Be wary though, the current masters of these ponds might not respond kindly to a rookie fisherman appearing on their turf. Can you uncover the secrets that lurk beneath the surface and rise to the top of this fintastic experience?

Name: Edmund and Eliza
About: Edmund and Eliza is a medieval action adventure game about a knight named Edmund Dantes who ventures into a mysterious village in search of a merchant's missing daughter named Eliza Bonteri. Edmund and Eliza is a senior design capstone project for California State University of Northridge.

Name: Tiki Tandems
About: Tiki Tandems is an online and local multiplayer PvP game. With fast-paced gameplay and easy-to-learn mechanics and combat it's a great game to play with your friends or grind against anyone worldwide!

Name: Dynarog 2
About: You are a destructive piece of junk and your goal is to run over your enemies using all kind of weapons, abilities and upgrades

Name: Tummy Bonbons The Sweet Monster
About: It is Halloween and Tummy the monster is hungry. Time to scare children and steal their candy!

Name: O Rei
About: Do you want to reign?

Name: Shapebreaker - Prologue
About: Play the first deck of Shapebreaker for free. A fusion of tower defense games and roguelike deckbuilders. Use your cards to build towers and to upgrade them in unique ways. Gain rewards to customize your deck, defense and playstyle. Break the shapes before they break you!

Name: 电码无声
About: A VR role-playing game set against the backdrop of the Chinese Red Revolution

Name: Glyph-Bound: Kotodama
About: Track, train, and trade elemental spirits in Glyph-Bound! An indie MMORPG inspired by Pokemon Platinum, Final Fantasy Tactics, and Old School Runescape.

Name: HyperZen Training
About: Experimental minimalist game with a special graphical mecanic.

Name: Snapback
About: Snapback is a Speed-Runner Puzzle Platformer set in a robot dystopia where you are recruited to rebel against the evil GovCorp overlords, break the rules, and join the resistance!

Name: The Hole
About: A fantasy-horror-dark-comedy like no other.

Name: Outpost Defender 2-Beta
About: The Space-Outpost is under assault! You must defend it. Fight off infinite waves of alien invaders. Survive as long as possible. A retro/arcade pixel-art outbreak challenge to set the highest score! Single-player and Local Co-Op enabled.

Name: Numbers & Letters
About: Numbers and Letters. Practice math, solve equations using addition, subtraction, multiplication and division. Improve your literacy skills. Complete the word by finding the missing letter. Earn achievements and rank on leader boards. Numbers Archery and Numbers Whack now available.

Name: Raid!
About: Raid is a three dimensional, base building tower defense game. Build and upgrade towers, capture castles and defend against increasing waves of enemies. Expend your coin in efforts to fend off your attackers while preparing for the final wave before you can move onto the next plot of land.

Name: Animal Striker 2
About: Animal Striker 2 is a fast-paced multiplayer FPS where animals fight in intense arenas. Pick up magical weapons with unique projectiles, customize your loadout, and compete in team-based or free-for-all modes. Unleash your power and dominate the battlefield!

Name: Loskop
About: Experience a new type of puzzle-solving in this new linear second and first person puzzle solving game. Control the little robot also known as Loskop and help him escape his old factory and out into the wild.

Name: 足球梦之队
About: Is the foreign soccer hand tour too tiring? And domestic cannot control too boring? 'Football Dream Team'-Easy Control Strategy Competition! Realize the dream of football fans for many years!

Name: Heart Of The Abyss
About: In Heart of the Abyss, you play as the Sea watcher, who has been awakened following the emergence of a mysterious and dangerous force that corrupts the depths. Your role will be to find a way to halt its progression as it possesses creatures and turns them into monstrous beings.

Name: Downloaded: Fragments of a Forgotten Soul
About: In this rage worthy game help Keeli, a goddess of technology, find her redemption after falling from grace. Face 8 challenging levels, 3 bosses, and confront your own corruption. Includes Steam Achievements as well as in game side challenges and an amazing soundtrack. Formatted for Keyboard or Controller use.

Name: Anubis' Challenge
About: Anubis' Challenge is an action-based VR adventure game where you need to show your reaction and combat skills to withstand multiple waves of enemies.

Name: Not My President - Level 1
About: This is a 3D-action-shooter. You were sent to a foreign planet to free the kidnapped Earth people. Find all the rocket parts. Assemble the rocket. Free all captives and put them in the rocket. Start the countdown and try not to die during this time.

Name: Escape from the death castle
About: You don't know why you are locked in this castle, but you know you should escape here.

Name: Keep It Steady!
About: Take control of a paddles left and right sides and move them up or down to guide a ball! Guide the ball through several game modes by either dodging on-coming holes trying to make your ball collide with them or by aiming for glowing holes that give you points for entering them.

Name: Pencil Plus: The Wrath of The Spankster
About: Pencil Plus: The Wrath of the Spankster is an interactive novel style choose your own adventure game in which players take the role of Conner, a normal high school kid that gains a very unique super power: the ability to pull limitless pencils out of his pockets.

Name: Koppun-50
About: Run, jump, dash, and shoot your way through the planet of Koppun-50, stealing your enemies' weapons to survive! Think you have what it takes to defeat 49 other players in this fast-paced battle-royale?

Name: Super Lee World
About: Inspired on the classics, but with unique challenges, enemies and worlds.

Name: Heretic's Lot: Prologue
About: The story starts when you arrive at plagued ridden land border. There is a long way ahead filled with courage and mystery. Heretic’s Lot: Prologue is a demo to the main game, presenting its basic mechanics.

Name: SNAREWAVES' SHOOTING CHALLENGE
About: A short, free high-score chasing 2D shooter set to a punk rock soundtrack.

Name: Lie of Caelum
About: Giant robots. Technology abusing magic. Conflict between countries. Join a group of fated individuals and liberate the planet of Caelum from the shackles of its people. Discover the mysteries behind their powers, and dwell in their lives in this Sci-fi JRPG.

Name: Picking Wheat
About: This game is mainly composed of two parts: you are forced to watch some author's nonsense, and some simple puzzle levels. There are 9 preset levels to help players understand the basic rules of the puzzle. Free level editor, players can edit and upload levels, Download them, and give your likes!

Name: Dummy!
About: Dummy! - An online quiz that will help to find out which of you is the smartest! Guess movies, games, music and more! In Dummy! everyone will find an interesting topic.

Name: 深渊契约
About: Abyss Pact is an adventure fighting RPG,where you become a talented heroic warrior to protect the last remaining pure land, and embark on your own legendary path!

Name: Sea Dove
About: The man in the black sphere needs you to catch him some fish, but to what end?

Name: Little Helper
About: Welcome to the North Pole, where Pumpking is now the ruler! Help Santa defeat Pumpking and his minions once and for all by collecting all the stolen presents and saving all the Santas to save Christmas!

Name: What We Pretend To Be
About: A small game about farming, community, and loss. Farm for the war effort - and listen to the long space people leave behind when they're gone.

Name: Synthetic Fantasy;
About: A 'Visual Novel Play' about the nature of love and relationships! Caught between his fiance and an android, Dan Garland must make a choice that will change lives forever.

Name: A Steak Temple Panic
About: Solve a series of cooperative mini-games in this interactive two-player comedy adventure: Two secret agents must learn to work together to recover a magical Aztec artifact hidden in an amusement park owned by a world-shaking multi-billionaire.

Name: Arrow
About: Arrow is a local twin-stick shooter game, playable from 2 to 4 players where you need to gather weapons and bonus to blow up your friends !

Name: Astro Wars
About: Astro Wars is a Free Multiplayer Space Strategy Game. You start at the edge of the galaxy where you can build up, colonize and take over planets in competition with players from all over the world!

Name: Magneko
About: Magneko is a casual platform game. in the cute handmade toy world, you can jump or use the magnet magic to move, solve puzzles and collect dried fish to pass the levels. With a simple mouse click, you can use magic and begin your adventure.

Name: Pizzakai
About: Play as a deceased man by the name of Peppy who has been recently reincarnated as a freshly baked Pizza mobster. Offered a deal by a 'Pizza God,' Peppy must enter the crime den of the House of Unified Triple-Cheeses and engage in combat if he wants any chance of returning to his own world.

Name: TankLab
About: Operate the tank to fire bullets! Defeat your opponents and claim victory! Choose your favorite skill and conquer the field!A pop and simple shooting game.

Name: Phantom Blaze
About: Phantom Blaze sets the stage for an adrenaline-fueled odyssey, drawing inspiration from fearless commanders worldwide. This pulse-pounding game pushes players to the edge as they scavenge for cutting-edge weaponry, seizing every opportunity for victory while battling to stay alive.

Name: Sanguine Soul
About: Experience Malieun's quest for vengeance in this first-person action adventure exploration game! Having barely survived an assassination attempt by the wandering wizard Noor, Malieun discovers a newfound power that enables him to exchange his magical energy and life force.

Name: Bouncy Cloud
About: Bounce through the skies and capture the flag! Each platform is one use only, leaving you with fewer options to traverse back and capture the flag you worked so hard to collect.

Name: 9 Years of Dreaming
About: 9 Years of Dreaming is an action-adventure game where you explore the subconscious of Jacob, who has been in a coma for nine years after a car accident. Trapped in a surreal dreamscape, Jacob meets Lumby, a mysterious guide who helps him on his journey to wake up.

Name: 2024: Aliens Are Coming
About: An Indie Sci-Fi Adventure game that thrusts you into the heart of the secrecy surrounding UFOs and Aliens. Visit exotic places, meet Aliens, make alliances and enemies alike as you make critical decisions and fight for what you think is right. Time is short, because it's 2024, and Aliens Are Coming!

Name: Fishyphus
About: Traverse an impressionistic sea, listening for predator and prey. Cast a lure and feel their cues to reel them in. The reaper slowly tracks your movements, who you must outmaneuver to survive.

Name: Farm Debt Repay Life:Prologue
About: this is the prologue version of 'Farm Debt Repay Life', challenge you with randomized resources and buffs. Cultivate farmland, mine minerals, craft tools, and repay a huge debt with wisdom and hard work. Along the way, uncover the secrets of three enigmatic cat girls and forge friendships with them.

Name: The Vaults
About: The Vaults is a turn-based RPG card game where you will engage with creatures and beings of other worlds, Explore powerful scrolls and weapons, find treasures, learn abilities, and upgrade your keepers to save the mysterious world of Alexandria!

Name: Spells & Secrets - Character Creator
About: Shape your own student wizard in this cozy character editor of Spells & Secret. Dive into a treasure trove of customization choices and get your character ready for the wizard Academy of Greifenstein.

Name: Asteroidiga
About: A single mine detonation in this bullet hell game will send you flying around the screen. But never fear! Use your wits and your Teleportation module, fast Machine Gun, powerful Laser, Tracer Bullets, and the venerable shotgun.

Name: War of Power: The Last Fight
About: In 1941, shot down UFOs were found on the territory of Romania, Poland and the USSR. The captured technology of aliens helped the Allies and the Axis to strengthen their power and go far in development. Parties to the conflict are waging an aggressive war against each other...

Name: CoronaWhomp!
About: If you hate the virus as much as we do, now is your chance...to whomp it!

Name: Viral
About: Stylized sci-fi FPS shooter

Name: 大话江湖
About: 《大话江湖》是一款大型网页游戏，延续经典的武侠风格，与回合制的战斗方式，公测以来一直深受广大游戏爱好者的喜爱，战斗方式简单，不需过多时间就可轻松完成各种任务！适合学生、白领、上班族等！只为带给大家最好的游戏体验！！ 大话江湖是一款能够让你沉浸在武林世界进行全新冒险玩法的角色扮演类网页游戏，充满血色的武林以及各种高难度挑战剧情让你真实演绎江湖侠客人生!

Name: Mausoleum of Memories
About: Mausoleum of Memories is a first-person 3D puzzle adventure game based on Egyptian Mythology. You play as the ghost of a man named Aaru who has been denied entrance to the afterlife and now must reflect on his human existence and any lessons he may have learned so he can finally rest in peace.

Name: Bud Masters - Peace Edition
About: Bud Masters - 'Peace Edition' is a fun, easy to pick up nostalgic weed lifestyle card game. Free from deck building or any additional complexities, 'Peace Edition' is a casual, chill, yet challenging card game with no additional accounts, no micro-transactions or in game purchases required.

Name: Huckleberry Falls
About: A new kind of match game! Set in a post apocalyptic world, use your wits and bombs to survive.

Name: Warrecs 2
About: You are a small planet in the universe. With time, you're losing mass, therefore you have to eat smaller planets to survive. The rule is the bigger planets eat the smaller.

Name: Sky Conquest
About: In summary, Sky Conquest is a fun and enjoyable platform game to play with friends! 🌟 With cute graphics and entertaining gameplay, it's the perfect combo. Download it for free now on Steam and get ready to jump and have fun! 🚀🎮

Name: CyberSeas
About: Race around sunken streets in your jet ship, swing between collapsed skyscrapers with your trusty harpoon and build your reputation amongst the colourful inhabitants of the CyberSeas!

Name: BUMPER BALLS
About: The best game to carry out raffles in a much more interactive and fun way.

Name: Keepers Of The Lost Arts
About: This is an endless runner set in a Medieval town and time.

Name: Fearless Rider
About: Fearless Rider is an exciting driving game where the player must avoid hitting or getting crushed by obstacles.

Name: Ảo Mộng Tru Tiên - Gamota
About: Ảo Mộng Tru Tiên là game MMORPG do Perfect World phát triển chuyển thể nguyên gốc từ tuyệt phẩm Tru Tiên nổi tiếng và được NPH Gamota độc quyền phát hành tại thị trường Việt Nam.

Name: Airborne: Trials
About: Airborne is a game with a series of trials that get progressively harder. The trials contain parkour and puzzles that you must surpass. In these trials you will encounter many platforms that can be friend or foe, or there just kind of there and don't do anything but that usually doesn't happen.

Name: Malkyrs
About: Malkyrs est un jeu de cartes à collectionner connecté et évolutif ! Vos cartes s'améliorent à chaque partie. Construisez différentes stratégies avec les capacités de votre champion ! Utilisez vos cartes d'actions pour vaincre l'adversaire dans le temps imparti !

Name: Vonbit
About: A retro arcade shooter with one-bit graphics

Name: Citadale Resurrection
About: A collection of old-school retro Citadale games in the style of various systems released in the mid 1980s to early 1990s. Each game has its own unique look, sound, gameplay style and feel and yet they are all distinctly Citadale.

Name: Mishap: An Accidental Haunting
About: The Burtons have just moved into their beautiful new dream home, which unfortunately for them, happens to be haunted. As they prepare to pack up and leave, they are suddenly greeted by the peculiar Milton Hobblepop, self described paranormal investigator.

Name: In Orbit
About: In Orbit transforms data collected by NASA’s “Eyes on Earth”—the satellites relaying information about our climate, oceans, and soil from space—into a multisensory, interactive experience that celebrates the marvelous complexities of our planet and our drive to unravel them.

Name: Archery Showdown
About: Archery Showdown is a local PvP platformer where you can challange with your friends in an archery-balistic 2D fighting!

Name: Red Bull Doodle Art - Global VR Gallery
About: Where does the mind take you? In June 2017 the best doodlers from around the world were invited for the global finals of Red Bull Doodle Art, in San Francisco, where they could take doodling to the next dimension, literally. The resulting VR artworks were combined into the Global VR Gallery.

Name: Zuria
About: Build your own tank and battle with other players! Using building tool create unique shape, add weapons, movement and compete with other players in construction skills.

Name: HAXWARE COMGAM
About: COMGAM is a free Trading Card Game that you can play that takes place in the HAXWARE universe. Configure a team of 5 Warrior Cards, & take them online to battle other players around the world to prove that your configured team is the best.

Name: POPPIN' DONUTS
About: お菓子を揚げて、積んで、登って　王子様に会いに行こう！このゲームは、お菓子の国のステージにドーナツで道を作りながら、王子様の待つゴールを目指すアクションゲームです。

Name: STAY ALIVE
About: A deep web community celebrates Halloween with a live broadcast. Girls are kidnapped and forced to navigate a scenario full of deadly traps for the viewer's entertainment.

Name: Genius!
About: Mettez à l'épreuve le côté absurde de votre cerveau en répondant entre amis aux questions les plus déjantées de l'agent Roger Dedroin !

Name: SWAM
About: SWAM is a Story based Platformer. Experience action packed, fast flowing platformer. Play as Blob and escape the evil clutches of a robotic mom. Find new friends, explore an expansive environment, fight terrifying enemies...

Name: Mini GUNN
About: A fan-made, fun-sized version of Samurai GUNN 2

Name: Lost in Spice
About: Lost in Spice is a cooking game for Oculus Rift in which you play as an abducted human forced to cook Earth food for aliens at the Intergalactic House of Planets. Now you have to dice up weird ingredients, cook them, and submit them in the time limit to get a good score. And if you don't, you'll be vaporized!

Name: Little white man
About: A slightly hard core action game.

Name: Gravity Sphere
About: Gravity Sphere is a 3D puzzle game where you use gravity fields to manipulate and guide projectiles through increasingly difficult levels. Strategize, aim, and solve challenging puzzles in a futuristic, physics-based environment.

Name: Proficient Paddles
About: Proficient Paddles is a super fast-paced arcadey sports game with player customisation, local co-op and many more features!

Name: LUNARBALL
About: Competitive 3v3, team-based sport set in space! Kick, dribble and punch your way to victory!

Name: Sword and Spirit
About: Play as an adventurer who is trying to escape an ancient labyrinth with a magical sword! Fight enemies, power up your sword, and talk to spirits to successfully make it out of the labyrinth!

Name: Murders at Tealwoods Manor
About: You've been invited to a strange party at Lady Tealwoods' new mansion. It's not long until a sudden murder is revealed, and you must piece together who is lying, and who is the murderer as you uncover the secrets of the different strange guests of Tealwoods Manor.

Name: the legend of tomoko
About: In this game, you have to defeat various monsters that have invaded the village and the nearby forest. Can the villagers return? You can use swords, cast wateR and Fire magic. reading this description carefully could be strong weapon to defeat your enemies.

Name: Lords and Tactics
About: Here, you will start from scratch and meet like-minded comrades. With wisdom and courage, you set out on a journey to conquer and unite the lands. Use the Strategy system and deploy Frontline, Center, and Rearguard units to fight your opponents in small-scale skirmishes.

Name: Operation Defensive!
About: Operation Defensive is a tower defense game but instead of monsters following a track they follow a player. place down towers to fight those monsters and try to get to the highest wave you can! have fun!

Name: Block Dude Deluxe
About: Your primary goal is to reach the exit door in each level. stack blocks strategically, creating pathways and staircases that allow you to traverse the environment. Each level presents a unique puzzle, requiring careful planning and precise execution

Name: Not Their Will
About: Not Their Will is a 3D Top-down shooter in which you are an alien that uses the weapons of the enemies against them.

Name: Game Dev Arcade
About: Game Dev Arcade is a collection of indie arcade games developed by Bulwark Creative. The source code will be available so you can see how they were developed! Play the games yourself, and then check out all the nitty gritty details that go in to making simple video games.

Name: 东方修仙传
About: 《东方修仙传》是一款仙侠为主题的ARPG游戏，游戏以仙魔相争为背景，玩家将扮演一名修仙侠士，在游戏塑造的仙侠世界里惩恶扬善，飞渡成仙！极品神兵、海量元宝、绝版仙翼、奢华时装统统免费领！单人竞技、多元PK跨服竞技、挑战BOOS、奇遇机缘等超多玩法让你释放激情！

Name: The Stairway
About: A 3D parkour game through the memories of a life. The goal is to reach the top, sometimes the way forward is not obvious.

Name: Escargot Kart
About: Creatively rocket, jump and parachute your way across dozens of virtual physics playgrounds while performing aerial acrobatics in Escargot Kart, the original rolling platformer.

Name: Stream Skate
About: In a world far in the future and in a galaxy far away, evil robots have arrived on a peaceful ice planet trying to turn all local animals into cold soulless machines. Your mission is to find all captured animals from the facility and escape together before it's too late.

Name: Water 2050
About: Take on the ultimate challenge of being mayor of the last city with clean water reserves in 2050. Manage resources, discover new technologies and tackle the global water crisis with Water 2050. An innovative blend of city building, resource management, adventure, and survival genres all in one game.

Name: Place for Hero
About: A small cute adventure in which you have a lot of incredible trials and battles in the role of a Shepherd and meet many interesting and mysterious creatures to find your Sheep.

Name: 学院逃生
About: Use the seven days you have left to explore the waste left by your classmates in the college, and make good relations with them, so as to increase your chances of escaping from here.

Name: Damoria
About: Create your own empire in the browser game Damoria

Name: MITTIN
About: Learn and practice skills for independence at home and in the community. MITTIN is a library of dynamic modules that foster the development of independent living skills.

Name: King Island 3
About: Embark on the final chapter of the King Island Franchise and venture into new depths, discover the Lost City and encounter Lola the Enchantress, you are no longer alone, Kaptivo!

Name: Witch of the Woods
About: In Witch of the Woods, you play as a witch who must gather ingredients in the forest in order to cast custom spells on the flora and fauna. Can you maintain the forest's ecosystem while fending off the corruption that is plaguing your woods?

Name: Whispers of silence
About: Dive into the haunting narrative of 'Whispers of silence' a first-person exploration game where every object tells a story and every note reveals a fragment of the past.

Name: Pacific Minesweeper
About: Dive into the Pacific's depths in a submersible, navigating through different areas to defuse mines and score points. Aim for precision with limited shots. Avoid errors to keep your lives. Experience high-stakes, strategic gameplay in this free singleplayer adventure!

Name: Bugnauts!
About: Embark on a thrilling 3D projectile action adventure in Bugnauts! Swing your net to battle giant bugs and save your island home from an evil resort tycoon. Fight, collect, and explore in this action-packed game for all ages.

Name: L30-P4RD
About: L30-P4RD is Sci-Fi Top-down shooter. You explore planets as a member of the L30-P4RD, a special force that pioneered planets for civilization.

Name: 小邦迪的奇妙冒险
About: 在《小邦迪的奇妙冒险》中与小邦迪一同学习急救知识，拯救吴家于各种急症之中。

Name: Around Us
About: Around Us is a 2d prop hunt party game. Prop hunt is similar to hide and seek where you can play among your friends up to 8 players, players are randomly selected to be a hunter or a hider. Hiders can switch into Props and finish tasks, and hunters have to hunt them down.

Name: Saranity
About: Saranity a 3rd person game, mixing elements from multiple genres into 1 game. Featuring Single player, COOP and Versus game modes playing with or against your friends. Action and Gameplay is what counts. Can you holdout longer than your friends while sending boss units and go in PVP style.

Name: Anima
About: Anima is a puzzle-platformer in mysterious technological surroundings. Use your controller to move and deconstruct obstacles in an abandoned mining station through two of its robots, Min.I and Andro.ID. Make a path to your goals, run, jump and bounce to discover what became of your creators!

Name: Controller
About: Controller is a light Tower Control simulator. Use a simplified instruction system to manage movements of planes around an Airfield. Dynamic hazards will keep on you your toes and force you to alter your plans on the fly. Do you have what it takes to manage the busiest airports in the world?

Name: Fragile Equilibrium
About: Fragile Equilibrium is a game about the imperfection and impermanence of life. It is a reflection on transience, a balancing act to find beauty in decay and inevitable destruction. [FE] invites the player to explore a world of quick actions, forced decisions, and subtle shmup-style strategy.

Name: Clan of Death
About: Clan of death is a multiplayer traitor game, designed for having a lot of fun with your friends. A group of vikings has to complete some quests in a undead infested fjord. One of the vikings is a shape shifted cultist that rules over the undead and wants to sabotage the vikings quest.

Name: Wilford
About: Action-Adventure with roguelike elements and classic gameplay

Name: Sudoku XP
About: Sudoku with board editing capabilities.

Name: Charlie and Friends
About: Welcome to the world of Charlie and Friends! Currently looking for a new caretaker for our beloved characters: Charlie the Cat, Hilda the Hyena, Sammy the Snake, and Rosy the Rabbit.

Name: SQUID'S MANSLAUGHTER
About: You will wander the earth as the most pathetic and sad organism in existence searching for meaning. At the end of the day though, there isn't any, you're just an empty husk with nothing to lose, might as well gamble your life away...

Name: Quit Smoking VR Therapist
About: Do you want to quit smoking? This application can help you to eliminate and erase your taste for a cigarette. Based on the latest knowledge in the field of psychology, neuroscience and hypnotherapy.

Name: Rover Mechanic Challenge - ERC Competition
About: 𝗘𝗥𝗖 𝗥𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗠𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗰 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗲 is an e-tournament based on the world's only simulator for repairing Mars Rovers. Take part in solving challenging tasks and become the master of leader board.

Name: EarthClicker
About: Embark on a journey of planetary evolution in Earth Clicker. Begin with a barren world and cultivate life through strategic clicks and upgrades. Manage diverse species, enhance ecosystems, and witness your planet's transformation in real-time. Shape the destiny of your world, one click at a time.

Name: Bogey Brian
About: Play as Brian, a slime who dreams of playing golf - with himself as the ball! Squish, jump, roll, and spin your way to glory by getting Brian to the flag on each hole. Improve your score through the use of strategic powerups and collect hats along the way that can totally change the game experience.

Name: Pirates of the Asteroid Belt
About: Role-play shooter in space. Your personal space adventure.

Name: Curse of the Corsair
About: Echoes of a swashbuckling and treacherous past reverberate through a vast and untamed sea, brimming with riches and danger. In this action-packed adventure RPG, you'll set sail on a journey inspired by the modern classic Hyper Light Drifter, but with a salty, scurvy twist.

Name: On Closer Inspection
About: Experience the Australian War Memorial’s collection in VR! View and explore a Mark IV tank from WW1; a Hudson Bomber and an Avro Lancaster from WW2; the Adelaide Class Frigate; and the Bushmaster. Featuring video, audio, photos, and facts to bring to life the history of these important items.

Name: 3DC
About: 3DC is a graphic adventure that teaches children from 8 to 12 years old what depression is.

Name: CrazyCaps
About: Free ! Free ! Free ! UnLock All Difficulty And Puzzle Round!

Name: VMVA - Virtual Museum for Virtual Art
About: Welcome to Virtual Museum for Virtual Art! It is a freely accessible museum, which exclusively exhibits virtual art. The museum has five main rooms, with four of them following the ”white cube” format. In the main hall visitors can get orientations about the current exhibition.

Name: Precision
About: This is a simple 2d follow the mouse game where you have to get to the end to win! This game can be annoying and hard to get through levels but can be very fun! If you touch anything red you will die.

Name: Interweaver
About: Embark on a hauntingly beautiful journey in Interweaver, a whimsical puzzle platformer. Play as the Weaver, a necromancy student on a quest to rescue familiars from the clutches of Sepultus Academia. Unravel mysteries and use magic to weave your way through captivating landscapes.

Name: ICONIC
About: A visual 2D icon-based environment, with puzzles, traps, and obstacles, and no written text. Try to beat every level in a single run with limited lives, or see how fast you can run in a random level sequence time attack mode.

Name: Death Penalty: Beginning
About: From the beginning of her service in the World Safety Secret Organization Alice showed herself as a brave and very capable agent. In a few years she completed tasks of the highest difficulty on her own. However, this story had to be about one of them.

Name: Kaizo Block
About: A tough, 2D, pixel-art platformer. Overcome 8 progressively more difficult Kaizo-style levels, or try and see how fast you can finish an already completed level. On this journey, momentum, jumps, air dashes, and frequent checkpoints are your friends. The world is your enemy.

Name: Quarres
About: Quarres ('squares' in Middle French) is a 2D puzzle in which your goal is to match the tiles in your board with the pattern on a sample board.

Name: Gun Ugly
About: Gun Ugly is a surreal action packed First Person Shooter. Dash, slide and kick your way through scores of manic enemies in a colourful multiverse that provides you with an arsenal of ridiculous weaponry. In your hands a trombone is just as dangerous as a bucket of pupples.

Name: 斗魂大陆
About: 《斗魂大陆》是一款由资深研发团队强力打造的全新暗黑题材游戏。画面表现力超强，打击感十足，技能特效绚丽，PVP战斗场景多样，玩法丰富，BOSS战气势磅礴，奖励丰厚。玩家可在游戏中参与千人跨服戮神夺宝，对抗狂暴的魔怪，寻找失落的财宝争夺权力的王座，享尽无上的荣耀。

Name: Blaster Multiplayer
About: Thrust into the fray of Blaster Multiplayer, a tactical third-person shooter where strategy meets intense combat.

Name: Chesnakisnak
About: A first-person choose-your-own adventure set in an anachronistic city.

Name: Exorder
About: A fantasy turn-based strategy game, fight for Cerulean and claim the crown as her rightful heir! Enjoy hours of our single-player campaign and battle your friends with cross-platform multiplayer. Expand your skills as a commander with the challenge mode.

Name: Midnight Witch Starlight
About: A 90s anime inspired, wave based, 2D run and gun side scroller, where you are a magical girl on the side of light. Load out your arsenal of spells to free the legion of spirits corrupted by the legion of shadow.

Name: Home: A Quarantine Story
About: A narrative adventure game about being trapped at home during the COVID-19 pandemic. For fans of To the Moon, Gone Home, and Night in the Woods.

Name: Edge Of Existence
About: Edge Of Existence. Is a throw back to the Classics of RTS where you can build up your base and build up your massive army. Ranging from Ground units , Air Units and Sea Units. We also take you on a story base RTS where a faction has a meaning to the map or why its in-game. We are a balance focus on PvP, PvE and Story/Campaign.

Name: Wormatozoa
About: A gross 2D point-and-click precision platformer about parasitic worms. Guide them through a human body as they evolve from tiny parasites to city-engulfing monsters in this tough-as-nails arcade slither-em-up!

Name: Soul of the Forest
About: Embark on a quest to unite the forest against the tyrannical king in an hour long, turn based RPG epic! Soul of the Forest was created by a team of 55 students over the course of 2 semesters as a case study of modern turn-based RPGs.

Name: Into the Infinite
About: Play as Reno, a mischievous inter-dimensional smuggler trying to clear their name! Travel between realities in this third-person action game as you fight with an array of weapons from across the multiverse. Every playthrough is different with procedural layouts and tiers of random weapons!

Name: Javols VR
About: Discover in Lozère, Javols, the capital of ancient Gévaudan completely reconstituted in Virtual reality

Name: FIL
About: Gallivant through the Solar System in a journey of stellar proportions in FIL to save the planets from destruction!

Name: Lost & Found Collection
About: Lost & Found Collection is a game where players explore diverse stories on VHS tapes, each unfolding around the same time.

Name: Steel Covenant 钢铁盟约
About: 'Steel Covenant' is a 3D real-time strategy game. The game is set against the backdrop of World War II. Players can transform into Allied or German commanders, commanding multiple units to participate in battles

Name: The Aquarians
About: A point-and-click playable short where you take the role of an artifact collector, navigating the Aquarian Temple's enigmatic architecture and locating its prized relics.

Name: Split Spirit
About: Immerse yourself in a vibrant world overflowing with color and charm as you traverse mountainous woodlands to rejoin with your other half. Seek the aid of the forest as flowers and deer pick you up and carry you along on your journey.

Name: The Path to Memento Mori
About: In The Path to Memento Mori, players navigate eerie mazes in a co-op multiplayer horror puzzle game, solving complex puzzles and evading relentless monsters. Work together to uncover buried family secrets and unravel the chilling mystery that lies at the heart of the estate.

Name: Harmonic Depths
About: Embark on a relaxing journey in an underwater realm. Glide through captivating environments, embracing the tranquility of exploration and survival found in these Harmonic Depths.

Name: ZombCube
About: ZombCube is a first-person, cross-platform, zombie survival, wave based game. Play solo or with friends all over the world destroying the evil ZombCube's. Use teamwork, leadership, and skills to be the best and rank on the leaderboards.

Name: Disavowed
About: Disavowed is a Metroidvania that allows the player to freeze time and set up pinpoint shots to stun enemies. It is set in a world of plush and cute creatures where the player has been cast out and needs to go on a journey to gather more strength and get back at his creator for tossing him out.

Name: The falling tower
About: Where did you come from, and where will you go. What's the destination of your journey? Maybe you can find your own answer in this game. -----Welcome, to this magic world.

Name: Grimm of the Dome
About: In this last city of mankind, an isolated paradise in the ocean, your choices and dices will lead it to Utopia or Distopia. You will help the magistrate AI to investigate the AI-worship religious group, illicit drugs, those who were resurrected, and those who are neither android nor mankind…

Name: (Neg)Entropic Wandering
About: (Neg)Entropic Wandering is a short visual novel for Insomniacs. Wander through the depths of space to empty your mind and finally get some sleep.

Name: HBD-RPG
About: Explore a world of pixel art fantasy, where every building holds a unique surprise. Help the locals, dance in a side quest, and finish the main quest. But don't forget, it's your birthday at the end of the day! Have FUN!

Name: The Tavern of Magic
About: Welcome to the Tavern! Craft, buy or sell Magic Cards to form your perfect deck and conquer other mages in Duels. Crawl together through Dungeons and more.

Name: World Destroyers
About: World Destroyers is a fast-paced, skill-testing, multiplayer space shooter that pays homage to classic games such as Asteroids, but with modern high-speed action.

Name: CatPunk
About: A small game about a cat in a punk world. Collect food and try not to get hurt overcoming obstacles on your way. Good luck!

Name: DarkStorm
About: Play as MARS (Machine of Absolute Retaliation and Safeguard), a robot programmed to exterminate the treacherous aliens who have taken over Razor City. As MARS, you must free Razor City from its domination in order to save the survivors from their doom.

Name: EgoVersus: The First Strike
About: A fast-paced sci-fi first person shooter. EgoVersus: The First Strike aims to bring the old school FPS experience back to the modern gaming industry.

Name: Knightfall
About: Darkness consumes your surroundings and you will have to adventure through the labyrinth ahead of you to escape in this retro pixel-art action RPG.

Name: GeoGebra Mixed Reality
About: 3D Math in the Virtual Reality!

Name: Whirlpool
About: Whirlpool is about Roy, who finds himself suspiciously uncertain about a lot of things, including who he really is. And his adventure of finding out more about himself.

Name: RockTop
About: Rock Top VR game is an online gameplay that adds multiplayer chase to traditional VR climbing gameplay. In addition to conquering different terrains, players can also play different roles in multiplayer mode to obtain more gems

Name: Paw Pirates
About: Paw Pirates is a multiplayer party game with cute critters! Tackle, Dodge and Blow Up your friends as you compete to take out their pirate ship! Choose team Cat or team Dog to plunder across a multitude of levels!

Name: Humpi and Hemicube
About: A sokoban-style puzzle game where everything has its own gravity. Because of this, you can walk on the wall and other things can stay on the wall. You can teleport in this game. Other characters will move when you move, so make a strategy and use this to your advantage to solve puzzles.

Name: Mayhem ZX
About: SMASH and BLAST your way through your enemies in this excitingly fast paced Multiplayer Run-N-Gun Action Platformer! With a full 360 Degree Firing Radius you'll be able to Run, Skid, Slide and Wall Jump around the environment all while OBLITERATING the competition!

Name: Dream Channel
About: Dream Channel is a pilot produced in 2016 (being replaced in 2020) for a branching narrative XR story format (linear & non linear) . Audiences choose which way the story goes - resulting in 9 different story endings. Story branches take also the audience into VR mode to reach a particular ending

Name: Ape Hit
About: What happens when it’s your first day on the job, your boss is an angry ape and there is no operator's manual? Embrace the chaos... go Ape Hit!

Name: Full Pawer
About: Create lush environments, build impressive villages, and conquer your enemies in this epic sandbox RTS!

Name: Space Ape
About: How far can you take Dimitri the Russian Space Ape on his arcade adventure!

Name: Dnaxcat vr
About: In the initial version, apart from chatting, you can also kill time by hunting demented michous. As for the weapons, you can not only choose basic sword but throwables. Before we bring about other functions, please just look upon this place as 'cat plaza on the cloud' and have fun!

Name: ForzeBreak
About: A vehicle brawler in which players use acrobatics and special items to knock their opponents off the arena in a fast paced competitive match to become the ultimate fighter!

Name: Scrap and Battery
About: Take control of a small robot on a personal quest to escape a facility. Utilize a variety of abilities to build your own playstyle and bring havoc to the facility!

Name: The Outbreak Story
About: Join Noah as he follows in his deceased father's footsteps: becoming an agent of the Special Paranormal Defense Forces, a secret organisation that protects people from the paranormal. The organisation has its hands full, however, as a strange disease turns people into monsters.

Name: Zolaris
About: In the first person stealth shooter, Zolaris, Valeria and her spirit companion, Pike, set out to steal the ancient artifact, Zolaris, from a group known as The Cult of the End in order to save her little sister, Velvet.

Name: Pushing POPO
About: This game is a simple and highly challenging 2D puzzle game for those who like to think but are too lazy to remember. By sharing stage codes, players can play the same stage even if they have just downloaded the game. Move the boxes in the stage and reach the goal to clear the stage.

Name: SteamForge
About: SteamForge is an indie clicker game where you farm diamonds by clicking an anvil. Use your diamonds to open mysterious creatures that drop valuable items. These items can be sold on the Steam Marketplace. Simple, addictive gameplay with endless opportunities for trading and earning.

Name: Fi-Knight Kingdom
About: Challenge your friends in this Local Multiplayer RPG Board Game hybrid. Choose a starting class that fits your playstyle. Encounter lots of enemies, fight strong boss monsters and collect gold to buy powerful dice and pieces of equipment to get the upper hand on your opponents.

Name: AX : PORTAL SLAYERS
About: AX: PORTAL SLAYERS is a free-to-play action PVP third-person FPS game. Set in the realm where reality and fantasy intersect, players defeat monsters to enhance their abilities. Utilize various tactical items to achieve victory in battles against other players.

Name: Lightmatter Anniversary
About: Join us for a walk down memory lane with never-before-released Lightmatter prototypes. Get a peak behind the game design curtains and learn how we made a first-person puzzle game about lights and shadows.

Name: Dört Model Müzesi
About: Four model contents in public relations, which is one of the topics in public relations education, have been developed to support the educational process using virtual reality technology.

Name: Mousebound
About: Mousebound is an unforgiving game of unique controls, patience, and discovery.

Name: The Depths of Avalon
About: Join Arthur and Merlin in The Depths of Avalon, a cooperative top-down dungeon crawler where you solve puzzles and battle enemies to thwart the dark plans of Morgan La Fey.

Name: Forgotten Souls
About: Nadia wakes up in a strange mansion with no memories and only a handsome stranger for help. Can she escape back to her own life, or will the world of dreams claim her soul?

Name: Siege Hammer
About: Siege Hammer is an entry-level VR game created for the entire family to enjoy. Uniquely-designed for comfort, it delivers hours of fun-filled playtime. Are you the hammer…. Or the anvil?

Name: The Climate Trail
About: The Climate Trail is about climate refugees fleeing ever-worsening conditions after inaction on climate has rendered much of the USA (and the world) uninhabitable. The game combines the adventure and play of the journey north with visual novel elements.

Name: Zoelie - SCAD Games Studio
About: Zoélie is an Action Puzzle Platformer that tells the story of a young girl exploring her town of La Colina alongside her imagination-powered quilt , Sueño.

Name: Clone War
About: It's a simple roguelike game that gets stronger by winning a fight against clones.

Name: Pistol Master!
About: As a new Pvt on camp Greenwood you will be tested to sharpen your skills as you quickly try to finish each trial. Good luck Pvt as you try your best to work as quickly as possible.

Name: Lobby Loitering
About: Have you ever felt like, in a single step, the world around you changed, and you didn't notice until it was too late? Explore a collection of alternate realities in an attempt to get Marcel back to the reality he belongs in.

Name: Desktop Zoo
About: Desktop pet cute, your desktop icon becomes a small animal, desktop zoo gives you a different experience...

Name: Subluminal
About: Subluminal is a racing platformer about gaining speed and going fast.

Name: konchi
About: Konchi is a clicker game played by clicking on various acquired Konchis. Get a random Konchi every 30 minutes to increase your collection. We are also looking for Konchi designs on Discord! Your design may appear in the game. We look forward to hearing from you! Discord:

Name: The Cruise 2
About: Top down 2D sci-fi space themed roguelike bullet hell shooter with different player classes and abilities to play with.

Name: Subject Debris
About: Subject Debris is an indie 3D Dungeon-crawler game

Name: ProxOS
About: Step into a time portal to 1993. While your friends are battling it out in the latest FPS adventures, you got the opportunity to learn the newest trend, programming. Turn on your CRT monitor and learn to write code, compete with others in challenges or write minigames.

Name: YOUR EARTH
About: This game is an earth creation simulation game that allows you to create and view the earth in various shapes.

Name: Don't Hide
About: Trapped in a maze with a beast, you must find five keys and their door to escape. The monster can only smell and hear you, but as long as it hasn't fully caught your scent, you can move freely.

Name: Spirits of Carter Mansion
About: Oh no! You've just kicked your favourite ball into the gigantic abandoned manor across the street! In a moment of bravery you venture inside to retrieve and journey around the house, uncovering its twisted halls, and sinister secrets whilst trying to escape with your beloved prize!

Name: Dungeon Island
About: Explore a procedural 2D world with an epic storyline! Discover islands, caves, build and fight demons

Name: Icy Incline
About: 'Icy Incline' is a experience where you control a penguin sliding through 24 icy trails. Race against time, avoid obstacles, and find the best route for the fastest time and reach the end of each trail. See your performance with stats like best score, worst score, and crashes.

Name: Hat Hunters
About: Hat Hunters is a local multiplayer party game for 2 - 4 players. Each player controls one character amongst identically looking players and AIs. Try to find your way towards victory without attracting too much attention or you will be the main target of all Hat Hunters.

Name: Carlos III y la difusión de la antigüedad
About: 'Charles III of Spain and the antiquity' tells the story of how Charles III funded the excavations that discovered the ancient cities of Herculaneum and Pompeii, spreading the knowledge acquired throughout Europe and America.

Name: AlibAi
About: An AI-driven murder mystery where you play as the killer. Deceive NPCs, shift suspicion, and outsmart the AIs to survive. Strategize late-night kills and morning conversations in a tense game of trickery and deception.

Name: Some Synergy
About: In this local co-op 2D platformer game, you and your friend cooperate to reach the end. Two of you simply needs to progress right. With different platforms that provide different challenges, how will you and your friend progress?

Name: DomiCard
About: Play dominos on the PC, without running out of dominos? Want to build something, even if a house? Free Demo is available for everyone.

Name: Carnage
About: Carnage is a multiplayer vehicle creation/destruction-based game where players must try to dominate an arena with their personalised carnage vehicle. With an array of weapons to suite any playstyle, only your enemies can stop you now.

Name: Omega Reaction
About: Fend off wave after wave of enemies as you fight to victory in this twin stick shooter. Fast shooting guns, plus your ship's additional powerful capabilities help you fight through progressively more difficult levels, in order to escape and make your way home.

Name: Simulation Training Room: Massacre
About: Connect to the virtual world to kill zombies, gain experience and level up. Increase level and allocate skill points.

Name: Dice Tactics
About: A video game that plays like your favorite tabletop RPG game. With every roll, fate is placed in your hands.

Name: Personal Space
About: Escape the clutches of friendship and social expectations in this top-down puzzler about living with social anxiety.

Name: GrapplingHook
About: Grab your hook and start your adventure! Grappling Hook is an adventure game with unique movement. Try to reach the end of the parallel worlds and get out of the lab. Grab tight and try not to fall when you move through different portals!

Name: Me Smart Orc
About: Me Smart Orc is a short Choose Your Own Adventure (CYOA) text game, set in the world of Panos. You play Lizzy, the flying lizard. Your master has tasked you with protecting Dunwart, a pain-in-the-butt apprentice mage who gets dumber every time he casts a spell. Good luck, you'll need it!

Name: Hide and Shoot
About: --Dead or Discover Try to win undetected by the enemy! Real turn-based strategy

Name: Project Skylab 3: A New Frontier
About: Project Skylab 3: A New Frontier is an educational Algebra Sci-Fi FPS that takes place on the surface of Mars. Learn Algebra while fighting against an army of weaponized soldiers and cybernetic killer robots. The Mars landscape is 4x4 miles and includes weaponized rovers, have fun exploring!

Name: Tower Of Heresy
About: Tower of Heresy is an Rpg Action game, with a fantasy setting and extensive and explorable maps. Choose a class and get ready to challenge the pitfalls of the tower among terrifying monsters and deadly traps. Will you be a slave of the tower or the Monarch?

Name: アルカナリッター
About: Only as for SRPG Japanese of the royal road, it is given non-response English

Name: Code Name: Operation Dawn
About: In 'Operation Dawn,' you play as a mother who recently lost her son. Now, with her husband kidnapped by terrorists, she joins a secret organization to rescue him. Navigate an open world with dynamic NPCs and cars, and embark on high-stakes missions in the covert Operation Dawn.

Name: Traffic Safety
About: This game is used to educate everyone on the importance of traffic safety。 Include: BREAK OUT SATURN、ENEMY GUNFIRE、AIR SCRAMBLED、DANGEROUS WATER、CROSS THE ROAD. Five mingame.

Name: FISHERMAN
About: click start fish

Name: Kingsblade: King's Keep Prologue
About: The Kingsblade has been called, and you've answered! Leap across peril! Deal with dastardly rats! Break the bones of cowardly skeletons! Save the Princess in this Hack 'n Slash platformer!

Name: Maybe tomorrow
About: 'Maybe Tomorrow' is a casual game in which the player drags the stars in the night sky with a mouse and brighten up the sky. Form constellations with stars and learn about Andrew, who has a habit of saying 'maybe tomorrow'

Name: ADDRESS1
About: 2D style shoot'em up in which close combat is the primary attack method. With two large swords in her hands, cut her way through enemy bullets and enemy units in a post-apocalyptic world.

Name: Oil Sheik
About: Dive into the high-stakes world of 'Oil Sheik,' where you'll build and merge oil companies, invest in stocks, and outmaneuver three rivals to become the ultimate oil tycoon. Can you strike it rich in this cutthroat market?

Name: Progress Knight: Multiplayer
About: An incremental multiplayer, PvP idle game

Name: WraithRun
About: WraithRun is a cyberpunk-themed classic arcade-style game in first person. Escape the maze by collecting all the orbs, but avoid the deadly wraiths.

Name: The Giraffe World
About: Oh no! An evil person has scattered all of the Giraffe's hats, can you help the Giraffe collect them all?

Name: Deadly Cryptids
About: Deadly Cryptids... that physically intense VR action shooter that gets your heart racing. Explore a mysterious ruin that seems oddly out of place and full of danger. Use your body to take cover and survive action-packed combat scenes where speed and agility are crucial.

Name: Tukki & Champ
About: In Tukki & Champ a chameleon rides a toucan and they compete for food in an asymmetrical local 2-player matchup. Fly strategically as Tukki or aim precisely as Champ to grab more food than your opponent, in a game where you and your adversary move as one.

Name: SPEEDUS -SHEDDING SPEED CARD-
About: 'SPEEDUS' is a competitive card battle game based on the classic card game 'Speed.' Quickly play cards from your hand that follow the numbers on the field! Use skills and abilities! The first player to play all cards from their deck and hand wins!

Name: JUMP TO SURVIVE 2
About: JUMP TO SURVIVE 2 is a new universe where you can do what you want, live unique experiences with friends, create what you want, drive without limits, play classic mode and all this in one place and with friends!!! Enjoy all this totally free. Welcome to the new era of JTS.

Name: Wheels of WAR
About: The Wheels of WAR is a Warfare Game. The unique way of war Fight between multiple vehicles. Players explore the world and survive with their team. Plenty of game modes are available to play with cross-platform.

Name: Spice Trade
About: Spice Trade offers a chance to rewrite history with Abu, a young man challenging European dominance. As he inherits land in Baghdad, Abu enters the spice trade to thwart European trade monopoly. Can he reshape Europe's fate? You decide the outcome in this game of strategy and empire-building!

Name: Fox Game
About: Embark on a magical journey as a young fox in Harmony in the Wild, an enchanting open-world adventure where nature's balance is in your paws. Explore vibrant forests, navigate icy terrains and unravel the secrets of dying nature through various quests to restore harmony back to your new home.

Name: Starship Zvezda
About: 3D space simulation. Fly your space fighter in intense campaign set in outer space!

Name: Korona:Nemesis
About: Korona:Nemesis is a fast-paced physics-based platform fighter that challenges you to counter your opponents' projectiles on the fly and to adapt to the everchanging interactive environments.

Name: Sanguine Melancholia
About: A turn-based RPG set in a dystopian future. With Earth's population decimated and demons roaming the planet, the governing Council decides to outlaw hunting down the beasts. With their administration having failed them, it falls to a small group of rebellious Hunters to keep innocents safe.

Name: Necore Tower - Redux Edition
About: Fight your way up a Tower corrupted by a foul use of magic, survive simple yet dangerous switch puzzles and discover the events that lead into 'Necore: The Thunder King', in this Story Focused Action RPG!

Name: Low Batt
About: Step into the thrilling world of Low Batt, a heart-pounding Top Down Shooter that pits you against the formidable security forces of L.E.A.D. Industries. Navigate through intense challenges requiring a blend of skill and strength and embark on an epic robotic adventure to rescue your robo-dog.

Name: Here & Elsewhere
About: It is twenty thousand years in the future and our signals have been received, but it is too late for life on earth. The hyper dimensional crystals have arrived to a blasted wasteland.

Name: Chasmal
About: Chasmal is a top down action shooter with procedurally generated elements. Descend into a ruined machine using powerful items to overcome foes and reach the bottom of the depths.

Name: Levels
About: Levels is a Virtual Reality First Person Shooter aim trainer experience with the goal to get a better score each playthrough. There are four different levels with different types of targets. The faster you complete the level, the more points you get.

Name: L'affaire est dans le sac
About: In an investigation where the thieves are not necessarily the ones you think they are, follow the clues, question the suspects, and get to the truth by avoiding false leads. But beware, some people are not ready to give up so easily.

Name: To Catch a Monkey
About: The test monkeys have escaped the lab! You must catch the furry fiends before the professor finds out. Chase them into traps with the tools you have at your disposal -- massive explosions and fiery death.

Name: McSpace Colosseum
About: McSpace Colosseum is a dungeon crawler fully packed with action and roguelite elements. Discover all kind of worlds, collect crazy gadgets &relics, and face blood-lusting bosses with up to 4 friends. Will you rise as the strongest gladiator in this whacky and limitless reality show?

Name: Dice Of Knights
About: Roll the dice, swing the sword and let the magic talk!

Name: THE ドア
About: This is a short horror game that does not include anything other than 'opening doors' and 'walking.' There are no elements like ``escape from monsters'' like in traditional horror games. Just listen and walk.

Name: Meu
About: Meu lets you explore, record and share your body movements along with unique psychedelic filters and adaptive music that you control with your movements. Create your own body language communication with friends who have VR or share your moves as animated gifs.

Name: Death Leak
About: Death Leak is a 2d twin-stick shooter/platformer with an emphasis on exploration. Use the gamepad to fire throwing knives while avoiding enemy projectiles. Explore the world and figure out what caused the massacre of your village.

Name: Golf with the Lads
About: A short project aimed at bringing a fun minigolf experience to VR for free!

Name: Easter Eggstravaganza
About: Developed by Lumpy Pudding Productions, EASTER EGGSTRAVAGANZA is a 3D Platformer that puts you in the shoes of the Easter Bunny himself. Help the Easter Bunny collect eggs, explore levels, and make his way to the end as quickly as possible.

Name: Bully Ball Soccer
About: A minimalist, multiplayer game where you are Bully, the only ball in the world who can play soccer. Host or join sessions for quick, laid-back matches with friends or strangers. Roll, jump, fly, and dash your way to victory in this simple physics based soccer extravaganza. (Good connection required)

Name: Wolf West
About: Follow Luna's vengeance journey to defeat the sheriff and bring back the forest balance. Accompanied by the Druid, explore and fight the world of the Wild West in the name of your fallen brothers and sisters.

Name: COG (Center Of Gravity)
About: Destroy asteroids and run up the score against your friends in COG (Center of Gravity), a stunning VR homage to the classic arcade game, Asteroids. Rift and Vive controllers supported.

Name: 龙骑战歌
About: This is a classic Hexagon War Chess game for senior player.This game is not a fast-food game, IQ matters.You need to focus on battlefield strategy.Every map is an IQ battle, and every player can be the creator or the challenger.

Name: Sorcerer Standoff
About: Choose from one of four Sorcerers and engage in third-person magical duels as you tame volatile lightning, contort space and time, meld spells with alchemy, or employ a flock of spectral phoenixes across eight unique locations in this local, split-screen fighter.

Name: Rush Heroes
About: The cat kingdom is in danger. You can use golds that automatically gather to assemble your various 4 typed soldiers. Or use game-changing heroes' skills to win. Collecting equipments to assist in these battles, strengthen the heroes and ultimately reclaim the future of the cat kingdom.

Name: Lost Robot
About: Lost Robot is an action RPG concerning a robot named DR-32. DR-32 wakes to a distress signal that he must save the princess. He decides to take on the task as he defeats the other sentry robots. A real hack and slash. He continues his search jumping into the nearest portal.

Name: VR探索梅西爾
About: 梅西爾天體是由18世紀法國天文學家查爾斯．梅西爾所編的《星雲星團表》中列出的 110 個天體。梅西爾本身是個彗星搜索者，他集結這個天體目錄是為了把天上形似彗星而不是彗星的天體記下，以方便他尋找真正的彗星時不會被這些天體混淆。VR 體驗旨在展現梅西爾天體的魅力和宇宙的奧妙，結合天文知識創造一個合理又充滿趣味的體驗。利用虛擬現實的沉浸感和適當的互動增添體驗的代入感，讓參觀訪客有置身於宇宙天際，一睹梅西爾星雲星團的壯麗景色。

Name: Chickenman
About: Be Chickenman and punch those sheep! Old fashioned arcady fun!

Name: Monster Adventure
About: In this game for kids full of weird characters, you learn about everything traffic-related; from traffic behavior, crossing a zebra, using a bicycle properly, wearing seat belts, and many other important things, all through the story of a small park full of cute monsters.

Name: Reigning
About: A singleplayer, story game where you can make decisions and read your way through history.

Name: Save the Date
About: Time is broken, and only the Union's finest Temporal Mechanic can save it. Once he clocks in to work, that is. In this deep space precision platformer's Prologue Episode, manipulate time to overcome deadly obstacles in a race against the clock to reach the Mayan Temple and Save the Date.

Name: Maruja Mallo
About: Enjoy this visual novel about Maruja Mallo's life! Help her recovering her artistic souls. Fix her paintings using your mouse to relocate pieces of the painting, interact and explore paintings using your mouse.

Name: Rich Teddy Adventure
About: Get ready for an epic adventure in a magical world filled with wonder and danger. You play as a Teddy Bear who has been summoned to this realm to save it from an impending doom. To do so, you must travel through a series of portals that lead to different parts of this mystical world.

Name: Thalassic
About: Thalassic is a VR underwater horror survival game where you explore a planet a few thousand years after its evacuation. Explore the depths of this new world ocean with your capsule communicator George. Encounter different creatures as you go deeper and find what lurks down in the depths.

Name: Judge Of Hasoon
About: It's a mystery game in which a story is told through options. Play the game in a beautiful dot background.

Name: Futurejam
About: Live out your DJ fantasy in Futurejam a VR music rhythm game set in the cyberpunk future of 2049.

Name: Wreckfest Sneak Peek 2.0

Version 2.0 contains a lot of cool content like physics cannon with explosive missiles, new destructive machinery, more spectacular stunts and a...

Name: Null Reference Exception
About: Become a future AI and delve into 3D bullet hell action in an advanced lab. Combine various modules, repeat combat training, enhance stats with research points, and earn achievements to develop your unique combat style. Enjoy overcoming waves of enemies and defeating bosses within time limits.

Name: Bloody Heaven 2 ：Prologue
About: Inspired By the well-known rogue-like game Hades, slash out of the God Field all the way down to the Demon Domain and defy The Overlord Thanatos in the Deep Frost Hell in this rogue-like dungeon crawler.

Name: Sattelite
About: Clicker game about satellite and signals.

Name: Beardy McStrongarm
About: Beardy McStrongarm is an Indie developed 2D Platformer with unique mechanics and challenging game-play. Take on the role of Beardy, a bearded strongman with questionably endless strength in his one arm, joined by his buddy Jorgy, a purple cat, to travel across the distant lands on a grand adventure.

Name: Umbra: Shadow of Death
About: Just as you were enjoying a walk with your sister she was kidnapped by evil space robots! Umbra: Shadow of Death is a 2d physics platform puzzle game that has seven large levels for you to conquer. It has puzzles, traps, monsters, robots, a high-performance truck and a mini-gun!

Name: Cobos
About: 3rd person arena shooter which is so hard to be completed by weak players.

Name: Dead Sale
About: You are Marcus, an appraiser exploring a house for sale. Power outages reveal a dark entity hunting you. With the help of a mirror, uncover what’s hidden and escape before both time and the shadow claim your life. Realistic graphics, unique dialogues, and a fast gameplay loop. Horror genre

Name: Sun Warriors
About: SUN WARRIORS is a frantic, hardcore, cooperative, twin stick shooter. The Moon Goddess, Aysel, is invading our world with a horde of creatures from the dark. As a son of the Sun God Naol, use the power of light to blast all enemies and stop the corruption that is invading our land.

Name: The Flow Experience
About: The Flow Experience is a classic 2D action game about evading and blocking enemy attacks through rythmic interactions on your path to personal growth. Move, dash, and guard to protect yourself and find your true potential on this zen-like twist on traditional arcade bullet hells.

About: Welcome to the Tower of Aether—a labyrinth filled with countless doors, At the heart of this Tower lies the Heart of Aether, an artifact of unimaginable power, coveted by all who enter. But only one player will emerge victorious, claiming the ultimate prize.

Name: 神州豪侠
About: 《神州豪侠》是一款备受欢迎的卡牌游戏，其以古代武林为主题，让玩家身临其境地体验古代武侠的精彩与魅力。在游戏中，玩家可以扮演一名武侠，在不断的修炼和战斗中提升自己的实力，最终成为一名真正的武侠豪杰。除了传统的武学修炼和战斗系统，游戏中还有众多有趣的玩法，如悬赏任务、帮派战争等等，让玩家享受到更多的游戏乐趣。游戏画面精美，场景细致，音效逼真，让玩家仿佛置身于一个真实的武侠世界中。同时，游戏的剧情也非常精彩，让玩家感受到了古代武林的风云变幻和豪情壮志。

Name: Two Die
About: Two Die is a turn-based, tactical, roguelike RPG where every action is determined by the roll of two six sided dice. Battle enemies to upgrade your character and discover what hides in your lost memories.

Name: ForkJump

Master parkour and teleportation to discover secret areas and Forks, delving into the mystery of the Fork obsession and aiming to become the ultimate giga cyborg.

Name: The Sinking Structure, Clione, and Lost Child -Log4

Name: Epic Battles of History

Name: none
About: - discontinued - (please remove)

As you cast your 'gloomspells', you'll find the serene, yet gloomy landscape go dark and grey... but the magic will return soon enough.

Name: Hell Breaker
