About: KIRO II: The Wizards Guild is a fantasy based multiplayer dungeon crawler in which up to six players can join online together to navigate through semi-procedurally generated dungeons using a classic text command system to slay monsters, collect loot, and defeat dungeon bosses.

Name: VED: Purification
About: VED is a story-driven RPG with a unique turn-based combat system and rogue-lite elements. The free version 'Purification' lets you explore the very beginning of VED's narrative and see if its world, art style and music draw you in - and continue where you left off in the full game!

Name: FLUCTUOID
About: Fluctuoid (noun.) a thing that changes size. Puzzle platforming that emphasises flow, discovery and a unique, laid back experience. Shrink and grow to make your way through the maze.

Name: Life in the Dorms
About: A comedy adventure game about love, friendship, and ramen noodles.

Name: FireRun - 逃生門
About: 'FireRun - 逃生門' offers a thrilling 2D adventure in an ordinary 3D world. Break through obstacles, survive, and showcase your sprinting skills. Prepare for heart-pounding challenges and unleash your courage in this exhilarating game!

Name: They Linger
About: Navigate the narrow hallways in the darkness to find and rescue Jessica and survive the infinite Labyrinth.

Name: Alone In The Forest VR
About: Explore the forest, solve the puzzles, start the generators and call for help. Use the flashlight to defend yourself from the 'thing' that tries to kill you.

Name: Puzzle Cube
About: Solve the 3x3 cube from a 2D perspective and set a record time! Tutorial video available on YouTube via in-game link. Various backgrounds, music, and cube skins to customize the experience. The timer can be turned off for learning or casual play. Online leaderboards track best times.

Name: Mapas do Horizonte - Um jogo para conhecer BH
About: Neste jogo infanto-juvenil gratuito que reúne quebra-cabeças em formatos diversos e jogos de encontrar objetos, o jogador conhece um pouco mais sobre a história da capital mineira ao passar por diversos desafios junto da professora Clara, da motorista Suely e da turma de alunos!

Name: Hot Robot
About: Strap yourself on for this First-Person Shooter with sex toy projectiles. Battle other dong-launching players in P2P multiplayer games like Capture the flag, Team Deathmatch, and Conquest.

Name: Shatterbound
About: Work with your past (and future) selves to solve puzzles. Shatter your obstacles, be your own platform, and more in this time-looping puzzler where YOU are your own solution!

Name: FITRIZ
About: Food puzzle game. Complete lines of food blocks and collect 175+ food items in 30 levels with the help of a raccoon.

Name: Hard, Fast, & Flashy
About: WARNING: THIS GAME IS HARD AS F***!! Run, jump, and blast your way through an unforgiving cyberscape at breakneck speeds, pushing your mind and body to their limits in the never ending pursuit of perfection. Studies show that nearly 15% of people enjoy being punished...Do you like it hard and fast?

Name: ProBee
About: A fast paced, team based arena game, in which the players control cybernetic athletes to measure their skills at Ultimate Frisbee and Parkour. Strategically place yourself around the arena to catch your team’s passes.

Name: BloodMoon
About: Survive the BloodMoon's horrors! Multiplayer horror game where teamwork is crucial. Run, hide, and escape to outwit relentless evil.

Name: Four Course Dungeon
About: It’s the 100th year anniversary of the ultimate cooking competition show, Four Course Dungeon! Every year, chefs from across the land gather to compete in a hunting, gathering, and cooking battle royale. Four chefs will enter, but only ONE can claim the title of the Legendary Dragon Chef!

Name: Portal Defect
About: Portal Defect is a Top-Down Roguelite set in the Future and you are an agent sent to the past to alter it. But something goes wrong!....Will you be able to escape time and space and return home? or will you die trying?

Name: Dot to Dot Sweep
About: Go for the high score in this arcade-style color matching action game. Maneuver your character through fields of colored dots collecting those that match your color.

Name: Missing Pictures : Abel Ferrara
About: For every movie made, dozens of pictures remain missing forever. The VR documentary experience MISSING PICTURES: Abel Ferrara gives the director a chance to tell the story that would otherwise never be told.

Name: Jigsaw Puzzles: Master Artists of Old
About: Jigsaw Puzzles depicting the beautiful paintings of the old master artists!Immerse yourself in the stories that these master artists weave in their paintings! Witness their incredible skill and knowledge of light, form, shadows, and colour!

Name: Launch Director
About: A walking simulator where you can launch rockets! Become the Launch Director for a commercial space transportation company. Can you configure these reusable rockets for a successful launch, ascent and landing?

Name: Death Becomes You: Yuri Onsen Vacation
About: Alice and Sophie finally have the time to go on an onsen retreat. However, their trip gets inturrupted by mysterious magic. The last straw: 'MY FOOD!!!' Will the couple be able to find the culprit and finally enjoy their vacation?

Name: Wicked Arcana
About: Step into the mystical world of 'Wicked Arcana,' where ancient runes unlock powerful magic and hidden truths in this early access demo.

Name: VR INTERACTIVE TRAILER: Runes
About: Experience this VR trailer in full immersion inside your headset and get a sneak peek of Runes, a single player, story-driven VR adventure game in which you are Leth, a renegade wizard fighting for survival in a virtual fantasy world.

Name: The Tales of Redbox: An Escape From Desire
About: A rail shooter thriller that will put your mouse flicks to the test.

Name: Cryspace
About: Cryspace is a fresh visual novel with a nostalgic flavor. Talk to your friends online, meet with them in-person, and allow your friend group to grow in numbers, or fall into despair through your own decision-making and discretion. Experience the first few dates with Sam for FREE.

Name: Conor Origins - T Trilogy
About: Experience Conor's first three visual novels. There's a story about a lonely man going for a walk, a guy getting tapped in a prison cell on an island, and a girl trying to confess to her weird crush.

Name: Spider Fear
About: Immersive Virtual Reality game where you fend off attacking spiders.

Name: Excommunicated
About: A typing game of investigation in a space base

Name: Swarm Horror
About: Swarm Horror is a survival horror game in which the player must progress while defeating insects. The goal of the game is to escape from the feeding ground of the insects you have wandered into. The insects call their friends to feed on you.

Name: Zero spring episode 2
About: It is a sequel to Zero spring episode 1. First you can choose to display the previous synopsis so you can enjoy it without playing the previous game. Although the previous work was FPS, it became JRPG to express the story completely from episode 2.

Name: Community Ball
About: This is a indie runner game based on geometry dash, in the game are 7 levels, Feel good, Firefly, My heart and more. The most of the levels have ncs songs so if you are a youtuber you wont have any probrem wirh the songs. In the game you have to collect coins in all levels.

Name: In a Detective's Mind
About: In a Detective's Mind is an investigation game that seeks to put you in the role of a detective, who needs to solve cases and deal with obscure problems from his past.

Name: 超越海盗
About: 《超越海盗》是一款一款策略类冒险游戏，玩家通过管理船员，探索岛屿，挖掘宝藏，探索各个地区，不断收集新的设备与武器，击败更强的敌人，深挖背后关于神的故事。目前无力维护中，仅作纪念。

Name: Count to Ten: Infinity
About: In this arcade-style game, chasing higher scores becomes an addictively fast-paced quest for precision. Count to Ten challenges you to tap numbered shapes in sequence, ramping up the challenge with every success. Pure, quickfire fun!

Name: Lichkeeper
About: Build traps and fling magic to protect the crystal heart that holds your immortal soul from an onslaught of wizards who are hell bent on destroying you!

Name: CoronaFighter
About: A coronavirus-themed shoot-em-up in the classic arcade tradition.

Name: マグネクション磁
About: This is a Magnetic force operation system 3D action game. By changing the objects on the stage and their own poles, we will capture various stages using the repulsive force and attractive force of the magnetic force.

Name: The Broston Saga
About: Battle rival gang members, uncover dark government secrets, befriend a talking cat, fight advanced humanoid androids, and go toe to toe against literal gods. Take the role of Tyrone Broston as you attempt to save a crumbling world filled with memes and chaos.

Name: Wetware
About: Explore the interplays between AI ethics and consciousness in the shoes of a researcher tasked to hack an enemy drone to win a war.

Name: 多宝修仙
About: This is a turn-based strategy immortal cultivation game, where you can subdue spiritual pets from all walks of life, refine exclusive magic weapons, and meet immortals and Taoists. My cultivation is my master!

Name: Beatitas
About: Join Lily on her pilgrimage as she pushes through trials, puzzles, and strategic combat in order to be reunited with her family.

Name: Cyber Blades - Demo
About: Cyber blades is a game where you fight back by slicing the enemy projectile with a melee weapon in a synthwave setting. It provides a unique experience that allows you to face hundreds of enemy archers with melee weapons. Slash arrows more powerfully, and get a higher score by cutting in a row!

Name: Darkness Eternal
About: A button-based top-down tower defense game that uses multiple mechanics for the player to enhance and defeat enemies with. There are 3 different towers the player unlocks by completing levels. Each one has a different purpose, range, damage, and rate of fire as the primary mechanics.

Name: Memory Maze
About: Memory Maze is a new maze game with an original concept. Designed for all types of players and all ages.

Name: Sluggerpunk
About: Sluggerpunk is a gripping 2D survivors roguelike adventure. As you navigate through a myriad of challenges, hone your skills and strategies to clash with formidable foes lurking in the underground. Build a versatile arsenal of abilities and gear to enhance your chances to survive, but will you?

Name: Reiner Knizia's The Confrontation
About: A turn-based strategy game pitting two players of Light and Shadow against each other with asymmetric forces and hidden units.

Name: Imperial Arms: Curse of the Conqueror
About: Imperial Arms is a grid-based, tactical RPG with classic style pixel graphics and level design.

Name: ESKO
About: ESKO is a virtual reality version of the first Finnish computer.

Name: Change the World
About: Human belief has the power to change reality. For millennia, alien races have been visiting Earth, gaining supernatural abilities and fantastic wealth by exploiting this remarkable power. But humans are advancing, and many aliens now find themselves leaving Earth with nothing but debts and regrets.

Name: Wings of The Universe
About: Wings of The Universe (WoTU) is a free-to-play 2D indie space action MMORPG top-down game developed by a single programmer. WoTU is designed to be co-op heavy, but even a lone wolf can survive with his skills and have fun.

Name: Owe Money Pay Money
About: Big Chief embarks on a quest for justice & cold hard cash in this retro brawler. Packed with eye-popping pixel art, 8-bit bangers, & a Singaporean twist, it’s as bizarre as beat ‘em ups get. Welcome to Owe Money Pay Money (O$P$)!

Name: The Lost Island
About: After an emergency landing with a space capsule you wake up alone (?) on an unknown abandoned planet. Without knowing where you are. To survive you will have to find food, craft items, harvest, build a shelter and keep the fire lit.

Name: 四叶草咖啡厅
About: 本游戏主旨绿色健康阳光积极向上充满正能量，无不良导向。

Name: StarMaker VR
About: Start your music journey in StarMaker VR, sing to release the real you and dance with your souls in the melody of the music! You will enjoy what you have changed in this all new experience!

Name: Nightcrawler VR Bowling
About: A bowling game for city slickers who like the night life vibes. Keeps track of your score adding extra points for strikes and spares. Reset at any time.

Name: Chronicles of cyberpunk - Deep sleep
About: Chronicles of cyberpunk - Deep sleep - is an exciting story about the confrontation between Big Brother and Supercomputer in unusual world

Name: Dungeon Heroes
About: Explore and fight your way through randomly generated dungeons in this action-packed local co-op multiplayer dungeon crawler!

Name: DEUS EX MACHINA: Stage Zero
About: Stage 0 is a puzzle-based VR room escape adventure game.

Name: DreamIsland
About: This game is an action exploration game where you complete various missions and collect 51 cards. The map is an open world, and you'll have to solve people's problems and unravel the mysteries of the world from a vast map!

Name: Everbee
About: This is a game about managing a beehive. Collect resources from flowers to raise bees and expand the hive!

Name: Boom Stick
About: Boom Stick is a Fast-Paced Shooter with projectile based combat. Inspired by many of the Old School Shooters but with some new Ideas.

Name: Imaginary girl -Prequel-
About: The future art will be drawn by two people... Platonic love? Drawing? Adventure game?

Name: MalovModernArt Virtual Museum
About: Explore virtual masterpieces in the mesmerizing MalovModernArt Virtual Museum, where modern art comes to life through your VR headset. Immerse yourself, engage, and be captivated by a world of colors and stories.

Name: Hachi Hachi Mystery
About: Hachi Hachi Mystery is a interactive Visual Novelf taking place at university. It's your first year as a university student and you're going to discover this new life! ...Well, that's how it should have happened.

Name: Pro Strategy Football 2019
About: Attention! PSF 2020 will be released in early September! With a full in-game editor, the ability to run multiple careers and season campaigns, full Play by Play of all games, and more, PSF 2020 is a massive update to the Pro Strategy Football series! Customize everything about your league, team, players, and images!

Name: Jooin's Romance Fantasy
About: It's a two-person production game for fans by V-tuber 'Lee Jooin'.The development of the game began with the support of many 'Churros(fans)' written in the ending credits. Enjoy the romance fantasy stories of 'Lee Jooin' and 'Churros'

Name: Daiichi Dash
About: Following the destruction of her hometown by a tsunami and the ensuing nuclear fallout, twelve-year-old Aiko travels to Tokyo to punish those allegedly responsible for her home's destruction.

Name: Skader
About: A sci-fi MOBA with unique ice-skating locomotion and a trail generator device to catch your enemies. Use power-ups to gain an advantage, coordinate with the team, and fight for your universe in the ultimate multiverse battle for the ancient artifact to save your universe from incursion

Name: Spoockey
About: Who cares about Christmas! We wanted Halloween all year long, so we made SPOOCKEY, a competitive multiplayer air hockey/block break mashup to satisfy your creepy cravings

Name: I Did It ALL for the COOKIE!
About: You are hanging out at a festive Christmas party when your eyes discover the most perfect Christmas confectionery ever! You must have it!... but someone already has it! What will you be willing to do, to get your Christmas wish?

Name: REAL MAN GOT 100
About: A simple platform jumping parkour game

Name: Peak Darkness
About: Survive and defend your home or don't it really doesn't matter. What matters is sending those things back to where they came from. Use weapon upgrades, friends or whatever to do this just get it done.

Name: さらば劇薬 -encore-
About: 普通の女子高生・ソワレは、普通な自分を変えるために普通じゃない劇団のオーディションを受けることにした。そこで出会ったのは元子役の女子高生・マチネ。彼女もまた、ソワレと同じく主役の座を狙っていたのだった……。

Name: My Hobby: Needlework Galore
About: Everything you need to create beautiful needlework creations! Simply select a spool of colored thread, find the corresponding number, and watch your fantastic needlework come to life in glorious textured detail with no wasted time gathering supplies and threading needles!

Name: Everlasting Abundance
About: A greedy AAA game company rules the world with an iron fist. You must join a faction of independent rebels and defeat the tyranny of Everlasting Abundance. Can you succeed? Is it all just a pointless dream?

Name: 地狱烹烹乐 Hell's Cooking Joy
About: 'Hell Cooking' is a cute mini-game of business simulation, in which players will play the manager of a Hell restaurant and prepare dishes that meet the needs of customers. In the game, you'll have to take care of the time to chop vegetables, cook them, and appease your guests.

Name: Project: Ternion
About: Ternion is the perfect game for anyone looking for a fast paced hero shooter where all heroes are tailored to unique play styles.

Name: 哥布林信条：起源  Goblin Creed: Origins
About: The kingdom is in danger. You must communicate this to your master!

Name: Jump By Coronho: Chapter 2
About: A saga continua. O universo de Jump By Coronho é expandido com novos personagens, mecânicas e histórias em Jump: Chapter 2. O jogador ao longo da gameplay vai pegando itens que o auxiliam na experiência, como gancho e a capacidade de construção.

Name: Circuit Breakout: Dual Polarity
About: Unravel the mysteries of a derelict facility as you control two characters with unique abilities simultaneously in this thought-provoking 3D puzzle adventure.

Name: Oylinder
About: A 3D platformer like you've never seen before, you must climb a mountain, by controlling a ball with six legs, a key for each leg, jump, roll and fall until you have mastered it. If you seek a challenge, this is it.

Name: Evrisia Art
About: Evrisia Art is a VR painting program that can help introduce new users to Virtual Reality in a fun, relaxed and easy to use way. By drawing simple shapes, new users can immediately get a sense of control over their environment without having to learn complex tools.

Name: Sbeve
About: A game of immense adventure and fun excavation potential.

Name: Ronald's Run
About: Help Ronald use his magic to defeat the crazy nanoos. There are 3 levels to choose from and you can collect as many coins as possible. A fun single-player as Ronald gains experience with every nanoo vanquished.

Name: Summoneer
About: Summoneer is a platformer and puzzle game, where you engineer your own designs.

Name: Find the Birds
About: Find the Birds is a free to play educational game about birds and conservation.

Name: Sleigh Strikers
About: Santa's going high-tech with the Present Launcher 1225! Join the jolly ride, rescue reindeer, and blast presents down chimneys in this holly, jolly, fast paced shoot 'em up. Make every shot count and save Christmas in a dash!

Name: King of Hell
About: King of Hell is a 6-player, online, Arcade Party Game. You play against your friends in a arena filled with random Items and Jump'n Run obstacles. Try to knock your opponents into the lava to stash points and then climb up to the top platform, to score your points and become King of Hell!

Name: Horatio: Connector 13
About: Akio's accidental encounter with 'Horatio’s Life' leads to a mysterious journey intertwining his past with a parallel world. Unravel secrets, confront otherworldly threats, and uncover the truth in this atmospheric adventure.

Name: Universe 51: Tannhäuser Wars
About: Universe 51: Tannhäuser Wars is a free-to-play fast-paced multiplayer FPS, taking inspiration from games like DOOM and Quake. In Tannhäuser Wars, two unfamiliar groups are mysteriously teleported to the same location. Since communication between them is impossible or undesirable, they clash!

Name: Degradation: Kyomu's Fury - 劣化：キョムの怒り
About: Fight viruses, survive insane waves of rays and bullets, and find out more about the inhabitants of the Network in this mix of exploration and 3D bullet-hell/FPS game.

Name: GameLab UngAalborg
About: This game will consist of games made in UngAalborg's GameLab.

Name: Jump Dash Soar
About: Jump Dash Soar is a frenetic, fast, and fun movement-based FPS. Build incredible speed with a powerful dash mechanic combined with rocket jumping, strafe running, slope jumps, and bounce pads!

Name: Hop N' Swap
About: 2D platformer where you swap between three characters with different movement.

Name: Sime Is Back
About: Sime's back, celebrated by locals but tired of exploitation. Join him & his feline friend on a whimsical Adriatic journey. Armed with his fish, Sime confronts enemies, smashes crates & reclaims what's his. Dive into this charming adventure of chaos, camaraderie, & fish-flinging fun!

Name: Quest Of Peril
About: Dive into the dark world of a Dying Earth, in this Idle exploration rougelike with turn based combat

Name: Car War Legends
About: Overcome dangerous obstacles, Battle against other drivers, and Race to the death in this intense car racing game!

Name: Skinscape
About: In this VR artwork, UK based artist Ian Truelove scales his paintings up to gargantuan proportions to show the beauty of the pixels they are made from.

Name: Flain - Tao force & Cubes
About: Pair and collect the floating cubes using Tao force. It may be a very hard game. Check your progress step by step and eventually reach the wisdom of Tao force.

Name: ED-IT
About: You are a robot named Ed with the ability to dream. Use your abilities to platform through levels and dream your way around obstacles.

Name: Solar Sweets
About: A multiplayer kitchen-simulator game where you can compete with your friends to find how who is the better chef! Create 10+ different types of pastries including: Waffles, Croissants, Pancakes and more!

Name: Temple of Pizza
About: Deliver pizzas to a mysterious party taking place in a previously abandoned temple in the woods.

Name: STARSHIP
About: In the game, you have different spaceships and 13 different skills. Gain money, parts, and skill pieces in victory and create your own ship skill set. In combat, anticipate your opponent's actions, avoid his damage, allocate energy properly, deploy skills, and push him to his death step by step.

Name: edataconsulting VR Office
About: Come at visit us (virtually) at our office in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. Enjoy a very simple VR sandbox experience for all, VR newbies and enthusiasts. Experience in first person the sensations of a digital twin environment. Learn how to move around and interact with objects in VR.

Name: Splash
About: Splash is a third-person splash damage based action RPG where you play as an alchemist traveling the land, creating more potions.

Name: Golden Panic
About: Golden Panic is a local and online Multiplayer Dungeon Crawler (from 2 to 4 players). Games are quick and user friendly.

Name: Galaxy X
About: Embark on an epic journey in this hardcore Multiplayer RPG! As a Galactic Cadet, you and your Combat Squad of friends must brave hostile worlds in search of valuable loot and resources. Craft powerful gear, slay otherworldly creatures, and save the galaxy.

Name: Time Jumper
About: Play as a time traveling wizard who's being chased by a timeless entity known only as the Void. Learn to harness your time traveling abilities as you carefully maneuver through treacherous environments from both the past and the future in Time Jumper - Time Traveling Precision Platformer.

Name: Wolfpack Island
About: Explore an island, meet others wolves in a multiplayer world, mine for resources, plant and harvest crops and take part in a wide-range of mini-games and activities! Dazzle friends with rare clothes and complete quests to find rare items!

Name: iBasket Manager 3 - Online Basketball Manager
About: Join the online Basketball revolution and immerse yourself in the ultimate sports simulation, where your decisions on and off the court will define your legacy. iBasket Manager 3 represents the nextgen of online Basketball Manager games. Are you taking the challenge, Manager?

Name: Wetpants
About: Wetpants is a short VR archery experience. Get your bow and bombs and guard that fortress to the last man and...tree?

Name: Piranha
About: Trotting through deserts, snow and forests to enter a portal by killing the Piranhas using abilities, combat and pickups

Name: Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Anime
About: If you like to make puzzles, Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Anime is your game. Beautiful and colorful images of anime kawaii style with a comfortable and intuitive interface and relaxing music that will allow you to concentrate on the difficult task of solving these puzzles.

Name: CycloHex
About: CycloHex is a twist on the classic board game Hex. Despite it's simple rules, there's a world of strategy in CycloHex and countless ways to out-think your opponent! Play against your friends locally or online, or take on the built-in AI!

Name: Mixed Estate
About: Mixed Estate is designed to bring solution for you to be confident in purchase.

Name: Spaceminers
About: Spaceminers is a free-to-play game where you can win Real Gold. Spaceminers: Gold Runner is a timed racing obstacle course and is the first of three game modes in our Early Access phase that will be released throughout 2023 and 2024. The full Spaceminers game launches in Spring 2025.

Name: Party Parkade
About: Party Parkade is a local couch multiplayer game where players compete against each other to score points by parking cars. While colliding into your friends and environment, frantically looking for spots, and experiencing power-ups, the game is guaranteed to spark chaotic entertainment in your homes!

Name: RogueLite
About: 'RogueLite' is a simple randomly generated dungeon that was inspired by classic RPGs, complete with 100 floors, over 200 treasures to find and 70 monsters to hunt, and 6 playable classes plus 6 unlockable classes.

Name: Bloodland
About: Bloodland is an online multiplayer combat game, based around magic and spell-casting. Join a team, play as different roles, and customize your character's attributes lead your team to victory. Battle across different landscapes in online matchmaking.

Name: 三国计-Q萌回合制卡牌
About: 《三国计》以三国历史为背景，重现经典回合战斗模式，各路猛将尽数登场，造型精美英姿重现。游戏内还有丰富多样的养成系统，心仪神将随性培养，花样阵容自由搭配。更能体验在战场上调兵遣将，与其他玩家争霸三国之巅，完成一统大业的恢弘壮志

Name: We're Party Together!
About: Easy to understand and simple casual game. Let's play 10 mini-games using WASD and arrow keys and run for a new record!

Name: Aphelion Headhunters
About: Aphelion Headhunters is a Third-Person PVE Hero Shooter featuring two unique player characters, each with their own distinct playstyle, abilities and suite of selectable upgrades.

Name: Rocket Swords
About: FLY THROUGH THE AIR USING A UNIQUE MOTION SYSTEM, NEVER BEFORE SEEN IN VR!

Name: Restoring the Past
About: Restore ancient artifacts in the company of a cat!

Name: Bible Trivia
About: How well do you know your Bible Trivia? Bible Trivia has never been so much fun. Challenge yourself or have a Bible Trivia night with friends and family in Party Mode!

Name: Body of Mine
About: Body of Mine is an award-winning VR experience that allows you to step into the body of another gender and discover the stories of transgender individuals.

Name: Cube Chase
About: Challenge your reflexes, navigate obstacles, dodge guards and pass checkpoints to unlock new areas and reach the glowing golden cube.

Name: Ashes of the Ark
About: Built exclusively for VR, Ashes of the Ark puts you into a survival situation where zombies have taken over the failing space station. Handle the most realistic weapons with real-life movements, freely explore the Ark, and solve puzzles in VR. Can you stop the Flood before they reach the cryo-sector?

Name: 250ms
About: 『250ms』 is a platform game that tests the player's reaction speed. The name '250ms' refers to the average human reaction time. Players progress through stages by quickly defeating various enemies.

Name: The treasure of civilization
About: VR文旅解谜冒险游戏；多人玩家的欢快VR游戏体验！射箭、密室、砍海盗等等丰富玩法，还能体验到大唐烟花等奇特盛宴！

Name: You are next

Name: Through time
About: Do you like challenging platform games? Then this game is for you!

Name: Hell Miners
About: Hell Miners is an action-packed 2D platformer roguelite where you dodge traps, defeat monsters and collect gold to build on your arsenal of powers, all while ascending to greater heights!

Name: Hangman
About: The classic Hangman game is now on Steam! Help Balloon Boy guess the correct words and phrases to avoid being eaten by the beast.

Name: Werelderfgoed: Romeins Aquaduct van Nijmegen en Berg en Dal
About: Ontdek hoe het Romeinse aquaduct van Nijmegen en Berg en Dal eruit moet hebben gezien. Bezoek verschillende locaties langs het traject, van de bron tot de waterbak in het Romeinse legerkamp.

Name: Sound Horizons
About: Score unique melodies in this minimalist rhythm game. Experience a dynamic music that reacts to your actions, and try to survive until the end.

Name: Small Dragon Big Appetite
About: 'Join Chompie as he explores the enchanted bunny kingdom, hunting down bunnies to satisfy his insatiable appetite! How many days can you go without starving?'

Name: Legend of the 9 Swords: Side Story
About: Legend of the 9 Swords: Side Story is a 2-Dimensional illustrated narrative role-playing game that is hand animated to give every hero and enemy there own style and feel.

Name: Skoory Rush
About: Arcadey arena platformer. Collect items, chain together combos, and enjoy the colorful graphics & energetic sounds.

Name: Dark: Frontier
About: Have you just been dying to hear the satisfying crunch of skeleton bone give way under your sword? Does throwing a kunai into the face of an enemy give you tingles in a special place? Maybe you perfer to spell sling your way out of otherwise boring situations? VR crawl your way into the Dark.

Name: VR Puzzle Box
About: Accept incredible brain twister challenge - try immersive VR experience that is simple, but very exciting.

Name: Cosmic Magus
About: An arcade spellcasting roguelite experience. Endless waves of enemies come at you, wait for them to use a spell then steal it and use it to eliminate them all.

Name: ニャンパヤ
About: 最大8人で対戦が可能な、3マッチパズルゲームだよ！ 同じ絵柄のピースを3つ以上揃えると、ピースが消えて得点ゲット！ 消えてる最中に消すことで得点アップ！ 高得点を目指して制限時間以内に消しまくれ！！

Name: Light Rider
About: Outrun and out think your opponents in this color shifting top-down racer. Shift your car into different parts of the color spectrum to avoid obstacles and discover shortcuts.

Name: Atrius Star
About: Bullet hell roguelite with challenging AI, fun weapons, monster infighting, and speed running.

Name: Deathly Dominion
About: Deathly Dominion is an intense survival game where players face endless hordes of zombies in a post-apocalyptic world. Each wave brings new challenges, requiring quick skills and well-thought-out strategies to survive. An immersive and challenging game for fans of the genre.

Name: Once A Stray
About: A brave cat named Auguen, indebted to the spirit Bennet, undertakes a series of quests in order to save their city from a plague cast upon by the necromancer Lazarus.

Name: Grave Robber
About: Grave Robber is a simple, tiny, fun and challenging arcade game where you'll face hordes of undead enemies and try to get the highscore.

Name: The Last Exodus
About: Turn-based tactical strategy with massive capital ships, frigates, gunships and fighter squads. Gather resources, research technologies, design and expand your fleet. Destroy your enemies. Single player and multi player mode, hot seat mod also available.

Name: Operation DogFight
About: Operation DogFight is a free local multiplayer airplane combat game where all the pilots are Dogs. Make use of dog-themed weapons to take down your friends across multiple maps.

Name: Dub Club
About: A third person multiplayer virtual music venue featuring an in-game live music stream.

Name: OUBEY VR - Samurai
About: Inside the art - Oubey Samurai In this VR you’re in a tight space surrounded by the deep red of the painting. Discover “the picture behind the picture” whilst also leaving your own tracks in the painting.

Name: Spookyard
About: Spookyard is a local 2D multiplayer computer game that has different and competitive dynamics for each arena, offering game modes that can vary within the topdown and sidescroll camera styles.

Name: Gleeb Glob
About: Gleeb Glob is a physics-based 2D precision platformer following a fatigued employee. Climb the corporate ladder by racing to the top through a series of challenging platforms. Run solo or race with others in competitive multiplayer matches.

Name: VR Museum
About: VR Museum - a virtual exhibition of historic machines, flying, would-be flying, and wannabe-flying. Walk as close as you want and DO touch the exhibits!

Name: 幻刃录
About: 《幻刃录》是一款西游题材的RPG仙侠游戏，不单拥有丰富的玩法、精美的场景、炫丽的打斗特效等特色，更有幻刃神兵特色养成系统；在游戏里你可将一块凡铁打造成为能与孙悟空金箍棒同阶的存在，幻刃神兵多种形态可满足玩家培养的欲望；游戏中更新悟空虎装，唐僧袈裟等特色时装让玩家本色出演；加入仙门学习仙法，丰富副本获得法宝，开局送神兵，通关送vip，元宝直接掉落，拥有VIP与神兵的你，可以创建家族，制霸全服；快来与孙悟空一起大闹天宫吧！

Name: Zeitz Machz √Rhapsody
About: A strange location, an awkward situation, and a mysterious girl: what will these lead to?

Name: Ultikill
About: Ultikill is a free to play top down shooter. It has single player and multiplayer features. There are a plethora of weapons to take on the endless number of monsters as well as the other players you are up against.

Name: LabyrInk
About: LabyrInk is the result of a 5-day Game Jam. It's an exciting third person shooter where the environment starts out completely invisible. You and other Goblinks must paint it up in order to reveal a path to your opponents. Features two distinct game modes: Last One Standing and Deathmatch.

Name: Mindworks: The Great Division
About: A choice-based visual novel game about science, division, and the false ideology of knowledge. Each and every one of your choices will determine whether the disciplines will end in unity or complete division. The key to eternal knowledge is in your hands.

Name: Space Revenge - Prologue
About: Space Revenge - Prologue is an action-exploration game. With a top down perspective, twin stick controls and a sci-fi mood to explore the enemy base full of dangers. Embark in this adventure and hunt down the responsible of your fathers dead. The only way is REVENGE!

Name: Cube Battlefield: 2048
About: A rogue-like top-down shooting game with infinitely generated levels. Grow a army of cubes with different abilities to break down enemies into smaller units. Make your cube army more powerful each time you are reborn.

Name: Earl's Minecart Adventures
About: Blast with amazing speed through mines and caves. Break through wood, stone- and steel. Evade flowing lava, falling rocks and hazardous machinery. Race, jump, fly with amazing speed across rivers and ravines. Looping, doors, saws, fire, high voltage, rocks, traps and more.

Name: K3LVN
About: K3LVN is a sci-fi action platformer where you play as an experiment trying to escape a space station lab where they’re being imprisoned. Through changing their state of matter, they can stick, jump, and roll their way to freedom.

Name: Gerrymander Madness
About: Gerrymander Madness places gamers into a fictional North Carolina legislator's office and allows them to manipulate the districts of a state map to gain political advantage for a chosen party.

Name: Apple Ring
About: Apple Ring is a free multiplayer online game. Players can win apples and become the winner in each match. Apples and rings are convertible, enhancing your community collection in the future. Real-time communication with others is possible during the game.

Name: IOUA
About: An endless torture game set in the distorted remnants of forgotten RPGMaker puzzles.

Name: Midnight at the Disco
About: Annihilate grotesque eyeball monsters in this top-down, roguelike, bullet purgatory, twin-stick shooter. Survive a full day raging on the dance floor by blasting baddies using unique builds combos on each frantic run to nab a spot on the online leaderboards.

Name: Riding Away
About: Riding Away is a VR music video featuring a new song by Kathy Snax. Listen to the harmonious melody as you walk and discover yourself.

Name: Snowrifters VEX
About: This is a Virtual Vehicle Exhibition in a museum like environment where you can teleport around and look at the models. A Showcase Room for the vehicles, some props and weapons from the race game Snowrifters. Get an impression of the unique design from Timon Sager.

Name: Nostalgici Anonimi
About: Nostalgici Anonimi is a short visual novel set in a dystopian program to heal from feeling emotions. Choose your path, interact with the android therapist and the teenagers recovering from the nostalgia disease. Discover a card game to unveil your emotions and find hidden clues to find the truth.

Name: Tank Game
About: Tank Game is a Local-Multiplayer Action game in which you and up to 7 friends select any of nearly 50 unique, super-powered... 'Tanks'... and use them to blast each other off the map!

Name: 小拾逅 Gathering Our Childhoods
About: The story of the game is about the player traveling back to the childhood campus. Players are required to complete all kinds of tasks, so as to collect the memory points to be able to return to the original world. Let's have a childhood journey together!

Name: Little Rhapsody of Game
About: In a mysterious map, engage in a hardcore and passionate battle carnival with several friend players, master excellent combat experience, and defeat opponents with sufficient reactions and skills to become the king of this world.

Name: 我和妹妹的日常~
About: This is a daily story about 'me' and 'my' sister. 'I' need to make different choices in order to reach the final outcome. 'I' was right to do that, right?

Name: DDS(D.I.Y Drone Simulator) Demo
About: [Notice]This demo application is going to deprecate soon.Please purchase the official version of DDS (D.I.Y Drone Simulator).DDS is a FPV racing simulator designed for practicing your racing drone flying skills. You can play FPV racing drone on various spaces. (Stadium, Forest, Parking lot, Downtown ST, )

Name: Gray Death
About: In a world full of demons and the undead, a man searches for his lost wife. Resources are limited. Death is instant and waiting in the darkness. You will be running, jumping, climbing and searching in this 2D or 2.5D puzzle platformer.

Name: Siam Twinstick
About: A badass, adrenaline pumping twinstick-shooter!

Name: Shape of Clouds
About: Keep calm and drag. Then drag some more. Find the right angle to reveal the hidden beauty. Relax and enjoy the amazing artworks you will discover.

Name: Onward and Upward! DX
About: Climb from the Earth to the Moon to try and solve an urban legend! Brave tough challenges as you float and grapple your way up to the tune of a great soundtrack! Be sure to bring a space suit, and get climbing!

Name: Champ's Nightmare
About: Champ's Nightmare is a horror immersive audio game for the visually impaired which prioritizes ears over eyes.

Name: VE FPSO TOUR in VR
About: FPSO Tour. Live some of the everyday scenarios offshore workers must face.

Name: Grudge TV
About: Vuinten, one of Paragon's most heroic warriors, has been imprisoned and thrown into the gladiatorial games known as Grudge TV for the murder of an Alt religious leader. Now, he must fight his way through hordes of genetically altered demons and ferocious bosses to win his freedom.

Name: Race On Ice 2022 Pro
About: Race On Ice 2022 Pro is an ice racing game where you can drive 28 drivers of the year 2021-2022 of the category Pro and Lite . The goal is very simple, you take a driver and try to win the race.

Name: Dead on Arrival: Remastered
About: Dead On Arrival: Remastered is an atmospheric horror-puzzle game. Uncover the true consequences of one’s actions. A remastered version of the original classic!

Name: CHASERS
About: The sky city ALUNA monopolizes the sun, and the resistance CHASERS fights back! A hack-and-slash RPG with deep world-building and strategic battles. No gacha! Play your favorite characters and build your ultimate team. Master elemental affinities, real-time swaps, dodges, and skill combos to win!

Name: Captcha Kills
About: A crossover between Among Us and the Turing Test. In this multiplayer battle royale, you deceive others into believing you are artificial intelligence and not human. Hide amongst the AI, eliminate players you believe are human, and be the last person standing to win.

Name: Sand Tanble War: The Crusandes
About: Be sure to become the King of the Kingdom of Jerusalem!

Name: Beer Run
About: Beer Run is an Indie game created to steal beers from supermarkets.

Name: Minamochi Factory
About: Super cute and stylish inspection action puzzle!

Name: Zabawa Karaoke
About: Zabawa KARAOKE​ śpiewaj i baw się śpiewając znane przeboje! Darmowa wersja zawiera trzy piosenki. Paczki z innymi piosenkami dostępne są jako dodatki (DLC) do aplikacji. Karaoke to rewelacyjna zabawa muzyczna dla każdego! Świetna na imprezę i spotkanie z przyjaciółmi.​

Name: Santa's busy day
About: Santa has a hard time, delivering all his presents on time. In this little Arcade Game, you will help him fly over the roofs and drop the presents in the right spot. But be careful:The game gets progressivly harder, as Santa's reindeer is flying faster and faster and faster.

Name: Anthony
About: 19세기 영국 어느 한 작은 마을 비가내리던 어느날 친구들과 밖에서 뛰어놀던 엔서니, 제물을 찾기위해 밖을 나온 케일럽과 아그네스에서 납치를 당하게되어 어느 한 가정집에 갇히게 되었고 이 집을 탈출해야하는 상황에 놓이게 되는데...

Name: Base of War
About: Base of War is a next generation 4x RTS game.

Name: Comrade-in-Arms
About: Comrade-in-Arms is a Top-Down 2D Arcade-Style Retro Shooter, where the aim of the game is to fight through the waves of enemies to eventually slaughter the boss at the end.

Name: Cowgirl Trainer
About: Cowgirl Trainer is a JRPG dating sim. Fight bandits and monsters, collect bounties, and romance a sexy cowgirl as you explore the town of Tombwood and its surrounding areas. Level up, spec your characters, pass persuasion checks, and more as you strive to take down the Black Cactus Gang.

Name: Orbit
About: Orbit is a Multiplayer Platformer game. Customise your own character and battle other Players and/or AI controlled Bots across a variety of randomly generated planets. Gain the advantage by earning XP and looting each Planet before your opponents do!

Name: Kings of Emperor Bonaparte
About: A persistent online wargame set in Napoleonic Europe. Command infantry, cavalry, and artillery to achieve victory.

Name: Frogman Magmaborn
About: A story-based rogue-like strategy RPG. Discover story and characters each run, battle in diverse hand-crafted maps, and edit everything with the dedicated modding tool!

Name: Nanook's Revenge
About: A two team multiplayer, top-down, survival game. There is only one deity in the shape of a bear against a team of robots builders. Robots need to create a base and gather resources in order to defend themselves against the bear. Nanook's task is to kill and destroy all robots bases.

Name: Project: Gemini
About: Project: Gemini is a Co-op game that sees Guttierez (Gutz) and Cricket work closely together to escape the city. Gutz acts as the foundation of the duo, providing stability and safety. Cricket is the tactical operative, supplying versatility and opportunity.

Name: Franky the Bumwalker: REBORN
About: Franky the Bumwalker: REBORN is an adventure game featuring quirky hero travelling in unique and fun world.

Name: Super No Crying in Baseball
About: An endless baseball rogue-like where you play baseball and manage your emotions at the same time.

Name: Amalgamy
About: Blend into the crowd, track down your friends and win the game.

Name: Death Lease
About: You will die.

Name: StoneDefence
About: There is a mysterious continent full of songs and laughter, a huge God stone stands in the center of the continent, guarding the local residents from generation to generation, the good scenery is not long, the God stone is missing, the mainland without the God stone Guardian lost the vitality of the past, a large number of evil forces hit

Name: Sisters_Possession2
About: Sisters Possession is an SRPG. By possessing girls, you can gain an advantage in battle. Gamepad play recommended

Name: Henshinko!
About: Gamble your reality for money in this male to female transformation-themed, transgender, reality-bending pachinko-style arcade game. Your reality may change at the end of every level, entering worlds of both good and bad fates where your relationship with your fiance can be enhanced... or destroyed.

Name: KoChaos
About: Slash, shoot, explode, vaporize, smash, and destroy, enemies with eight heroes to use to your advantage! Fight tons of bosses on one of four difficulties in the incredibly difficult souls-like/risk-like. The game takes inspiration from Risk of Rain 2, Dark Souls combat, and Vampire Survivors.

Name: Slime Slam
About: A classic take on match 4 puzzle games from the 90's. With 4 gameplay modes and local multiplayer, this fast-paced challenging puzzler will keep you on your toes! Highly customizable options for any style of play.

Name: Bout

Name: Hero's Survival
About: Heroes Survival is a shooting roguelike game where you become a hero, grow and survive by hunting monsters. Become the strongest hero among players by creating various builds using various skills, weapons, and items!

Name: Kismet Tapestry

Name: Convergence Compulsion
About: Escape endless waves of danger, match colors, avoid obstacles, and earn power-ups in this fast-paced, arcade spectacle!

Name: ResttW
About: Restt is an addictive game, which will test how well can you handle your anger and stress. The game is in hand-made graphics with a retro touch. The whole game is inspired by Slovak streamer resttpowered.

Name: Coin Pusher Live
About: Elevate your Twitch & YouTube streams with live interactive coin-pushing fun! Viewers can drop coins in the chat with !drop commands, shaping the action in this classic casino/arcade experience. Engage your community, and turn your stream into a virtual arcade!

Name: 逢魔之時
About: 由台灣團隊小狐狸工作室製作的遊戲雛形，日系水墨風格的ARPG。利用技能組合擊倒Boss吧！

Name: The Desert's Rose
About: The Desert's Rose is a Virtual Reality Adventure game created by Eddie O'Hagan. It consists of an interactable world with everyday household items and some items not so....household. This is an Early Access game that is constantly updated with 100% free content.

Name: シモツケノヤカタ
About: ヤカタを探索して消えた妹を探す2Dホラーアドベンチャーゲーム。 妹が消えた理由と不思議な生物達の目的は・・・ ダークでメルヘンなホラーアドベンチャーゲーム、是非楽しんでください！

Name: Cards of the Dreaming Dragons
About: How well do you know your friends? Cards of the Dreaming Dragons is the ultimate tabletop game you can play with your friends and family. Figure out what they are thinking and deceive them to win. Play with 3-8 players.

Name: Refraction
About: Jackie Shields wakes up to find everything in her world a little different than she remembers it. Trapped between her own dimension and a parallel one, she soon realizes that nothing can remain unchanged in her life. Especially not herself...because the other dimension has a Jackie of its own!

Name: Pavement Pummel
About: Welcome to Pavement Pummel, an exhilarating multiplayer physics-based bike racing game. Engage in thrilling races against players worldwide across diverse landscapes. Master the art of strategy, skill, and speed. Navigate through city streets, mountain trails, or off-road terrain.

Name: Floating Coffin

Name: MagicCat
About: This's a story about cats and monsters. You'll play the magic cat who need to save the world and take part in an unforgettable journey.

Name: Droste Effect

Name: Shaped Touches

This game was installed as part of the 17th International Architecture Exhibition - La Biennale di Venezia.

Name: Desaturation Point

Name: Mystery Manor: hidden objects

Name: Blue Rabbit, Black Future
About: A thrilling 2D platformer, with cute and minimal pixel art style! Enjoy 24 challenging levels and a couple boss battles, all wrapped in a short but intense story with animated cinematics. A compact and intense experience that’s sure to keep you hooked!

Name: Hues
About: Move sprites slices and destroy color blocks.

Name: Tech Support 2077
About: You are an AI sent to battle an overwhelming tide of computer viruses and malware - in VR! Shoot them with your explodo-revolver, or slash them down with waves of deadly energy from your plasma sword, and if they get too close you'll have to beat them back with your bare hands!

Name: Naughty Or Nice
About: Help Santa get ready for Christmas by loading children's gifts into Santa's Sleigh using a magical candy cane slingshot. However do not miss otherwise the children end up on the naughty list. Made for the HTC Vive.

Name: Echoes of the Iron Prison
About: Echoes of the Iron Prison is a platform game in which the player, through stealth and manipulation, must guide an amnesiac prisoner out of a steampunk prison while collecting shards of her identity.

Name: PIGEONS
About: A multiplayer pvp game with cool pigoens

Name: SojournVR
About: Fight enemies, craft weapons and complete quests with your friends in virtual reality! Available for HTC Vive and Oculus Touch platforms in Early Access.

Name: Linked
About: Explore past and future, high and low in this short platformer game!

Name: Meadow Fun!!
About: Meadow Fun!! is a game mainly for kids (from 3 to 10), where players have to gather, with their magic nets, stray animals, along 20 colorful and relaxing levels. All set in a dreamy environment, with a soft and charming original sound track. Gamepad, keyboard and mouse supported. Steam controller supported in game. Only for Windows

Name: Carl und Cari: Trubel in Tierstadt
About: Jump into Carl and Cari: Trubel in Tierstadt, an interactive educational game in which you have to help Tierstadt and its animal inhabitants with their jobs in order to save the big town festival. Get to know different training jobs and their training opportunities in a playful way.

Name: Gekko Episode of Minato
About: On the stage where swords, machines and ponytails appear in modern society A school romantic comedy visual novel where you can enjoy exciting and exciting love patterns This is the first in the moonlight series. A cool and stoic girl in this work, You can enjoy Minato's love story.

Name: Imvi: Echoes of Harmony

Name: Valley of Stars
About: Welcome to this little Valley of Stars! Select your hero and start the battle. Defeat the big devil in the deep forest...

Name: 骰子模拟器

Name: WWII Squad Level Land Battles ssp
About: A Wargame for Grognards, its a little bit complicated for the average user. it is chits representing the units . the combat is decided by dice rolls and modifiers. It is 2D topdown. with a fantastic A.I.

Name: Brainland

Name: Cemetery Warrior 7 Boss Rush

Name: Madness Fantasy

Name: Divenia

Name: StarForce 2193: The Hotep® Controversy

Playing as one of 5 different factions, each with different goals, you may defend helpless alien civilizations, or exploit them for their planets' natural resources. Play with others who are online, or play against the AI.

Name: Rolling Valley

Name: Defenders of the Dune

Name: Delator

Name: Divine Twins
About: Dual roles, open world adventure，be both hero and spouse.

Name: CZO Online

Name: Metal March: Beginner Experience

Create a force that fits your strategy & style and generate powerful synergies by using cards and relics to complete your expedition! Gather your troops and get ready to March your Metals!

Name: Tochos vs. Brokens

Name: TOONCOP

Name: The Secret Weapon

Name: OrcinUS: Orca Pod Rescue

Name: Protostar Twilight

Name: Down Word

Name: Constructo - Dungeons Builder

Name: Raatihuone

Name: Road Toad

Name: Vroom Vroom Valley

Name: Resttolandia

Name: Emberlight
