About: Dorky Fork is a simple yet сhallenging puzzle game about pushing cubes.

Name: Heard There Was A Chosen One
About: What if The Dark Lord attacked you the moment that your quest began? Now it is time to answer that question in the randomly-generated Land of Hexile!

Name: If Only...
About: This VR experience uses the architectural design by M@ STUDIO Architects for the 2016 National Gallery of Victoria (NGV) Architecture Commission titled “Haven’t you always wanted…?” which transplanted a familiar object (a suburban car wash) into an unfamiliar surrounding (the art gallery).

Name: Imagine Island
About: Welcome to Imagine Island, the ultimate online playground for kids – and it’s free! Explore areas of the world, discover hidden secrets, play exciting mini games, customize your avatar, and join the safe social community in this ever-evolving virtual world full of endless fun and adventure!

Name: Future Futures - Command Z
About: Command Z is a virtual reality gallery poised as a space for collaboration founded to engage the exponential digitization of art and its presentation. Future Futures was developed during the Jump Into The Light artist residency in the Lower East Side of New York City.

Name: Redumption
About: Redumption is an action adventure game where you explore a town consumed by the waste. Fight bosses and retrieve precious items to save your friends from the witch's curse. Can you clean up the town and achieve redumption?

Name: Furs of Fury
About: Creatures of the forest, unite! Rats run amok across the countryside. Demonic creeps roam the barren fields of our once lush woodland. The most peaceful of beasts are now brimming with FURY! The future of every beast is in your paws. Are you friend? Or are you fur?

Name: Halfway Home
About: Halfway Home is a stat-management visual novel game created by students at DigiPen Institute of Technology. As the house’s most reclusive resident, get to know the other residents, manage your time between different rooms, and improve your social skills.

Name: The Last Duskreaper
About: Try this side view platformer metroidvania that tells the story of a bird in a dying kingdom infected by glitched monsters.

Name: 梦境管理公司：梦魇清洁工
About: Guard every trapped soul. Step into the realm of dreams, and clear away the nightmares. DreamControl Inc—wishing you pleasant dreams!

Name: OSLO:2084
About: In OSLO:2084, hack your way through a dystopian world where AI rules supreme and democracy is a distant memory. As Embla, fight for freedom and change the course of history in this thrilling cyberpunk adventure.

Name: Infiltrate & Extract
About: A top-down 3D stealth game where remaining undetected is of utmost priority. Take down security guards and stay in the shadows to reach the vault and extract a highly valuable relic.

Name: The Hellchemist
About: The Hellchemist is an intense pve arena shooter where you will fight waves of monsters while random events will alter the way you have to play the game and makes every run unique. The game is heavily inspired by Doom and Quake. Bunny hops, shooting and a whole lot of explosions!

Name: Sleeping Dogs: Ghost Pig
About: Become the elusive movie star with the Ghost Pig mask. Dogeyes’ black fedora hat, an assassin’s straw hat, and a lone sheriff’s hat are also included in this free pack.

Name: Chroma
About: Chroma is a solo third-person narrative platformer game where you play as an artist exploring her creativity by restoring color and bringing life back to the environment.

Name: Hero of Fate:Prologue
About: Hero of Fate is a smooth and fun 'rougue' game with 'survivor' as the core gameplay. You will receive various tasks or meet unexpected events under monsters surrounded, and you can also recruit partners or battle alone. In this fantasy world, go to experience a exciting and unpredictable adventure!

Name: Wasting Away
About: Retro horror 3D game tells a gloomy story of the Vainonmiel camping destination. It used to be popular, until some of the visitors started disappearing without a trace. Can the Reporter survive and keep his job, or will he get arrested or fall victim to the mysterious killer of Vainonmiel?

Name: TSEROF
About: Find hidden puzzle pieces and find the secret of a Charlotte who lost her memory.

Name: Coalescence
About: Coalescence is a visual novel that takes you deep within Moniker Labs to explore its secrets. Play as one of three characters, each with their own storyline and dialogue options. Form relationships with the companions you encounter and try to make it out alive!

Name: The Specter Chronicles: Episode 1 - The False Prophet
About: The Specter Chronicles is a cyberpunk visual novel that combines text-based adventure with turn-based tactical combat.

Name: DASH n CRY
About: DASH n CRY is a fast-paced, challenging 2D Precision Platformer game for those who want to put their skills to their limits.

Name: schoolLife 东洋中学之异闻录
About: Satirize some educational systems

Name: Last Chance VR
About: This is a very simple and easy VR game. Just enjoy yourself inside the VR world!

Name: Random Blacksmith Game
About: Jump into a fictionalized and dramatized medieval village as the village's blacksmith.

Name: Realms
About: Welcome to Realms, a first-person shooter inspired by the rules and aesthetics of popular tabletop RPGs. Use The Die of Chaos along with your abilities and alternate gun fire to help Fortuna explore different realms and destroy any and all threats along the way.

Name: Velocity Rift
About: Velocity Rift is a fast-paced first-person shooter where you shoot orbs to defeat enemies and save the world. The number of orbs is limited and shooting enemies at their weak spots return the orbs faster. Also, the faster you move, the slower the world becomes, so always be on the move!

Name: Valley of Tribes
About: Valley of Tribes is a 1v1v1 strategy game where three tribes battle to be the last tribe standing. Send units and construct buildings to destroy enemy tribes and ensure your tribe's survival.

Name: Infinite Library
About: In this award winning puzzle-platformer you are tasked with saving the Infinite Library from impending doom! Use unique movement and abilities to navigate dangerous puzzles and dispel the darkness before it's too late!

Name: BAD BILLY 2D VR
About: Billy is really angry! Billy's girlfriend Jessica was kidnapped by creatures from a 2D World. Billy has to follow the creatures into the 2D World to free Jessica.

Name: Pato Martinez
About: History can be thrilling, learn the importance of the air force during the Spanish civil war, the most important air battles, the pilots that fought and the airplanes they used. Fight through the air around the Jarama, Brunete or Ebro. Learn, at the same time you become a flying ace!

Name: Lo-Fi Lounge
About: A lounge for meeting others and vibing out to live Lofi and Retrowave.

Name: The Littlest Fry
About: You are a small goldfish who has to protect a youngling while discovering how unforgiving the ponds in the wilderness are. Your objective is to defend a baby fish from predators while out maneuvering them while evading other obstacles that may be in your way while searching for safer waters.

Name: Impractical Spells
About: The rules of the game are simple. Pick cards to get stronger. Be the last wizard standing to win, Win 8 rounds to win the game.

Name: Rally31
About: Rally31 is a small open-world racing game with 12 unique and experimental vehicles. The vehicles are physics-based with each one having a different setup to the suspension system. This adds variety to the difficulty level and driving experience of each machine.

Name: SnekMP
About: Did you ever have a dispute with a friend? Finally there is a way to sort out whos Snek is BIGGER!However, in SnekMP bigger does not necessarily mean better! Having a huge C... khm... Snek definitely helps, but you will also need to be quite agile to win!

Name: Little Crab Fisher
About: A clicker-style crab fishing game based in a fantasy world. Collect mythical crabs, travel the high seas, and upgrade your ship. A fun-filled adventure awaits!

Name: Space Smack!
About: Space Smack! is a 1 to 4 player party game exploding with chaos and sabotage. Enter into the vast expanse of space and clash in a variety of minigames. In this controller-only game, cooperate or undermine your friends to become victorious!

Name: Magilore
About: Magilore is a satirical RPG that has a unique battle system, memorable characters, and humorous dialogue. While the story involves the usurping of a king, there are plenty of laughs to have and plenty of love to give for this game.

Name: Arthur Owl's Word Block
About: Meet Arthur Owl and his clever game Word Block. With around 200 included puzzles and even more in downloadable packs, you'll have plenty to do! If you're addicted to games like Wordle and love VR, this is for you!

Name: Far Eastern Federal University Virtual Expo
About: Take a look around and get to know the Far Eastern Federal University, campus life and medical research facilities in this virtual reality experience!

Name: Moon is Not the Limit
About: Reach into orbit with Moon is not the Limit! Take to the stars as a recent recruit to the space program and learn all about the science behind space travel.

Name: Crash Test Oliver
About: Dive into a stylized 2.5D metroidvania world. Beat enemies, find and collect items as you progress through a struggling world to finally escape the simulation. Are you ready for this journey?

Name: Meow Playground
About: Meow Playground is an online multiplayer game that lets you play as a cute animal character.

Name: TouchNothing
About: 3D view, first person but no person，challenge yourself，several levels，A torture game.

Name: Six Paths
About: Learn a 4-step human algorithm for the six circular paths of 1) Being Friendly, 2) Being Grounded, 3) Being Balanced, 4) Being Nourished, 5) Being Understanding, 6) Being Flowing.

Name: Bloodgeon
About: Bloodgeon is a fast paced multiplayer game that has 2 teams battle it out for supremacy. Mixing MOBA and Left 4 Dead’s versus mode comes a fresh new take on the top down genre!

Name: The Muybridge Mausoleum
About: Like an art installation in virtual reality, The Muybridge Mausoleum playfully blends elements of shadow play, 19th century magic lantern shows, and early film set design. The result is a cinema for neanderthals.

Name: Introspection
About: IntroSpection is a top-down bullethell-like action game about a man forced to confront his past. Delve into memories and blast through waves of inner demons as you explore one man's mental purgatory.

Name: Pylorus - Footsteps of Greed
About: A free 2d roguelite where enemies form a living ecosystem with rivalries and alliances. This is not your war: scavenge some gold and escape with your life... Or stay longer to uncover secrets and more riches, the choice is yours. Strange things happen to those that follow the footsteps of Greed...

Name: Sky Mirror · Strolling
About: Relax and stroll in this dreamland, get positive energy and avoid negative energy.

Name: Stagdraft
About: STAGDRAFT is a Chaotic 2D multiplayer hack and slasher. Designed for intense PvP action and supports up to 24 players. Pick your role, strategize with your allies and dominate the battleground to capture all the zones and secure the final objectives in a domination warfare!

Name: El Culto
About: Disfruta de esta porción del juego RPG Old School, encarna a este detective que investiga una serie de asesinatos perpetrados por una secta satánica, impide que se desate el caos y evita que 'el culto' reviva a un antiguo demonio del infierno.

Name: Debit And Credit:A Walk Through Accounting Hell
About: Bad accountants go to accounting hell. Complete an accountant's walk through accounting hell, solving puzzles and searching for save points. This is a college student's attempt at making an interactive problem set for Accounting Principle students.

Name: Downtown
About: You moved to live in the city Downtown. Try to get out of poverty in the city, which is ruled by the police and the mafia.

Name: Undo The Jam Damage
About: Bruce's love for PB&J sandwiches has entangled him in a spellbinding predicament. Venture into the enchanted forest to help Bruce lift the witch’s curse. Tread carefully, though—the woods are fraught with dangers for the unprepared. The game is designed to be difficult

Name: Genjiro: Samurai Defense
About: A Samurai Hack & Slash, Roguelike, City Defense Game! Upgrade your skills and defend the city from waves of incoming enemies. For how long can you hold them off?

Name: Find the Whales
About: Find the Whales is a free-to-play educational game for all ages about ocean conservation. Find marine animals and do conservation quests to help protect them & their habitats!

Name: Spectral Realm
About: Spectral Realm is a top-down tower defense Rogue game, where players need to play the role of an astronaut who has just landed on a different planet to block a constant stream of attacking native creatures and continuously strengthen themselves with the gems contained within their bodies.

Name: Chef Strikes Back
About: Chef Strikes Back is a single player, Cooking Sim / Hack'n'Slash.

Name: Eragon's Tale
About: Brave through the darkness in his dreams. Or die trying.

Name: The Complex IV
About: The Complex IV is a turn-based RPG set in the world of Dungeons & Dragons. Using a subset of the SRD 5.1 ruleset, play solo or compete with up to 5 other players in scenarios designed to test your sword and sorcery skills against a relentless horde of monsters.

Name: Rectangulong
About: A silly game about hitting a ball back and forth. Play against a friend or a computer in 12 levels awesome style.

Name: Missing Pictures : Naomi Kawase
About: For every movie made, dozens of pictures remain missing forever. In the VR documentary experience MISSING PICTURES: Naomi Kawase, the famous Japanese filmmaker tells a love story, involving a bicycle road trip and self-acceptance, a project she ended up abandoning.

Name: Signal
About: Signal is an immersive action-adventure game made as a student project where you attempt to uncover the mystery behind your old mentor's distress message. To succeed in your mission, you will have to use your martial arts skills and fight off hostile creatures that are trying to stop you.

Name: Bone Boy
About: Feeling bad to the bone? Shred through the body as Bone Boy - learn rad tricks, help your friends and collect epic hats along the way. Get out there and tear it up, kid!

Name: No throwing
About: There is only one level of the 3D fixed view integral mini-game.Maneuver the robot to hit falling items and protect the chickens.

Name: Avalo Legends
About: Avalo Legends is a first person melee (FPM) multiplayer game. Located in the distant galaxy of Iska, it’s a frantic melee match which takes place in the stadium of the capital of the galaxy, Khot. Choose one of the different champions available and fight in wild battles for an absolute victory.

Name: Surprise Party!
About: Save the world as a Balloon(!?) in this story driven horror/stealth puzzle game!

Name: Wobble Warriors
About: Wobble Warriors is a 1-4 player ragdoll fighting couch co-op game. In this dungeon crawler, you and your friends play as some wobbly dragons on a mission to conquer the goblins who stole your gold. Jump, dash, ground pound, and bonk your way to victory by clearing each room.

Name: Malfunction II
About: Malfunction II is a journey that'll feature vast exploration and difficult obstacles to overcome. You've awakened on an inescapable planet crawling with the Plague and your objective is to uncover the mysteries behind this dilemma and to finally put an end to the Plague- once and for all.

Name: Into the Pyramid
About: Into the Pyramid is the new multiplayer game from Aisukaze Studio, be part of the team trying to scape from the pyramid or sabotage the mission for your own interests.

Name: Operation TP
About: A Post-Apocalyptic store run gone wrong, keep moving, don't get hit, get that TP!

Name: Naught Bots
About: Make cute things cry!

Name: Gumstein: The Awakening
About: Solve puzzles and evade hazards using several interesting abilities such as sticking to walls, splitting, and launching your other half through multiple levels on your quest to find Ruby

Name: 无限家园
About: The game is designed in the way of infinite flow, with weapons, maps and missions of various combat styles. The game has two operation modes: keyboard and mouse and VR. After the VR device is connected and restarted, it will automatically switch to VR mode.

Name: DumbBots: Hello World
About: DumbBots: Hello World is the FREE introduction to the world of coding a DumbBot. Learn a new skill in 2020, and pickup the basics of coding with drag-and-drop ease in a fun setting. Or show your coding mettle by competing with other DumbBots.

Name: Cracking the Stone
About: Enter the life of a boy experiencing tragedy for the first time, the burden of his parents’ hopes & dreams, and the struggle to let his emotions in. Deflect the negative emotions coming from outside forces while trying to juggle the ins and outs of childhood, puberty, and relationships.

Name: REPULSE: Galactic Rivals
About: REPULSE: Galactic Rivals is a local competitive couchgame up to 4 players set in a retrofuturistic universe. Players have the ability to attract and repulse cubes spread around the arena at high speed. A dozen of game modes revolve around this core mechanic.

Name: Whispering Shadows
About: Put yourself in the shoes of a schizophrenic person and experiment the hell of the voices

Name: Tiska Buska
About: Fight for redemption through the eyes of Mahkklen, a mysterious figure in search of vengeance in this world of dishonesty and tiranny, this action packed unseen combination of adventure and racing games offers you 9 levels of pure intrigue and danger, each one with a different new challenge!

Name: VR-NISSAGE 3 - John Wentz Art Exhibition
About: VR-NISSAGE 3 - A room scale virtual reality art exhibition of paintings by artist John Wentz

Name: Project Gravity
About: Take the role of a test subject tasked with testing out a new experimental device capable of changing the gravitational pull of any objects it is used on. With this at your disposal, you must complete a few puzzles in this short single-player experience.

Name: Iaijutsu
About: In this retro action game, the player controls a mysterious ronin, navigating the rooftops and alleys of a rainy city as they are hunted by a team of elite assassins.

Name: アパシー荒井昭二　～牧場奇譚～
About: 『学校であった怖い話』の語り部、荒井昭二。 彼は一年の夏休み、友人の誘いを受けてとある牧場でアルバイトをする。 全編、荒井昭二で染まる耽美且つ狂気の世界に貴方の心は息つく間もなく犯される。

Name: GreenGuardiansVR
About: Tricky and funny cooperative multiplayer action in VR - A mega-corporation beams you into a supposedly rosy future. But rebels hack into the system to warn you: Only together can you break through the propaganda machine and save the world! Only German language

Name: Corporate Chaos
About: Corporate Chaos is a 2D Action game where an office worker must battle the forces of automation to get his job back! Explore the labyrinth like office building with only furniture and broken bits of bots to defend yourself.

Name: Operation Satoshi [Early Version Alpha]
About: This is a game in development. It has been published just to get feedback from community. We are aware there will be defects and will do weekly updates. Feedback can be sent to contact@metaxseed.io. A shooting RPG game to rescue a kidnapped scientist, Nakamoto Satoshi.

Name: 아스타나 이야기 ~누가 다키마쿠라 만들었어!~
About: One peaceful day, Queen Quinshua heard that her illegal dakimakura was being made and decided to take action to stop it

Name: YOUFIGHT
About: Discover integrated reality with this game mixing 2D fighting and video!Keep your real appearance and become an outstanding boxer in the game thanks to an automated video cutting technique which allows to show some animations from your video capture.

Name: Escape!!
About: ESCAPE!! is an endless runner through a haunted forest. Jump, slide, kick and close your eyes to survive. Beautiful handmade pixel art, with frightening monsters and a terrified survivor.

Name: Good Guy Card
About: This game is a adv game.says that player go to university and try to find his best lover's story.

Name: SHADOW PUPPET
About: A short horror game about wandering through vaguely familiar memories while something endlessly follows you. It moves when you do, and you need to get out before it catches up.

Name: IMUGI
About: IMUGI is a point and click isometric puzzle game. Players can utilize mechanics such as box pushing, water flooding, and lightning strikes to make it past the trials laid out by the spirits of the mountain. Make it past the trial and ascend from Imugi to Dragon.

Name: Hotel Manibella
About: Get ready for the ultimate horror puzzle game! Check into Hotel Manibella for a spine-chilling experience. With a unique art style and secret storyline, journey through the floors of a haunted hotel, with each level becoming scarier and more intense.

Name: Elemental Engagements
About: Wield god powers and command legions of elemental thralls against your friends! Elemental Engagements is a split-screen, versus, real-time-strategy game. Gain favor with the elemental gods to use their 16 powers, battle on 3 maps, and play with either Keyboard or Controller!

Name: Rhythm Journey
About: A vertical rhythm game created by students in the Game Arts Department. All of the music used is original by students.

Name: JOBifAI
About: Land your dream job with JOBifAI! With an impressive CV and AI-crafted portfolio, you've got an interview at Grizley Studios! However, you forgot what you submitted... can you convince the art director that you're the perfect fit anyway?

Name: Number Fields
About: Number Fields is a logic game where players uncover tiles indicating the proximity of hidden bombs and treasures. Choose your difficulty, customize grid sizes, and enjoy. Provides a way to stay fully engaged while calming nervous energy discreetly.

Name: Adventures in Morality: An Interactive Case Study
About: Take a 3D interactive test to calculate your sympathy-type. According to CYBIL, the A.I. who built Adventures in Morality, differences in sympathy-types is the cause and solution to all human conflict. Hear CYBIL's story and discover your sympathy-type in Adventures in Morality.

Name: Uncle Unco
About: GET TO THE BUS!

Name: Keeper Of The Valley
About: Jump, glide and dash your way to the top of the mountain in this 3D adventure platformer set in an open and enchanting valley!

Name: Mosh Pit
About: Work together to defend a punk rock band from an army of evil robots in this two-player co-op beat-'em-up.

Name: Running into the Cyberpunk
About: A wanted criminal trying to outrun the robots. Robots that are trying to put a stop to her escape. How long could you last in this cyberpunk universe? Run into the cyberpunk to find out!

Name: Stream Toys by Zokya
About: A collection of chat-interactive games and toys that you can use to engage with your audience. Includes 'Plinker' a multi-player skill game that turns messages in your chat to tokens that 'plink' and bounce down a peg board. Land a plinky in the bucket to score a point!

Name: Fallen
About: A minigame collection game where you help people in the town of Havoton to regain your angelic status!

Name: Chaotic Loop
About: Chaotic Loop is a little game, where your objective is to complete the level you choose, also everytime you play something in the game will change and this makes the loop of finishing the level chaotic.

Name: ReDo
About: A supernatural horror visual novel game where your choices decide if you and your friends see the light of day again or not. Use your sleuthing skills with point and click mechanics to battle horrifying creatures of the night that haunt an abandoned school building and earn your title of 'Exorcist'!

Name: Minotaur Maze
About: Minotaur Maze is a simple action puzzle game about navigating a maze and avoiding a monster. Somewhere out there lurking, The Minotaur is honing in on your location and hunting you down! With each new level, the difficulty increases because the maze gets larger and the Minotaur gets faster.

Name: Destoria: The Withering
About: Destoria: The Withering is a mini top down shooter game with a sole objective to survive as many waves as possible.

Name: Construction Charlie
About: Collect items and defeat enemies in this action-packed platformer! Construction Charlie jumps from between platforms over many detailed environments. Even after the main game is finished, a detailed level editor puts the power to create in your hands, allowing you to build your own experience!

Name: Ricky did nothing wrong
About: Have fun with little puzzles in this Point & Click game! But be careful with the choices you make...

Name: 天仙变
About: 天裂妖魔出，众神平息乱。《天仙变》是一款以仙侠题材为背景的经典回合制手游。精美丰富的仙境场景刻画，刺激绚丽的战斗画面，让你身临其境感受神魔斗法的刺激和精彩。经典著名的人物齐聚，一同陪伴你征战仙途，想想就热血沸腾。更有拉风强悍的神仙宠代步，扶摇直上九万里！各路妖神鬼怪层出不穷，为祸苍生，等你征服。快来和我一起斩妖除魔吧！

Name: Video Realms
About: Short sci-fi stories for Windows PC

Name: Newtonian Horror
About: Step into the boots of Isaac Newton, in a world before gravity was invented. Newtonian Horror is an occult platformer where you can't move or shoot and the only weapon at your disposal is gravity. Use your exceptional knowledge as Newton to manipulate gravity and defeat your enemies!

Name: Trinity
About: Trinity is a challenging fps/puzzle set in a surrealistic universe.

Name: RANGER VS. DRONES
About: This is a VR study.Your participation begins with our online survey.Please follow the link in the external links section.

Name: The Ai Games
About: Ever wonder why cockroaches can't be irradiated? They re-spawn. Earth is a survival game made by cockroaches. You are selected to represent the Earth game as its AI champion vs the greatest AI in all the games they have made. Will you survive the games, and what AAA conspiracy will you uncover?

Name: Armadillo Assault
About: Armadillo Assault is a multiplayer, action-platformer shooter, inspired by the glory days of couch multiplayer fun. Re-creating the magic of local multiplayer in an online environment, Armadillo Assault offers a unique experience for players looking to have action-packed group fun with friends!

Name: Paragonian 3 : The Warrior of Light
About: Paragonian 3: The Warrior of Light is an ARPG that plays alone. Explore the Oriental World! Gwang, who lost his mind in the fight against Laijin, the god of lightning, is rescued by the chief of the village. He will lose Inner Qi in the fight against Laijin and must regain his strength.

Name: Goblins
About: Command the Emerald Goblin Army and win the Great Gold War. Master Campaign Battes across 20 unique and increasingly difficult levels. Relax with a fun Mini-Game. Battle and play with your friends in Multiplayer Lobbies and Arenas (Multiplayer Beta Available Now)

Name: Cubecois
About: Cubecois is a fast and challenging arcade style game with great music. You can choose various skins and upgrades for your mission!

Name: FARIA: Ghosts of the Stream
About: Heed the Song of the Wild and join Fiona Lightspyre as she embarks upon a journey northwards. Along the way, she'll make acquaintances, forge friendships and face much peril in her quest to 'upstream'. This is a Happy Fantasy.

Name: Solar Showdown
About: Welcome to Solar Showdown - the ultimate 2-player couch competitive game where you harvest solar power, build defenses, and produce minions to attack your opponent's towers. Generate enough power to activate your base's ultimate weapon and blow up your rival! Grow, build, defend, and dominate!

Name: Rockytown
About: What happened to the people of Rockytown? Have fun at the village fair, with 4 exciting mini-games.

Name: Farm Garden Simulator
About: Farm Garden Simulator is a farm simulator game where you can grow a lot of crops and raise animals.

Name: VIP Shuttle
About: The VIP Shuttle Experience is a free virtual reality experience in a futuristic environment. Complete your mission to get to your meeting on time by reaching the VIP Shuttle. You face numerous challenges and in the end you have to prove how courageous you really are ...

Name: Merge
About: Merge is a 2~4 players shooter party game, which can also play single player with computer. Each player plays as a mystery creature called 'I', which is weak, helpless but greedy and fierce. It can parasitize and control every weapon or defense component it attaches.

Name: Captivus
About: Join the movement! Build a deck, equip your ship, and take on others in intense 1v1 card battles!

Name: Harmagedon
About: The player, as God's agent, takes the power of God and embarks on a journey to reclaim his power against beings who run wild at will.

Name: Hover Cubes: Arena
About: Hover Cubes: Arena is a competitive first-person action jump 'n' run, combining a fast dynamic gameplay (air jumps, wall jumps, dash and slides) and shooter mechanics to reach a whole new level. Be part of a great tournament! Play with or against your friends or challenge other players worldwide.

Name: Tremblay Island
About: The French-venture has returned... now on Steam!

Name: Echolight
About: Echolight ist ein actionbasiertes Roguelike-Spiel, in welchem du die Welt vor dem Chaos gefährlicher Monster, mit Hilfe der Waffen der Götter des Tages und der Nacht retten musst.

Name: Nekopter
About: Vous incarnerez un petit chat tout mignon ayant pour seul but de retrouver le sommeil ! Malgré sa faible condition physique, il n'est pas du genre très tendre avec ces abominables créatures le dérangeant sur ses lieux de repos préférés !

Name: Tap Shap - The World's First Multi-platform Reaction Game
About: Tap Shap is a unique, free-to-play, addictive game & the world's first multi-platform reaction game!

Name: Covert Commando
About: Wishlist our upcoming title Rebel! ** / ** Similar to Covert commando but heaps more fun! Covert commando is a no frills rogue ultra-lite top down dual stick looter shooter.

Name: BoxxyQuest: The Gathering Storm
About: An epic and satirical throwback to the internet of yesteryear, made with the help of actress and legendary meme queen Catie 'Boxxy' Wayne.

Name: Island Party Chaos
About: Island Party Chaos: Dive into a hilarious multiplayer adventure! Navigate whimsical obstacles, conquer wild challenges, and outsmart rivals in the race to be the ultimate party champion. Get ready for laughter, strategy, and unpredictable mayhem – let the chaos begin!

Name: Farjob
About: Delve into a boundless realm of twisting pathways and absurd bosses.

Name: Untitled Rougelike Arcade Game
About: A short arcade roguelike.

Name: Little Robot
About: Join me on my first game as an Indie Dev with this casual 15-minute exploration game where players navigate the backyard, as our favorite sad robot, collecting essential components to successfully return indoors!

Name: Oh Sheep!: Baaaa
About: Embark on the fantastic world of Oh Sheep!, a slapstick cartoon-style action game where you'll encounter crazy enemies. Sheep will be your salvation.

Name: Reapers
About: An online battle trading card game set in a dystopian universe, focused on deck building, resource management and trading.

Name: Space Aces

About: Flow with the music while defeating enemies. You can use your favourite music to create and share levels with the community and also download new ones to extend your gameplay. Complete levels and unlock new ships and skins to get new game styles and cool looks.

Name: BattleTubers
About: The Digital Media Acquisition Creature and his army of CopyWright Creeps have invaded Vtuber worlds! Gather a group of friends and battle as one of your favorite streamers to defend their homes!

Name: Flat Earths!
About: A tongue-in-cheek couch-multiplaying, trident-hurling, death-o-gasm of an aquatic mammal simulation.

Name: Fast Travel: Loot Delivery Service
About: Fast Travel is a time trial racing game where you must use a hover bike to navigate strange and dangerous environments to deliver loot boxes. While piloting the hover bike, you must maintain your balance to make sure you lose as little of your cargo as possible and avoid crashing.

Name: Call Sign is Magic Liner
About: Call Sign is Magic Liner is an old school Shmup with a new twist. You can strategically draw lines and defeat your enemies.

Name: ThanksTaking
About: Play as a bloodthirsty turkey seeking vengeance on everyone in the household! You must try to escape the house before you are caught and cooked. Use a large variety of brutal attacks to take down your enemies and show them who's boss!

Name: Paradigm Shift
About: A group of young adults, gifted with elemental powers by the anomaly, are forced to go to battle with these unknown forces. Sooner than later, they come to find out that they're a lot more connected to the unfolding chaos than it seems...

Name: Shadow Of Nebula
About: After forced and sudden landing on an abandoned planet, the hero must fight for his life and find his way home. Along the way he discovers that his presence on the planet wasn't just an accident, and that he's somehow involved in a larger than life intrigue threatening all humanity.

Name: Parasite in Love
About: Infected with the parasite commonly known as the “brain eating amoeba”, you have 10 days left before your death. One of the symptoms is hallucinations. And through that, “he” starts to talk and confesses his love to you. Can you convince the parasite to leave your body before it’s too late?

Name: Trajectory Fracture
About: A fully physics based game featuring challenges that revolve around breaking items in satisfying ways and letting off some steam doing it

Name: Divine Combat
About: Divine Combat is a turn-based strategy game wherein you lead a team to victory against another team. The fights are in top-down view on a grid, much like similar turn-based unit management games. There is no penalty for losing.

Name: Zomcade
About: Zomcade is a challenging action-horror arcade style game for Steam VR. Immerse yourself in over 15 different ways to play.

Name: Save and Conquer : 8 Years
About: This is a 2D defense game that depicts the near future that may arise from climate change. Unlike the defense game, which is automatically attacked by traditional turrets, it is an attractive game that requires you to defeat the enemy by operating the turret directly with limited power.

Name: RX Racing 2022 Pro
About: RX Racing 2022 Pro is an arcade rallycross game where you can drive the drivers of the year 2022 in different categories. The goal is very simple, you take a driver and try to win the race . More than 40 pilots, +20 teams, +25 tracks 3 Modes : Time Attack , Race and Season

Name: Hex Slayer
About: Hex Slayer is a turn-based strategy game where the goal is to conquer the island. Featuring special classes and custom campaigns, expand your kingdom and outwit the enemy by building huts, towers, and powerful units.

Name: Two Love
About: 文字冒险 英格兰贵族洛各斯·因瑟恩再也忍受不了疾病的折磨，正当他决定自主了断生命时，遇到了一名黑发红瞳的旅人······吸血鬼安克里蒂·沃该依然在寻觅她想要的，在坎维岛上，她见到了一丝可能性······塔莉亚特·阿道尔追寻着她的仇人，一则消息传来······来自东方的杀手欧瑞特见证着。

Name: Rocket Armor
About: Rocket Armor is the most realistic and exciting flight combat experience in VR today! It features a completely new type of flight control system and maneuvering capability – it’s like really flying using two huge rockets strapped to your arms!

Name: IOX
About: Top-down scifi ARPG set in the future around the orbits of Jupiter. You take the role of a mercenary that works contract missions to various corporations operating in the solar system.

Name: RD's Adventure Mini Golf
About: RD's Adventure Mini Golf - Chip & Putt Edition is a game I developed for my Son. It comes packed with 3 x 18 hole courses, with additional courses to be added in future updates! The version you are about to purchase (I hope) or download if your already own the game is a complete redesign of the game.

Name: Ninja Resurrection: A tale of Kuro
About: The hardest fighting game

Name: Color Security
About: Only the most experienced programmers are able to enter the simulations and come out of them still alive. Survive using the powers at your disposal while collecting the corrupt data of your customers avoiding lasers, viruses and much more in this casual game set in the future and...much more.

Name: Mage at Stake
About: Roguelite wizard game, where you play as a wizard fighting off waves of monsters and bosses using powerful magic, gathering helper bats and perks. Each time you play, you’ll face new challenges in different biomes, making you think on your feet and try different strategies to win.

Name: Timber!
About: Dementia, tragedy and fun – all in the same taste of a potato! Timber! is a 2D point-and-click storydriven game that takes you on an emotional journey. Explore a mix of feelings, from the heart-wrenching struggles of dementia to the unraveling of a tragic story.

Name: Danger!Energy
About: Connect the points with neon rays to liberate virtual city of Santermonia from the Main Virtual Controller's tyranny.

Name: SZEN
About: 'The Symphony of Mysteries!' SZEN is a musical Virtual Reality safe-space, where we can leave our hectic, busy lives for a moment and enter a world where you experience a place of melodic tranquility and wonder. Sit back, relax, let SZEN take you away!

Name: The Vault
About: A quick view into another world through the eyes of a single console.

Name: Mission: Space
About: After the Earth exploded, the fate of the Earth is in your hands. By creatively building your own spaceship, you'll fight your way through space against pirates. On your journey you will meet many different life forms, some with good, others with bad intentions.

Name: illuminati Simulator VR
About: This simulator, features a real and completely accurate Freemasonry temple. as well as an Ordo Templi Orientis Gnostic Mass working lodge... it is an Experience more than a game. when you purchase this title you can expect to be teleported to a virtual freemasonry lodge where you will be able to perform any ritual you may want in a safe...

Name: HEX PLAT
About: The Game Is A Simple 2.5d Platform Action Game. The player can move and jump. That and solve puzzles using little gimmicks in the stages. The objective of each stage is simple: manipulate the spheres to reach the red glowing tiles, that's it.

Name: Fantasteroids
About: Fast-paced gameplay, rainbow colours and snappy animations all come together to give you a retro arcade-feel game with renewed graphics and avatars. There's a variety of different modes for you to choose from, and different skins to unlock and leaderboards for you to show off to your friends!

Name: Two Worlds - The 3D Art Gallery
About: The theme of the exhibition is values that affect everyone all the time. The society surrounding us defines what people appreciate. The paintings illustrate a reverse value system. This means, for example, showing poverty as something people admire and seek.

Name: Liquid Space
About: Liquid Space lets you interact with ultra-realistic liquids in zero gravity on the international space station.

Name: CGI™: The Game
About: Step into the shoes of one of 7 real-life body scans of models from today’s generation and take on robots aliens & monsters in this futuristic metaverse. Utilizing stunning computer-generated imagery plus a custom soundtrack, the CGI game offers an immersive and action-packed gaming experience.

Name: Nautical Dispute
About: Retro nostalgic big voyage game, dream back to the road of great voyage! Exploration, management, trade, piracy and war are constant topics. With wisdom and luck, gradually build a powerful fleet. Set sail, take the Golden Silk Road again, and reproduce the great voyage!

Name: Buried
About: Get out of an underground research facility, but beware, don't get killed by the mysterious creatures. They hear you move. When they are close, hide and try not to breath. Avoid detection to get out of the facility.

Name: A Shade Darker Than Gray
About: Short dark comady, casual story game about 15 minutes in length for a play through. There're 6 different endings and 8 collectibles, and 3 different mini games. Over 100+ funny quotes to find throughout and loads of side events to interact with.

Name: Hide And Seek Scramble!
About: Three players. Two teams. One kidnapped bunny! Play as three different characters in this fast-paced, competitive multiplayer game.

Name: Dichotomy
About: Dichotomy is a VR rhythm-like game set within a celestial depiction of the mind. With levels themed around the five main types of OCD, you must avoid negative thoughts and compulsive behaviour to break through to a clear mind.

Name: 词影
About: A Chinese idiom guessing game that combines pictograms with Wordle guessing

Name: Merchant Master
About: A simulation game. Start from scratch to build a merchant empire.

Name: Cantrip Cafe
About: Cantrip Cafe is a zany, zesty restaurant game where you and your friends play as spell-casting witches to not only serve your customers, but protect them from a horde of hungry monsters.

Name: Sea of Chaos
About: 'Chaos Sea' is an easy real-time strategy development game, where you play a land floating in chaotic waters. Build your base, recruit your heroes, defeat and capture monsters, match traits and equipment, and reach the depths of the sea.

Name: Somny & Yawn: Dream Detectives
About: Both players play as Somny & Yawn, two detectives who investigate the nightmare that invades the Islands of Dreams. With his sharp eyesight, Somny can find clues spread across the islands, while Yawn, thanks to her exceptional social skills, can discover the secrets of the inhabitants.

Name: Expedition Oregon
About: Oregon Industries has tasked with leading the colonization of the last frontier: Space. Fill spaceships with resources then blast them off into the great unknown, seeking fortune while battling calamites that try to defeat you at every turn.

Name: POCKET MYSTERY EP DX
About: A surreal, murder-mystery puzzle game originally designed for the GameBoy.

Name: A Lot of Universes
About: Jump from world to world searching for an interdimensional fugitive. Collect items and use them to resolve tricky situations that threaten to delay your progress.

Name: Microcosm
About: Build tiny voxel worlds in virtual reality! Microcosm is the game I've wanted to play in VR ever since I saw the Oculus Rift Kickstarter way back in 2012. I picked up a Vive last year, but no one seemed to be making the voxel game I wanted. Finally, I just decided to build it myself.

Name: Run!!!
About: This game is cool! You can parkour while you run from enemy, and if you escape, you win.

Name: The Tower Of TigerQiuQiu 2
About: About: The Tower of TigerQiuQiu is a mini game collection Include：Gem Three Elimin，1942-J20，Under Water Bubble ，Ball Breaker，Tiger Tank 70

Name: Aztec Tower
About: Aztec Tower is a free VR bow & arrow game about defending the temple of your people against the spanish conquistadors.

Name: Until the Last Plane 1942
About: In Until the Last Plane 1942 you control two airplanes simultaneously. A short game that delivers a relaxed alternative to the usual shoot'em ups. Singleplayer or local co-op.

Name: Here to There
About: A singleplayer puzzle FPS. The player attempts to solve each area, making progress towards the end.

Name: Voice of the Wizard by Brett Farkas
About: Voice of the Wizard is a 100% voice recognition controlled adventure game. Explore an open world of forests, fields, and shorelines. Learn spells, solve mysteries, and defeat enemies. It's up to you to be the Voice of the Wizard.

Name: VR Hybrid War 2117 - VR 混合战争 2117
About: VR Hybrid War 2117 is an intense, action packed space shooting game. It has laser pistols, metallic enemy spiders, explosions, probes flying around trying to seek and destroy you. The mission is to destroy the enemy probe factory, liquid oxygen tank, space ship and a radar.

Name: Kings' Cross
About: KINGS' CROSS a unique mix of STRATEGY, RPG and TOWER DEFENSE. It delivers quick-fire, tactical combat balanced with customization of your hero, army and planning your way to win.

Name: Jack Hayes: The Lazarus Sign
About: A very special challenge: people. Deal with the darkest parts of our modern day society in a story with elements of a film noir. Don't let the humorous dialogue or the seducing smile of a stranger fool you - your choices decide the fate of Jack Hayes, his partner and every other person!

Name: Grid Dungeons
About: A turn-based strategy game. Command a team with swordsmen, archers, and mages, strategically navigating grid maps. Unleash unique actions to defeating enemies. Master tactics, minimize damage, and conquer in this immersive strategy adventure.

Name: The Informant Chronicles- Chronicle 1: Riverside Danger Part 1
About: Informant Red is assigned to a ten year old settlement on a river that is fearful in light of a massacre that left over half the village dead on a forest expedition. As she spends more time getting to know the locals, she discovers clues that suggest this incident was no accident.

Name: Dimlight Dungeon
About: A dark fantasy dungeon crawler where the player controls a reptilian brawler and travels within the ruins of a once mighty heroic fortress.

Name: HyperBody
About: Dive into HyperBody dungeons: an experimental VR walking simulator blending architectural ruins, cult themes, sensorial vibes, and queer narratives. Navigate mysterious realms and affective tales, and immerse in a psychedelic, rhythm-fueled cosmos. Experience a meditative, aestheticised trance!

Name: Raddoll
About: A ragdoll physics infinite runner

Name: Lichtreich: Willa
About: Detective Alex got the case to check Viper mansion. When her owner was alive he kept there ordinary people to mutate them. Can you find out how many alive people you can find? Be sure to check every corner!

Name: Arena of Shaelo
About: Arena of Shaelo is a pixelated co-op card game set in the world of Shaelo. Once you begrudgingly take a step into the arena, it soon dawns on you that it is only through the power of teamwork that both you and your teammate might make it out alive.

Name: Barnacles Beers and Brawls
About: Barnacles, Beers, and Brawls is a fast-paced bar management game. You are a tavern bar manager in a world filled with plundering pirates and tentacled monstrosities. This game was part of the University of Utah’s Division of Games program for the class of 2024’s Capstone Project!

Name: Merchant Isle
About: As a language Metroidvania, Merchant Isle invites you to a tranquil world to be immersed in language, trade, and exploration. As you unravel the mystery of your ancestors, you'll negotiate with locals, forage for resources, and uncover hidden secrets. A cozy adventure awaits! 🌴💬🌊

Name: SpectrumGames
About: The good old Mafia in a virtual space, as close to the offline version. Become the Game Master, invite players and build the game atmosphere as in real life! Or find an open room to join as a player.

Name: Realm Traveler
About: Realm Traveler is an epic fantasy adventure game set in a world of boundless possibilities.

Name: SWISCAPE
About: Oh, my God! The planet has exploded. The aliens have all gone off somewhere. Everyone is waiting for your help. You manipulate a life-saving ball. Swipe and jump!

Name: 莎比编辑器 SUBE
About: In this game, you will play a junior high school student who doesn't like learning, and all you have to do every day is go to school, finish school, and sleep.

Name: vi.dange
About: Vi.dange is a contemplative experience where you play a human subject placed in the path of his own light. Discover 25 visual and sound works and find your true identity.

Name: The Pirates of Sector 7
About: Seek adventure, fortune and fame in a sector of space riddled with faction conflict, dastardly pirates, & deft merchants.

Name: Crimson Phoenix Rise
About: The game is a story-driven 2D platformer, with some Metroidvania aspects, where the player determines the outcome of the game based upon their “Morality” score, which itself is based upon the player's decision to kill in the game.

Name: Harmony Overture
About: When the world has gone silent, music finds a way. But when there is harmony there is discord. Interact, Fight, Dash, and Dodge your way through the dungeons filled with discourse and calamity to bring harmony back to your utopia.

Name: BreakFest
About: Play as Waltynn, a waffle from the planet Hekta who lost control of his spaceship and crashed on the planet Lylo. Help him survive and escape the planet. As you explore the planet, you realize that you've landed right in the middle of a Apocalypse.

Name: StarStruck
About: StarStruck is a fast-paced side-scrolling platformer with a uniquely bizarre aesthetic. The game features 12 weird worlds, each with a 36 second timer to complete, but don’t expect a quick and easy experience. Making it through the game will require master-level platformer play.

Name: Aussie Sports VR 2016
About: Aussie Sports VR 2016 invites you into Australia’s sporting community to meet the players, see the fans, feel the passion and be a spectator at major events of 2016. Explore Australia's favourite sports and play mini games: AFL, Basketball, Cricket, Football and Rugby.

Name: Soul Eater
About: The player embarks on a journey through a sword containing the soul of a being desperate for revenge against their past betrayers. As the player travels the world, they seek out those who betrayed them in the past, and with each encounter, they have the opportunity to seize their souls.

Name: DruMidia
About: DruMidia is a VR drumming music game. Players can use midi file as a custom chart!

Name: Hunter Beat
About: Description: Hunter Beat is an exhilarating virtual reality game designed specifically for people who want to escape from everyday worries, shift to positive emotions, and enhance their concentration.

Name: Trash Panda: The Adventures of Ricky and Boxman
About: Help Ricky Raccoon and Box Man defeat the evil Mouse King! Use box man to boost the height of your jumps, throw trash at the Mouse King's soldiers, and make it through each level as you continue your journey to save the park!

Name: GameLib
About: GameLib is an application that brings together several 3D multiplayer mini-games, such as Werewolves Online, Ludo, and Connect 4 (4 in a row). GameLib features an in-app voice chat function, so you can communicate with other players during the game.

Name: Magistrangers
About: Short kinetic visual novell about three girls get caught in quite misterious situation.

Name: Brain Bait
About: Arcade, Puzzles, Speedrunning: Old school one-screen puzzle action game. Lure all Zombies into the traps to advance to the next level. Includes Steam Leaderboards and Personal Challenges.

Name: Xaphan - Battle Simulator
About: Xaphan is a third person shooter mixed with sandbox battle simulator featuring zombies, huge insects, medieval knights, animals and monsters.

Name: ToVer Defense
About: Do your best to defend your virtual castle from enemies trying to invade it! Can you get the most out of resources such as crossbow, teleportation and... magic?!

Name: Lionheart
About: Lionheart is a Japanese RPG where you explore the Magic Labyrinth, 'Libra Corridor.' Featuring original Japanese voice acting, colorful characters and dozens of different monsters to vanquish as you explore the secrets of the Corridor.

Name: IN CELL
About: IN CELL is a kinetic visual novel (linear, no choices) about the epidemic of sexless, nationless, and friendless men. Gender dynamics are currently not functional, sustainable, or beneficial to either men or women. IN CELL is uncensored conversation between the sexes.

Name: Deliver or Die!
About: Deliver or Die! is an arcade game based on many classic ideas put together. With a bomb strapped to your car, time is of the essence. Collect deliveries, collect powerups, drop off the deliveries, and make sure they are on time... or you DIE!

Name: Oath
About: Take the Oath, overcome the Trials, and discover the truth of the Heart in this original indie RPG.

Name: Memory Hunters
About: A classic RPG where you will experience unique places, solve puzzles, fight turn-based battles and live an exciting adventure.

Name: Veni, Vidi, Vici
About: Dispel the world's corruption by befriending magical creatures through rhythm-based dance combat!

Name: Elect
About: Elect is a multiplayer political simulation game. Run in elections, join or lead a political party, and vote on laws in the U.S. and 15+ other countries. Become your country's leader and declare wars, send foreign aid, appoint a cabinet, fight pandemics, vote in the United Nations, and more.

Name: Wallpaper Maker （造物主视频桌面）
About: Let your desktop move!

Name: Virtuále: Heist Simulations
About: A turn-based heist game where you get to mastermind your own high-profile job. This game’s rich atmosphere and sense of style underpin the simple but fun strategy gameplay. Sneak, hack, and smash your way to riches in Virtuále: Heist Simulations!

Name: Stacking Fairy
About: Compete in an online multiplayer game to build the tallest tower within the time limit! Once your tower is built, it will undergo a durability test. If you prioritize height too much, your carefully constructed tower might topple during the test... The key to victory is combining various blocks!

Name: 怪異ジャッジ・ラビリンス
About: 不思議な世界にとびこむ、探索型カジュアル推理ファンタジー！ ヒントを得るたび主人公の様子がおかしくなっていき…

Name: Word on the hook
About: An exciting intellectual fishing game, where you need to catch words (as a “fish”) and earn coins!

Name: EndlessCar
About: The car passes through obstacles to earn points mini-game.

Name: Artovya
About: Dive into the bizarre land of Artovya in a thrilling CCG! Master five distinct factions—Fantasy, Alien, Futuristic, Horror, and Interdimensional. Forge your strategy with unique mechanics and thrilling battles across fantastical realms. Unleash your creativity, build your deck, and dominate!

Name: Powder
About: From Gameplay Recordings & Long Streams to Viral Clips. Get short-form videos from your gameplay recordings & streams in a few clicks.

Name: The Ethernal Spiral
About: The Eternal Spiral is an immersive fantasy action RPG that blends intense combat, with an interesting time loop mechanic that ensures that every time playing feels unique.

Name: DuST: undefined
About: Protect the core as long as you can from infinite undefined threats.

Name: BumpUpGhostBuster
About: This is a one-player horror game in which you must defeat the ghosts that lurk in the field. Search for invisible ghosts by relying on sound, and defeat them without being found by the ghosts. If the ghost finds you・・・

Name: Entropic Decay: Prologue
About: This is the free prologue version of Entropic Decay, a fast paced, but slow burn horror/action FPS inspired by games from the late 90's through early 2000's. Enter volatile scenarios filled with danger, from both the living and the dead, where wits are as crucial as brawn...

Name: Building Block Cities - Fire Copter Drills
About: This game includes two major parts: building a city scene using the given building blocks and finishing fire copter drills on the scene. The building blocks can be assembled by matching color-coded faces on the blocks, and a drill is finished after the fire copter flies through all waypoint gates.

Name: Raiverb
About: Localize your games or apps faster and easier, add new languages or translate your updates with ease. Raiverb is a versatile localization assistant, capable to leverage your existing content to deliver context-aware, accurate and fitting translations. Includes a range of quality-of-life features.

Name: Titor's Time Traveling Tale
About: Step into the shoes of a medieval physicist studying the theory of time travel in 'Titor's Time Traveling Tales,' the VR escape room game. While conducting experiments on a strange artifact, you accidentally activate it and find yourself transported to a server room in the distant future.

Name: KRITIKA: ZERO
About: Would you like to immerse yourself in the exciting world of KRITIKA:ZERO? KRITIKA:ZERO is a dynamic online multiplayer game that combines lightning-fast combat, anime-style 3D visuals, and an ever-expanding world.

Name: 折射大师（Master of refraction）
About: 《Master of refraction》is a puzzle game for children that combines 'leisure' and 'fun'. Players can use props to adjust the angle of the turret and the mirror to light up the stars, so as to pass to the next level. This work was originally a mobile game.

Name: WingMen
About: Get ready for a chaotic flight over lands, between mountains, through deserts and across calm seas in this casual but challenging game.

Name: AbraTabia Kingdom
About: AbraTabia is a magical adventure game where you can build and defend your own kingdom . Grow your citizen population while managing food, gold and resources. Upgrade buildings and research technologies to enhance your soldiers and player character. Army battles with siege weapons and more.

Name: Gateway to the Kulikovo Field: The Battle of Yepifan
About: Find yourself in the center of a decisive battle for Russian lands. You are a 16th century Sagittarius. Repel the Crimean army, show valor and ingenuity in battle. Whether the enemy reaches Moscow or not depends on you!

Name: Cyber Attack VR board game
About: VR Co-op board game when players will fight against ship AI on board and inside of it at the same time. Hack all robots, and be prepared to protect yourself inside of the ship, solve 3D puzzles and help your friends.

Name: tranceWave NEO
About: tranceWave NEO is a classic arcade twin-stick shmup, inspired by others in the 'trance shooter' genre. Move, shoot, survive, and aim for a high score!

Name: A murder of crows
About: Try to get all the crows before disaster comes for you

Name: Ball Drop
About: Get the ball to the end zone safely. Without exploding!

Name: Elementyle
About: Elementyle is a chess-like, turn-based strategy game where players claim tiles with unique pieces and element sets.

Name: Writeway
About: Happy Journaling. Elevate your mental wellness through the evidence-based practice of writing.

Name: Gamebox
About: Gamebox is a free and open source sandbox game centered on user generated content. You decide what you want to play, be it in 3D or 2D, single-player or multiplayer, or create and upload your own games.

Name: Colliderscope
About: Push your brain to the limits as you push blocks around. Colliderscope is a peacefully infuriating puzzle game where you push and pull blocks to form specific shapes.

Name: Gridiron
About: Gridiron is a fast-paced fusion of sci-fi and arcade-style football featuring easy to understand controls and a competitive multiplayer driven online experience. Gridiron supports up to 7v7 action in both casual and competitive online matches, offline practice mode and much more!

Name: Rome Goes Rogue
About: Rome Goes Rogue is a chaotic roguelite where anything can happen when you least expect it

Name: Lusófona Games Collection 2023
About: Lusófona Games Collection 2023 is a selection of four distinct experiences, ranging from puzzle and exploration games to more action oriented ones. These experiences summarise the diverse work produced by our students, during their project based classes while attending the Video Games degree.

Name: Shiftall VR Manager
About: Shiftall VR Manager is posture estimation app for HaritoraX series. It's includes the necessary software and drivers to use HaritoraX series with SteamVR™.

Name: Nemesis - FDT
About: In Nemesis - FDT, build your team of 4 heroes from 7 unique classes and set off to climb an infinite tower where the fights intensify on each floor. No story, no ending: the goal is simple, go as far as possible to get the best score!

Name: A Handful of Lewd Games
About: In A Handful of Lewd Games you'll compete in competitive masturbation, draw seedy art commissions to pay rent, and slap disembodied anime butts at the risk of being jumpscared!

Name: NH Bid at MSCYPAA: The Game
About: Go to MSCYPAA! Win the Bid!

Name: Giresun
About: This is a 3rd person shooter game that you can play 1v1, 2v2, 4v4, 5v5 mods against bots.

Name: Nanoscape VR
About: Nanoscape VR takes users on a journey to the microscopic world. Explore the surface and interior of a cancer cell, exploring and learning about cellular anatomy and processes.

Name: Rotting Rumble: Zombie Football
About: Run to the end zone in this 3D platformer as you're chased by hordes of zombies! Collect weapons and items to fight back against the undead. Can you outrun the zombie horde?

Name: FreshBallFall
About: Colourful 3D-platformer where you help your Ball-friend in his adventures through different levels and obsticles.

Name: Heart and Core
About: A twin-stick action brawler. Young engineer JJ and her robot companion, KAI, evade the totalitarian control of the ruthless Santiago. Traverse, hide, and fight your way through a seemingly unending onslaught of enemy RAMs. Use JJ’s Gravity Gun and KAI’s fists to stun and destroy enemies.

Name: UPGRADE 2021-22 - Bionic Traveler
About: A compilation of the collaborative efforts of the University of Pennsylvania Game Research and Development Environment's programmers, artists, writers, and sound engineers over the 2021-2022 academic year. Fight our enemies, view our art, explore our scenes, and listen to our soundtrack!

Name: THE STRONG HIGH SCHOOL
About: THE STRONG HIGH SCHOOL is said to be attended only by strong characters. Before you know it, 'you' will be enrolling in THE STRONG HIGH SCHOOL. ---

Name: Universe Survivors
About: A space ship game that you destroy asteroids make money gain xp and level up. Earn upgrades to improve your ship. And destroy the multiple bosses including a centipede monster and the spike ship. Arcade style vibe with unique mechanics.

Name: Kitchen Trials: Rush
About: Return to the kitchen as fast as possible using your chef's knife on a chain to whip through living vegetables to pass your first trial in this kitchen-themed 2D platformer. Obtain all the stars with the fastest times to surpass the other competitors! How fast will you rush back to the kitchen?

Name: Alien Fury
About: Arcade space shooter that gets progressively harder, the longer you play. It's a simple a matter of shooting the alien missiles, before they hit you. How long can you survive?

Name: Knock the Bloody Door Down
About: It's hard to be a human in a world of vampires, isn't it? Explore an underground society, uncover its secrets, and make friends along the way. What awaits you on the path ahead - adventure? Or merely more heartache?

Name: Batteri Fjell 1945
About: Rumors are circulating about unrest at Fjell Fortress outside Bergen, and it's your job as a journalist to get to the bottom of what's happening. Explore an accurate reconstruction of the fortress as it appeared when World War II ended in 1945.

Name: 骑士派对
About: As a lord on the continent of Oren, lead your knights on various adventures!!

Name: Hidden Among Thieves
About: Gather loot and hide from other players.

Name: VIRTUE
About: A customizable event display for collider experiments for desktop or virtual reality. Explore electron-proton collisions in the ePIC detector at the future Electron-Ion Collider, or upload your own detector geometry and detector data to be animated.

Name: sunny-place-3: microgods

Arm yourself with powerful weapons, such as the Fireball and Shield, and utilize game-changing perks, to navigate dynamic battlefields and outwit cunning enemy droids.

Name: Sensei! I like you so much! - Fangirl Toolkit

Name: 人世间：海岛 测试版
SpaceMine

Name: Gyelfars
About: Mini turn-based tactics fantasy game.

Name: Bomhops

Name: Wild Runs

Name: Stamped: an anti-travel game

Name: Blue Cradle -signifie-

Name: Quadrivium - Paths of History

Name: Turmoil
About: Turmoil is a 3D isometric top-down action roguelike game. Inspired by a dieselpunk aesthetic, navigate a winding factory space filled with environmental hazards and hostile robot workers with the goal of survival. Rise from the ashes! Show the boss that a worker is more than their mechanical parts.

Name: SHADOW

Grow the boy by encountering various events at the gym and school, and push Babel out with all your might! The difficulty of boss fight and the boy's growth will be determined by the exercise you choose!
